root:
<字串 編號="5001" 文字="/c$2%1/c*,welcome to the Guidance Class of the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="5002" 文字="It will help to teach you the basic operations of the game. As well as giving you an insight into our magical game world. And you will soon find that entering the Lyceum is only the first step on your journey..."/> <字串 編號="5003" 文字="You must master a great many different skills and techniques in order to evolve in the Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="5004" 文字="In a nutshell, you must [/c$2make great efforts to be an eligible angel/c*], do your best to focus on giving help to the human beings in Eden."/> <字串 編號="5005" 文字="First choose the [/c$2career subject/c*] which interests you the most. Each career is made up of certain/c$2 6 /c*skills."/> <字串 編號="5006" 文字="If you want to change skills, you can talk to [/c$2Skill Angel/c*] in the Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="5007" 文字="You have chosen your career subject! So now, we will begin the Guidance Class."/> <字串 編號="5008" 文字="I'm ready."/> <字串 編號="5009" 文字="I don't want to join in."/> <字串 編號="5010" 文字="Are you familiar with the game operation? Are you sure you want to Quit?"/> <字串 編號="5011" 文字="Yes."/> <字串 編號="5012" 文字="Let me see."/> <字串 編號="5013" 文字="/c$2%1/c*,I will send you to the Angel Lyceum, remember to find the [/c$2Angel's Tutor/c*] and register."/> <字串 編號="5014" 文字="Good, now enter the first phase, [/c$2learn about the equipment used/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5015" 文字="I will give you the uniform of the Angel Lyceum you will need to learn how to put it on."/> <字串 編號="5016" 文字="First, click (/c$2Alt+B/c*) the bag icon in the lower right corner."/> <字串 編號="5017" 文字="Right click the equipment, or press the equipment button (/c$2Alt+E/c*), or you can drag and drop the equipment into it."/> <字串 編號="5018" 文字="Talk to me after you have [/c$2put your equipment/c*] on."/> <字串 編號="5019" 文字="Listen to the instructions again."/> <字串 編號="5020" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5021" 文字="Very good, you have already learned how to equip yourself."/> <字串 編號="5022" 文字="Hello Little Angel, will you talk to the [/c$2Angel Raphael/c*]?"/> <字串 編號="5023" 文字="I'm the Skill Angel, are you satisfied with your skill distribution? If you have any problems during your studies, you must tell me."/> <字串 編號="5024" 文字="I wish to change my skill."/> <字串 編號="5025" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5026" 文字="Heaven has given us many talents, if you feel that the skill you are learning doesn't suit you, then you can easily choose another one! Only your perfect skill can bring you happiness."/> <字串 編號="5027" 文字="I hope you will practice your skill. If you do, then I believe that you will prove yourself to be a great asset to our cause."/> <字串 編號="5028"/> <字串 編號="5029" 文字="Hello there, Little Angel, I'm the Chief Director ! There is a warehouse for each of the freshman in the campus; do you wish to use it now?"/> <字串 編號="5030" 文字="How do I use it?"/> <字串 編號="5031" 文字="none"/> <字串 編號="5032" 文字="Yes I would like to use the warehouse."/> <字串 編號="5033" 文字="Not right now, thank-you."/> <字串 編號="5034" 文字="The warehouse is free for the freshman to use. All you need to do is, open your toolbar and put your excess props into it. If you don't think one warehouse is enough, you can hire another safe. "/> <字串 編號="5035" 文字="But the safe is much more expensive. If you wish to use one, you must first buy the [/c$2key to the cashbox/c*]. The safe also has a time limit but apart from that, the use of the safe is the same as that of the warehouse. "/> <字串 編號="5036" 文字="Besides, the different role's warehouse in the same account number can be use by each other."/> <字串 編號="5037" 文字="And the [/c$2key to the cashbox/c*] only can be bought in a special shop."/> <字串 編號="5038" 文字="You are welcome to use it."/> <字串 編號="5039" 文字="Then, enter the second phase, [/c$2buying and selling goods/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5040" 文字="I will give you 10 dollars. Go to see the [/c$2Angel Aide/c*] and buy the Examination File for the next course."/> <字串 編號="5041" 文字="When you have a deal, remember there is a [/c$2scrolls for you to browse/c*], pick the goods you want and enter the number you need."/> <字串 編號="5042" 文字="Click on the tick in the lower right corner of the dialog box and put a check mark in the confirm interface, then you have finished the deal."/> <字串 編號="5043" 文字="Talk to me after you [/c$2have bought the Physical Examination File/c*] from the Angel Aide."/> <字串 編號="5044" 文字="Listen to it once more."/> <字串 編號="5045" 文字="Buy the document."/> <字串 編號="5046" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5047" 文字="Good for you! You now have the Examination File needed for the [/c$2Angel Raphael/c*], so you can go to find him."/> <字串 編號="5048" 文字="/c$2%1/c*,I have received your Examination File, I'm the guide for this phase of your journey."/> <字串 編號="5049" 文字="Now enter the third phase, [/c$2how to battle/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5050" 文字="You must practice by yourself to improve your fighting ability. This will give you a better chance when you come up against real monsters."/> <字串 編號="5051" 文字="First, move the cursor onto the monsters and [/c$2left click/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5052" 文字="Click (/c$2Alt+S/c*) the sword icon in the lower right corner, the skills or magic that you have learned will be shown there. Or you can drag and drop the skill icon to the hotkey, if you [/c$2locked the monsters by right clicking/c*] and press [/c$2F1~F12/c*], you can use your magic skills."/> <字串 編號="5053" 文字="The totem beside me shows the four cities in the Eden, when your HP/c$2 0 /c*and you change into [/c$2estate of spirit/c*], you can [/c$2touch/c*] your totem and [/c$2re-live/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5054" 文字="Remember at first, in the Angel Lyceum, [/c$2you can re-live by using any of the four cities' totems/c*]. But after you have chosen one, in the future, you can only re-live by using the same totem."/> <字串 編號="5055" 文字="In the future, you may meet with [/c$2Cupid/c*], if you talk to him you will find that he can record the place of your re-birth."/> <字串 編號="5056" 文字="Try to [/c$2beat 2 Slarm/c*] if it's OK!"/> <字串 編號="5057" 文字="Try to [/c$2beat 2 Slarm/c*] if it's OK!"/> <字串 編號="5058" 文字="Listen to it once more."/> <字串 編號="5059" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5060" 文字="Good, it seems that you have some knowledge about fighting."/> <字串 編號="5061" 文字="If your character sits down and has a rest after pressing [/c$2Insert button/c*], then your HP and MP can be restored quicker."/> <字串 編號="5062" 文字="I will send you to the Angel Lyceum, go to find the [/c$2Director Wolay/c*] at the big door. Or you can keep practicing here until you feel you are ready."/> <字串 編號="5063" 文字="I'm ready to go to the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="5064" 文字="I wish to stay here."/> <字串 編號="5065" 文字="Now I will send you to the Angel Lyceum, remember to find [/c$2Director Wolay/c*] and register with him."/> <字串 編號="5066" 文字="/c$2%1/c*,welcome to Practice Centre in the Angel Lyceum. I'm Wolay the tutor here. "/> <字串 編號="5067" 文字="Now enter the last phase, [/c$2map and quest/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5068" 文字="The mini map is in the top right corner, the yellow pointer shows you where you are on it."/> <字串 編號="5069" 文字="Click on(/c$2Alt+M/c*) the compass icon on the lower right corner and you can open the large map."/> <字串 編號="5070" 文字="In the scene map, you can see where the other NPC's are and all the other exits."/> <字串 編號="5071" 文字="You can choose to do what the god told you or to take a commission from the people in Eden. Both are referred to as [/c$2quests/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5072" 文字="Click (/c$2Alt+Q/c*) the Angel Log icon on the lower right corner, and you will find the quest notes."/> <字串 編號="5073" 文字="Put a check mark on the left frame of the quest, and the [/c$2quest clue/c*] will appear in the right of the menu, you can check your quest schedule any time."/> <字串 編號="5074" 文字="There is a [/c$2clue/c*] on the top of the right corner of the interface, click on it and the NPC that may be able to help you will appear in the large map, marked by a red-letter."/> <字串 編號="5075" 文字="If you don't have any questions, then your Guidance Class is over."/> <字串 編號="5076" 文字="Listen to [how to use the map] again."/> <字串 編號="5077" 文字="Listen to [how to inquire about the quest] again."/> <字串 編號="5078" 文字="OK, I have no questions."/> <字串 編號="5079" 文字="Congratulations! You have graduated, Little Angel. Come and find me if you want to return to Eden."/> <字串 編號="5080" 文字="I wish to return to Eden."/> <字串 編號="5081" 文字="I will choose to leave here."/> <字串 編號="5082" 文字="I will send you to your city, goodbye, Little Angel."/> <字串 編號="5083" 文字="Change your rings."/> <字串 編號="5084" 文字="I only wish the best for you, always."/> <字串 編號="5085" 文字="Lovely/c$2%1/c*, if you wish to marry your true love, come back and find me and bring me the [/c$2Sunlight Tear/c*] and [/c$2Dew Crystal/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5086" 文字="Dear/c$2%1/c*, if you wish to marry your true love, come back and find me and bring me the [/c$2Sunlight Tear/c*] and [/c$2Dew Crystal/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5087" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, you may only have one [/c$2Dew Crystal/c*], you must be true of heart!"/> <字串 編號="5088" 文字="If you want to marry in the beautiful church, you must buy a [/c$2Luxurious Wedding Ticket/c*] from the shop."/> <字串 編號="5089" 文字="Dear /c$2%1/c*, are you ready for your ceremony?"/> <字串 編號="5090" 文字="I'm ready for it!"/> <字串 編號="5091" 文字="No, wait a moment."/> <字串 編號="5092" 文字="The wedding is beginning!"/> <字串 編號="5093" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, you must take the [/c$2Angel Ring/c*] with you or you can't get married!"/> <字串 編號="5094"/> <字串 編號="5095"/> <字串 編號="5096"/> <字串 編號="5097"/> <字串 編號="5098"/> <字串 編號="5099"/> <字串 編號="5100" 文字="Hello, I'm the Repair Angel; I can mend any equipment for free in the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="5101" 文字="Repair the equipment."/> <字串 編號="5102" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5110" 文字="Make friends with others by opening the menu (/c$2Alt+F/c*), add the other players into your friends list!"/> <字串 編號="5111" 文字="If you want to change your skill to a different one you can go to find the [/c$2Skill Angel/c*] in the Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="5112" 文字="Go to find Michael and take part in the [/c$2Intelligent Kid training/c*] if you have/c$2 15 /c*credits spare."/> <字串 編號="5113" 文字="Mine for the products needed to make Robot ride! But be careful of the whirlwind that drives through in the campus."/> <字串 編號="5114" 文字="It's very important that you pay attention to the status of your quest (/c$2Alt+Q/c*) at all time."/> <字串 編號="5115" 文字="Little Angel, have you managed to get the [/c$2Monster Badge/c*]? If you have, then I can exchange any gift for it."/> <字串 編號="5116" 文字="How can I get the Monster Badge?"/> <字串 編號="5117" 文字="What can be exchanged for it?"/> <字串 編號="5118" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5119" 文字="If you beat the leaders of the monsters you may find it. But you must discover which kinds of the monsters have the badges for yourself. "/> <字串 編號="5120" 文字="The badge has three levels, these are [/c$2Copper Monster Badge, Silver Monster Badge, Gold Monster Badge/c*]. The stronger the monster leader, then the higher level of the badge."/> <字串 編號="5121" 文字="I will tell you a secret, if you beat the Elves in the East and West Playground, you have the chance to see their leader, beat him and you can get the [/c$2Copper Monster Badge/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5122" 文字="/c$21 /c*the Copper Monster Badge can be exchanged for a/c$2 1 /c*secret gift from me, then you will have the opportunity to get the following prize!"/> <字串 編號="5123" 文字="Are you sure you want to exchange with me?(It needs one Copper Monster Badge)"/> <字串 編號="5124" 文字="Yes."/> <字串 編號="5125" 文字="Let me see."/> <字串 編號="5126" 文字="I will take your badge. I hope you get the prize that you desire!"/> <字串 編號="5127" 文字="You don't have enough badges, Little Angel! You can only exchange them for gifts when you have enough!"/> <字串 編號="5128" 文字="You can't leave the prison because your punishment is not over."/> <字串 編號="5129" 文字="You can leave the prison; remember to toe the line from now on!"/> <字串 編號="5130" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, it seems that you broke the rules of the game; remember to toe the line from now on!"/> <字串 編號="5131" 文字="Choose the missing prop."/> <字串 編號="5132" 文字="Welcome to Angels Online! If you want to [/c$2exchange the dummy treasure/c*] or take the [/c$2missing prop/c*] back, come and find me!"/> <字串 編號="5133" 文字="Choose the dummy treasure."/> <字串 編號="5134" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5135" 文字="Check your bag, talk to me again if you haven't used up all of the dummy treasure."/> <字串 編號="5136" 文字="The beam of light which symbolizes the [/c$2Aurora Totem/c*] is blinding..."/> <字串 編號="5137" 文字="The black cat which symbolizes the [/c$2Dark City Totem/c*] transmits an evil smile..."/> <字串 編號="5138" 文字="The lightning which symbolizes the [/c$2Iron Totem/c*] transmits an indefinable strength..."/> <字串 編號="5139" 文字="The vine which symbolizes the [/c$2Breeze Totem/c*] transmits a limitless vital force..."/> <字串 編號="5140" 文字="Revival."/> <字串 編號="5141" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5142" 文字="You feel a returning strength come into your body, you have been revived!"/> <字串 編號="5143" 文字="You are not the angel of this totem, you can't be revived by using this it..."/> <字串 編號="5144" 文字="When you reach level/c$2 20 /c*, you must have the [/c$2Skill Crystal/c*] if you wish to change your skill. Just now the crystal is free, as a way of celebrating the University's anniversary. Would you like to have the crystal?"/> <字串 編號="5145" 文字="Yes, I would like it now."/> <字串 編號="5146" 文字="No, not now."/> <字串 編號="5147" 文字="Lovely Little Angel, I will give you/c$2 6 /c*crystals for free, so that you may try out different skills! If you still need it, then you must buy it in the [/c$2Item Mall/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="5148" 文字="Have you managed to collect the [/c$2Monster Badge/c*]? If you have then, I can exchange it for any gift."/> <字串 編號="5149" 文字="How can I get the Monster Badge?"/> <字串 編號="5150" 文字="What can be exchanged?"/> <字串 編號="5151" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5152" 文字="If you beat the leaders of the monsters you may earn a badge. But you must discover which kinds of the monsters have the badges for yourself. "/> <字串 編號="5153" 文字="The badges have three levels, these are [/c$2Copper Monster Badge, Silver Monster Badge, Gold Monster Badge/c*]. The stronger the monster leader then the higher level of the badge."/> <字串 編號="5154" 文字="/c$21 /c*the Copper Monster Badge can be exchanged for a/c$2 1 /c*secret gift box from me. Then you have the opportunity to get the following prize!"/> <字串 編號="5155" 文字="/c$21/c* The Silver Monster Badge can be exchanged for a/c$2 1 /c*secret gift trunk from me. Then you have the opportunity to get the following prize!"/> <字串 編號="5156" 文字="/c$21/c* The Silver Monster Badge can be exchanged for a/c$2 1 /c*medium-sized secret gift trunk from me. Then you have the opportunity to get the following prize!"/> <字串 編號="5157" 文字="/c$21/c* The Silver Monster Badge can be exchanged for a/c$2 1 /c*good-sized secret gift trunk from me. Then you have the opportunity to get the following prize!"/> <字串 編號="5158" 文字="Are you sure you want to exchange with me?(I require two Copper Monster Badges)"/> <字串 編號="5159" 文字="Are you sure you want to exchange with me?(I require one Silver Monster Badge)"/> <字串 編號="5160" 文字="Are you sure you want to exchange with me?(I require two Silver Monster Badges)"/> <字串 編號="5161" 文字="Are you sure you want to exchange with me?(I require three Silver Monster Badges)"/> <字串 編號="5162" 文字="Yes."/> <字串 編號="5163" 文字="Let me see."/> <字串 編號="5164" 文字="I will take your badge; I hope you get the prize you want!"/> <字串 編號="5165" 文字="You don't have enough badges, Little Angel! You can only exchange them for gifts when you have enough!"/> <字串 編號="5166" 文字="I have the scroll of Earth and Life, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5167" 文字="I have the scroll of and Chaos, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5168" 文字="Do you want to improve your battle skills? I have many scrolls which tell of the skills of the sword, axe and spear, do you wish to buy it?"/> <字串 編號="5177" 文字="This is the entrance to the Training Palace, only the Little Angel who has received permission from Michael and finished the [/c$2Intelligent Kid Training/c*] may enter."/> <字串 編號="5178" 文字="You feel a returning strength come into your body, you have been revived!"/> <字串 編號="5179" 文字="I have many kinds of swords, axes and spears. There are many wild animals in the fields so be sure to buy a good weapon for yourself."/> <字串 編號="5180" 文字="I have many kinds of longbows and catapults, would you like to take a look?"/> <字串 編號="5181" 文字="I sell [/c$2exploitation tool/c*] and [/c$2Robot/c*], the first one is suitable for short time work, the last one is better for long time work, choose the one you need!"/> <字串 編號="5182" 文字="I have many kinds of Heavy Armor, would you like to try them on?"/> <字串 編號="5183" 文字="I have many kinds of Light Armor, would you like to try them on?"/> <字串 編號="5184" 文字="I have many kinds of Mage Gear, would you like to take a look at them?"/> <字串 編號="5185" 文字="I have the scroll of Life Magic, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5186" 文字="I have the scroll of Wraith Magic, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5187" 文字="I have the scroll of Chaos Magic, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5188" 文字="I have the scroll of Earth Magic, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5189" 文字="I'm the Ride seller in the Aurora City! You can choose the [/c$2Steed/c*] and [/c$2Magic Donkey/c*] that you wish to use."/> <字串 編號="5190" 文字="I wish to look at your goods."/> <字串 編號="5191" 文字="No, not now."/> <字串 編號="5192" 文字="Hello, ladies and gentlemen, this is the only and best shop for metal weapons. Do you want to take a look?"/> <字串 編號="5193" 文字="Hello, I sell handcrafted wooden and throwing weapons, come to take a look."/> <字串 編號="5194" 文字="I sell [/c$2exploitation tool/c*] and [/c$2Robot/c*], the first one is suitable for short time work, the last one is better for a longer time work, choose the one you need!"/> <字串 編號="5195" 文字="Hello, ladies and gentlemen, this is the best and only shop for metal crafted defensive armors. Do you want to take a look?"/> <字串 編號="5196" 文字="Hello, I have the handmade Light Armor, take a look at it."/> <字串 編號="5197" 文字="Hello, I have the handmade Mage Gear, take a look at it."/> <字串 編號="5198" 文字="I have the scroll of Life Magic, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5199" 文字="I have the scroll of Wraith Magic, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5200" 文字="I have the scroll of Chaos Magic, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5201" 文字="I have the scroll of Earth Magic, are you interested in it?"/> <字串 編號="5202" 文字="I'm the Ride seller from the Iron Castle! You can choose the [/c$2Gerbil/c*] and [/c$2Boar/c*] that you wish to use."/> <字串 編號="5203" 文字="My master asked me to sell these weapons, Do you want to buy some? If I don't sell any today he won't allow me any supper tonight!"/> <字串 編號="5204" 文字="My master asked me to sell these things. They are some long, curved things, I guess that they are bows. You can look by yourself, but don't tell my master."/> <字串 編號="5205" 文字="I sell [/c$2exploitation tool/c*] and [/c$2Robot/c*], the first one is suitable for short time work, the last one is better for long time work, choose the one you need!"/> <字串 編號="5206" 文字="My master asked me to sell these metal defensive weapons, do you want to buy any? If I don't sell any then I won't be allowed to eat any breakfast."/> <字串 編號="5207" 文字="Hi, I have some Light Armor which is crafted from all natural materials. Do you want to buy some? If you miss this opportunity to buy, then you will have to wait for another winter to pass before you get the chance again."/> <字串 編號="5208" 文字="Hi, I have some Mage Gear which is crafted from all natural materials, take a look at it."/> <字串 編號="5209" 文字="I have the scroll of the Life Magic, I don't want to let it out, but I think you have great potential, I will sell it to you and trust your honor."/> <字串 編號="5210" 文字="I have the scroll of the Wraith Magic, I don't want to let it out, but I think you have great potential, I will sell it to you and trust your honor."/> <字串 編號="5211" 文字="I have the scroll of the Chaos Magic, I don't want to let it out, but I think you have great potential, I will sell it to you and trust your honor."/> <字串 編號="5212" 文字="I have the scroll of the Earth Magic, I don't want to let it out, but I think you have great potential, I will sell it to you and trust your honor."/> <字串 編號="5213" 文字="I'm the Ride seller from the Dark City! You can choose the [/c$2Evil Cat/c*] and [/c$2lizard/c*] that you wish to use."/> <字串 編號="5214" 文字="Hello, I sell many kinds of weapons, such as falchions, axes and spears; I promise that you won't be disappointed."/> <字串 編號="5215" 文字="Hello, I sell longbows and catapult, what type do you prefer?"/> <字串 編號="5216" 文字="I sell [/c$2exploitation tool/c*] and [/c$2robot/c*], the first one is suitable for short time work, the last one is better for a longer time work, choose the one you need!"/> <字串 編號="5217" 文字="Hello, I sell many kinds of metal weapons; do you want to take a look?"/> <字串 編號="5218" 文字="Hello, brothers and sisters, the equipment that I sell is very light, do you want to buy one?"/> <字串 編號="5219" 文字="Hello, brothers and sisters, the equipment that I sell is very comfortable, do you want to buy one?"/> <字串 編號="5220" 文字="Dispense with the rubbish; buy the scroll if you want to learn about the new Life Magic."/> <字串 編號="5221" 文字="Dispense with the rubbish; buy the scroll if you want to learn about the new Wraith Magic."/> <字串 編號="5222" 文字="Dispense with the rubbish; buy the scroll if you want to learn about the new Chaos Magic."/> <字串 編號="5223" 文字="Dispense with the rubbish; buy the scroll if you want to learn about the new Earth Magic."/> <字串 編號="5224" 文字="I'm the Ride seller from the Breeze Jungle! You can choose the [/c$2Nightwolf/c*] and [/c$2Chicken/c*] that you wish to use."/> <字串 編號="5225" 文字="Welcome, what can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="5226" 文字="Anything broken can be repaired by my nimble hands, there is nothing I can't mend."/> <字串 編號="5227" 文字="OK, I wish to repair this equipment."/> <字串 編號="5228" 文字="Hello, ladies and gentlemen. This is the biggest bank in the Iron Castle, your money and goods will be well-kept here. Do you want to use it?"/> <字串 編號="5229" 文字="Hello, I'm the Technician in the Iron Castle, can I help you?"/> <字串 編號="5230" 文字="Hi, this is the underground bank in the Dark City. Do you want to use it?"/> <字串 編號="5231" 文字="Ah, don't be so doubting of my skills. For I'm the only slave who can repair weapons in the Dark City. How can I help you?"/> <字串 編號="5232" 文字="Hello, welcome to the bank in the Breeze Jungle, you can put your money and goods here without worrying. Do you want to use it?"/> <字串 編號="5233" 文字="Hello, young risk taker. Do you want me to repair any weapons or equipment for you?"/> <字串 編號="5234" 文字="Hello, Little Angel, I'm the Angel Merchant who sells the manufacture recipes. If you want to learn how to make things then you can buy one."/> <字串 編號="5235" 文字="Hello, Little Angel, I'm the Angel Merchant who sells the magic scrolls. If you want to learn more magic, you can buy one."/> <字串 編號="5236" 文字="Which warehouse do you want to use?"/> <字串 編號="5237" 文字="I wish to use my own warehouse."/> <字串 編號="5238" 文字="I wish to use the corporation's warehouse."/> <字串 編號="5239" 文字="Hi, I have many special recipes. If you don't want to get the formula by going through teachers' training, then you can buy one for a penny."/> <字串 編號="5240" 文字="Little Angel, you must still be confused by the [/c$2game interface/c*] of the Angels Online, do the teachers need to explain it for you?"/> <字串 編號="5241" 文字="OK"/> <字串 編號="5242" 文字="No, thanks."/> <字串 編號="5243" 文字="First, the [/c$2the interface of the character's attribute/c*] at the top left corner of the scene."/> <字串 編號="5244" 文字="You can see your portrait and name on the interface. /c$2HP:/c* shows your hit points /c$2MP:/c* shows your magic points /c$2SP:/c* shows your skills and level. If you want to know some more details, click on the little button at the top and you can see your character's attributes."/> <字串 編號="5245" 文字="Now, let me introduce the [/c$2hotkey column/c*] for you."/> <字串 編號="5246" 文字="You can put [/c$2skills, magic, expression, props/c*] into their fields. Each field has it's own corresponding hotkey [/c$2F1~F12/c*], it can help you to switch between the skill and the magic very quickly."/> <字串 編號="5247" 文字="Then, let me introduce the [/c$2mini map/c*] to you."/> <字串 編號="5248" 文字="The mini map shows your locality, you will never get lost if you use it well."/> <字串 編號="5249" 文字="Next, I will introduce the [/c$2main interface/c*] to you."/> <字串 編號="5250" 文字="The interface at the lower right corner provides information on all of the kinds of functions. You can open the interface icon and study the use of them."/> <字串 編號="5251" 文字="Last, something information about the [/c$2chat channel/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5252" 文字="You can use the chat channel to talk with other players. Just enter whatever subject you want. There are many different kinds of channel, each with their own use. You can also adjust a channel to suit your own needs. "/> <字串 編號="5253" 文字="These are the basic instructions. You must find out how the rest of the world works by yourself. Good Luck!!!"/> <字串 編號="5254" 文字="I have many kinds of scrolls for the Weapon Recipe, do you want to take a look at it?"/> <字串 編號="5255" 文字="I have many kinds of the scrolls for the Armor Recipe, do you want to take a look at it?"/> <字串 編號="5256" 文字="I have many kinds of the scrolls for the Art Recipe, do you want to take a look at it?"/> <字串 編號="5257" 文字="I have many kinds of the scrolls for the Sewing Recipe, do you want to take a look at it?"/> <字串 編號="5258" 文字="I have many kinds of the scrolls for the Cooking Recipe, do you want to take a look at it?"/> <字串 編號="5259" 文字="I have many kinds of the scrolls for the Advanced Recipe, do you want to take a look at it?"/> <字串 編號="5260" 文字="I have many kinds of the scrolls for the high-level weapon, do you want to take a look at it?"/> <字串 編號="5261" 文字="I have many kinds of the scrolls for the high-level art, sewing and Cooking Recipe, do you want to take a look at it?"/> <字串 編號="5262" 文字="Tell me about the Rides"/> <字串 編號="5263" 文字="Tell me about the Pets."/> <字串 編號="5264" 文字="Rides can be upgraded [/c$2move speed/c*], there is also different [/c$2additional ability/c*] between each kind of the Ride. How to choose the best ride, will be your most important lesson after you reach level /c$230 /c*."/> <字串 編號="5265" 文字="Each county has its own ride. If this interests you then be sure to keep your eyes open!"/> <字串 編號="5266" 文字="If you wish to raise a pet, then first you must buy an Egg. The pet will grow and develop through your care and the battles that you win. The stronger your pet turns out to be then the better help it will be able to provide you with."/> <字串 編號="5267" 文字="Tell me about the Robot."/> <字串 編號="5268" 文字="Robot not only can provide the [/c$2burden/c*], but also can [/c$2strengthening ability/c*], it helps you to fight against to the fierce monsters! And, if you buy the upgraded hardware, you can do the [/c$2hardware alterations/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5269" 文字="I sell kinds of sundries, if you wish to make goods, then you need to buy the materials that I offer."/> <字串 編號="5270" 文字="Let me see."/> <字串 編號="5271" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5272" 文字="Hum?"/> <字串 編號="5273" 文字="I wish to get married."/> <字串 編號="5274" 文字="I wish to get divorced."/> <字串 編號="5275" 文字="Find the priest in the church if you want to get married. I'm the person who handles divorce."/> <字串 編號="5276" 文字="Once you are divorced you cannot go back. Have you decided? Are you sure?"/> <字串 編號="5277" 文字="I wish to get divorced."/> <字串 編號="5278" 文字="No, let me think it over."/> <字串 編號="5279" 文字="The divorce procedure has been completed."/> <字串 編號="5280" 文字="Come to see me once you have the [/c$2divorced requisition/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5281" 文字="Dear Little Angel, divorce only happens to couples."/> <字串 編號="5282" 文字="Roll Kitty Warplane"/> <字串 編號="5283" 文字="Olive Black Dog Battle Robot"/> <字串 編號="5284" 文字="Are you sure?"/> <字串 編號="5285" 文字="Yes"/> <字串 編號="5286" 文字="Let me think it over."/> <字串 編號="5287" 文字="You don't have the Robot or Rebuilder Hardware. Remember to put the two items into your bag."/> <字串 編號="5288" 文字="You don't have enough money. Alteration is very expensive."/> <字串 編號="5289" 文字="Hum, wait for a moment, the alteration is processing."/> <字串 編號="5290" 文字="OK, your Robot is altered. If you have any problems, you can come back to me."/> <字串 編號="5291" 文字="I have many kinds of the scrolls for the Defensive Recipe, do you want to take a look?"/> <字串 編號="5301" 文字="My dream is to travel around the world, creating a lot of wonderful stories by fighting against unknown creatures. If you have any questions about the district around the Aurora City, you could come to me."/> <字串 編號="5302" 文字="Tell me about the Aurora City"/> <字串 編號="5303" 文字="The Aurora City-rim "/> <字串 編號="5304" 文字="The monsters in different places."/> <字串 編號="5305" 文字="The battles and the quests"/> <字串 編號="5306" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5307" 文字="The city ruled by Holy Race is the most brilliant pearl in the southwest of Eden. It extends to Riprap Coast in the south and Crashing plain in the north. The city is based on well-developed agriculture and has an open policy towards free sea transportation especially in the Dawn Harbor."/> <字串 編號="5308" 文字="However, the fishing Cherry village suffers a lot from the [/c$2Riprap Pirates/c*] who bring a great deal of trouble to the south coast."/> <字串 編號="5309" 文字="The Aurora City is divided into five sections. Which section are you interested in?"/> <字串 編號="5310" 文字="Spike Farm"/> <字串 編號="5311" 文字="Sunflower Plain"/> <字串 編號="5312" 文字="Dawn Harbor"/> <字串 編號="5313" 文字="Riprap Coast"/> <字串 編號="5314" 文字="Cherry Village"/> <字串 編號="5315" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5316" 文字="Spike Farm is the granary of the Aurora City and provides the most part of their food. What's more, it's peaceful rural nature gives visitors an impression of being far far, away from the stress of the city. Recently, I have received complaints from the farm owners about the rising taxes and problems with the management."/> <字串 編號="5317" 文字="Sunflowers grows everywhere on the Sunflower Plain. Since the Knight Colonel Douglas retired, he has upgraded the planting skill and carried out his second spring. When the flower season comes, Sunflower Plain stands first on the list of the destinations for those who love dating or hiking. However, recently, it has been clouded by frequent accidents. The reason is still a mystery."/> <字串 編號="5318" 文字="Gathering in Dawn Harbor, sailors pursue the same dream of finding the secret treasure of the ocean and especially the fabled Golden Island Treasure. Recently, the newly rising riprap pirates planned to attack the local Ocean Union. But, what measures can be taken against the pirates?"/> <字串 編號="5319" 文字="Riprap Coast is the home base of the Riprap Pirates. You had better detour around it. It is said that Dawn Harbor and Cherry Village are usually disturbed by them. If only a knight from Aurora City would come to assist the villagers."/> <字串 編號="5320" 文字="Cherry Village is the self-sufficient fishing village on the border of Aurora City. It attracts many experts who wish to research its unique products and creatures. Unfortunately, the threat of the pirates darkens the prospect of visitors. Would someone stand and fight?"/> <字串 編號="5321" 文字="Are you interested in the monsters' distribution? I have risked my life collecting this information: Spike Farm:there the monsters are about level 6~12 Sunflower Plain:there the monsters are about level 12~18 Dawn Harbor:there the monsters are about level 18~21 Riprap Coast:there the monsters are about level 21~24 Cherry Village:there the monsters are about level 27~30"/> <字串 編號="5322" 文字="When you reach a new place and meet someone new, you will hear their request! If you are a warm-hearted risker then you will help them! During the battle and practice, you can accumulate experience and the people you help will give you ample rewards."/> <字串 編號="5323" 文字="The [/c$2Auro Guard Captain/c*] at the playground needs your help. Also citizens all over the world need someone to help to solve their problems for them."/> <字串 編號="5324" 文字="Look at what you are wearing, young risk taker! Go out of the Aurora City! The inhabitants of [/c$2Spike Farm/c*] need your help."/> <字串 編號="5325" 文字="Look at what you are wearing, you seem to like taking risks. Maybe the inhabitants of [/c$2Sunflower Plain/c*] need your help."/> <字串 編號="5326" 文字="Look at what you are wearing, you seem to like taking risks. Maybe the inhabitants of [/c$2Dawn Harbor/c*] are being attacked by the pirates, they may your help before the reinforcements from the Aurora City can arrive."/> <字串 編號="5327" 文字="Look at what you are wearing, you must be familiar with the battle. The Pirates who make trouble on the [/c$2Riprap Coast/c*] will be sorry that they messed with you!"/> <字串 編號="5328" 文字="Look at what you are wearing, you must be an experienced fisher, I think. The people from [/c$2Cherry Village/c*] need your help to drive the Pirates away."/> <字串 編號="5329" 文字="Look at what you are wearing. I guess that you must be able to see far into the future! There are many people and things for you to experience outside the Aurora City."/> <字串 編號="5401" 文字="My most favorite thing is to take notes on any unusual mines, collect any peculiar recipes and buy or sale the popular merchandise! If you have any questions about mining or making, just ask me!"/> <字串 編號="5402" 文字="About Tools and shops in Aurora City."/> <字串 編號="5403" 文字="About the goods around Aurora City."/> <字串 編號="5404" 文字="recipes and quests"/> <字串 編號="5405" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5406" 文字="Go straight to the southeast of the city, you will find a great number of shops there and also many tools for free! Which tool do you want?"/> <字串 編號="5407" 文字="Melting Furnace and Iron Pestle"/> <字串 編號="5408" 文字="Abrasive Wheel"/> <字串 編號="5409" 文字="Sewing Machine"/> <字串 編號="5410" 文字="Stove"/> <字串 編號="5411" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5412" 文字="you can find the [/c$2Melting Furnace and Iron Pestle/c*] in the weapon seller's shop, but you must have the skill of [/c$2weapon/c*] or [/c$2armor/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5413" 文字="you can find the [/c$2Abrasive Wheel/c*] in the weapon seller's shop, but you must have the skill of [/c$2technics/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5414" 文字="you can find the [/c$2Sewing Machine/c*] in the tailor's shop, but you must have the skill of [/c$2sew/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5415" 文字="you can find the [/c$2Stove/c*] in the cook's shop, but you must have the skill of [/c$2cook/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5416" 文字="Oh? What kind of the goods' are you interested in distributing?"/> <字串 編號="5417" 文字="Ore."/> <字串 編號="5418" 文字="Wood."/> <字串 編號="5419" 文字="Flowers and grass."/> <字串 編號="5420" 文字="Algae"/> <字串 編號="5421" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5422" 文字="make sure you have learned the Digging Skill before mining! Digging Skill level 01~10 :Spike Farm Digging Skill level 11~20 :Sunflower Plain Digging Skill level 21~30 :Riprap Coast Digging Skill level 31~40 :Crashing Hillock"/> <字串 編號="5423" 文字="make sure you have learned the lumbering skill before cutting! lumbering skill level 01~10 :Spike Farm lumbering skill level 11~20 :Sunflower Plain lumbering skill level 21~30 :Riprap Coast lumbering skill level 31~40 :Crashing Hillock"/> <字串 編號="5424" 文字="make sure you have learned the collecting skill before collecting! collecting skill level 01~10 :Spike Farm collecting skill level 11~20 :Sunflower Plain collecting skill level 21~30 :Riprap Coast collecting skill level 31~40 :Crashing Hillock"/> <字串 編號="5425" 文字="make sure you have learned the fishing skill before the fishing! fishing skill level 01~10 :Spike Farm fishing skill level 11~20 :Sunflower Plain fishing skill level 21~30 :Riprap Coast fishing skill level 31~40 :Crashing Hillock"/> <字串 編號="5426" 文字="The first step in learning how to produce is to purchase the new prescription from Recipe Seller. Also if you obtain some ridiculous orders during production, you may go to the [/c$2Suft C of C/c*], they will assist you there."/> <字串 編號="5427" 文字="You can get twice the results with half the effort if you use the Robot to mine the products. "/> <字串 編號="5428" 文字="Beast Den"/> <字串 編號="5429" 文字="make sure you have learned the collecting skill before collecting! collecting skill level 01~10 :Spike Farm collecting skill level 11~20 :Sunflower Plain collecting skill level 21~30 :Riprap Coast collecting skill level 31~40 :Crashing Hillock"/> <字串 編號="5430" 文字="make sure you have learned the collecting skill before collecting! collecting skill level 01~10 :Wishing Tear collecting skill level 11~20 :Scrap Iron Village collecting skill level 21~30 :Cactus Plain, Burning Desert collecting skill level 31~40 :Gebuer Vale"/> <字串 編號="5431" 文字="make sure you have learned the collecting skill before collecting! collecting skill level 01~10 :Shadowy Path collecting skill level 11~20 :Fungus Forest South collecting skill level 21~30 :Bottomless Pit, Degula Maze collecting skill level 31~40 :Fungus Forest North"/> <字串 編號="5432" 文字="make sure you have learned the collecting skill before collecting! collecting skill level 01~10 :Dense Forest collecting skill level 11~20 :Mushroom Forest collecting skill level 21~30 :Moon Hidden Swamp, Jade Vale collecting skill level 31~40 :Megalith Plain"/> <字串 編號="5501" 文字="I'm the challenger of risks. I have experienced plenty and have many stories from each place that I have visited. I have fought with Monsters you have never even heard about. So, if you have any questions about the Iron Castle-rim, just ask me!"/> <字串 編號="5502" 文字="Tell me about Iron Castle"/> <字串 編號="5503" 文字="Tell me about the Iron Castle-rim"/> <字串 編號="5504" 文字="Tell me about the monsters in different places."/> <字串 編號="5505" 文字="Tell me about the battles and the quests."/> <字串 編號="5506" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5507" 文字="The well-developed city built by the rich resources in the desert and the heat from the sun for their operation. The black castle in the middle of the vast desert may seem ridiculous but it is a great source of power"/> <字串 編號="5508" 文字="Recently, the Pestle Corps in Iron Castle tried to defeat the [/c$2Gebuer/c*] and gain absolute victory in one fight. However, the young leader of Gebuer carried out some new strategy."/> <字串 編號="5509" 文字="The Iron Castle can be divided into five sections. Which section are you interested in?"/> <字串 編號="5510" 文字="Wishing Tear"/> <字串 編號="5511" 文字="Scrap Iron Village"/> <字串 編號="5512" 文字="Cactus Plain"/> <字串 編號="5513" 文字="Burning Desert"/> <字串 編號="5514" 文字="Gebuer Vale"/> <字串 編號="5515" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5516" 文字="Wishing Tear is the infrequent oasis in the desert, where the caravans rest after trudging to sell products from foreign countries. However, the water source has been polluted by an unknown cause. The scientists of Iron Castle are determined to find the reason. "/> <字串 編號="5517" 文字="The waste from Iron Castle is transported and dealt with in Scrap Iron Village. It may surprises you to think of the rubbish area as scenery. However, the hill of iron waste is well worth your visit. But recently robbers have begun to easily break it apart and have caused many accidents. They must be stopped!"/> <字串 編號="5518" 文字="When seen from the southeast of Wishing Tear, the sentry guard by the East defensive army of Pestle corps is easily found. The sentry was established to restrain the uprising of [/c$2Lizardman/c*] on Cactus Plain. However, it isn't always successful, due to the lack of soldiers."/> <字串 編號="5519" 文字="Burning Desert is a horrible desert full of poisonous things and corpses. The local Pestle corps and the defending army led by the General Alexander are monitoring the Northern area of Gebuer Vale. However, there are numerous accidents that occur endlessly without expectation. Which makes it a terrible place to be!"/> <字串 編號="5520" 文字="Gebuer Vale is the base camp of the Iron Castle's enemy Gebuer. Though they have been evicted from the original castle, [/c$2Decadence City/c*], they make a good natural barrier and linger on in steadily worsening conditions. According to the spy sent by the Pestle corps, Gebuer is preparing a plan to counterattack Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="5521" 文字="Are you interested in the distribution of the Monsters? I risked my life collecting this information Wishing Tear:there are monsters here with a level of about 6~12 Scrap Iron Village:there are monsters here with a level of about 12~18 Cactus Plain:there are monsters here with a level of about 18~21 Burning Desert:there are monsters here with a level of about 21~24 Gebuer Vale:there are monsters here with a level of about 27~30"/> <字串 編號="5522" 文字="there are monsters here with a level of about"/> <字串 編號="5523" 文字="The [/c$2Chief Assistant/c*] at the playground needs your help. Also, citizens all over the world need someone to help to solve their problems for them."/> <字串 編號="5524" 文字="there are monsters here with a level of about, go out of the Iron Castle! The businessmen in [/c$2Wishing Tear/c*] need your help."/> <字串 編號="5525" 文字="Look at what you wearing, young risk taker, maybe the inhabitants in [/c$2Scrap Iron Village/c*] need your help."/> <字串 編號="5526" 文字="Look at what you wearing, young risk taker, the inhabitants in [/c$2Cactus Plain/c*] are being attacked by the Lizardman, the East defensive army need your help."/> <字串 編號="5527" 文字="Look at what you are wearing; you must be familiar with battle. The Poisoner and the Necrogenic who make trouble in the [/c$2Burning Desert/c*] will surely be sorry to have angered you."/> <字串 編號="5528" 文字="Look at what you are wearing, you must be an experienced fisher, I think. You can help Pestle Corps to defeat Gebuers."/> <字串 編號="5529" 文字="Look at what you are wearing; I guess that you must be able to see far into your future! There are many people and things for you to experience outside of Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="5601" 文字="My most favorite thing is to take notes on any unusual mines, collect any peculiar recipes and buy or sale the popular merchandise! If you have any questions about digging or manufacturing, just ask me!"/> <字串 編號="5602" 文字="About tools and shops in Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="5603" 文字="About the goods around Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="5604" 文字="recipes and quests"/> <字串 編號="5605" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5606" 文字="Go straight to the southeast of the city, you will find the shops stand in great numbers, and there are many tools for free! Which tool do you want?"/> <字串 編號="5607" 文字="Melting Furnace and Iron Pestle"/> <字串 編號="5608" 文字="Abrasive Wheel"/> <字串 編號="5609" 文字="Sewing Machine"/> <字串 編號="5610" 文字="Stove"/> <字串 編號="5611" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5612" 文字="You can find the [/c$2Melting Furnace and Iron Pestle/c*] in the weapon seller's shop, but you must have the skill of [/c$2weapon/c*] or [/c$2armor/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5613" 文字="You can find the [/c$2Abrasive Wheel/c*] in the weapon seller's shop, but you must have the skill of [/c$2technics/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5614" 文字="You can find the [/c$2Sewing Machine/c*] in the tailor's shop, but you must have the skill of [/c$2sew/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5615" 文字="You can find the [/c$2Stove/c*] in the cook's shop, but you must have the skill of [/c$2cook/c*]."/> <字串 編號="5616" 文字="Oh? Also if you obtain some ridiculous orders during production, you may go to the [/c$2Suft C of C/c*], they will assist you there."/> <字串 編號="5627" 文字="You can get twice the results with half the effort if you use the Robot to mine the products. "/> <字串 編號="5628" 文字="Hello, Little Angel, I'm the Angel Merchant who sells the Skill Scroll, if you want to learn some skills, you can buy one from me."/> <字串 編號="5629" 文字="I'm the risk taker who has explored the depths of the land, I have experienced plenty of the adventures from each place, fought with countless monsters that you have never seen, and made friends all over the world. If you have any questions about the Dark City-rim, ask me!"/> <字串 編號="5630" 文字="Tell me about Dark City"/> <字串 編號="5631" 文字="Tell me about the Dark City-rim"/> <字串 編號="5632" 文字="Tell me about the monsters in different places."/> <字串 編號="5633" 文字="Tell me about the battles and the quests"/> <字串 編號="5634" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5635" 文字="Dark City is the habitat of Shadow Faction. And they believe themselves to be the descendants of an excellent archaic race. As for the mysterious abyss on their border, there are two totally different stories. No matter which one is true, it can not stop Shadow Faction's great curiosity."/> <字串 編號="5636" 文字="Those who live underground have excavated burrows that enable everyone to experience the uncommonly magnificent views. However, the newly founded Underground Company seems to be worried about the project."/> <字串 編號="5637" 文字="The Dark City can be divided into five sections. Which section are you interested in?"/> <字串 編號="5638" 文字="Shadowy Path"/> <字串 編號="5639" 文字="Fungus Forest South"/> <字串 編號="5640" 文字="Bottomless Pit"/> <字串 編號="5641" 文字="Degula Maze"/> <字串 編號="5642" 文字="Memory Cave"/> <字串 編號="5643" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5644" 文字="Shadowy Path has been trying to process the projects of railroad and city expansion. But the railway company has become annoyed by this. So that the planned schedule is running seriously late."/> <字串 編號="5645" 文字="Fungus Forest South overgrows with all kinds of funguses. And the most spectacular thing is the fog and dew that they exude. It is a valuable subject matter for those who are interested in glamour."/> <字串 編號="5646" 文字="There is a unfathomable hole in southwest of Dark City. No one knows how long it has been here and what is hidden at it's bottom. So it sets up a [/c$2Energy Research Center/c*].But the nearby communion often make trouble."/> <字串 編號="5647" 文字="Degula Duke, the famous aristocrat in Dark City, is living right there. But lately, he has started to refrain from drinking blood, favoring the Dark Pumpkin instead. Unfortunately, this has resulted in an uprising from his Vampire followers."/> <字串 編號="5648" 文字="It is the burial ground of Dark City people. Besides, many of the funeral mounds are too old to be opened. Therefore, this place is called the Memory Cave. Thanks to the good care of local caretakers, the grounds are not dirty. Recently, though accidents make the caretakers much busier."/> <字串 編號="5649" 文字="Are you interested in the distribution of the Monsters? I risked my life collecting this information Shadowy Path:there are monsters here with a level of about 6~12 Fungus Forest South:there are monsters here with a level of about 12~18 Bottomless Pit:there are monsters here with a level of about 18~21 Degula Maze:there are monsters here with a level of about 21~24 Memory Cave:there are monsters here with a level of about 27~30"/> <字串 編號="5650" 文字="there are monsters here with a level of about"/> <字串 編號="5651" 文字="The [/c$2Executive Puyi/c*] at the playground needs your help. The Engineers in [/c$2暗影信道/c*] need your help."/> <字串 編號="5653" 文字="There are monsters here with a level of about, maybe the Businessmen in [/c$2Fungus Forest South/c*] need your help. They said that they can't do the business there."/> <字串 編號="5654" 文字="there are monsters here with a level of about, the Energy Research Center in [/c$2Bottomless Pit/c*] were attacked by the Wizards and the Mimics, the scientists need your help to keep doing their research ."/> <字串 編號="5655" 文字="Look at what you are wearing; you must be familiar with battle. The Evil Leech who make trouble in the [/c$2Degula Maze/c*] will surely be sorry to have angered you!"/> <字串 編號="5656" 文字="Look at what you are wearing, you must be an experienced risker, I think. "/> <字串 編號="5685" 文字="I'm the risker of this forest, I had experienced plenty of the stories for each place, fight with the monsters you have never seen, and make friends in the world. If you have any question for the Breeze Jungle-rim, ask me!"/> <字串 編號="5686" 文字="about Breeze Jungle"/> <字串 編號="5687" 文字="Breeze Jungle-rim"/> <字串 編號="5688" 文字="The monsters in different places."/> <字串 編號="5689" 文字="the battle and the quest"/> <字串 編號="5690" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5691" 文字="People here love the forest so much that nobody can compare to them. They believe, every tree of the forest holds their ancestors' soul, so they often hold memorial ceremonies and sacrifices to remember them. "/> <字串 編號="5692" 文字="Now, the elder of the family is preparing to pass the leadership to the young generation, but the new leader seems to have conflicts with some opinions held by the other elders."/> <字串 編號="5693" 文字="The Breeze Jungle can be divided into five sections. Which section are you interested in?"/> <字串 編號="5694" 文字="Dense Forest"/> <字串 編號="5695" 文字="Mushroom Forest"/> <字串 編號="5696" 文字="Moon Hidden Swamp"/> <字串 編號="5697" 文字="Jade Vale"/> <字串 編號="5698" 文字="Mysterious Garden of Eden"/> <字串 編號="5699" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5700" 文字="You will be surprised by the colorful wood in Dense Forest. But you should not only regard the view and admire the surroundings, but you should also pay attention to your safety. Because not everything is as peaceful as it seems....."/> <字串 編號="5701" 文字="Mushroom Forest is a low-lying everglade, with many Mushroom Monster. Fortunately, it is watched by Rolling Tail Guild, so it is not too dangerous. Besides, it is said that they have some argument with the Wild Pigs, maybe it was due to the competition of the annual [/c$2Golden Matsuake/c*]awards."/> <字串 編號="5702" 文字="Breeze Jungle, one of their ancient grounds, is the place to hold a fiesta. The land is covered by bulrushes and other natural wonders. The wooden bridges span the surface of the larger part of the everglade. It is said that there is a old forest sealed by magic deep in the everglade. But how to get there is still a mystery."/> <字串 編號="5703" 文字="In the western part of the Breeze Jungle, there is a mysterious canyon. Which is a legendary relic and the most common place to find the serious Natural Philosophers. But lately it has coveted by [/c$2Magic Eye/c*]Cracksman group. They wish to mine it dry of all of it's precious deposits. "/> <字串 編號="5704" 文字="The northwest part of the Breeze Jungle is an ancient Garden of Eden which was made by a fat cat for his wife. But, now no-one dares to live there. There is no sure reason why. But people do talk of a ghostly shadow that sometimes appears there!!!!"/> <字串 編號="5705" 文字="Are you interested in the distribution of the Monsters? I risked my life collecting this information Dense Forest:there are monsters here with a level of about 6~12 Mushroom Forest:there are monsters here with a level of about 12~18 Moon Hidden Swamp:there are monsters here with a level of about 18~21 Jade Vale:there are monsters here with a level of about 21~24 Mysterious Garden of Eden:there are monsters here with a level of about 27~30"/> <字串 編號="5706" 文字="When you reach a new place and meet someone new, you will hear their request! If you are a warm-hearted risker then you will help them! During the battle and practice, you can accumulate experience and the people you help will give you ample rewards."/> <字串 編號="5707" 文字="the [/c$2Militia Chief/c*] at the playground needs your help. Also, citizens all over the world need someone to help to solve their problems for them."/> <字串 編號="5708" 文字="Look at what you wearing, young risk taker, go out of the Breeze Jungle! The Herbalist Hebu in Dense Forest needs your help."/> <字串 編號="5709" 文字="Look at what you wearing, young risk taker, maybe the members of Rolling Tail Guild in Mushroom Forest need your help. They can't find the Golden Matsuake."/> <字串 編號="5710" 文字="Look at what you wearing, young risk taker, the Moon Hidden Swamp were attacked by the Marsh Frogs, the Pontiff need your help to carry on with the fiesta."/> <字串 編號="5711" 文字="Look at what you are wearing; you must be familiar with battle. "/> <字串 編號="5741" 文字="If you have no questions, go to see [/c$2Executive Puyi/c*] on the Dark City Square! He will give you something to do."/> <字串 編號="5742" 文字="If you have no questions, go to see [/c$2Militia Chief/c*] on the Breeze Jungle Square! He will give you something to do."/> <字串 編號="5743" 文字="If you have no questions, go to see [/c$2Auro Guard Captain/c*] on the Aurora City Square! He will give you something to do."/> <字串 編號="5744" 文字="If you have no questions, go to see [/c$2Chief Assistant/c*] on the Iron Castle Square! He will give you something to do."/> <字串 編號="5745" 文字="Hi! I'm the loveliest of all the Angels in Heaven, my name is Cupid. Do you need my help?"/> <字串 編號="5746" 文字="What kind of help?"/> <字串 編號="5747" 文字="Set the place for your revival."/> <字串 編號="5748" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5749" 文字="The situation is, when your HP turn/c$2 0/c*, you will become [/c$2estate of spirit/c*]. My ability can endow you with a brand new body and then you carry on with your mission."/> <字串 編號="5750" 文字="If I register your [/c$2renascence place/c*] here, you can choose the place where you want to be revived."/> <字串 編號="5751" 文字="Hum, OK! Wait for a moment."/> <字串 編號="5752" 文字="Now, your [/c$2renascence place/c*] is registered here, you will appear here if you are revived."/> <字串 編號="5760" 文字="Hello, Little Angel /c$2%1/c*. You can't enter this area right now, because there is an outbreak of an evil disease there. We are investigating about the cause. Ordinary humans aren't affected by this disease, but as the citizens of Heaven, we are in great danger."/> <字串 編號="5761" 文字="If you want to go to the other countries in Eden, maybe I can help you."/> <字串 編號="5762" 文字="I wish to go to the other countries."/> <字串 編號="5763" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5764" 文字="I will send you to the [Heaven Telepotation]."/> <字串 編號="5765" 文字="Hello, Little Angel /c$2%1/c*. I'm Aurora Angel. Do you want to go to Aurora City?"/> <字串 編號="5766" 文字="Hello, Little Angel /c$2%1/c*. I'm the Dark City Angel. Do you want to go to Dark City?"/> <字串 編號="5767" 文字="Hello, Little Angel /c$2%1/c*. I'm the Iron Castle Angel. Do you want to go to Iron Castle?"/> <字串 編號="5768" 文字="Hello, Little Angel /c$2%1/c*. I'm the Breeze Jungle angel. Do you want to go to Breeze Jungle?"/> <字串 編號="5769" 文字="yes"/> <字串 編號="5770" 文字="No"/> <字串 編號="5771" 文字="I will send to the border of Aurora City Manor."/> <字串 編號="5772" 文字="I will send to the border of Dark City Manor."/> <字串 編號="5773" 文字="I will send to the border of Iron Castle Manor."/> <字串 編號="5774" 文字="I will send to the border of Breeze Jungle Manor."/> <字串 編號="5775" 文字="I have some liquid medicine which can you to regain your physical strength and energy, would you like some?"/> <字串 編號="5776" 文字="When you grow up, you can come back and find me and apply for the league. Ask your friends if they wish to join the same league to strive for our world together."/> <字串 編號="5777" 文字="What are the qualifications for and the benefits of founding a league?"/> <字串 編號="5778" 文字="/c$21.you must at least reach level 25. 2.the Level of your character must reach level 3 3.payment for the charge of founding a league, it's about 60000 dollar./c* after founding the league, you can take a chance on your friends, share the wealth with them and take part in the Angel Competitions with other leagues, strive to be the best league around."/> <字串 編號="5779" 文字="How do I upgrade the league?"/> <字串 編號="5780" 文字="Each member of the league can /c$2contribute the appointed material/c* for his league to gain /c$2League repute/c* in the league interface [/c$2upgrade the repute/c*]. The league is upgraded when the reputation accumulate up to a certain extent. The benefit is: the league coffer will be open to everybody, the leaguer's upper limit will heighten, and their battle effectiveness will be strengthened!"/> <字串 編號="5781" 文字="I wish to found a league."/> <字串 編號="5782" 文字="Your qualifications don't measure up. Please read the qualifications for founding a league. Make sure you can pass muster and come back and find me."/> <字串 編號="5783" 文字="These ancient books and cultural relics are the rare cultural heirlooms from our forefathers."/> <字串 編號="5784" 文字="Do you wish to have the [Skill Crystal]? Kneel down and say [虹吟是神!] three times and I will give you one."/> <字串 編號="5785" 文字="The road leading to [/c$2Decadence City/c*] is sealed up by a punchy magic, so you can't go to that place now."/> <字串 編號="5786" 文字="The road leading to [/c$2Faded Jungle/c*] is sealed up by a punchy magic, so you can't go to that place now."/> <字串 編號="5787" 文字="You haven't been invited to enter the [/c$2Palace/c*] in Aurora City, so you can't enter now."/> <字串 編號="5788" 文字="You haven't been invited to enter the [/c$2Holy Palace/c*] in Breeze Jungle, so you can't enter now."/> <字串 編號="5789" 文字="You haven't been invited to enter the [/c$2pyramid/c*] in Dark City, so you can't enter now."/> <字串 編號="5790" 文字="You haven't been invited to enter the [/c$2Ironlord Hall/c*] in Iron Castle, so you can't enter now."/> <字串 編號="5791" 文字="I can help you to change your [/c$2skill/c*]! Find the right skill which is suitable for you, with more practice."/> <字串 編號="5792" 文字="I wish to change my skill."/> <字串 編號="5793" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5794" 文字="Choose the skill which you want to change."/> <字串 編號="5795" 文字="In order to avoid the traffic jam at the Lyceum, the leader of the Lyceum Michael had created different spaces. By using these I can transport you to many other places."/> <字串 編號="5796" 文字="Angel Lyceum"/> <字串 編號="5797" 文字="Angel Lyceum"/> <字串 編號="5798" 文字="Angel Lyceum"/> <字串 編號="5799" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5800" 文字="I will send you there."/> <字串 編號="5801" 文字="Where are you going?"/> <字串 編號="5802" 文字="East Playground"/> <字串 編號="5803" 文字="East Playground"/> <字串 編號="5804" 文字="East Playground"/> <字串 編號="5805" 文字="East Playground"/> <字串 編號="5806" 文字="East Playground"/> <字串 編號="5807" 文字="West Playground"/> <字串 編號="5808" 文字="West Playground"/> <字串 編號="5809" 文字="West Playground"/> <字串 編號="5810" 文字="West Playground"/> <字串 編號="5811" 文字="West Playground"/> <字串 編號="5812" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5813" 文字="Training Palace"/> <字串 編號="5814" 文字="Training Palace"/> <字串 編號="5815" 文字="Training Palace"/> <字串 編號="5820" 文字="The limit of changing skill."/> <字串 編號="5821" 文字="Before you reach level/c$2 20 /c*you may change your skill for free. But, when you reach level/c$2 20/c*, you must use one [/c$2Skill Crystal/c*] to change the skill. You must be careful to pay attention to this."/> <字串 編號="5822" 文字="You don't have the [/c$2Skill Crystal/c*], you must buy one from the Dummy Shop."/> <字串 編號="5823" 文字="Do you want to improve your sword battle skills? I have many scrolls which tell all the skills of the sword, do you want to buy it?"/> <字串 編號="5824" 文字="Do you want to improve your axe battle skills? I have many scrolls which tell all the skills of the axe, do you want to buy it?"/> <字串 編號="5825" 文字="Do you want to improve your spear battle skills? I have many scrolls which tell all the skills of the spear, do you want to buy it?"/> <字串 編號="5826" 文字="Do you want to improve your bow battle skills? I have many scrolls which tell all the skills of the bow, do you want to buy it?"/> <字串 編號="5827" 文字="Buy the stationery"/> <字串 編號="5828" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5829" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, do you want to change your surroundings, maybe restart your peaceful journey? My job is helping people who want to change factions. If the faction isn't full of members, you can join it after paying the fee."/> <字串 編號="5830" 文字="About changing faction."/> <字串 編號="5831" 文字="I wish to change faction."/> <字串 編號="5832" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5833" 文字="The first qualification is that the faction isn't already full of members. And then, if you take part in any Faction, you can also join their faction."/> <字串 編號="5834" 文字="The leader of the Lyceum, Michael, has considered the problem of human resources and has made the decision that every Little Angel cannot apply to change Faction more than once a day (24 hours). And the most important thing is that once you transfer to another faction, some assignments are no longer to be carried out. Besides, with the increase of the standard, commission charge for transferring factions it is getting too expensive."/> <字串 編號="5835" 文字="the Lyceum also makes favorable measures to encourage Little Angels to change their city for the distribution of population. If you are voluntarily join a faction with the population less than the faction in your city, the commission charge will have a 50% discount."/> <字串 編號="5836" 文字="Which faction do you want to join?"/> <字串 編號="5837" 文字="Aurora"/> <字串 編號="5838" 文字="Shadow"/> <字串 編號="5839" 文字="Beasts"/> <字串 編號="5840" 文字="Steel"/> <字串 編號="5841" 文字="Let me see."/> <字串 編號="5842" 文字="Sorry, this faction is full of members. I can't accept your application."/> <字串 編號="5843" 文字="You don't cut the mustard. And your level is not high enough to pay for the procedure of joining the new faction."/> <字串 編號="5844" 文字="You cut the mustard. Pay for the procedure of joining the new faction and you can be their newest member."/> <字串 編號="5845" 文字="Congratulations! The faction you choose is expecting more freshmen to strengthen their power. You only need to pay 50% of the charge."/> <字串 編號="5846" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 4000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5847" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 25000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5848" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 130000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5849" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 450000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5850" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 2000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5851" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 125000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5852" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 65000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5853" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 225000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5854" 文字="Let me think about it."/> <字串 編號="5855" 文字="Little Angel, you don't have enough money! come back and find me after collecting the gold."/> <字串 編號="5856" 文字="Little Angel, you are still one of the members of the league, you can't change your faction. Make sure you exit your league first then come back and find me."/> <字串 編號="5857" 文字="You are one of members of Aurora faction. We I hope you can keep on your guard and strive for more glory for your faction!"/> <字串 編號="5858" 文字="You are one of members of Shadow faction. We I hope you can keep on your guard and strive for more glory for your faction!"/> <字串 編號="5859" 文字="You are one of members of Beasts faction. We I hope you can keep on your guard and strive for more glory for your faction!"/> <字串 編號="5860" 文字="You are one of members of Steel faction. We I hope you can keep on your guard and strive for more glory for your faction!"/> <字串 編號="5861" 文字="Little Angel, I can understand your sentiment for protecting the world, but it is such a pity that we are shorthanded and cannot deal with your move right now. I will help you to change the faction after one day has passed."/> <字串 編號="5862" 文字="Join the faction immediately."/> <字串 編號="5863" 文字="Hum? Little Angel, you haven't graduated from the Angel Lyceum, it's too early for you to talk about the affairs of state. Your most pressing affair is finishing your lessons!"/> <字串 編號="5864" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 1350000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5865" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 3200000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5866" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 675000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5867" 文字="Join the new faction by paying 1600000 gold."/> <字串 編號="5870" 文字="The most popular activity [Letter Collection event] is being held. Did you get any Word Collecting Cards? come back and find me and receive a gift after you have collected the appointed words. Hurry up! Don't waste any time."/> <字串 編號="5871" 文字="Introduce Word Collecting Card Activity."/> <字串 編號="5872" 文字="Exchange Word Collecting Cards for gift."/> <字串 編號="5873" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5874" 文字="During the activity, if you can find the [Hell Rabbit] or the [Hell Horned Rabbit] and beat them, you have the chance to get one of Word Collecting Cards from the set of five----[A], [N], [L], [G], [E]. Each different word has a different gift!"/> <字串 編號="5875" 文字="I wish to take a look at the gift."/> <字串 編號="5876" 文字="Return to the previous dialogue."/> <字串 編號="5877" 文字="If you have any of these Word Collecting Cards from this set [A], [N], [L], [G], [E], you can exchange them for delicious fruits. The fruits can make you stronger and improve your ability!"/> <字串 編號="5878" 文字="[G], [E] can be exchanged for delicious fruits, Treasure Map or a Pet."/> <字串 編號="5879" 文字="[A], [N] can be exchanged for the Silver Monster Badge and the Peculiar Chips of the Precious Stone."/> <字串 編號="5880" 文字="[G], [E], [L] can be exchanged for the Expression Set Gift Box, Octopus Backpack or Beetle Bag."/> <字串 編號="5881" 文字="[A], [N], [G], [E] can be exchanged for one of the Pet Eggs from the four Elves."/> <字串 編號="5882" 文字="[A], [N], [G], [E], [L] can be exchanged for the surprise Lucky Bag. There is a Gem, a Treasure Map and precious Enhanced Hammer in it, and you have the chance to take one Pet Egg from the three there."/> <字串 編號="5883" 文字="How many combinations of the Word Collecting Cards do you have?"/> <字串 編號="5884" 文字="Anyone of [A], [N], [G], [E], [L]"/> <字串 編號="5885" 文字="[GE]"/> <字串 編號="5886" 文字="[AN]"/> <字串 編號="5887" 文字="[GEL]"/> <字串 編號="5888" 文字="[ANGE]"/> <字串 編號="5889" 文字="[ANGEL]"/> <字串 編號="5890" 文字="Which card do you want to exchange?"/> <字串 編號="5891" 文字="[A]"/> <字串 編號="5892" 文字="[N]"/> <字串 編號="5893" 文字="[G]"/> <字串 編號="5894" 文字="[E]"/> <字串 編號="5895" 文字="[L]"/> <字串 編號="5896" 文字="You don't have enough Word Collecting Cards, go on collecting!"/> <字串 編號="5897" 文字="Good! Choose any gift you like!"/> <字串 編號="5898" 文字="When you have more Word Collecting Cards, come to see me and receive a gift, or if the activity is over, the Word Collecting Cards will be wasted."/> <字串 編號="5899" 文字="The dialogue from line 5870-5899 is for the activity of Letter Collection."/> <字串 編號="5900" 文字="[Totem Battle] has begun. Many Little Angels join in the competition, and strive for the glory! Do you want to join?"/> <字串 編號="5901" 文字="The introduction of Totem Battle."/> <字串 編號="5902" 文字="I wish to join in."/> <字串 編號="5903" 文字="I don't feel well, maybe some other time."/> <字串 編號="5904" 文字="The playground for the skirmish has been specially designed for athletics. All of the Little Angels are sent to different playgrounds according to their ability. In the skirmish, angel of every faction can try their best to attack other factions. And every evening at 7 there will be powerful evils attacking. As long as you can win, you will receive the glory of success----[Riddle Piece]!"/> <字串 編號="5905" 文字="Of course, when doing your best to fight with evil, you should be afraid of other angel's attack, or other people taking advantage~~~ only you can understand the situation and can become the last winner."/> <字串 編號="5906" 文字="If you're one of Production System, you can also find many exploitable resources and [Riddle Pieces]. After collecting 200 fragments, they can be exchanged [Angel League Certificate]with me. But the period of exploitation can be easily changed by enemies. So this job is really no safer than a group fight. "/> <字串 編號="5907" 文字="Any association which can collect the most [Angel League Certificate],can get their own associated area first after officially testing the [Totem War]"/> <字串 編號="5908" 文字="My heroic angel. I will send you to the battle. Please do everything you can to show your achievements accomplished whilst working in the world."/> <字串 編號="5909" 文字="You do not belong to the Angel Protector's of our faction. According to the law, I can't let you enter the battle. Please return to the main city of your faction and enter from the [Totem Battle] in your local outpost."/> <字串 編號="5910" 文字="Little Angel, your strength is not high enough for you to join the battle. Please don't try to sign up again until your grade reaches level 21."/> <字串 編號="5911" 文字="Exchange the Riddle Piece for the [Angel League Certificate]."/> <字串 編號="5912" 文字="come back and find me after you have collected 200 [Riddle Piece], you can exchange them for an [Angel League Certificate] which depicts the glory of the league! Your place in the competition is marked by the number of diplomas you have got. You must collect as many as you can and your talent will show itself in the leagues!"/> <字串 編號="5913" 文字="Exchange."/> <字串 編號="5914" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5915" 文字="Wow! You are so excellent to collect so many chips! You must do it with your friends, please take this [Angel League Certificate]."/> <字串 編號="5916" 文字="You don't have enough pieces! Make sure you have collected 200 and then come to change the diploma."/> <字串 編號="5920" 文字="I'm the Heaven General. I have been ordered by Michael to come here to wait for the elites and give the prizes to them."/> <字串 編號="5921" 文字="Tell me the qualification for the prize."/> <字串 編號="5922" 文字="I wish to get the prize."/> <字串 編號="5923" 文字="Send me to the League Manor."/> <字串 編號="5924" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="5925" 文字="When you/c$2 reach the level 30/c*, join in any league, win the [/c$2Totem Defend War/c*] with your leaguers and gain the right of the land, you can go to get an exclusive Angel Gift Box from the Officers who have the same official rank as me in each city."/> <字串 編號="5926" 文字="When you measure up [level 40+Status level 7], [level 50+Status level 8], [level 60+Status level 9], you can gain the more valuable Gift Box. /c$2Each day you only get one chance to get the gift/c*, if you want to get the gift again, you must /c$2wait until the next day/c*."/> <字串 編號="5927" 文字="Little Angel, you haven't reach the standard level, come to get the gift after you reach/c$2 level 30/c*."/> <字串 編號="5928" 文字="Your league is the winner of the Totem Defend War, choose which prize you want."/> <字串 編號="5929" 文字="The Gift Box of Fighting and Spell"/> <字串 編號="5930" 文字="The Gift Box of Production and Mining"/> <字串 編號="5931" 文字="Please do not forget that your victory is not your own success but the accomplishment of your team members' hard work, together. If your association continues to keep the ownership of Totem and it's feudal system, you can receive my reward everyday. You will face a lot of challenges in the future. As long as you keep taking exercise and everyone is of one mind to withstand the outsiders, you can continue the great harvest."/> <字串 編號="5932" 文字="Little Angel, your league should not attack any Totems. So I can't offer you any rewards or services. You should fight for your own honor. Please co-operate with your members to make your strategy. And try your best to win the game!"/> <字串 編號="5933" 文字="OK, I will send you to the league Manor, are you ready?"/> <字串 編號="5934" 文字="Any time is OK."/> <字串 編號="5935" 文字="Wait for moment."/> <字串 編號="5936" 文字="Your league doesn't have the right of the land totem, so I can't serve you."/> <字串 編號="5937" 文字="Congratulations! You and your leaguers have won the war! If you have the totem, then I can serve you. What can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="5938" 文字="Send me to the main city of the faction."/> <字串 編號="5939" 文字="Send me to the Mysterious Area."/> <字串 編號="5940" 文字="This is your league's homeland. So now you can buy anything from me!"/> <字串 編號="5941" 文字="Prop and equipment exchange."/> <字串 編號="5942" 文字="Recipe and scroll exchange."/> <字串 編號="5943" 文字="You may have had great success, but each day you will only have one chance to get a prize, please wait until the next day."/> <字串 編號="5944" 文字="Little Angel, you are the winner of the Totem Defend War, but your own efforts aren't up to the standard. Take part in the war and gain experience from it, upgrade your status; I believe that it will not be long before you will get the prize."/> <字串 編號="5945" 文字="Give me the Regression Scroll."/> <字串 編號="5946" 文字="This is the scroll which can send you to the back to the league instantaneously. But you may only carry one with you, after using it; you can get another one from me."/> <字串 編號="5947" 文字="You already have the [Regression Scroll], please cherish the limited resources, don't waste them."/> <字串 編號="5948" 文字="I wish to open my own league bank."/> <字串 編號="5949" 文字="Open the league bank for me."/> <字串 編號="5950" 文字="This is the Singles Day-1111, although it isn't really a special day for celebration, we still I hope that all of the single Little Angels can go to find their happy lives."/> <字串 編號="5951" 文字="The single Angels who expect love must find it by chance. I can give you a [/c$2Single/c*], you can exchange it for the other Little Angels who also have it. It can help you to encourage and bless each other."/> <字串 編號="5952" 文字="Are you certain that you will get the [/c$2Single/c*]?"/> <字串 編號="5953" 文字="Do you need more details about this event?"/> <字串 編號="5954" 文字="yes"/> <字串 編號="5955" 文字="no"/> <字串 編號="5956" 文字="After you get [/c$2Single/c*] and find another angel who /c$2is in the same faction/c*,/c$2 with a level gap of less than 5/c*and has the [/c$2Single/c*]. You can use/c$2 trade function/c* to exchange. If you are successful, you can open the letter to receive a special gift from the Love Angel."/> <字串 編號="5957" 文字="Exchange the [/c$2Single/c*] with other Little Angels! Don't lose it. If you don't know what you need for the change, you can ask me. Happy Singles Day, I hope you can find your true love."/> <字串 編號="5958" 文字="Happy Singles Day, I hope you can find your true love."/> <字串 編號="5959" 文字="I wish to buy the Status Badge."/> <字串 編號="5960" 文字="Welcome winners, to the Mysterious Area! I'm the Governor here, what can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="5961" 文字="How do I upgrade the level of the totem?"/> <字串 編號="5962" 文字="As long as you are a local, anyone can donate their material to enhance their Totem. Doing this has a great many of benefits. Apart from strengthening the Totem's resistance to being hit. But you could build it up more and you can give [totem protection] skill to Totem to gain more merits."/> <字串 編號="5963" 文字="The resources needed to upgrade the Totem are mostly semi-manufactured goods made by the Production System. Every contribution is donated as a basic unit of 200. The higher the standard is, the more experience you will gain."/> <字串 編號="5964" 文字="When you use [Obsidian Brick], [Coral Strip], [Iron Beast Leatherlace], [Bright Grass Silk], [Star Skin], [Bright Grass Oil], [Star Fish Meat], [Iron Beast Meat slice], you can upgrade your totem experience by about 12 points."/> <字串 編號="5965" 文字="When you use [Steel Ingot], [Delta Strip], [Blood Beast Leather lace], [Leaf Grass Silk], [Shining Skin], [Leaf Grass Oil], [Shining Tuna Meat], [Blood Beast Meat slice], you can upgrade your totem experience by about 24 points."/> <字串 編號="5966" 文字="When you use [Silver Ingot], [Purple Crystal Strip], [Crystal Beast Leather lace], [Angel Silk], [Blazing Scale Skin], [Angel Oil], [Fiery Shark Meat], [Crystal Beast Meat slice], you can upgrade your totem experience by about 48 points."/> <字串 編號="6000" 文字="Young risk taker, have you ever heard about the [/c$2Nightmare Cave/c*]? It is the biggest news recently in Eden."/> <字串 編號="6001" 文字="What is the Nightmare Cave?"/> <字串 編號="6002" 文字="How do I get there?"/> <字串 編號="6003" 文字="By going through the passport exchange."/> <字串 編號="6004" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="6005" 文字="Some days ago, our Exploration Association found a grave mound that gave off a very strange smell, there was some ancient writing carved into the stone wall, after the experts researched into it, they found out the name of the cave was....... [/c$2Nightmare Cave/c*]."/> <字串 編號="6006" 文字="It is said that the Cave is cursed with the power to turn the Eden citizens' sweet dreams into nightmares. It's terrible to be true but then again........."/> <字串 編號="6007" 文字="This is one of the entrances to the Nightmare Cave, [/c$2Crashing Hillock/c*], if you want to pass here, you must have the permit from our association."/> <字串 編號="6008" 文字="This is one of the entrances to Nightmare Cave, [/c$2Megalith Plain/c*], if you want to pass here you must have the permit from our association."/> <字串 編號="6009" 文字="This is one of the entrances to Nightmare Cave, [/c$2Fungus Forest North/c*], if you want to pass here you must have the permit from our association."/> <字串 編號="6010" 文字="This is one of the entrances to Nightmare Cave, [/c$2South of Mirror Lake/c*], if you want to pass here you must have the permit from our association."/> <字串 編號="6011" 文字="Hey! Young risk taker, you have got the permit?"/> <字串 編號="6012" 文字="Do you wish to get the permit? Unless you give me some gifts I won't give the permit for [/c$2Nightmare Cave/c*]to you."/> <字串 編號="6013" 文字="If you can give me/c$2 50000/c* dollars then I will give you the permit."/> <字串 編號="6014" 文字="ok"/> <字串 編號="6015" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="6016" 文字="Ha-ha, I'm really embarrassed to ask for the money but.... Here this permit is for you! Please be careful when you enter the [/c$2Nightmare Cave/c*]."/> <字串 編號="6017" 文字="You don't have enough money. I can't give you the permit."/> <字串 編號="6018" 文字="Your level isn't higher than/c$2 Lvl 40 /c*, I can't let you in."/> <字串 編號="6019" 文字="This [/c$2Nightmare Cave/c*] was found by our group. People who don't have the permit aren't allow to come in. If you want to get the permit, go to find our Leader in the city."/> <字串 編號="6020" 文字="I have the permit."/> <字串 編號="6021" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="6022" 文字="Oh, you have got the permit, be careful when you enter, the cave is a dangerous place.
