Go to beat the/c$2 15/c* Fire Elves in the East Playground and West Playground."/> <字串 編號="12006" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="12007" 文字="Not right now"/> <字串 編號="12008" 文字="Fire Elves are at the East Playground and the West Playground, the task record is in your Quest Log(/c$2Alt+Q/c*)."/> <字串 編號="12009" 文字="Ha-ha, you are my best student! Even the highest level lessons can't stop you! Excellent!"/> <字串 編號="12010" 文字="If you keep up your practices, you will be the best student I have ever had! You can get/c$2 3/c* scores for this lesson."/> <字串 編號="12101" 文字="Hello, I am the Shopkeeper! In my shop I have weapons and equipment of every kind imaginable. It is my aim to help all of the students to be successful at their studies."/> <字串 編號="12102" 文字="I'm sorry I don't want any."/> <字串 編號="12103" 文字="Tell me about the buying and selling of goods"/> <字串 編號="12104" 文字="Is there anything of interest at the school?"/> <字串 編號="12105" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="12106" 文字="What an adorable Little Angel! Whenever you want to buy some equipment, food or groceries then just come to see me. Moreover, should you ever want to sell anything then I just might buy it off you."/> <字串 編號="12107" 文字="Do you need anything for the start of the new term? We have everything!"/> <字串 編號="12108" 文字="It is said that there is a great and ancient tree in the school. But there are no records of it being planted..."/> <字串 編號="12109" 文字="Sounds funny. I will check it."/> <字串 編號="12110" 文字="Huh! That is to boring to bother with!"/> <字串 編號="12301" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, I am Lyceum leader Michael. According to my instructions, I must train you to be the Little Angels who defend the crown."/> <字串 編號="12302" 文字="Introduction to Angel Lyceum"/> <字串 編號="12303" 文字="What training do the top students receive?"/> <字串 編號="12304" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="12305" 文字="The Angel Lyceum is in the clouds above the Garden of Eden, it set up for to training Little Angels against the attacks from the [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*] who want to destroy the Garden of Eden."/> <字串 編號="12306" 文字="Therefore, you must study hard. Remember! The safety of the world may rest on your shoulders!"/> <字串 編號="12307" 文字="I have prepared a test for the top students in the school. Only the students who have/c$2 15/c* scores qualify for the test."/> <字串 編號="12308" 文字="I wish to take the training."/> <字串 編號="12309" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="12310" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, you don't have enough points from the Lyceum. You can only take part in the Intelligent Kid Training after you get [/c$215 points/c*]."/> <字串 編號="12311" 文字="Good, the Lyceum leader appreciates your courage. I will tell you the contents of the [/c$2Intelligent Kid Training/c*]."/> <字串 編號="12312" 文字="There is a path to the [/c$2Training Palace/c*] deep in the depths of the East and West Playground. It was created by a terrible magic and because of this many vile monsters walk it."/> <字串 編號="12313" 文字="There are 6 different kinds of monster, you must beat them and collect the rare [/c$2Core/c*] that they will drop after you win."/> <字串 編號="12314" 文字="Place the [/c$2Core/c*] which were dropped by the 6 monsters on the alter in the Training Palace and the [/c$2Qiuaner/c*] will be summoned."/> <字串 編號="12315" 文字="If you can beat him and bring his necklace back to me, then you will have passed my test."/> <字串 編號="12316" 文字="The [/c$2Training Palace/c*] is in the depths of the East and West Playground, go to collect the monsters' [/c$2Core/c*] and beat [/c$2Qiuaner/c*]."/> <字串 編號="12317" 文字="Congratulations! You managed to beat [/c$2Qiuaner/c*] and bring his necklace back to me."/> <字串 編號="12318" 文字="Choose the prize that you would like, they have been prepared by the Lyceum leader Michael! These celestial weapons are very unique and rare."/> <字串 編號="12401" 文字="Congratulations! You have finished the most difficult training in the Angel Lyceum, go to find your [/c$2Angels' Tutor/c*] if you are ready to leave."/> <字串 編號="12402" 文字="[Beast Statue] [/c$2Beast Core/c*] shows life and energy in the Plain and the Forest of Eden."/> <字串 編號="12403" 文字="[Human Statue] [/c$2Human Core/c*] shows the most creative seeds in Eden."/> <字串 編號="12404" 文字="[Plant Statue] [/c$2Plant Core/c*] shows the disseminator who spreads the marvelous fragrance all over Eden."/> <字串 編號="12405" 文字="[Energy Statue] [/c$2Energy Core/c*] shows a wonderful life-form from Eden. But, their true faces have never been seen."/> <字串 編號="12406" 文字="[Deathless Statue] [/c$2Deathless Core/c*] shows the inflexible power of the deepest underground depths of Eden."/> <字串 編號="12407" 文字="[Evil Statue] [/c$2Evil Core/c*] shows the strongest evil power in Eden. It is in their nature to be so."/> <字串 編號="12408" 文字="This must be the alter that the Lyceum leader mentioned. It certainly seems to be full of mystical power."/> <字串 編號="12501" 文字="Place the six different [Cores] on the Alter."/> <字串 編號="12502" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="12503" 文字="You need put the six different [/c$2Cores/c*] on the Altar, and then prepare to summon Angel Disciple..."/> <字串 編號="12504" 文字="You are still short of the other kinds of [/c$2Core/c*], you must collect all six kinds of Core to summon [/c$2Qiuaner/c*]."/> <字串 編號="12505" 文字="The photosphere on the Altar has made the six Cores blend together into a blinding beam of light..."/> <字串 編號="12506" 文字="You've beat the Angel Disciple, go back to tell the Lyceum leader at once!"/> <字串 編號="12507" 文字="Once Angel Disciple has been summoned, you can't summon him again."/> <字串 編號="12508" 文字="This is the award for passing the third level. Now there is only the last level left for you to study!"/> <字串 編號="12601" 文字="Firstly, congratulations to you for coming to the last part of your training. I'm sure that with a little hard work you will easily pass this next level. You can only train your mind to be strong against [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*] by tasting the cruelty of battle."/> <字串 編號="12602" 文字="We hope that the Angel Lyceum can train strong enough Angels to prevent Heaven's traitor [/c$2Lucifer/c*] and his followers from destroying the purity of the Land of Eden. This is the reason that we train you so hard. We only hope that our efforts can let the Land of Eden filled with happiness and love again, like before. It's down to you Little Angel, are you ready?"/> <字串 編號="12603" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, if you want to fight against Lucifer and the Evil Lyceum, you must first pass all of the training I will give you. I hope you prove strong enough to take it. This level is not for the faint hearted. Are you ready to begin?"/> <字串 編號="12604" 文字="I would like to accept the training."/> <字串 編號="12605" 文字="Maybe next time."/> <字串 編號="12606" 文字="The adventurer will have to face many difficulties, these are always easier to face with friends. Find some trustworthy companions to make your adventure interesting! When you find someone who has a common goal, you can press (/c$2Alt+F/c*) to open your friend list and invited him to be your friend!"/> <字串 編號="12607" 文字="The ultimate aim of the fourth level of training is to [beat/c$2 Holy Armor General/c*] in the Training Palace, I hope you can pass!"/> <字串 編號="12608" 文字="The final training is to go to the Training Palace to beat [/c$2Holy Armor General/c*], there is a passage that leads to the Training Palace in the depths of East Playground and West Playground each."/> <字串 編號="12609" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, you did well. I'm very proud of you. Congratulations to you for passing all the training needed to be a great Angel. Now you must continue your studies by yourself. Only that way can you be the best Angel ever."/> <字串 編號="12610" 文字="This is the award for the final training. I hope you can remember the importance of our mission. And that we never give up, we face difficulties head on and tackle them without pause. The Angel Lyceum is also very proud of you! I'll charge you with the important mission of helping to regain the people of Eden's confidence in us. And help their lives become once again filled with happiness and love!"/> <字串 編號="12611" 文字="You've already finished the most difficult training in the Angel Lyceum, if you're ready, you can go to find you [/c$2Angels' Tutor/c2] to complete your graduation."/> <字串 編號="12747" 文字="My dear Little Angel, I hope you can be the best Angel Protector in your city."/> <字串 編號="20001" 文字="Hello, /c$2%1/c*! We are so grateful that you will be the Angel Protector of Aurora City. I am the Angel here and I have come to help you to reach the highest level of being a Angel Protector."/> <字串 編號="20002" 文字="I've come here to report."/> <字串 編號="20003" 文字="The mission of the Angel Protector."/> <字串 編號="20004" 文字="What is the Angel Contribution?"/> <字串 編號="20005" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="20006" 文字="You came here just in time. Thank goodness!"/> <字串 編號="20007" 文字="I am to be your guide here in Eden. I will point out which is the proper way to go."/> <字串 編號="20008" 文字="There are many people who need your help in the Aurora City, but your ability is too limited just now. You must begin your adventure only after you have collected some information here."/> <字串 編號="20009" 文字="In this house lives two of the most knowledgeable Aurora City residents [/c$2Merchant Aliser/c*] and [/c$2Explorer Lim/c*]. Aliser knows the business of products distribution and storing goods in Aurora City like the back of his hand. You can ask him any questions about it you like."/> <字串 編號="20010" 文字="Lim is an excellent adventurer. And he knows more about the geographical conditions and the characters of the Ogres in Aurora City than anyone else. Added to that he also knows much about Battles and Magic. You can ask him any question on the subject."/> <字串 編號="20011" 文字="As the Angel Protector in Aurora City, you must try your best to help the people here. Lead them away from the suffering, help them to solve their problems and try to let happiness return to every nook and cranny of this land. That is the job of a Angel Protector."/> <字串 編號="20012" 文字="But, now people do not believe in the existence of Angels anymore. So you appear to them in the form of a human being! You will have to travel a long distance before reaching the final goal. Please fight on!"/> <字串 編號="20013" 文字="[/c$2Angel Contribution/c*] is a way of comparing the deeds of the Angels. Every city--- Aurora City, Dark City, Breeze Woods and Iron Castle-- has their own [/c$2Angel Contribution/c*]. We will decide how much Angel Contribution they will receive according to their contributions to the cause."/> <字串 編號="20014" 文字="Now, you can help all of the citizens in Aurora City solve their problems. If you can complete each assignment they give you then you will get Angel Contribution, and in the future you can join the Angel Protector's competition to accumulate more Angel Contribution. When the Angel Contribution reaches a certain amount, your [/c$2rank/c*] will increase too!"/> <字串 編號="20015" 文字="When your total [/c$2Angel Contribution/c*] has reached a certain amount, you can come to me to take a Heaven assignment. After finishing it, you will be promoted to a higher level of Angel Protector and at the same time you will receive presents and blessings from Heaven. "/> <字串 編號="20016"/> <字串 編號="20017" 文字="Talk to them. If you can accumulate more experience and upgrade your character level to/c$2 20/c* and your Angel level to/c$2 2 /c*, then you can come to see me and take the first mission for Aurora City as a Angel Protector."/> <字串 編號="20018" 文字="Send me back to the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="20019" 文字="I will send you back to the Angel Lyceum. If you want to come back here, go to find [/c$2Director Wolay/c*]."/> <字串 編號="20020" 文字="You are strong enough now, so you don't need to return to the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="20021"/> <字串 編號="20101" 文字="Hello, I am the Master of [/c$2Spike Farm/c*]. You see, this big farm is in my charge. It keeps me very busy. But recently I have had cause for concern."/> <字串 編號="20102" 文字="What are you worried about?"/> <字串 編號="20103" 文字="Erm...Goodbye."/> <字串 編號="20104" 文字="Oh? Can't you tell? The Field Mice have taken a shine to my crops and have been eating them like there's no tomorrow. So this years harvest is not good enough. It has been said that the taxes are going to go up again. These things really make me worry!"/> <字串 編號="20105" 文字="Can you help me to get rid of those troublesome Field Mice? They are in the field."/> <字串 編號="20106" 文字="Yes, of course I'll help you."/> <字串 編號="20107" 文字="I am sorry, I have something else to do."/> <字串 編號="20108" 文字="Oh dear, you can't deal with so many Field Mice now, your level is not high enough. Come back to help me after you reach/c$2 level 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="20109" 文字="Great! You deal with those Mice and bring me their/c$2 10/c* tails once you are done."/> <字串 編號="20110" 文字="Do you know where the Field Mice are? They have fat brown bodies and hide in the field! Hum! Remember collect/c$2 10/c* the tails for me."/> <字串 編號="20111" 文字="Wow! There are so many tails, well done!"/> <字串 編號="20112" 文字="I always say that a job done well deserves rewarding. Please take this as way of thanks."/> <字串 編號="20113" 文字="I am the Farmer here; you're not from around here are you? You don't look local."/> <字串 編號="20201" 文字="There are definitely less Field Mice than before, but there is something else troubling me."/> <字串 編號="20202" 文字="Hey Farmer, what else is worrying you?"/> <字串 編號="20203" 文字="Ok! Bye."/> <字串 編號="20204" 文字="Ah, you noticed. All of my Pumpkins have been turned into Pumpkin Men, it must be the work of the naughty Magicians. Some of the local children have been badly scared by it. Could you please go to deal with them for me?"/> <字串 編號="20205" 文字="Not a problem!"/> <字串 編號="20206" 文字="Sorry, I have something else to do."/> <字串 編號="20207" 文字="You're the best! Defeat/c$2 20/c* Pumpkin Men and I will give you a great reward!"/> <字串 編號="20208" 文字="You haven't defeated all of the Pumpkin Men, I can hear the Pumpkin Men's noise echoing all over my fields."/> <字串 編號="20209" 文字="Well done! Thank you for defeating the Pumpkin Men for me."/> <字串 編號="20210" 文字="This is your reward, please take it."/> <字串 編號="20301" 文字="Has the time changed? Are there less hours in the day now? It must be because my wages are so low. Why would they try to cheat me out of my pay?"/> <字串 編號="20302" 文字="Hey Farmer, you got some trouble again?"/> <字串 編號="20303" 文字="Bye."/> <字串 編號="20304" 文字="Ah! I still have woes. It isn't easy to take charge of a farm! Those Jackstraws had no fear of sunburn or windburn before, but now it is all they talk about. They have decided that they should get danger money and want a raise. We tried to talk it out but we could not reach an agreement. So now they are making trouble in my fields."/> <字串 編號="20305" 文字="Aahh! Will my troubles never cease? My crops are destroyed. I can't pay the tax this year! What did I do to deserve this bad luck? I'm a good man. Oh I just don't know..."/> <字串 編號="20306" 文字="I will help you."/> <字串 編號="20307" 文字="Take care."/> <字串 編號="20308" 文字="Really? You will? Thank you so much. Those Jackstraws have almost destroyed my crops! You must be my Angel Protector or something!"/> <字串 編號="20309" 文字="The Jackstraws are running around the edges of my fields. You can catch up with them there. Please be firm with them for they have very little brain and are easily confused."/> <字串 編號="20310" 文字="Wow! You have finished the task so quickly. There are definitely less Jackstraws than before. Oh please tell me what method you employed to make them calm down?"/> <字串 編號="20311" 文字="You have dealt with all of my problems one by one. Without even bating an eyelid. I really appreciate all you have done for me! If you ever want to come to work here then there will always be a job waiting for you!"/> <字串 編號="20312" 文字="Please could you pass this [/c$2Package/c*] to my wife on your way out? I have something to tell her."/> <字串 編號="20313" 文字="This is my gift for you, please accept it!"/> <字串 編號="20401" 文字="Hello, I'm the Farmer's wife, are you a tourist? It seems strange that you should choose to visit such a dirty place but each to their own. The weather today is too hot, I'm afraid it makes the farm smell terrible, well more terrible than before at any rate. I don't know how my husband can stand it?"/> <字串 編號="20402" 文字="Your husband asked me to give you this Package."/> <字串 編號="20403" 文字="I must go now. Good-bye."/> <字串 編號="20404" 文字="Package, what package? Oh this one. He wants me to take the Package to the Manor Keeper in [/c$2Sunflower Plain/c*]. How strange that he asks me go there by all by myself! Sometimes it seems like he cares more for the farm than me! He used to be so jealous but now..."/> <字串 編號="20405" 文字="But I don't trust the people in that Manor house. I really don't want to go there. You look kind, would you help me, please?"/> <字串 編號="20406" 文字="OK! No problem!"/> <字串 編號="20407" 文字="I must go now. Good-bye."/> <字串 編號="20408" 文字="Oh, how wonderful! You are so kind, please give the package to the Manor Keeper in [/c$2Sunflower Plain/c*], go east along the road and you'll see it."/> <字串 編號="20409" 文字="I'm sorry to put you out so. It is easy, go east along Ocher Road and you'll see it."/> <字串 編號="20410" 文字="They say that behind every successful man stands a strong woman like me. I love my husband but he spends too much time worrying about this pile. But now you've helped to solve our troubles maybe things will be different...Thank you so much!"/> <字串 編號="20411" 文字="What ho! I'm the Manor Keeper of Sunflower Fazenda, in addition to serving the master of manor --[/c$2pre-Knight Colonel/c*], I am also responsible for the running of the place."/> <字串 編號="20412" 文字="The Spike Farmer let me give you this."/> <字串 編號="20413" 文字="I have nothing to say. I quit."/> <字串 編號="20414" 文字="Oh. It's the flour from the farm. My master only likes to eat bread made from Spike Farm's flour. Nothing else will do for him."/> <字串 編號="20415" 文字="Thank you for bringing it here, please accept this gift."/> <字串 編號="20416" 文字="Hello, I'm the Farmer's wife, are you a tourist? It seems strange that you should choose to visit such a dirty place but each to their own. The weather today is too hot, I'm afraid it makes the farm smell terrible, well more terrible than before at any rate. I don't know how my husband can stand it?"/> <字串 編號="20501" 文字="Hey you there! I am the cook of Spike Farm and an excellent one, even if I do say so myself. But the Farmer is very particular about his food. So I must be very cautious with the menu! But, alas today I am shorthanded, I need someone's help. Would you assist me?"/> <字串 編號="20502" 文字="Sure how can I help you?"/> <字串 編號="20503" 文字="It is Ok. Good bye!"/> <字串 編號="20504" 文字="Right! It is..."/> <字串 編號="20505" 文字="I wish to cook some traditional food. So I have decided to make my famous [/c$2pumpkin porridge/c*]. My secret recipe has been handed down through my family for generations! The fragrant and sweet pumpkin concoction makes my mouth water just to think about it!"/> <字串 編號="20506" 文字="However, all of the pumpkins were turned into Monsters by the naughty Magicians. I haven't made this dish for so long and I am just dying to let the Farmer try it. Can you help me to collect some more ingredients?"/> <字串 編號="20507" 文字="Ok!"/> <字串 編號="20508" 文字="No. Sorry I don't feel like it today!"/> <字串 編號="20509" 文字="Please can you bring me/c$2 10/c* Pumpkins?"/> <字串 編號="20510" 文字="You'd be better of going to search in the Pumpkin in the field. But remember I need/c$2 10/c* Pumpkins bringing back!"/> <字串 編號="20511" 文字="Thank you! There are easily enough fresh pumpkins to make my porridge! I may even be able to bake some cookies as well! "/> <字串 編號="20512" 文字="Your level is not high enough to deal with a problem like this. Come back once you have reached level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="20513" 文字="Hey you there! I am the cook of Spike Farm and an excellent one, even if I do say so myself. But the Farmer is very particular about his food. So I must be very cautious with the menu! But, alas today I am shorthanded, I need someone's help. Would you assist me?"/> <字串 編號="20514" 文字="Thank you, these pumpkins are very fresh! And not a scratch on them. You must have got to them before the monsters could damage them,"/> <字串 編號="20601" 文字="Aaahhh! How can I keep my kitchen clean when there are so many Field Mice everywhere? There's no choice I have to deal with them!"/> <字串 編號="20602" 文字="Ooohhh! But I am terribly short handed just now. You seem to be a dependable sort of chap. Could you handle this for me?"/> <字串 編號="20603" 文字="Sure, why not!"/> <字串 編號="20604" 文字="No, I don't feel like helping today."/> <字串 編號="20605" 文字="Please can you help me to catch/c$2 20/c* Field Mice."/> <字串 編號="20606" 文字="Do you know where the Field Mice are? They like to hide in the fields! Remember and collect/c$2 20/c* tails for me."/> <字串 編號="20607" 文字="Oh hurrah! Those dirty Field Mice won't run around in my kitchen anymore."/> <字串 編號="20608" 文字="Your level is not high enough to deal with a problem like this. Come back once you have reached level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="20609" 文字="Thank you so much, this humble gift is for you!"/> <字串 編號="20701" 文字="I wish to make a Roasted Sashimi for the Farmer's supper tonight! It's his favorite. The fresh fillets are smoked in the burning straw. It really is a fantastic dish!"/> <字串 編號="20702" 文字="But we are short of Straw and the Jackstraws are making trouble in the fields. It seems that I have no way to get more. Do you think you could help me to fetch some?"/> <字串 編號="20703" 文字="Sure, why not!"/> <字串 編號="20704" 文字="No get it yourself."/> <字串 編號="20705" 文字="Bring me/c$2 10/c* bales of Straw that should be enough. "/> <字串 編號="20706" 文字="The Jackstraws are running around the edges of my fields. You can catch up with them there. Please be firm with them for they have very little brain and are easily confused."/> <字串 編號="20707" 文字="Ha-ha, with all of this straw I won't have to worry about those wretched Jackstraws for quite a while! Thank you so much."/> <字串 編號="20708" 文字="Your level is not high enough to deal with a problem like this. Come back once you have reached level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="20709" 文字="Thank you so much, this gift is for you!"/> <字串 編號="20801" 文字="Hello, I am the Clerk of [/c$2Sunflower Field/c*], You are very welcome here as long as you follow our rules! Do not break any branches or damage the trees in any way. Do not throw litter......."/> <字串 編號="20802" 文字="What is troubling you so?"/> <字串 編號="20803" 文字="I will abide by your rules. I promise."/> <字串 編號="20804" 文字="I had heard that some Pumpkins were making trouble at Spike Farm. And the same thing has happened here. All of our Pumpkins have become stronger and are beginning to transform. They are even destroying our beautiful sunflowers. What can I do? "/> <字串 編號="20805" 文字="Do you need my help?"/> <字串 編號="20806" 文字="I am leaving. Goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="20807" 文字="You are not strong enough to deal with these pumpkins. Come back here once you have reached level/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="20808" 文字="Wow! Thank you so much for agreeing to help. You must defeat all of the Pumpkin creatures in the field please!"/> <字串 編號="20809" 文字="They are running all over the field. Come back here to see me once you have defeated enough of them."/> <字串 編號="20810" 文字="I can see that there are much less of the vile creatures than before. They should be manageable now. Thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="20811" 文字="This is a gift from us, please take it."/> <字串 編號="20812" 文字="Hello, I am the Clerk of [/c$2Sunflower Field/c*], You are very welcome here as long as you follow our rules! Do not break any branches or damage the trees in any way. Do not throw litter......."/> <字串 編號="20901" 文字="What ho! I'm the Manor Keeper of Sunflower Fazenda, in addition to serving the master of manor --[/c$2predecessor Knight Colonel/c*], I am also responsible for the running of the place."/> <字串 編號="20902" 文字="What are you worrying about?"/> <字串 編號="20903" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="20904" 文字="The Sheep, that belong to the Colonel, have run away again. It is getting cold outside and we need some wool to make warm clothes. Can you [/c$2bring some wool back/c*] to us? Be careful, these are not ordinary Sheep not only can they play the flute they are also highly trained in the art of defense!"/> <字串 編號="20905" 文字="No problem!"/> <字串 編號="20906" 文字="Sorry, I have something else to do."/> <字串 編號="20907" 文字="I am sorry, you aren't qualified to do a job like this because you haven't reached level/c$2 10 /c*yet. These Sheep are dangerous, you'd better come back after you have trained some more."/> <字串 編號="20908" 文字="Really is that all? Collect/c$2 5/c* bundles of wool from the Sheep. It sounds easy enough, although I am curious about how the Sheep play flute? And why everyone else seems to be a little scared of them. Maybe the Gardener knows the reason, he hates those Sheep."/> <字串 編號="20909" 文字="The Sheep are to the south of Sunflower Field, pass over the bridge and you should be able to find them."/> <字串 編號="20910" 文字="Great! You collect so much wool!"/> <字串 編號="20911" 文字="Here is a reward. You deserve it."/> <字串 編號="20912" 文字="What ho! I'm the Manor Keeper of Sunflower Fazenda, in addition to serving the master of manor --[/c$2Pre-Knight Colonel/c*], I am also responsible for the running of the place. Have you ever heard of Auraro Knight Corps? "/> <字串 編號="21001" 文字="Hi, I'm [/c$2Douglas/c*], welcome to my Sunflower Fazenda."/> <字串 編號="21002" 文字="Tell me about being the Knight Colonel."/> <字串 編號="21003" 文字="Tell me about the Auraro Sword."/> <字串 編號="21004" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="21005" 文字="Aahh, young man, you do not understand the workings of the palace. I can only tell you that the new Prime Minister is er...Well complicated, I guess. The thing that worries me the most is that the King seems to be completely under his spell..."/> <字串 編號="21006" 文字="Now, the Aurora City is in danger. Not only inside but also outside. There are some [/c$2Riprap Pirates/c*] in the north Riprap Coast who seem set on raiding the place. But the Prime Minister delays the dispatching of troops to support Dawn Harbor, without a clear reason. I am too old to go through a battle in the palace."/> <字串 編號="21007" 文字="That is the reason why I asked the King to remove me from my duty. I feel like growing flowers is the more suitable for me. I can't handle political matters anymore."/> <字串 編號="21008" 文字="Forty years ago, on the night when the new Colonel took over my job, the [/c$2Knight's sword/c*] disappeared from the store house, in the palace of Aurora City. The King gave order to find it, but up to the now, no one has been able to find it."/> <字串 編號="21009" 文字="I heard a rumor, a year before, that the sword was stolen by a cunning thief. He then broke it into [/c$2many pieces/c*]. Some of the pieces were sold all over to places near Eden...I think it is impossible to find the whole sword."/> <字串 編號="21010" 文字="Dear Strangers, I am [/c$2Douglas/c*], the host of this manor. Please feel free to enjoy yourselves. "/> <字串 編號="21101" 文字="You want to admire the flowers? This is the most famous Sunflower field around. When they flower visitors come from miles around to gaze at their beauty. So I become more and more busy... Unfortunately there are also a lot of noisy animals."/> <字串 編號="21102" 文字="What noisy animals?"/> <字串 編號="21103" 文字="That's Ok."/> <字串 編號="21104" 文字="Do you hear the noisy piping? That's because of those Sheep. They can play the flute? Would you help me to quieten them down?"/> <字串 編號="21105" 文字="Hum, no problem, leave it to me."/> <字串 編號="21106" 文字="I'm sorry. I have something else to do."/> <字串 編號="21107" 文字="You are too weak to deal with those deadly Sheep. Come back once your level has reached/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="21108" 文字="I am sorry to trouble you. I hope you can make them quieter. I last heard them cavorting around next the river."/> <字串 編號="21109" 文字="Do you find them? Go east and you will see a little bridge, the Sheep are over there."/> <字串 編號="21110" 文字="Ha-ha, you came back! It's so much quieter now, thank you very much!"/> <字串 編號="21111" 文字="Thank you for you help, this gift is for you."/> <字串 編號="21112" 文字="Have you come from far away? Originally, the Sunflower Plain was famous all over the world. "/> <字串 編號="21201" 文字="Kind Stranger, as a matter of fact, I find the music made by the Sheep to be most soothing!"/> <字串 編號="21202" 文字="Hum, you must know something that I don't?"/> <字串 編號="21203" 文字="I have something to do, I must go now."/> <字串 編號="21204" 文字="I found that maybe I have something in common with those wooly creatures. I believe that their tuneful piping has aroused my musical nature, ha-ha! But, could I possibly trouble you further? Could you [/c$2find a well-content musical instrument for me/c*]? I wish to start practicing after work."/> <字串 編號="21205" 文字="You changed a lot. Ok, I will help you."/> <字串 編號="21206" 文字="I am sorry, I don't have time."/> <字串 編號="21207" 文字="The Sheep's flutes make a nice sound, maybe you could take one from them."/> <字串 編號="21208" 文字="Oh? How would I get a flute from the Sheep? I have heard that they are deadly!"/> <字串 編號="21209" 文字="Wow! A flute! That's great! I can play it now."/> <字串 編號="21210" 文字="Please take this gift. Thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="21301" 文字="Kind Stranger, you got me a flute, I must surely owe you something."/> <字串 編號="21302" 文字="Oh? What's this?"/> <字串 編號="21303" 文字="I am busy, bye."/> <字串 編號="21304" 文字="But I don't have a music book. I wonder how those Sheep can play such heavenly music? They must have a wonderful music book, it must be written by [/c$2Sheep Beethoven/c*]."/> <字串 編號="21305" 文字="Sheep Beethoven? Tell me more."/> <字串 編號="21306" 文字="That does not interest me at all."/> <字串 編號="21307" 文字="[/c$2Sheep Beethoven/c*] is a very special Sheep, it has the musical talent to make such haunting tunes. The Sheep which can play the flute were all taught by it. It may have the [/c$2Mystic Score/c*], could you get it for me?"/> <字串 編號="21308" 文字="Ok, no problem."/> <字串 編號="21309" 文字="I am sorry, I have something to do."/> <字串 編號="21310" 文字="No one knows the whereabouts of the [/c$2Sheep Beethoven/c*]. Some fishermen say that it appears in the space between the bank and the boulders. You should ask someone to help you. For this will not be easy to deal with. Remember it's no ordinary sheep!"/> <字串 編號="21311" 文字="You can't you find [/c$2Sheep Beethoven/c*]? It has been seen to appear in the area between the bank and the boulders. You can ask someone there if they have ever seen it."/> <字串 編號="21312" 文字="Score! I've really got the Music Score! I will treasure it forever. Thank you so much!"/> <字串 編號="21313" 文字="That is great! Stranger! You've found the treasure for me and I will give you this gift in return. Here are all of my treasures; you can choose one of them."/> <字串 編號="21314" 文字="This city has so many places of interest, not only the flower field but also the [/c$2Dawn Harbor/c*], which is in the southern part of Spike Farm. But, it seems that they are experiencing trouble there now. They will be in dire need of your help."/> <字串 編號="21315" 文字="Kind Stranger thank you so much."/> <字串 編號="21401" 文字="If you want to go to the [/c$2Dawn Harbor/c*], I will write a letter of recommendation to the [/c$2Fish Labor Union/c*] Leader. Just show someone there the letter and they will take you to him. They really need your help, they're are in awful trouble."/> <字串 編號="21402" 文字="Ok, thank you."/> <字串 編號="21403" 文字="No, I am not interested in doing this now."/> <字串 編號="21404" 文字="Goodbye, Stranger, the way to the [/c$2Dawn Harbor/c*] is to the southeast of Spike Farm. If you get lost or you don't know how to get there, you can ask someone for help."/> <字串 編號="21405" 文字="Kind Stranger, why do you come back? Ah well, please make sure to enjoy yourself."/> <字串 編號="21406" 文字="I am the leader of [/c$2Fish Labor Union in Dawn Harbor/c*], what can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="21407" 文字="Tell me about the Fish Labor Union."/> <字串 編號="21408" 文字="I have a letter of recommendation."/> <字串 編號="21409" 文字="I have nothing to say to you. Quit."/> <字串 編號="21410" 文字="The [/c$2Fish Labor Union/c*] is an organization which is in charge of the Dawn Harbor, and this harbor is in charge of all ships on the western ocean. We offer room and board for the exotic passengers and sailors. But now, the pirates make so much trouble here that it's become necessary to enhance the force in the harbor. We need to ask [/c$2Aurora City/c*] for help."/> <字串 編號="21411" 文字="A letter of recommendation, eh? Let me see."/> <字串 編號="21412" 文字="Oh, my old friend has written it! I have not seen him for such a long time. He says here that you helped him out a lot and that you are really kind young man. Ah-ha, we welcome you here!"/> <字串 編號="21501" 文字="Oh no! Where has my ring gone? That hateful Slam! What can I do now?"/> <字串 編號="21502" 文字="You got some trouble?"/> <字串 編號="21503" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="21504" 文字="That awful Slam, he stole my [/c$2ring/c*] whilst I was looking at the flowers. However, I cannot distinguish which Slam was the thief, they all look the same to me. Can you help me to find my ring?"/> <字串 編號="21505" 文字="Yes, I will find it for you."/> <字串 編號="21506" 文字="No sorry, I have something else to do, bye."/> <字串 編號="21507" 文字="Don't make promises that you can't keep. These Slams are not the same as the common ones. You are not strong enough, come to see me after you have reached level/c$2 10 /c*. "/> <字串 編號="21508" 文字="Thank you, these Slams are causing havoc next to the bank. Be careful, they will attack you as soon as look at you."/> <字串 編號="21509" 文字="Can you find Slams? Try going north along the bank until you see them."/> <字串 編號="21510" 文字="This is my ring! Great!"/> <字串 編號="21511" 文字="This ring cost me a lot of money. It shows of my worth and attracts a lot of pretty women! This reward is for you, take it please. Thank you for helping me."/> <字串 編號="21512" 文字="Why are those, usually docile, Slam attacking people? They cause so much of a disturbance that I cannot even look at the flowers."/> <字串 編號="21513" 文字="Huh! You are not a local person. How can you understand the worries of a local? Go away and leave me alone!"/> <字串 編號="21601" 文字="Hey there, I'm the cook in the [/c$2Dawn Harbor/c*], I am in charge of preparing the meals for the sailors in harbor. Have you ever tried my seafood? All the sailors love my cooking so much! Ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="21602" 文字="Can I taste your cooking?"/> <字串 編號="21603" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="21604" 文字="Of course, there is no such thing as a free lunch though. If you want to taste my dishes then you must do something for me first. Too many people are put off working here by the Riprap pirates, it is too hard to recruit anyone nowadays. Are you willing to help me?"/> <字串 編號="21605" 文字="Ok, I will."/> <字串 編號="21606" 文字="Forget it."/> <字串 編號="21607" 文字="Well, you can see that the port is very dirty. Because of this we are over run with Mice and I cannot bear the noise that they make. Please help me to get rid of those noisy Mice. When you come back, the food will be prepared."/> <字串 編號="21608" 文字="You look too scrawny to be depended on. When you have reached level/c$2 15 /c*, you can come back to see me!"/> <字串 編號="21609" 文字="The Mice that are causing the trouble are easy to spot. They are the [/c$2Grey Mouse/c*]. These Mice grow to such a huge size because they only eat the seafood we catch in ocean. I can't possibly imagine how things will be if we don't take care of this problem."/> <字串 編號="21610" 文字="Why do you come back so early? You can't have caught them all yet. I just saw a [/c$2Grey Mouse/c*] running through here not one minute ago. Get back to work or I won't give you any food."/> <字串 編號="21611" 文字="Ah-ah, you've certainly raised a sweat. You must have been working really hard!"/> <字串 編號="21612" 文字="Here is your food. I hope you enjoy it."/> <字串 編號="21613" 文字="Hey, I am the cook in the Dawn Harbor. I am in charge of preparing the meals for all of the sailors in harbor."/> <字串 編號="21701" 文字="Have you ever heard of [/c$2Salted Crabmeat/c*]? On the ocean, salt is used to keep food from turning bad. And also to add flavor for example crabmeat and salt match perfectly. I was the head cook on a ship at one time and I often made this dish for my sailors. It brings back a lot of memories."/> <字串 編號="21702" 文字="It sounds delicious, where can I get some?"/> <字串 編號="21703" 文字="That doesn't interest me at all!"/> <字串 編號="21704" 文字="Whilst we were talking about it my mouth was watering at the thought. Could you help me to get the ingredients? The soldier crabs in haven's are especially delicious. I will pay you for each one if you can bring me/c$2 10/c* Crab Meat."/> <字串 編號="21705" 文字="There is no way that you are strong enough to complete this task. You can only try once you have reached level/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="21706" 文字="The Soldier crabs have been appearing to the east of haven board. Don't tell me that you didn't see them."/> <字串 編號="21707" 文字="My cooking pot is not yet up to temperature. But you can use this time to take the meat from the crabs."/> <字串 編號="21708" 文字="Hey! You must do it quickly before the meat turns bad."/> <字串 編號="21709" 文字="You are lucky enough to not have to wait! I just found some soldier crabmeat in stock. Therefore, I can let you try some now. Try it."/> <字串 編號="21801" 文字="Have you heard of Herb Tortoise Meat? In fact, the Turtle Meat is not as chewy as everybody thinks. The meat is quite tender, especially with vanilla! That was my teacher's secret ingredient."/> <字串 編號="21802" 文字="It sounds delicious, how can I get some?"/> <字串 編號="21803" 文字="That doesn't interest me at all."/> <字串 編號="21804" 文字="If you can collect/c$2 4/c* pieces of Turtle Meats for me, then I will cook it for you."/> <字串 編號="21805" 文字="If you want to try my cooking, you must do something for me first! Come to see me after you have reached level/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="21806" 文字="There are many turtles to the west of Dawn Harbor, and in the beach. Go there!"/> <字串 編號="21807" 文字="You did not collect enough Turtle Meat. Do not forget that I need/c$2 4/c* pieces."/> <字串 編號="21808" 文字="You have collected the enough Turtle Meat! Good! Give it to me! Turtle Meat must be dealt with straight away. This reminds me so much of my old teacher."/> <字串 編號="21809" 文字="OK, here is the Vanilla Turtle Meat, taste it! I promise you will love it! This is only eaten in Dawn Harbor."/> <字串 編號="21901" 文字="Hum, I am so angry! Karter has gone too far by saying that!"/> <字串 編號="21902" 文字="Why are you so angry? What happened?"/> <字串 編號="21903" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="21904" 文字="I am Bonny,Karter and I are sailors in Dawn Harbor. We were talking about the rise of [/c$2Riprap Pirates/c*] and the fact that now the safety of the port is being threatened. Karter said he would go to fight them while I suggested that we should wait the army of Aurora City come and support us."/> <字串 編號="21905" 文字="Karter called me a coward, only depending on other people. Oh he makes me so angry. We should not just rush into danger without a plan. Those Pirates are many in number and what harm to them can just two men do? It is more sensible to wait for a proper attack than to risk our lives now!"/> <字串 編號="21906" 文字="Besides, [/c$2Fish Labor Union/c*] is seeming to take action. They will never surrender themselves to the scallywag Pirates. I made a proposal for the attack and tried to send it to the Fish Labor Union. But my package was stolen by the pirates."/> <字串 編號="21907" 文字="Alas, if Karter had only seen my [/c$2proposal/c*], he would have known that I am not a coward."/> <字串 編號="21908" 文字="Give the proposal to Bonny."/> <字串 編號="21909" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="21910" 文字="Huh? This my [/c$2proposal/c*]? How do you get it? As you have it now, could you give it to Karter? Our argument got so heated that I am embarrassed to see him now."/> <字串 編號="21911" 文字="Please [/c$2give the proposal to Karter/c*], it will prove that I am not a coward."/> <字串 編號="21912" 文字="Did you give the proposal to Karter? Thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="21913" 文字="My name is Karter, I'm a sailor, do you want to join us in the fight against the pirates? We need your help!"/> <字串 編號="21914" 文字="Give the proposal to Karter."/> <字串 編號="21915" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="21916" 文字="Proposal? Oh no! This was written by Bonny. I misunderstood him before. I called him a coward, how can he ever forgive me?"/> <字串 編號="21917" 文字="Thank you! I will go to make amends at once. I can't believe I almost lost my best friend over a silly misunderstanding."/> <字串 編號="21918" 文字="Thank you, this gift is for you. I will go to see Bonny and apologize to him. "/> <字串 編號="21919" 文字="I'm the Sailor Bonny. I am sorry, but now I am in bad mood, don't disturb me."/> <字串 編號="21920" 文字="I'm the Sailor Karter, please take care of yourself, the Riprap Pirates are making trouble here."/> <字串 編號="22001" 文字="Ha-ha, I have been here for many years. I am retired now, do you want to listen the stories of my life? I know many legends of the ocean!"/> <字串 編號="22002" 文字="Yes that sounds really interesting."/> <字串 編號="22003" 文字="I am sorry, I have something to do."/> <字串 編號="22004" 文字="There are many un-known secrets of the ocean! We like to pass the stories between the sailors! Besides, the [/c$2Golden Island/c*] has taken delight in being talked about by so many people."/> <字串 編號="22005" 文字="Tell me the story of Golden Island."/> <字串 編號="22006" 文字="Give the Leather Map Fragment to the old man."/> <字串 編號="22007" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="22008" 文字="It is said that there is a island full of gold to the northwest part of the Dawn Harbor far away in the ocean. There are also many unknown rare species. And there is a secret way to this island, but the map has become lost."/> <字串 編號="22009" 文字="What is that? Oh, it is [/c$2Golden Island's Chart/c*]. How did you get it? It went missing on the ocean years ago. It is unbelievable that you had it all along."/> <字串 編號="22010" 文字="I was on the ship at that time. Luckily, I survived. But I never saw the map again. Now you are so lucky to have found it. However, there is still the mystery of the [/c$2Golden Island's Sea-route/c*]."/> <字串 編號="22011" 文字="Come to see me if you find any clues! I will do my best to help you."/> <字串 編號="22101" 文字="Welcome! I am the boss of this shop, what can I get you? All of the seafood is on sale right now! Don't tell me that you are a [/c$2Riprap Pirate/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="22102" 文字="Oh? Why?"/> <字串 編號="22103" 文字="I'm not hungry, thank you."/> <字串 編號="22104" 文字="I can't stand those the pirates. They came here the other day and ordered a lot of food but they left without paying for it."/> <字串 編號="22105" 文字="They told me that they are the Riprap Pirates and if I'm not careful they would destroy my shop! It is horrible to be bullied so!"/> <字串 編號="22106" 文字="I can help you with this problem."/> <字串 編號="22107" 文字="Sorry it's none of my business."/> <字串 編號="22108" 文字="Really? You'll help me to beat the pirates in south [/c$2Riprap Coast/c*], thank you! The Pirates are easy to spot, they are all wearing bandanas on their heads. Come back to see me after you have beaten them."/> <字串 編號="22109" 文字="You want take revenge for me? Judging by your appearance, you couldn't even beat my Granny, let alone those fierce and cruel pirates. Come back to see me after you have reached level/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="22110" 文字="The Pirates are to the south Riprap Coast. It is said that their base camp is built inside a cave. If you anyone wearing a bandana, do not hesitate to attack, they are pirates."/> <字串 編號="22111" 文字="The Pirates are easy to tell, because they all wear bandanas on their heads. Come to see me after you have beaten them."/> <字串 編號="22112" 文字="Ah-ah, a guest said that someone was dealing with the Riprap Pirates, it must be you."/> <字串 編號="22113" 文字="We decided to give you an award to honor your courage and kindness, here you are!"/> <字串 編號="22114" 文字="Welcome! Foreign visitors! I'm the boss of this restaurant, if you want any kind of food at all then I am at your service."/> <字串 編號="22115" 文字="Welcome! I'm the boss of this restaurant, we have everything you want. And we have all kinds of sea-food on special offer."/> <字串 編號="22201" 文字="It is such a great joy to go fishing at the port, don't you think so? I love to fight with the fish caught on the end of my hook."/> <字串 編號="22202" 文字="It's very exciting to go fishing here."/> <字串 編號="22203" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="22204" 文字="But at the south Riprap Coast, there is a group of [/c$2Harp Sheep/c*] who are make merry every day. Their noise has scared all of the fish away. And the number of shoals which swim into the harbor is decreasing day by day. Who will drive those sheep away?"/> <字串 編號="22205" 文字="I can drive those sheep away for you."/> <字串 編號="22206" 文字="I have something else to do, bye!"/> <字串 編號="22207" 文字="You can't handle those sheep. I heard there are also flute playing sheep in Sunflower Plain. But in Riprap Coast, they are much larger and much more dangerous. You can come back to try after you have reached level/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="22208" 文字="Sorry to trouble you, can you help me to drive the Harp Sheep at Riprap Coast away? I will give you a wonderful prize."/> <字串 編號="22209" 文字="Can't you find those [/c$2Harp Sheep/c*]? They usually appear around the entrance to Dawn Harbor at Riprap Coast."/> <字串 編號="22210" 文字="I am catching a lot more fish right now and every day the fish crop grows more and more, it must be because you drove the sheep off. "/> <字串 編號="22211" 文字="Thank you for your kindness, please take this prize."/> <字串 編號="22212" 文字="Thank you for getting rid of those noisy Harp Sheep. Now I can enjoy my fishing in peace."/> <字串 編號="22213" 文字="Are you a foreigner? You can see the vast ocean from here. But if sightseeing isn't your thing these used to be good fishing waters but nowadays...The fish crops are growing smaller and smaller..."/> <字串 編號="22301" 文字="I am Fishing Leader of Dawn Harbor, what can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="22302" 文字="Tell me about the Fish Labor Union."/> <字串 編號="22303" 文字="Do you need some help?"/> <字串 編號="22304" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="22305" 文字="Why do you ask me about that, young risk taker? There is a serious shortage of human resource in the harbor. Do you see the chopping boards and surfaces covered in grime? This is because we have no managers or cleaners. Beside the bad appearance, the dirty environment encourages bacteria and ruin the seafood."/> <字串 編號="22306" 文字="We are just about to take part in [/c$2neatening the harbor/c*], Do you want to join us? As long as you can defeat/c$2 20/c* life-forms, we will give you a great prize."/> <字串 編號="22307" 文字="I will."/> <字串 編號="22308" 文字="I am sorry, I have something to do."/> <字串 編號="22309" 文字="I am glad that you are so warmhearted. But you have not yet reached level/c$2 15 /c*,so you can not take on this task."/> <字串 編號="22310" 文字="Good! Come back to see me if you can kill/c$2 20/c* life-forms in the harbor, "/> <字串 編號="22311" 文字="You haven't killed/c$2 20/c* yet, work harder!"/> <字串 編號="22312" 文字="Hum, it seems that you are filled with inexhaustible energy. We feel better with your help."/> <字串 編號="22313" 文字="This is a prize for you, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="22401" 文字="Young risk taker, it seems that you care about the safety of Dawn Harbor, have you ever heard the [/c$2Riprap Pirates/c*]? They are the most dangerous and deadly group of criminals on the ocean."/> <字串 編號="22402" 文字="Who are the Riprap Pirates?"/> <字串 編號="22403" 文字="Sorry, It doesn't interest me at all."/> <字串 編號="22404" 文字="The Riprap Pirates are organized by a group of sailors who willingly commit all manner of crimes. Their leader is called [/c$2Captain Huc/c*], a vindictive and cruel person. Because of his clothes, he is also called [/c$2Green Demon Huc/c*]. Now their ranks are growing in number every day, Dawn Harbor is in grave danger. "/> <字串 編號="22405" 文字="I have applied for the support of the Aurora City Knights many times. But there is never any news from them. My warmhearted young risk taker, can you do me a favor and take my signed letter to Aurora City's [/c$2Deputy Colonel/c*]."/> <字串 編號="22406" 文字="Ok, I will do it."/> <字串 編號="22407" 文字="Sorry, I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="22408" 文字="Please give the letter to the [/c$2Deputy Colonel/c*] of the Aurora City, and hopefully he will give you one to return to me. Please and wait find out."/> <字串 編號="22409" 文字="I am the [/c$2Deputy Colonel/c*] of Auraro Knight Corps, young man, what can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="22410" 文字="Tell me about the Auraro Knight Corps."/> <字串 編號="22411" 文字="Are you the Deputy Colonel?"/> <字串 編號="22412" 文字="Tell me about the Auraro Sword."/> <字串 編號="22413" 文字="Give him the chairman's letter."/> <字串 編號="22414" 文字="Nothing, quit."/> <字串 編號="22415" 文字="[/c$2Auraro Knight Corps/c*] belongs to the Lifeguard Corps of Aurora City's King, they have the responsibility to protect Aurora City. Because of the Evil Pirates Group on the south coast, we are training the new members. But now they are ready and waiting for the order to drive those Pirates away."/> <字串 編號="22416" 文字="The Pre-Knight Colonel [/c$2Douglas/c*] retired due to his age. Now he has devoted himself to gardening. If you go to the Sunflower Plain, you will see his farm. As for his quick departure from the Knight business no one knows for the real reason for sure. But the rumors say that he had a [/c$2quarrel with the Prime Minister in Aurora City/c*]. In fact, even I don't know the reason."/> <字串 編號="22417" 文字="There was the sword of [/c$2the past dynasty Knight Colonels/c*] in Aurora City. It could easily defeat the evil. But since the age of Old Colonel Douglas it has disappeared. No one knows where it is now. "/> <字串 編號="22418" 文字="Letter? Oh, it's the letter from the Fishing Leader at Dawn Harbor. Let me take a look at."/> <字串 編號="22419" 文字="Sorry to bother you young man, but please can you help me to pass on this sad message. Now Auraro Knight Corps can only go to Dawn Harbor when they receive [/c$2order of the King/c*]. I know Fishing Leader had applied for help for many times, but there are no clear directions from the King."/> <字串 編號="22420" 文字="Please go back to tell Fishing Leader to hold on for a few more days. I think the King will make the order soon. I don't think the Riprap Pirates will be making trouble in Aurora City any more."/> <字串 編號="22501" 文字="I am the Fishing Leader in Dawn Harbor, what can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="22502" 文字="Relay the story from the Deputy Colonel."/> <字串 編號="22503" 文字="Tell me about the Fish Labor Union."/> <字串 編號="22504" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="22505" 文字="Alas, Dawn Harbor is no better or worse off than before. The treacherous Captain Huc has been unseen for quite a while now and no one knows where he gone. Now the Vice Captain is doing his job instead."/> <字串 編號="22506" 文字="I have an idea. We should deal with the Vice Captain first. It will certainly rattle them because they lack their leader to guide them. Therefore, we can delay the date of their attack on Dawn Harbor."/> <字串 編號="22507" 文字="But our people can't carry out this plan because should something go wrong the Pirates know of their names. My brave young risk taker, will you do me a favor and carry out this difficult assignment?"/> <字串 編號="22508" 文字="I am not afraid of it."/> <字串 編號="22509" 文字="Sorry, it's too dangerous for me."/> <字串 編號="22510" 文字="Oh great young risk taker! Please let me give you my best respects! The future of the harbor is dependant on you! It is said that the [/c$2Vice Captain/c*] of Pirates has appeared at the western part of the Riprap Coast, defeat them and show them that they can't mess with us."/> <字串 編號="22511" 文字="If you follow the south path of Dawn Harbor, you will reach the Riprap Coast, [/c$2there is a little island to the west of the coast/c*], the Vice Captain has been spotted there."/> <字串 編號="22512" 文字="Oh great young risk taker, before you even came back, the news about your victory over the Vice Captain had spread all over Dawn Harbor. Maybe even Aurora City already knows the news! The Pirates will be in turmoil. You are our hero!"/> <字串 編號="22601" 文字="Thank you, now you can go to find the leader of [/c$2Cherry Village/c*]. He is one of my friends. I have told him to give you the treasure I left there. Please take for your reward."/> <字串 編號="22602" 文字="Have you ever been to Cherry Village? It is located on the east side of Riprap Coast. Just follow the path and you'll find it."/> <字串 編號="22603" 文字="Hey, hey! Young risk taker! I'm the leader of [/c$2Cherry Village/c*]. I heard that you are the hero who beat the Pirates. I'm very honored to meet you."/> <字串 編號="22604" 文字="My friend is the Fishing Leader in Dawn Harbor. He asked me to give you a present. Please take it. These are his treasures, please select one of them."/> <字串 編號="22605" 文字="You are so strong that you can defeat the Vice Captain."/> <字串 編號="22701" 文字="We are the Policemen of Dawn Harbor. We are in charge of the harbor safety. Although the Pirates often make trouble here and we are too shorthanded to do much about it!"/> <字串 編號="22702" 文字="Are you in trouble?"/> <字串 編號="22703" 文字="Hum, I will walk the chalks."/> <字串 編號="22704" 文字="The police are too shorthanded, they desperately need help. Maybe when Knights get here it will be better. But we still need to be on guard. You look like you mean business, do you want to join us?"/> <字串 編號="22705" 文字="Yes, I do."/> <字串 編號="22706" 文字="I am sorry, I have something else to do."/> <字串 編號="22707" 文字="Great! I knew you were just the man for the job. If you can collect/c$2 5/c* Pirate necklaces, we will give you a reward to praise your courage."/> <字串 編號="22708" 文字="Well, it seems that your power isn't strong enough yet to deal with these cruel Pirates. Come back to see me when you have reached level/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="22709" 文字="There are many Pirates wearing bandanas around Riprap Coast. Some of them have necklaces, but not all of them. It must proves their status or achievements."/> <字串 編號="22710" 文字="Oh, you to collected the/c$2 5/c* necklaces so quickly! I think the Pirates will begin to be a little scared of your name!"/> <字串 編號="22711" 文字="To praise your courage and strength, Dawn Harbor's police give you this reward! Please accept it."/> <字串 編號="22712" 文字="We are the Dawn Harbor's policemen, we are in charge of the safety of the harbor. Every one must obey the rules, even if they are not local!"/> <字串 編號="22801" 文字="Hey, young risk taker. Have you seen a man with brown hair and a goatee?"/> <字串 編號="22802" 文字="No, what's wrong?"/> <字串 編號="22803" 文字="Give the necklace to the woman."/> <字串 編號="22804" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="22805" 文字="Well, the man with beard is my husband, his name is [/c$2Noman/c*]. Last week I came to Dawn Harbor with him, on the way to Cherry Village, we were attacked by the Pirates. My husband fought with them in order to protect me."/> <字串 編號="22806" 文字="I escaped from the Pirates, but I haven't see my husband for many days now, I don't know what happened. Ooohhhh! I'm so worried! (Sob! Sob!)"/> <字串 編號="22807" 文字="But how can it be?...This is my husband's necklace!..Is he..."/> <字串 編號="22901" 文字="No! I believe that he still alive! Please find him! He must have been caught by the Pirates, can you go to look for him around the Riprap Coast?"/> <字串 編號="22902" 文字="Ok, don't be sad."/> <字串 編號="22903" 文字="Sorry, I can't."/> <字串 編號="22904" 文字="Thank you so much! His name is Noman, I believe that he is being held captive somewhere at Riprap Coast."/> <字串 編號="22905" 文字="There are some bone fragments here..."/> <字串 編號="22906" 文字="Check it out."/> <字串 編號="22907" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="22908" 文字="There is also a bloody handkerchief lying in the fragments, the bloodstain has turned black so it's not fresh. But...Oh no! There is a name embroidered in yellow letters... [/c$2Noman/c*]."/> <字串 編號="22909" 文字="Did you find my husband? I have asked so many people, but no one knows. (Sob! Sob!)"/> <字串 編號="22910" 文字="Give the woman the handkerchief."/> <字串 編號="22911" 文字="I will keep on looking for him."/> <字串 編號="22912" 文字="Oh that stupid man! Why did he leave me, how can I live without him? Those vile Pirates killed my husband. "/> <字串 編號="22913" 文字="Thank you all the same, even though my husband has died. I still mean thank you for telling me the truth. Here is a gift for you, please accept it!"/> <字串 編號="23001" 文字="Kind young risk taker, can you do me a favor?"/> <字串 編號="23002" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="23003" 文字="Sorry, I have something else to do."/> <字串 編號="23004" 文字="We have a son, he is the [/c$2Newbie/c*] in the headquarters of Aurora Knight Corps. He enlisted when he was 16, he said that he wanted to protect us and the village from danger."/> <字串 編號="23005" 文字="But now his father has died, I must send him this message. But I am too old and distraught, can you give him this letter and the necklace for me? His name is [/c$2Timi/c*]."/> <字串 編號="23006" 文字="I will give the letter to him."/> <字串 編號="23007" 文字="Sorry, I am busy."/> <字串 編號="23008" 文字="Thank you, young risk taker. I am very glad to have met you!"/> <字串 編號="23009" 文字="My son is a novice in the [/c$2headquarters of Aurora Knight Corps/c*], please give him the letter."/> <字串 編號="23010" 文字="Has my son read the letter? Hum, I believe that he will be as brave as his father, I must be strong, and wait for the day that Timi becomes a real Knight."/> <字串 編號="23011" 文字="Hello, I am the Newbie Timi, my dream is to become [/c$2one of the Knights in Aurora Knight Corps/c*] to protect my parents and my city."/> <字串 編號="23012" 文字="Give Timi the letter and the necklace."/> <字串 編號="23013" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="23014" 文字="Aaahhh! My father...The vile Pirates! I will avenge my father!"/> <字串 編號="23015" 文字="My mother hopes that I can be strong and avenge my father when I become a real Knight. I must try hard! I won't let my mother down!"/> <字串 編號="23016" 文字="Thank you for helping us, please accept this gift!"/> <字串 編號="23017" 文字="I am the Newbie Timi, I must try hard to protect my parents!"/> <字串 編號="23018" 文字="I am the Newbie Timi, you're not from around here, are you? What a pity! Only natives can join the Knightage."/> <字串 編號="23101" 文字="Hey young risk taker, I am the Cherry's Leader. I didn't know that there were any tourists here. Since the Pirates appeared in the Riprap Coast, few people come here to visit now."/> <字串 編號="23102" 文字="The Village leader is looking older."/> <字串 編號="23103" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="23104" 文字="Of course it is the Pirates that have aged me like this. They came to our village and took all of our money and valuables away. And now no one will come to visit. I just don't know what to do. How can I be the Village leader?"/> <字串 編號="23105" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="23106" 文字="Sorry it's not my business."/> <字串 編號="23107" 文字="Young risk taker, you can't deal with them now, come to see me after you have reached level/c$2 22 /c*."/> <字串 編號="23108" 文字="Are you sure? These are not your common Pirate, the ones who stole our treasure are their leaders. The Dawn Harbor's Police tell us that the Pirates put the treasure into a [/c$2Chest/c*]."/> <字串 編號="23109" 文字="You will need three keys [/c$2Golden, Silver, Copper/c*] to open the chest, three leaders take turns to keep them safe. But no one knows who has them now. If you can get our treasure back, we will regard you as a hero."/> <字串 編號="23110" 文字="The Golden key, Silver key, Copper key are kept by the [/c$2Pirate Leaders/c*]. The chest is kept by the Pirates on the [/c$2western island/c*] off the Riprap Coast."/> <字串 編號="23111" 文字="Give the pearl to the village leader."/> <字串 編號="23112" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="23113" 文字="You have brought our money and our valuables back! Thank you very much, young man! You have done us a great honor!"/> <字串 編號="23114" 文字="You didn't try to keep any of these valuables, you are a great man! Thank you very much, please choose a gift."/> <字串 編號="23115" 文字="I am the Cherry's Leader, thank you for bringing us back the valuables. Now we are feeling calm and ready to fight back"/> <字串 編號="23116" 文字="This is a locked treasure box."/> <字串 編號="23117" 文字="Use the key."/> <字串 編號="23118" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="23119" 文字="This box is empty! Someone has already emptied it! But who?"/> <字串 編號="23120" 文字="The box has opened inside there is a heavy bag. Open the bag. Inside there are many big and glowing pearls."/> <字串 編號="23121" 文字="I am the Cherry's Leader, all passengers must take care of yourselves, it's very dangerous in the western Riprap Coast. "/> <字串 編號="23122" 文字="The Cherry Villagers will remember your kindness for always, thank you!"/> <字串 編號="23201" 文字="Hello, I am the travelling Scholar, Nilsson, I am studying the nature around the Cherry Village. I know that there is a huge soldier crab called the [/c$2Cherry Crab/c*], its most primary character is the crossed flower pattern on it's shell."/> <字串 編號="23202" 文字="Are you studying the Cherry Crab?"/> <字串 編號="23203" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="23204" 文字="Yes, it is said that their shells have many uses, can you collect some for me? I need/c$2 4/c* shells to do the research."/> <字串 編號="23205" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="23206" 文字="I have something to do, bye."/> <字串 編號="23207" 文字="I am sorry, you can't deal with those huge Soldier Crabs, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 22 /c*."/> <字串 編號="23208" 文字="There are many Cherry Crabs in the coastal area. They will attack you if they think they are being threatened. Come to see me if you collect/c$2 4/c* shells."/> <字串 編號="23209" 文字="You haven't collected enough shells, the Cherry Crabs are distributed all around the coast."/> <字串 編號="23210" 文字="Thank you for collecting so many shells for me, I couldn't do this job by myself."/> <字串 編號="23211" 文字="Thank you for you help. This gift is for you, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="23212" 文字="Hello, I am the travelling Scholar, Nilsson, I am studying the nature around the Cherry Village. It seems that you are not an Aurora City citizen, are you from a foreign country? It's so lucky that I can meet a foreigner here."/> <字串 編號="23301" 文字="Hum, I have finished collecting the shells, now what should I do?"/> <字串 編號="23302" 文字="Do you have any plans?"/> <字串 編號="23303" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="23304" 文字="Kind risker, last week, I was doing research with my friend in Crashing Hillock. He asked me to find out about [/c$2Vanilla/c*], when he knew that I would come to Cherry Village."/> <字串 編號="23305" 文字="But I am too busy doing my own research about shells, I can't go there for him. I don't know how to tell my friend?"/> <字串 編號="23306" 文字="Let me help you!"/> <字串 編號="23307" 文字="I have something to do, I can't help you."/> <字串 編號="23308" 文字="[/c$2Vanilla/c*] is a kind of herb which smells like the cherry blossom, it's hidden under the ground. So it is too difficult to find. However, the [/c$2Spine Turtle/c*] of Cherry Village can find this plant easily, maybe you can find the Vanilla from the Turtles."/> <字串 編號="23309" 文字="Maybe the turtles don't have enough Vanilla, please collect as much as you can, give me/c$2 5/c* Vanilla Residue."/> <字串 編號="23310" 文字="You can find the Vanilla by using the spine turtle, not every turtle has it, but you have the chance."/> <字串 編號="23311" 文字="Let me see, you've collected the Vanilla."/> <字串 編號="23312" 文字="Hum, the Vanilla Residue you found is very exceptional, thank you!"/> <字串 編號="23401" 文字="Kind risker, I am in great trouble, I was ashamed to tell you before, but from your recent behavior, I think you can help me."/> <字串 編號="23402" 文字="Oh? Say it!"/> <字串 編號="23403" 文字="I am sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="23404" 文字="A few days ago, when I passed by an island in the center, I was attacked by a [/c$2Huge Blue Turtle/c*]. Luckily, the Cherry Villagers drove it away. When I came back, I found that my bag had been taken, my precious notebook was in it."/> <字串 編號="23405" 文字="That turtle was very fierce, I think that it must be [/c$2Blue Potec/c*], a rare Monster in Cherry village. It's a kind of Spine Turtle. Can you get the notebook back for me?"/> <字串 編號="23406" 文字="Ok, I will help you."/> <字串 編號="23407" 文字="It's too dangerous, I am sorry."/> <字串 編號="23408" 文字="Great! But [/c$2Blue Potec/c*] is not a common spine turtle, you can ask someone for help, it appeared in the center island."/> <字串 編號="23409" 文字="Go to find Blue Potec in the Center island! Come to see me if you get the [/c$2Notebook/c*] back."/> <字串 編號="23410" 文字="Is this my notebook? It seems that it hasn't been damaged at all, you finished my task and beat the [/c$2Blue Potec/c*], it's really marvelous!"/> <字串 編號="23411" 文字="Great risker, this is the prize for you, please choose the one you like!"/> <字串 編號="23412" 文字="It's so lucky that the notebook wasn't damaged."/> <字串 編號="23501" 文字="I have finished my research on Vanilla whilst you went to find the Potec. Do you want to go to Crashing Hillock?"/> <字串 編號="23502" 文字="Crashing Hillock?"/> <字串 編號="23503" 文字="no."/> <字串 編號="23504" 文字="[/c$2Crashing Hillock/c*] is an upland which is located to the north of Sunflower Plain. Because of the poor soil, the agriculture isn't as developed as Spike Farm. My friend was doing research there to find out why. Can you give the research data to him?"/> <字串 編號="23505" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="23506" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="23507" 文字="Give the data to Scholar Yale in Crashing Hillock, thank you!"/> <字串 編號="23508" 文字="Crashing Hillock is located to the north of Sunflower Plain, please give the data to Scholar Yale."/> <字串 編號="23509" 文字="Long time no see, risker! Are you all right?"/> <字串 編號="23510" 文字="I am Yale, Scholar of the Crashing Hillock. Do you have any problems??"/> <字串 編號="23511" 文字="Give the report to Yale."/> <字串 編號="23512" 文字="Nothing."/> <字串 編號="23513" 文字="Nilsson asked you to give me this data! Thank you very much."/> <字串 編號="23514" 文字="This data can help me to think up a solution for the agriculture in Crashing Hillock. Please take this prize. "/> <字串 編號="23515" 文字="As a geologist, I can find the most suitable crop for this area."/> <字串 編號="23601" 文字="It seems that you don't trust me! Do you know who I am? I am the hero who protected the Cherry Village, people call me the [/c$2Robust Yady/c*]! I am the Militia Chief in Cherry Village."/> <字串 編號="23602" 文字="Militia in Cherry Village?"/> <字串 編號="23603" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="23604" 文字="Have you ever heard of the [/c$2Militia in Cherry Village/c*]? The Riprap Pirates do not dare to attack here because of the prestige of the Militia! Do you want to join us? It's your honor."/> <字串 編號="23605" 文字="I want to join the Militia."/> <字串 編號="23606" 文字="I am not interested in it."/> <字串 編號="23607" 文字="Ha-ha! You are a man of rich experience. Prove your ability or you can't join us. Beat/c$2 20/c* Spine Turtles and then come to see me, those monsters are easy to deal with, don't let me down! The task is very simple."/> <字串 編號="23608" 文字="Do you want to join us? After you reach level/c$2 22 /c*, you can."/> <字串 編號="23609" 文字="The spine turtles are everywhere, come back quickly after beating/c$2 20/c* of them. I am very busy, I can't wait for you for a long time. "/> <字串 編號="23610" 文字="Oh! You come back! You didn't let me down! Ok, you can join us now."/> <字串 編號="23611" 文字="Welcome to the Militia of the Cherry Village!"/> <字串 編號="23612" 文字="It seems that you don't trust me! Do you know who I am? I am the hero who protected Cherry Village, people call me the [/c$2Robust Yady/c*]! I am the Militia Chief in Cherry Village. Do you want to join us? Foreigner aren't allowed to join."/> <字串 編號="23701" 文字=" I am the Militia Chief in Cherry Village. This team only has two members - you and me. So we can't slack off! "/> <字串 編號="23702" 文字="Tell me about the mission."/> <字串 編號="23703" 文字="I have something to do, bye."/> <字串 編號="23704" 文字="I will ask you to clean up the beach! You must get rid of the Cherry Crabs on the beach, it will be good exercise fighting against the Cherry Crabs."/> <字串 編號="23705" 文字="yes."/> <字串 編號="23706" 文字="I am busy."/> <字串 編號="23707" 文字="Come back to see me after you have cleaned up enough Cherry Crabs. They are all over the beach."/> <字串 編號="23708" 文字="Can't you find any Cherry Crab? Do not tell me that you are a Militia Soldier! One more clue, they are on the south beach, go quickly!"/> <字串 編號="23709" 文字="Good! You finished the task, the beach is once again beautiful."/> <字串 編號="23710" 文字="This is the prize for you, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="23801" 文字="In order to show off our prestige, please go to the southwest of the coast, go along to the south and pass the sandy beach, you will see an island, affix this flag to the Pirates' camp! It will make them afraid of us."/> <字串 編號="23802" 文字="Ok, no problem."/> <字串 編號="23803" 文字="I can't do that."/> <字串 編號="23804" 文字="Take the flag, it's our symbol of strength! They are on the [/c$2Southwestern Island/c*], they are easy to find!"/> <字串 編號="23805" 文字="You didn't affix the flag, are you afraid? The island is to the southwest of the village."/> <字串 編號="23806" 文字="Affix the flag on the camp."/> <字串 編號="23807" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="23808" 文字="You finished the task! Good! The pirates must be afraid. I really want to see their scared faces!"/> <字串 編號="23809" 文字="This the prize for you, please take it."/> <字串 編號="23810" 文字="At the camp many pirates are assembled..."/> <字串 編號="23901" 文字="The Riprap Pirates have committed all manner of crimes, if we want to fight against with them, we must have enough equipment. But now we are lack money, my pockets can't afford this spending. So we must get the material from the fields."/> <字串 編號="23902" 文字="Where can I get the materials?"/> <字串 編號="23903" 文字="I am busy."/> <字串 編號="23904" 文字="Do you see the Spine Turtles? Their Shells are the best material for the Armor! Go to collect/c$2 10/c* Turtle Shells."/> <字串 編號="23905" 文字="I need/c$2 10/c* Turtle Shells, you don't have enough, the Spine Turtle is unequalled for it's shell."/> <字串 編號="23906" 文字="You brought the turtle shells back! Good! After processing we can wear the Turtle Suit."/> <字串 編號="23907" 文字="This the prize for you, please take it."/> <字串 編號="24001" 文字="I am the Guard Captain, you must obey the rules of the Aurora City. If you violate the laws, I won't forgive you."/> <字串 編號="24002" 文字="Of course, the area around Aurora City is our precinct. You must deal with all of the Monsters, Beasts and Prisoners there at once. "/> <字串 編號="24003" 文字="How can I help?"/> <字串 編號="24004" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="24005" 文字="We got a message that somebody found the trail of the [/c$2Jackstraw Mige/c*] in Spike Farm, if you can defeat them, Aurora Guard will give you a great prize."/> <字串 編號="24006" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="24007" 文字="It's too dangerous.
