He will tell you all he knows."/> <字串 編號="25701" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, it isn't the right time to talk to me."/> <字串 編號="25702" 文字="Little Angel, I am a Spy Angel, I'm in charge of finding out about the [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*]. Angel Spy Office needs your help."/> <字串 編號="25703" 文字="What's the information?"/> <字串 編號="25704" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="25705" 文字="The Evil Lyceum will choose suitable evil souls to go to hell, they have sent their [/c$2Student Union Leader/c*] to Eden. Now he is choosing the souls as we speak, your task is to stop him."/> <字串 編號="25706" 文字="This task is very dangerous, although you get the permission of the Aurora Angel, in order to avoiding the failure I must check your ability again."/> <字串 編號="25707" 文字="Ok, no problem."/> <字串 編號="25708" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="25709" 文字="Please defeat the [/c$2Grey Mice/c*] in the Dawn Harbor! Finish this task as quickly as you can!"/> <字串 編號="25710" 文字="Come to see me if you defeat most of the Grey Mice."/> <字串 編號="25711" 文字="Good! Little Angel, you certainly have ability. It's so uncommon that the Angel Lyceum brings up a person with such skills."/> <字串 編號="25712" 文字="Take a break! I will give the task to you."/> <字串 編號="25801" 文字="The Evil Lyceum's Student Union Leader is called [/c$2Asmode/c*], he is their most outstanding student. He is a fierce and has no conscience. He came to Eden to recruit students by the commission of [/c$2Satan/c*], we must stop him."/> <字串 編號="25802" 文字="A head-on collision is bad for our spy work, so we have a battle plan. At first, you must gain [/c$2Asmode's trust/c*]. Are you ready?"/> <字串 編號="25803" 文字="I am ready."/> <字串 編號="25804" 文字="not yet."/> <字串 編號="25805" 文字="Asmode's target are the members of the Riprap Pirate, you can gain his trust if you pretend to be a Riprap Pirate. Try to get the [/c$2Secret Badge/c*] from the Piratekin!"/> <字串 編號="25806" 文字="Come to find me after you get the [/c$2Secret Badge/c*] from the Piratekin! Those Piratekin have been spotted around the Riprap Coast."/> <字串 編號="25807" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, you are very good, you can gain Asmode's trust after getting the [/c$2Secret Badge/c*]. "/> <字串 編號="25808" 文字="Then, I will tell you where is Asmode."/> <字串 編號="25901" 文字="The Evil Lyceum leader [/c$2Asmode/c*] pretends to be a fisherman on the Riprap Coast, he looks the right person to be selected for the Evil Lyceum every day."/> <字串 編號="25902" 文字="Take the [/c$2Secret Badge/c*] and go to find Asmode! You can catch his attention."/> <字串 編號="25903" 文字="Go away, kid! Don't disturb me when I am fishing, or I will hit you!"/> <字串 編號="25904" 文字="Little pretty girl, what's your name? Do you want to go fishing with me? Ha-ha, we could do something else after fishing."/> <字串 編號="25905" 文字="Give the Secret Badge to Asmode."/> <字串 編號="25906" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="25907" 文字="Oh, you are one of the Piratekins! The badge shows your status."/> <字串 編號="25908" 文字="Did you get the information from your leader? I am preparing to build a pirate branch, I need a person with abilities just like yours!"/> <字串 編號="25909" 文字="Please prevent Asmode's plan."/> <字串 編號="26001" 文字="Welcome to join my team. Why do you look different to the other pirates? Are you the underling of Michael?"/> <字串 編號="26002" 文字="Mi, Michael? I didn't get you..."/> <字串 編號="26003" 文字="I must go first."/> <字串 編號="26004" 文字="Oh, nothing, Michael is the most handsome boy I have ever seen. I yearn day and night for his friendship, but he dislikes me. Ah, he doesn't like me at all."/> <字串 編號="26005" 文字="I am worried about you, because you don't look like a pirate. In order to prove you are a real pirate, go to the [/c$2Cherry Village/c*] on the eastern Riprap Coast and steal some treasure!"/> <字串 編號="26006" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="26007" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="26008" 文字="When you get enough money and valuables from the civilians in Cherry Village, come back to find me."/> <字串 編號="26009" 文字="It seems that you met unexpected difficulties! Asmode is not an easy one to fool. He is careful to get the credit from the Evil Lyceum's Director Wolay [/c$2Satan/c*]."/> <字串 編號="26010" 文字="Go to find the Cherry's Leader! Tell him if he wants to get rid of Riprap Pirates then he has to help us."/> <字串 編號="26011" 文字="Foreign risker, I am the Cherry's Leader. I am so surprised to see a foreigner in this village. Since the Riprap Pirates appeared in the Riprap Coast, no one wants to come here anymore. "/> <字串 編號="26012" 文字="You want to stop the Riprap Pirates."/> <字串 編號="26013" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="26014" 文字="Young man, I'm not quite clear with you, the Riprap Pirate becoming evil? [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*]? It seems a bit complicated..."/> <字串 編號="26015" 文字="It's all right. You did a great favor for our village, you found my jewelry, now you can borrow it to finish your job."/> <字串 編號="26016" 文字="Give the village leader's pearl to Asmode."/> <字串 編號="26017" 文字="You're so ruthless, you stole such a large pearl, Cherry Village must in trouble now."/> <字串 編號="26018" 文字="You are really bad! But I like it."/> <字串 編號="26019" 文字="Stop Asmode's plan, please."/> <字串 編號="26101" 文字="Very good, I completely believe that you are the elite of the Riprap Pirates, Please take this magic stone."/> <字串 編號="26102" 文字="Now you go to [/c$2Cherry Village/c*],there is a [/c$2Monkey Statue Holding An Egg/c*] in the island on the southwest of village, remember to use the magic stone there. My friends will wait there to hold a great welcoming ceremony for you!"/> <字串 編號="26103" 文字="Go ahead! I'll stay here to enjoy fishing!"/> <字串 編號="26104" 文字="There is a incantation written on the egg, I don't know the purpose, I feel weak when I put my hand close to the eggshell."/> <字串 編號="26105" 文字="Put the magic stone close to the egg."/> <字串 編號="26106" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="26107" 文字="The Magic Stone gives off a purple light and shakes violently in your hand, you have to hold it tightly. "/> <字串 編號="26108" 文字="At the same moment, you are surrounded by a purple light!! It is too bright to open your eyes."/> <字串 編號="26109" 文字="When you open your eyes, you find yourself trapped in a dark cave. [/c$2Asmode/c*] is standing in front of you."/> <字串 編號="26201" 文字="Haw-haw. I am the genius evil from the Hell Lyceum--[/c$2Student Leader Asmode/c*]!Do you see it? These are my underlings. You have the honor to be one of them."/> <字串 編號="26202" 文字="Here is my Magic Formation! Contribute your soul. And I will bring you to hell."/> <字串 編號="26203" 文字="What! I have actually been defeated by mere humans!"/> <字串 編號="26204" 文字="!! (Asmode seems to understand something...)"/> <字串 編號="26205" 文字="There is only one person who has this power."/> <字串 編號="26206" 文字="Before Asmode can finish his words, he disappears in black smoke into the air."/> <字串 編號="26207" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, the news about you beating Asmode has been spread all over."/> <字串 編號="26208" 文字="You have done a great job for the Angel Lyceum! The Lyceum leader, Michael, is very happy because you have destroyed the Evil College's recruitment plan."/> <字串 編號="26209" 文字="Pick one present which the Lyceum leader, Michael, has arranged for you! They are all precious [/c$2Heaven Weapon/c*]."/> <字串 編號="26210" 文字="You can go back to find the [/c$2Aurora Angel/c*] now. Thank you for your help. Angel Spy Office will record your contribution."/> <字串 編號="26211" 文字="I am the Spy Angel. I will collect all the information about the Evil Lyceum for the Heaven."/> <字串 編號="26212" 文字=".............................."/> <字串 編號="30001" 文字="Hello, /c$2%1/c*! We welcome you as the Guard Angel of Dark City, I am the Angel here and I have come to help you to reach the highest level of Guard Angel."/> <字串 編號="30002" 文字="I have come here to report."/> <字串 編號="30003" 文字="Tell me about the mission of the Guard Angel."/> <字串 編號="30004" 文字="what is the Angel Contribution?"/> <字串 編號="30005" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30006" 文字="You came here in time, Good!"/> <字串 編號="30007" 文字="I'm your first guide in Eden. I'll give you more instruction in appropriate situations..."/> <字串 編號="30008" 文字="There are many people who need help in the Dark City, but your ability is limited. Begin your adventure by first collecting some information here."/> <字串 編號="30009" 文字="There are two knowledgeable Dark City residents in this house. They are [/c$2Merchant Glanze/c*] and [/c$2Risker Zalfer/c*]. Glanze knows all about the products distribution and store goods in Dark City. As well as he knows the back of his hand. You can ask him any questions about them."/> <字串 編號="30010" 文字="Zalfer is an excellent adventurer. He knows all about the geographical conditions and the characters of Ogres in Dark City. He also knows about battle and magic information as well. You can ask him many questions about them."/> <字串 編號="30011" 文字="As a Guard Angel in Dark City, you must try your best to help lead the people here away from suffering, help them to solve their problems. And help to bring happiness to every nook and cranny of this land. That is the job of a Guard Angel."/> <字串 編號="30012" 文字="But, now people do not believe in the existence of Angels anymore. So you have to come to them in the form of a human! The road before you reach your goal is a long and perilous one! Please fight!"/> <字串 編號="30013" 文字="[/c$2Angel Contribution/c*] is the score to compare for Angel. Every country--- Aurora City, Dark City, Breeze Woods and Iron Castle-- have their own [/c$2Angel Contribution/c*]. We will decide how much Angel Contribution they can get according to their contribution."/> <字串 編號="30014" 文字="Now, you can help the citizens in Dark City to solve their problems, complete the assignments that they give to get Angel Contribution, and in the future you can join the Guard Angel's competition to accumulate more Angel Contribution. When the Angel Contribution reach to a certain amount, [/c$2Rank/c*] will increase too!"/> <字串 編號="30015" 文字="When your total [/c$2Angel Contribution/c*] reaches a certain amount, you can come to me to take on a Heaven assignment. After finishing these assignments, you will be promoted to a higher level of Guard Angel, and at the same time you will get the presents and blessing for Heaven. "/> <字串 編號="30016"/> <字串 編號="30017" 文字="Talk to them now. If you accumulate more experience and upgrade your character level to/c$2 20/c* and your Angel level to/c$2 2 /c*, you can come to see me and take the first mission for Dark City as a Guard Angel."/> <字串 編號="30018" 文字="Go back to the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="30019" 文字="I will send you back to the Angel Lyceum. If you want to come back here, go to find [/c$2Director Wolay/c*]."/> <字串 編號="30020" 文字="You are strong enough, so you didn't need to come back to the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="30100" 文字="Hello, I am the Sickle Soldier, I'm in charge of the order of Shadowy Path to make the [/c$2Continuation Project/c*] in Dark City able to move on wheels. But the thing didn't work as I thought it would."/> <字串 編號="30101" 文字="How can I help?"/> <字串 編號="30102" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30103" 文字="The thing is that..."/> <字串 編號="30104" 文字="There is a group of Evil Cats hidden around the Shadowy Path, they sometimes attack our equipment, some workers have been injured by them as well and so the project must be stopped."/> <字串 編號="30105" 文字="If someone can help me to deal with the Evil Cats, then the project can go on, and I don't need to go the rounds with the other soldiers."/> <字串 編號="30106" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="30107" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30108" 文字="Ah, look carefully, you can't deal with those Evil Cats now, come to help me after you reach level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="30109" 文字="Ok, the task is trusted to you. Those Evil Cats have been appearing in the southeast area, come to see me if you can beat/c$2 20/c* Evil Cats."/> <字串 編號="30110" 文字="Do you know where the Evil Cats are? They have been appearing in the southeast area."/> <字串 編號="30111" 文字="Well done! I don't need to worry about the safety of the building site anymore. Thank you very much!"/> <字串 編號="30112" 文字="Please take my gift!"/> <字串 編號="30113" 文字="I am the Sickle Soldier, go northwards and you will reach the [/c$2Dark City/c*]."/> <字串 編號="30114" 文字="Hello, I am the Sickle Soldier, I'm in charge of the order of Shadowy Path to make the [/c$2Continuation Project/c*] in Dark City able to move on wheels. But the thing didn't work as I thought it would."/> <字串 編號="30200" 文字="A group of Skeletons are making trouble everywhere, they won't accept the management of the [/c$2Central Officials/c*] in Dark City. Many workers have been hurt by their Snipers and the materials have been stolen, it's really bothersome."/> <字串 編號="30201" 文字="If someone can help me to deal with the [/c$2Skeletal Snipers/c*], the project can go on, and I don't need to go the rounds with the other soldiers."/> <字串 編號="30202" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="30203" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30204" 文字="Are you sure? I am afraid that you will be hurt by their arrows, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="30205" 文字="You are so warmhearted! Go to the western building site and beat/c$2 20/c* Skeletal Snipers."/> <字串 編號="30206" 文字="Go to the western building site, the Skeletons who use bows and arrows are your target, come to see me after you beat/c$2 20/c* Skeletal Snipers."/> <字串 編號="30207" 文字="Well done! The Sickle corps needs a person with abilities like yours! Those Skeletal Snipers can no longer make trouble now."/> <字串 編號="30208" 文字="Thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="30301" 文字="I am the Foreman of Shadowy Path, I am in charge of the project affairs. It's time that I must do the briefing, how I hate briefings."/> <字串 編號="30302" 文字="Tell me about the Shadowy Path."/> <字串 編號="30303" 文字="Do you need some help?"/> <字串 編號="30304" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30305" 文字="The Shadowy Path is part of the continuation of the Dark City's scheduled progress. But those Skeletons will deliberately set out to destroy our project. In their eyes, we are the villains who destroyed this area."/> <字串 編號="30306" 文字="They think that the Dark City is blessed by the gods from the [/c$2Bottomless Pit/c*], they don't like us to make extensive buildings! We just want to improve the living conditions of Dark City. Why can't they understand?"/> <字串 編號="30307" 文字="If you will, can you get the [/c$2Project Schedule/c*] from each construction place for me? I need to know the plans for the Shadowy Path."/> <字串 編號="30308" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="30309" 文字="Sorry, I don't want."/> <字串 編號="30310" 文字="There are construction point in the south and north, you can get the schedule from the engineers there."/> <字串 編號="30311" 文字="You have come back so quickly! Let me see."/> <字串 編號="30312" 文字="Hum, it seems that the planning of the No.1 hole in the south is a bit slow. I must go to the locale."/> <字串 編號="30313" 文字="Anyway, thank you for helping me!"/> <字串 編號="30314" 文字="I am the Foreman of Shadowy Path, I am in charge of the project affairs. What can I do for you? Young man."/> <字串 編號="30315" 文字="I am the Foreman of Shadowy Path, foreign visitor, go to the Dark City quickly! Here is too dangerous."/> <字串 編號="30316" 文字="I am the engineer here, everyday I am in fear of the Skeletons' attack and the plan of the project, I am under great pressure."/> <字串 編號="30317" 文字="I have come here for the Project Schedule."/> <字串 編號="30318" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30319" 文字="Oh? Did our foreman ask you here? He must be afraid of the Skeletons' attack, he is such a coward! Hum!"/> <字串 編號="30320" 文字="Oh? Did our foreman ask you here? It's good that he didn't ask me to go there. "/> <字串 編號="30321" 文字="Oh? Did our foreman ask you here? I know that he won't come here to take the schedule by himself."/> <字串 編號="30322" 文字="Take them! And take care of those skeletons on the way."/> <字串 編號="30323"/> <字串 編號="30401" 文字="What can I do? If the engineer knows about this he won't forgive me. What can I do? "/> <字串 編號="30402" 文字="You look worried? What's wrong?"/> <字串 編號="30403" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30404" 文字="I'll tell on the sneak, but alas, I don't know whether I can tell you! But I really don't know what to do! You mustn't tell others."/> <字串 編號="30405" 文字="Our Dynamite is missing! I am suspicious of the [/c$2Red-cloth Skull/c*]. Can you find it for me?"/> <字串 編號="30406" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="30407" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="30408" 文字="The Red-cloth Skull's camp is in the southwest, they make trouble in the Shadowy Path with the Skeletal Snipers and Skeletal Rogues, it's really a big problem!"/> <字串 編號="30409" 文字="Please find the [/c$2Dynamite/c*] for me, it must have been taken by one of the Red-cloth Skulls, I have to work now."/> <字串 編號="30410" 文字="Can't you find the Red-cloth Skulls? They are in the southwest."/> <字串 編號="30411" 文字="Alas, I am muddleheaded! You can't deal with those Red-cloth Skulls until you reach level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="30412" 文字="Great! This is my lost [/c$2Dynamite/c*]! It was stolen by the Red-cloth Skulls."/> <字串 編號="30413" 文字="Thank you for your help. If my boss found out, I would lose my job! You are my benefactor, please take my prize."/> <字串 編號="30414" 文字="After this lesson, I must take better care of this dynamite."/> <字串 編號="30415" 文字="are you the foreign visitor? Alas, I can't tell you the secret, I must find out that thing."/> <字串 編號="30501" 文字="I am the Mystique Trader in Dark City, I buy every kind of Incantation, offering and medicinal materials. Do you know the hottest ceremony in the city? "/> <字串 編號="30502" 文字="I don't know."/> <字串 編號="30503" 文字="I am not interested in it."/> <字串 編號="30504" 文字="It is the [/c$2Cat Tail Magic/c*], his magic can make the liar grow a Cat's tail. Is it funny? Wives always use it to question their husbands! Ha-ha."/> <字串 編號="30505" 文字="Everyone plays at this magic ceremonial, but because of this, we are lack the materials, can you collect some more for me?"/> <字串 編號="30506" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="30507" 文字="Sorry. I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="30508" 文字="Come back to help me after you reach level/c$2 6 /c*, I will give you the prize."/> <字串 編號="30509" 文字="I need/c$2 10/c* Evil Cat's Tails, you can get this material from the Evil Cats."/> <字串 編號="30510" 文字="You don't have enough Evil Cat's Tails, I need/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="30511" 文字="This is your prize, thank you for collecting the Evil Cat's Tails for me."/> <字串 編號="30512" 文字="This is your prize, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="30513" 文字="Why [/c$2Cat Tail Magic/c*] is so popular? Especially with wives."/> <字串 編號="30514" 文字="Foreign visitor, be careful of [/c$2Cat Tail Magic/c*] when you enter the Dark City, it's most popular now."/> <字串 編號="30601" 文字="I am the principal of the Shadowy Path project, the whole project is funded by the [/c$2Railway Company/c*] group, if the project can be completed, you can get the prize from the [/c$2Central Official/c*] of Dark City. But things don't always go to plan..."/> <字串 編號="30602" 文字="Tell me about the railway company."/> <字串 編號="30603" 文字="Has the plan changed?"/> <字串 編號="30604" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30605" 文字="I am the boss of the [/c$2Railway Company/c*], my dream is to build subways to everywhere in the world. Now I am on commission from the Dark City. I am planning the extension project, and I want to design a railway for this project, too."/> <字串 編號="30606" 文字="Have you ever heard of the Red-cloth Skull? In order to show their loyalty to the Bottomless Pit God, they often break our railway."/> <字串 編號="30607" 文字="No one knows what's in the Bottomless Pit, they make trouble because of a uncertain legend, does belief make a person crazy?"/> <字串 編號="30608" 文字="I will help you."/> <字串 編號="30609" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30610" 文字="Risker, I admire you, but I can't let you try this before you reach level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="30611" 文字="Good! Please drive the Red-cloth Skull away, they are in the southwest of the project camp, come to see me if you finish the task."/> <字串 編號="30612" 文字="You haven't driven the Red-cloth Skull away, they are in the southwest of the project camp, come on!"/> <字串 編號="30613" 文字="You drove most of the Red-cloth Skulls away, great!"/> <字串 編號="30614" 文字="Thank you for your contribution to our [/c$2Railway Company/c*], this little gift is for you, please take it."/> <字串 編號="30615" 文字="Foreign visitor, I am in charge of the [/c$2Railway Company/c*], if you are interested in this project, you can come to find me."/> <字串 編號="30701" 文字="Warmhearted risker, can you do me a favor? I don't want to beat up other people, maybe you can solve this problem for me."/> <字串 編號="30702" 文字="Oh? What's the problem."/> <字串 編號="30703" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="30704" 文字="Whilst I patrolled the building site, I was attack by an Evil Cat. After that, I found my [/c$2Safe's Key/c*] were missing."/> <字串 編號="30705" 文字="There are some important documents in the safe, they are for the [/c$2Central Officials/c*], can you find them for me? "/> <字串 編號="30706" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="30707" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="30708" 文字="I believe that the key must be taken by an Evil Cat, can you find them for me? "/> <字串 編號="30709" 文字="The Evil Cats have been appearing in the eastern Shadowy Path, come to find me if you get the [/c$2Safe's Key/c*]."/> <字串 編號="30710" 文字="It's my missing key, thank you very much! I must tie the key to a necklace next time."/> <字串 編號="30711" 文字="Those vile Evil Cat, I really want to defeat all of them. By the way, this prize is for you."/> <字串 編號="30801" 文字="The workers have been inefficient recently, I pay them and they are infatuated. It must relate to the bell."/> <字串 編號="30802" 文字="What bell?"/> <字串 編號="30803" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30804" 文字="A bell which can make people become stupefied. On hearing it they become absentminded. This bell is worn by the Evil Cat leader."/> <字串 編號="30805" 文字="The Evil Cat leader is called [/c$2Cinluo/c*], it means dark night. You can solve this problem if you beat it."/> <字串 編號="30806" 文字="I will deal with it."/> <字串 編號="30807" 文字="I have no idea, I quit."/> <字串 編號="30808" 文字="The [/c$2Giant Cat Cinluo/c*] is hiding in the depths of the project camp, it's very strong, you can ask someone to help you."/> <字串 編號="30809" 文字="Come to see me if you get the Giant Cat, Cinluo's bell."/> <字串 編號="30810" 文字="You didn't get the Giant Cat, Cinluo's bell, go on!"/> <字串 編號="30811" 文字="I see the bell, You really beat the [/c$2Giant Cat Cinluo/c*]! You can join the Sickle corps."/> <字串 編號="30812" 文字="My workers can work intently again, thank you very much! Please choose a gift as you like!"/> <字串 編號="30813" 文字="I hope the project can go on."/> <字串 編號="30901" 文字="Sorry, you have done me a great favor, but can you accept my last request?"/> <字串 編號="30902" 文字="What is it?"/> <字串 編號="30903" 文字="I am busy, I quit."/> <字串 編號="30904" 文字="The project can go on now, but we are short of materials, can you go to the [/c$2Fungus Forest South/c*] and give the supplementary order to a Businessman called [/c$2Pierce/c*]."/> <字串 編號="30905" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="30906" 文字="No, I quit."/> <字串 編號="30907" 文字="Thank you, risker! Go along to the eastern Shadowy Path, and you will reach the Mushroom Forest."/> <字串 編號="30908" 文字="Can't you find the Mushroom Forest entrance? Go along east and you will find it! Remember to give the supplementary order to a Businessman called [/c$2Pierce/c*]."/> <字串 編號="30909" 文字="I am in charge of the Shadowy Path project, I hope the outstanding achievements of the [/c$2railway company/c*] will flourish, but I must finish the project now."/> <字串 編號="30910" 文字="What do you want to buy? My name is [/c$2Pierce/c*], I am the Mushroom Forest's Businessman, but the business here is not so good recently."/> <字串 編號="30911" 文字="Give him the order of railway company."/> <字串 編號="30912" 文字="Do you have any problems??"/> <字串 編號="30913" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="30914" 文字="Hum, it's the [/c$2railway company/c*]'s supplementary order. No problem, I was worried about their project's schedule!"/> <字串 編號="30915" 文字="The business here is not as good as before, but now I have the order form, it really makes me happy!"/> <字串 編號="30916" 文字="Thank you for coming here, risker."/> <字串 編號="31001" 文字="What do you want to buy? My name is [/c$2Pierce/c*], I am the Mushroom Forest's Businessman, but the business here is not as good as before."/> <字串 編號="31002" 文字="Give the railway company's supplementary order to him."/> <字串 編號="31003" 文字="Do you have any problems?"/> <字串 編號="31004" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31005" 文字="Do you see that group of kids who pull the Small Wood Carts? They are very cute but naughty. They like to make trouble here, I hope they can be quiet."/> <字串 編號="31006" 文字="I can make them keep quiet."/> <字串 編號="31007" 文字="It's none of my business."/> <字串 編號="31008" 文字="Are you sure? I hope you won't feel bored. Come to see me after you reach level/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="31009" 文字="Oh? I really want to know how to make them quiet. Anyway, if you can help me do this I will give you the prize."/> <字串 編號="31010" 文字="The [/c$2Imps/c*] are playing near the entrance of the Shadowy Path, I am afraid that they will make trouble here."/> <字串 編號="31011" 文字="Thank you for your help, the Imps don't make trouble here these days!"/> <字串 編號="31012" 文字="I promise to give a gift to you."/> <字串 編號="31013" 文字="Foreign visitor, where are you from, the Foggy Forest in the south or the Gebuer Vale in the north? Are you from the Iron Castle or the Aurora City?"/> <字串 編號="31101" 文字="I feel sleepy. Who can help me? This insomnia is really troubling me."/> <字串 編號="31102" 文字="Do you feel sleepy?"/> <字串 編號="31103" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31104" 文字="Can you hear the [/c$2Crybaby/c*]? Most of them cry everyday, it really troubles me. It makes me so sleepless!"/> <字串 編號="31105" 文字="I will drive the Crybabies away."/> <字串 編號="31106" 文字="Take care of yourself."/> <字串 編號="31107" 文字="Do you want to drive the Crybabies away? You are too weak to do this, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="31108" 文字="Great! Drive them away for me, I really need to have a rest."/> <字串 編號="31109" 文字="The Crybabies are gathering at the entrance of the Foggy Forest, I suggest that you go there with earplugs."/> <字串 編號="31110" 文字="The sound of the Crybabies is barely be heard now! Great! I can sleep well tonight."/> <字串 編號="31111" 文字="I will finally get rid of the bags under my eyes!"/> <字串 編號="31112" 文字="Only an insomniac knows how terrible it is to stay up all night, every night. I'm really happy that I can get to sleep now."/> <字串 編號="31113" 文字="I feel so sleepy. Who can help me? This insomnia really troubles me."/> <字串 編號="31201" 文字="I am the Spell Talisman Teacher of the Dark City. I am studying the new magic, I travel all around the world in order to get the materials."/> <字串 編號="31202" 文字="Do you have any new discoveries?"/> <字串 編號="31203" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31204" 文字="I am studying the [/c$2Dew and Fog/c*], it can make magic more liable to succeed. But it's hard to collect the [/c$2Dew and Fog/c*]."/> <字串 編號="31205" 文字="Maybe I can help you?"/> <字串 編號="31206" 文字="Go on!"/> <字串 編號="31207" 文字="I am sorry, you can't help me just now, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="31208" 文字="The Ghosts that floats in the north are called [/c$2Paopao/c*], they have the ability to get [/c$2Dew and Fog/c*] from the fungus, maybe you can get it from them, please get/c$2 10/c* Dew and Fog for me!"/> <字串 編號="31209" 文字="You didn't get/c$2 10/c* Dew and Fog, you have get it from Paopao."/> <字串 編號="31210" 文字="Wow!/c$2 10/c* Dew and Fog! Thank you, risker! I can continue my research now."/> <字串 編號="31211" 文字="This is your prize, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="31212" 文字="Foreign visitor, have you ever heard of the [/c$2Dew and Fog/c*]? It's the special local product of the Fungus Forest South!"/> <字串 編號="31301" 文字="I am the Kindergarten Teacher in Dark City, I am Miss Diana, why am I here? I don't want to stay here."/> <字串 編號="31302" 文字="It sounds like you are very angry."/> <字串 編號="31303" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31304" 文字="I want to recruit students here, but the [/c$2Naughty Imps/c*] occupy all of the places where I go and play with my teaching materials. I can't stand it!"/> <字串 編號="31305" 文字="All of my painstaking efforts will go to waste if you can't drive them away!"/> <字串 編號="31306" 文字="I will help you."/> <字串 編號="31307" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31308" 文字="You want to help me? You can't deal with them now, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="31309" 文字="To drive those Naughty Imps away, you must use the [direct] way. Sorry to trouble you."/> <字串 編號="31310" 文字="Drive/c$2 20/c* Naughty Imps away in the flinty way, I hope they will be tactful. "/> <字串 編號="31311" 文字="Thank you for you help. Now to be a good teacher is not so easy as before. If you deal problems in the wrong way, the students will complain about you to their parents. Who will then argue with you, maybe even get you fired."/> <字串 編號="31312" 文字="This is your prize, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="31313" 文字="I am the Kindergarten Teacher in Dark City, I am Miss Diana, I always think that if I can train those [/c$2Naughty Imps/c*], they will be more intelligent."/> <字串 編號="31401" 文字="Do you know who I am? I am the Trainer of the Dark City, It took me 10 long years to find my [/c$2Calmness/c*] goal."/> <字串 編號="31402" 文字="Calmness?"/> <字串 編號="31403" 文字="Have you ever heard of the choke point?"/> <字串 編號="31404" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31405" 文字="To be at peace with yourself is a kind of religiousness of the emotions and the heart. If you can control your emotions, you will succeed; if you can't do this, you will be a second-rater. So I decided to rethink my goals to achieve this."/> <字串 編號="31406" 文字="There are some crying Crybabies all around here these days, they make me crazy. I don't know how can they cry day and night?"/> <字串 編號="31407" 文字="Their strenuous concentration at it makes me curious."/> <字串 編號="31408" 文字="I will find out the reason from them."/> <字串 編號="31409" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31410" 文字="Come to see me after you reach level/c$2 10 /c*, but thank you all the same."/> <字串 編號="31411" 文字="Really? Please find out the reason why they can concentrate so hard. I have heard that the Crybaby has the [/c$2Three Calmness Knacks/c*], if you get it, come to find me."/> <字串 編號="31412" 文字="Have you found the knack? I believe you can do it."/> <字串 編號="31413" 文字="Give the scrap of paper to him."/> <字串 編號="31414" 文字="This is a broken spitball, the words on it are blurry, I can't tell what is it about."/> <字串 編號="31415" 文字="But it proves that the Crybabies have a method."/> <字串 編號="31416" 文字="Do you know who I am? I am the Trainer of the Dark City, It took me 10 long years to find my [/c$2Calmness/c*] goal."/> <字串 編號="31501" 文字="The trick you have brought me is broken, I believe they must have the whole thing."/> <字串 編號="31502" 文字="I am interested in the knack."/> <字串 編號="31503" 文字="I am not interested in it."/> <字串 編號="31504" 文字="I believe you can get the evidence from the Crybabies, go on!"/> <字串 編號="31505" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="31506" 文字="I am busy."/> <字串 編號="31507" 文字="It isn't difficult to get those books from the Crybabies, I guess they must have three chapters."/> <字串 編號="31508" 文字="Give the three chapters to him."/> <字串 編號="31509" 文字="Good! They have the whole book, how can they reach the Calmness goal?"/> <字串 編號="31510" 文字="Oh my, how unexpected!"/> <字串 編號="31601" 文字="I must read these books carefully."/> <字串 編號="31602" 文字="..............."/> <字串 編號="31603" 文字="What do you get from the books?"/> <字串 編號="31604" 文字="I have something else to do, I must go first."/> <字串 編號="31605" 文字="What's the matter?"/> <字串 編號="31606" 文字="Ignore other people's opinions, do one's duty...even the kids know these things! Will I reach my goal if I do like this!"/> <字串 編號="31607" 文字="Do you have any problems?"/> <字串 編號="31608" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31609" 文字="You used this waste paper and these three books to play a joke on me! I don't believe that I can improve on my efforts this way."/> <字串 編號="31610" 文字="It's really offensive! I can't abide a person who plays jokes on me! I will teach you a lesson!"/> <字串 編號="31611" 文字="Dark Evil, please appear! Punish this insincere person!"/> <字串 編號="31612" 文字="You must pay for this with your life!"/> <字串 編號="31613" 文字="What! The evil is defeated so easily?"/> <字串 編號="31614" 文字="Philosophy always exists in the simple truth. It's my fault, I am still an impulsive person."/> <字串 編號="31615" 文字="I must begin my journey again, although I wasted 10 years, thank you for helping me."/> <字串 編號="31616" 文字="I will give you a prize in order to show my regret."/> <字串 編號="31617" 文字="Please don't mind."/> <字串 編號="31701" 文字="I hope the unpleasantness can quickly pass. I hope you can forgive me."/> <字串 編號="31702" 文字="I forgive you."/> <字串 編號="31703" 文字="I don't want to forgive you."/> <字串 編號="31704" 文字="Thank you for your magnanimity, I have another request, please give this letter to the Scientist in the Bottomless Pit, who is called [/c$2Essam/c*]."/> <字串 編號="31705" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="31706" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31707" 文字="[/c$2Scientist Essam/c*] is my father, I told him that I would go out to cultivate myself according to a religious doctrine, but I have failed. I hope he can understand me after reading this letter."/> <字串 編號="31708" 文字="The Bottomless Pit is in the west of the Shadowy Path, go along west and you will reach the Bottomless Pit."/> <字串 編號="31709" 文字="Do you know who I am? I am the Trainer of the Dark City, I have failed many times, but I still persevere."/> <字串 編號="31710" 文字="Hello, here is the Energy Research Center in the Bottomless Pit. I am the Chief here, my name is Essam."/> <字串 編號="31711" 文字="Give the letter to Essam."/> <字串 編號="31712" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31713" 文字="This letter is written by my pigheaded son! As a father, I must still cherish him silently."/> <字串 編號="31714" 文字="Thank you for helping me, I am sorry to trouble you."/> <字串 編號="31715" 文字="Hello, here is the [/c$2Energy Research Center in Bottomless Pit/c*], I am the Chief here, my name is Essam. This is a secret area of the Dark City, foreign visitors mustn't stay here."/> <字串 編號="31801" 文字="I am the Sickle Soldier, I am in charge of protecting the [/c$2Energy Research Center in Bottomless Pit/c*]. Here is often attacked by crazy people, it really troubles me."/> <字串 編號="31802" 文字="What crazy people?"/> <字串 編號="31803" 文字="Tell me about your troubles."/> <字串 編號="31804" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31805" 文字="[/c$2Wizards/c*] believe that the power of the Bottomless Pit is given by the [/c$2God/c*], in order to show their loyalty, they agree to destroy the soil in the deep underground. The Skeletal group from the Shadowy Path have begun to oppose the Dark City."/> <字串 編號="31806" 文字="We built a Research Center here to explore the magic power of the Bottomless Pit. The Wizards think it's irreverent to the god, and they don't agree with it."/> <字串 編號="31807" 文字="But no one can prove if the Bottomless Pit has a god or not. Maybe it's only an invention of the wizards?"/> <字串 編號="31808" 文字="Things are like this..."/> <字串 編號="31809" 文字="There is a group of [/c$2Fire Mimics/c*] to the north of the Research Center, they attack the soldiers and the researchers with fire bottles. Our equipment has caught on fire and we are face a terrible disaster."/> <字串 編號="31810" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="31811" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31812" 文字="Thank you for your offer, but it's our responsibility to do it. And you haven't reached level/c$2 15 /c*yet so you can't help me."/> <字串 編號="31813" 文字="Please defeat/c$2 20/c* Fire Mimics, I will give you a prize!"/> <字串 編號="31814" 文字="You haven't defeated/c$2 20/c* Fire Mimics yet. They are appearing to the north of the [/c$2Energy Research Center in Bottomless Pit/c*], come on!"/> <字串 編號="31815" 文字="You have defeated/c$2 20/c* Fire Mimics, we can have overcome the raid."/> <字串 編號="31816" 文字="I will show our thanks to you, please take this prize."/> <字串 編號="31817" 文字="I am the Sickle Soldier, I am in charge of protecting the [/c$2Energy Research Center in Bottomless Pit/c*]. Here is often attacked by crazy people, it really troubles me."/> <字串 編號="31901" 文字="There is a group of [/c$2Frantic Wizards/c*] near the [/c$2Ancient Tomb/c*], they believe that in the Bottomless Pit lives a god and the Ancient Tomb has a magic power. So they make trouble for our Research Center."/> <字串 編號="31902" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="31903" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="31904" 文字="Help? What can you do? Come to see me after you reach level/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="31905" 文字="Please defeat the [/c$2Frantic Wizards/c*] near the Ancient Tomb! Those crazy people are so disgusting."/> <字串 編號="31906" 文字="The Frantic Wizards are to the west of the Research Center, you can find them there."/> <字串 編號="31907" 文字="Hum, you did a nice job, our burden has certainly been lightened!"/> <字串 編號="31908" 文字="This is the prize for you, please take it."/> <字串 編號="32001" 文字="I am the Researcher in [/c$2Energy Research Center in Bottomless Pit/c*], my job is explore the magic power of the [/c$2Bottomless Pit/c*]. But things aren't going as expected..."/> <字串 編號="32002" 文字="Tell me about the Bottomless Pit."/> <字串 編號="32003" 文字="Do you have any problems?"/> <字串 編號="32004" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32005" 文字="[/c$2Bottomless Pit/c*] existed long before we came here. There are many legends about it, but no one knows which are true. Today, the Dark City has learned many research skills from the Iron Castle. So now we have begun the research work of the Bottomless Pit."/> <字串 編號="32006" 文字="However, our progress has been stalled by the crazy people. We are powerless to stop their raids."/> <字串 編號="32007" 文字="The path to the Dark City is occupied by a group of Wizards, every time we try to send materials to the Dark City. They use their Black Crows to attack our researchers."/> <字串 編號="32008" 文字="I wonder what those [/c$2Crow Wizards/c*] are planning?"/> <字串 編號="32009" 文字="I will deal with them."/> <字串 編號="32010" 文字="Take care of it yourself. I quit."/> <字串 編號="32011" 文字="Come to see me after you reach level/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="32012" 文字="Please drive the Crow Wizards, who occupied the road of the Dark City, away! We will give you a prize."/> <字串 編號="32013" 文字="You can find the [/c$2Crow Wizards/c*] to the east of the Research Center. They are easy to spot as they have Black Crows perched on their shoulders. Please drive them away."/> <字串 編號="32014" 文字="Great! The Sickle Soldiers said that the Crow Wizards are decreasing in number."/> <字串 編號="32015" 文字="On behalf of the researchers in [/c$2Energy Research Center in Bottomless Pit/c*], I would like to extend our thanks. This is the prize for you, please take it."/> <字串 編號="32016" 文字="Hello, foreign visitor, I am the researcher in [/c$2Energy Research Center in Bottomless Pit/c*], my job is explore the magic power of the Bottomless Pit."/> <字串 編號="32101" 文字="Ouch! It's so painful! My research will be have to be halted. This burn has injured me too much to work."/> <字串 編號="32102" 文字="How did you get burned?"/> <字串 編號="32103" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32104" 文字="There is a group of Fire Mimics which makes trouble to the north of the Research Center. A few days ago, whilst I was collecting samples of the rock in the north of the Bottomless Pit, I was attacked by a Mimic, and my arms were badly burned. It's really painful."/> <字串 編號="32105" 文字="The medicine and the materials need to be brought here from the Dark City, but it will take several days for them to arrive. So I must make the burn ointment by myself, but my arms are too painful to use. I don't know what can I do?"/> <字串 編號="32106" 文字="I can collect the materials for you."/> <字串 編號="32107" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32108" 文字="You can't do it, it's too dangerous to collect the materials, come to help me after you reach level/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="32109" 文字="I need/c$2 10/c* Crow's Feathers and/c$2 10/c* Black Agars, the Crow's Feathers can be found from the Crow Wizards, the Black Agars can be found from the Frantic Wizards, it is an indication of their ceremony."/> <字串 編號="32110" 文字="Come to find me after collecting/c$2 10/c* Crow's Feathers from the Crow Wizards and/c$2 10/c* Black Agars from the Frantic Wizards."/> <字串 編號="32111" 文字="You got the materials I need, I must make the burn ointment quickly. I can't stand the pain any longer!"/> <字串 編號="32112" 文字="Thank you for helping me, this is a prize for you, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="32113" 文字="Alas, although I have the burn ointment, I don't know that when can I recover fully, the research plan will be delayed again. What can I do?"/> <字串 編號="32114" 文字="Ouch! It's so painful! My research will be have to be halted. This burn has injured me too much to work. Foreign visitor, you must be on your guard."/> <字串 編號="32201" 文字="Hello, I am a researcher in [/c$2Energy Research Center/c*], I'm in charge of the data analysis. My job is a little boring but I have some interesting hobbies to make up for it."/> <字串 編號="32202" 文字="What hobbies do you have?"/> <字串 編號="32203" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32204" 文字="I collect all kinds of coins! In my free time, I take pleasure in my coins, each coin has a different pattern!"/> <字串 編號="32205" 文字="If you collect enough coins, come to see me and I will buy them at a high price! Recently, I want to get the [/c$2Clown's Coin/c*], but I don't know where to find it."/> <字串 編號="32206" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="32207" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32208" 文字="Really? I don't think so! Come to see me after you collect/c$2 10/c* Clown's Coins."/> <字串 編號="32209" 文字="Don't you know where to collect the Clown's Coin from? I don't know either. But just as its name implies, maybe the clowns have it."/> <字串 編號="32210" 文字="Wow! You got the Clown's Coins! Let me see, they are beautiful! "/> <字串 編號="32211" 文字="Thank you for collecting this for me! This is your prize, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="32212" 文字="Hello, I am a researcher in [/c$2Energy Research Center/c*], I am in charge of the data analysis. "/> <字串 編號="32301" 文字="Hello, here is [/c$2Energy Research Center/c*], I am the Chief here, my name is Esmat."/> <字串 編號="32302" 文字="Tell me about the Energy Research Center."/> <字串 編號="32303" 文字="Give the letter to Esmat."/> <字串 編號="32304" 文字="Give the Seal Pieces to Esmat."/> <字串 編號="32305" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32306" 文字="On the commission of the [/c$2Central Officials/c*] in Dark City, I am studying the mystic power of the Bottomless Pit. Many excellent scholars have come from the Dark City are also studying here, day and night to solve the mystery."/> <字串 編號="32307" 文字="What's this? risker, you found something marvelous!"/> <字串 編號="32308" 文字="The seal's character is the same as the [/c$2Ancient Key/c*]. The Ancient Key can open the Ancient Tomb, but it has been separate into two parts, the other part is kept safe by a Central Official."/> <字串 編號="32309" 文字="If you can collect all of the seals, you can enter the [/c$2Ancient Tomb/c*] to the west of the Bottomless Pit. It's said that there is a secret about the origin of the Dark Race. The Bottomless Pit is the same, we are studying its power, we believe it's related to the origin of Dark Race."/> <字串 編號="32310" 文字="Go to find the [/c$2Central Officials/c*] in Dark City! Leave the seal here. Give this letter to the leaders, they will give the other half to you."/> <字串 編號="32311" 文字="Go the find the Central Official and get the Seal Piece!"/> <字串 編號="32401" 文字="Young man, what can we do for you?"/> <字串 編號="32402" 文字="Tell me about the Central Officials."/> <字串 編號="32403" 文字="Give Esmat's letter to the Leader."/> <字串 編號="32404" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32405" 文字="We are in charge of the Dark City. We are proud to be a mystic race, do you see the mystic power rising up from the city? In order to expand this force, the project operates around the clock! "/> <字串 編號="32406" 文字="Whilst our race is becoming stronger we still wonder about our origins. Nowadays, we are using many resources and lots of manpower to research the Bottomless Pit."/> <字串 編號="32407" 文字="Esmat's letter? Let me see..."/> <字串 編號="32408" 文字="Young man, you get the other half of the seal! Congratulations."/> <字串 編號="32409" 文字="I think that Esmat must want to solve the mystery of [/c$2Ancient Tomb/c*], give this Seal's half to Esmat! We look forward to the following research report."/> <字串 編號="32410" 文字="Young man, what can we do for you? Give this Seal's half to Esmat in [/c$2Energy Research Center/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="32411" 文字="Young man, what can we do for you?"/> <字串 編號="32412" 文字="Here are the [/c$2Central Officials/c*] Decision Making Conference of Dark City, foreigner, what have you come here for?"/> <字串 編號="32413" 文字="Hello, here is Energy Research Center, I am the Chief here, my name is Esmat."/> <字串 編號="32414" 文字="Give the Seal Piece to Esmat."/> <字串 編號="32501" 文字="What a pity, risker. Recently the Research Center has been attacked by the Fire Mimics, the Seal Piece has been taken by them."/> <字串 編號="32502" 文字="Many of our researchers are injured, I heard those Fire Mimics say that: [who goes against theory god must be punished]."/> <字串 編號="32503" 文字="What can I do? One half of the Seal is lost..."/> <字串 編號="32504" 文字="I will get the Seal Piece back."/> <字串 編號="32505" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32506" 文字="It's too dangerous if you haven't reached level/c$2 15 /c*yet, please think it over."/> <字串 編號="32507" 文字="Those fire mimics go along to the north, they are not far from here, please get the Seal Piece back for me."/> <字串 編號="32508" 文字="Those fire mimics are appearing to the north of the Research Center, one of the Mimics has the [/c$2Seal Piece/c*]."/> <字串 編號="32509" 文字="Well done, risker! Thank you for getting back the Seal Piece for me! Put the two parts of the Seal Piece together!"/> <字串 編號="32510" 文字="After the two parts of the Seal are put together the whole seal shines."/> <字串 編號="32511" 文字="This is the [/c$2Ancient Key/c*], now it has returned to the world! risker, you have finished this task!"/> <字串 編號="32601" 文字="Take this [/c$2Ancient Key/c*] to the [/c$2Ancient Tomb/c*] which is in the east of the Research Center! First, open the stone door which has been sealed for a long time."/> <字串 編號="32602" 文字="I must repair the broken data, I am in charge of the Research Center avoiding attack from the Fire Mimics. You must explore the Ancient Tomb."/> <字串 編號="32603" 文字="Ok, I will come back to you if anything."/> <字串 編號="32604" 文字="I am busy."/> <字串 編號="32605" 文字="[/c$2Ancient Tomb/c*] is in the east of the Research Center, there are many Frantic Wizards, but dependant on your ability, they shouldn't be too much of a match for you."/> <字串 編號="32606" 文字="It's an old and massive stone door, I can feel a strange ambience coming from it."/> <字串 編號="32607" 文字="Check out the door carefully."/> <字串 編號="32608" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32609" 文字="There is a little hole in the door. It's very odd, almost like a keyhole...."/> <字串 編號="32610" 文字="Place the seal into the keyhole."/> <字串 編號="32611" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32612" 文字="The door shakes and dust falls from it. The seal in the keyhole gives off a purple light. The glow slowly starts to form the shape of a figure......"/> <字串 編號="32613" 文字="Hum, unworthy soul, do you dare to crash into the ancestor's place."/> <字串 編號="32614" 文字="After you beat the Elf the seal turns into a bright [/c$2Gold Seal/c*]. Take it back to Esmat."/> <字串 編號="32615" 文字="Hello, here is [/c$2Energy Research Center/c*], I am the Chief here, my name is Esmat."/> <字串 編號="32616" 文字="Give Esmat gold seal,tell him everything"/> <字串 編號="32617" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32618" 文字="Hum! Is that the case? The elf and the gold seal, but what does it mean?"/> <字串 編號="32619" 文字="Anyway, I will keep studying the [/c$2Gold Seal/c*]. This is your prize, choose any one you like."/> <字串 編號="32620" 文字="Thank your for your contribution to the Dark City. I will do my best to find out the secret of the Ancient Tomb."/> <字串 編號="32701" 文字="Welcome to the Mansion of the [/c$2Degula Duke/c*], I am the Manager, Pandora. I'm in charge of this house, I am so busy these days, help yourself."/> <字串 編號="32702" 文字="What are you worried about?"/> <字串 編號="32703" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32704" 文字="The thing is like this..."/> <字串 編號="32705" 文字="There are some Evil Eyes flying and messing up the house, I can't drive them away! "/> <字串 編號="32706" 文字="The squeamish [/c$2Degula Duke/c*] is very angry! And on top of all that he has a toothache as well! He is using me to vent his rage. I just want to scream! "/> <字串 編號="32707" 文字="I will destroy the Evil Eyes for you."/> <字串 編號="32708" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32709" 文字="You can't do it yet, the Evil Eyes are very fierce, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="32710" 文字="You are so sweet, risker. Defeat/c$2 20/c* Evil Eyes for me and I will give you the prize."/> <字串 編號="32711" 文字="The Evil Eyes are appearing to the south of the Mansion, sometimes they come here to create havoc. Come back to see me after you get rid of/c$2 20/c* Evil Eyes."/> <字串 編號="32712" 文字="Well done, you drove most of them away. I will ask the workers to clean up this area now."/> <字串 編號="32713" 文字="Thank you for your help, this is your prize, please take it."/> <字串 編號="32714" 文字="Foreign visitor, welcome to the Mansion of the [/c$2Degula Duke/c*], I am the Manager, Pandora. If you need any help, I will serve you with all my heart."/> <字串 編號="32801" 文字="A group of Leeches likes to make trouble around the Mansion. They bite the body and suck the blood, it's hideous!"/> <字串 編號="32802" 文字="The duke always insists on [/c$2vegetarianism/c*], the Darkness Pumpkins juice tastes just like blood, too. But those Leeches don't believe it. I hope someone can teach them a lesson."/> <字串 編號="32803" 文字="I will do it."/> <字串 編號="32804" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32805" 文字="Those Leeches aren't so easy to deal with, come back to defeat them after you reach level/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="32806" 文字="Please drive the leeches, who stay in the northeast of the Graveyard, away! Come to see me after you finish."/> <字串 編號="32807" 文字="Look out of the window, the leeches are running around in the Graveyard, go to the northeast of the Mansion and drive them away!"/> <字串 編號="32808" 文字="Thank you for helping me! If the Degula Duke hear this news, he will be very happy!"/> <字串 編號="32809" 文字="In order to thank you, I will give you a prize, please take it."/> <字串 編號="32901" 文字="Hum, I am so tired, the [/c$2Darkness Pumpkin/c*] harvest time is coming, I must take care of them. Those vile leeches will come to ruin these pumpkins."/> <字串 編號="32902" 文字="Why do the leeches ruin the pumpkins?"/> <字串 編號="32903" 文字="Give the harvest report to the Gardener."/> <字串 編號="32904" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32905" 文字="Don't you know about this? Formerly, the Leeches sucked blood, but as time went by, when we cultivated the Darkness Pumpkin, we found that the juice tasted just like blood. So the Degula Duke wanted to hold a [/c$2Pumpkin Fans Club/c*] to make the Darkness Pumpkin known."/> <字串 編號="32906" 文字="But those conservative Leeches don't agree with it, they feel humiliated if they don't suck fresh blood, so they fought against the Degula Duke. I am afraid that they will come to ruin our Pumpkins"/> <字串 編號="32907" 文字="The harvest time is coming, I must take care of the pumpkins. I am so busy, I can't leave here."/> <字串 編號="32908" 文字="I will do it."/> <字串 編號="32909" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32910" 文字="Really? I am sorry to trouble you. Please go to find the Gardeners in the north and east parts of the field and bring the [/c$2Darkness Pumpkin's Growth Report/c*] back for me."/> <字串 編號="32911" 文字="You didn't get the report, go to find the Gardeners in the north and east parts of the field."/> <字串 編號="32912" 文字="I am the assistant in the North Darkness Pumpkin field, our pumpkins are very special, they taste great! "/> <字串 編號="32913" 文字="I have come here to get the Growth Report."/> <字串 編號="32914" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="32915" 文字="Oh, here is the report, thank you."/> <字串 編號="32916" 文字="Foreign visitor, I am the assistant in the south Darkness Pumpkin field, our pumpkins are very special, they taste great! "/> <字串 編號="32917" 文字="Thank you! I can control the pumpkins' growth with these two reports."/> <字串 編號="32918" 文字="Hum, I hope everything can go on."/> <字串 編號="33001" 文字="I am the owner of this land, I am Degula Duke. Ouch, my tooth feels painful again."/> <字串 編號="33002" 文字="Tell me about the Degula Duke."/> <字串 編號="33003" 文字="What's wrong with you?"/> <字串 編號="33004" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33005" 文字="The [/c$2Degula Race/c*] enjoy high prestige in the Dark City, they have lived here ever since they were awarded the territory a long time ago. But recently due to differing different views, the other leeches don't agree to my guidance, it's what I am worrying about."/> <字串 編號="33006" 文字="Because I haven't sucked blood for a long time, my tooth blood vessels have shrunk. As a result my teeth always feel painful. And I am too old to go to the Dark City, my doctor has gone to the Fungus Forest North now, I don't know what to do?"/> <字串 編號="33007" 文字="This toothache is taking over my life!"/> <字串 編號="33008" 文字="If I can help you, I will."/> <字串 編號="33009" 文字="Take care of it yourself. I quit."/> <字串 編號="33010" 文字="I have a recipe, but the ingredients are too hard for you to get. Come to see me after you reach level/c$2 20 /c*. Ouch."/> <字串 編號="33011" 文字="I have an ancient family recipe, Leeches must take care of their teeth. Collect/c$2 10/c* Magic Eyes' Tails and/c$2 10/c* Single-eye Bat's Wings for me."/> <字串 編號="33012" 文字="Come to see me after you have collected/c$2 10/c* Magic Eyes' Tails and/c$2 10/c* Single-eye Bat's Wings."/> <字串 編號="33013" 文字="Fine, it seems that you have collected all of the materials. Thank you, young man. This toothache is driving me crazy."/> <字串 編號="33014" 文字="This is the gift, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="33015" 文字="I am the owner of this land, I am the Degula Duke. Ouch, my tooth feels painful again."/> <字串 編號="33101" 文字="This medicine reassures me. If I don't have toothache, I can bear eating delicious food!"/> <字串 編號="33102" 文字="What do you want to eat?"/> <字串 編號="33103" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33104" 文字="The Manager, Pandora told me that there is a peculiar pumpkin to the east of the pumpkin field, it's kept by a One-eyed Bat called [/c$2Bershala/c*], my Gardeners can't get close to it. Can you bring the pumpkin back for me and drive Bershala away? "/> <字串 編號="33105" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="33106" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="33107" 文字="[/c$2Bershala/c*] sometimes appears in the east of the pumpkin field. Please drive it away."/> <字串 編號="33108" 文字="Go along the east until you can see the east pumpkin field, [/c$2Bershala/c*] sometimes appears there when it has a rest. Be patient and you will find it."/> <字串 編號="33109" 文字="This is the Fantastic Pumpkin! You actually finished the task, thank you!"/> <字串 編號="33110" 文字="I am a multi-millionaire, you can choose any gift you like! I won't try to cheat you!"/> <字串 編號="33111" 文字="Ha-ha, I expectant of the delicious food made from this pumpkin."/> <字串 編號="33112" 文字="I am the owner of this land, I am the Degula Duke. Help yourself, I'm off to the feast."/> <字串 編號="33201" 文字="I will hold a feast made entirely of this pumpkin! And invite all my friends come to enjoy it."/> <字串 編號="33202" 文字="Could you do me another favor?"/> <字串 編號="33203" 文字="How can I help you?"/> <字串 編號="33204" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33205" 文字="I have a good friend who is the Graveyard Keeper in the north of the [/c$2Memory Cave/c*]. I want to invite him to my Mansion and have dinner, can you give the invitation to him?"/> <字串 編號="33206" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="33207" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="33208" 文字="After you leave the Mansion, go north and you will reach the Memory Cave, there is a Management Department in the northernmost point. My friend is there."/> <字串 編號="33209" 文字="Did you give the letter to the Graveyard Keeper at [/c$2Memory Cave/c*]? He is in the Management Department."/> <字串 編號="33210" 文字="Young man, what have you come here for? Please check in here, nowadays few people come here. They all seem to becoming distant and selfish. This used to be a place of memory, but now it's just full of forgotten decedents."/> <字串 編號="33211" 文字="What memories?"/> <字串 編號="33212" 文字="Give the invitation to the keeper."/> <字串 編號="33213" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33214" 文字="It's a letter from my friend the Degula Duke. Let me see."/> <字串 編號="33215" 文字="Young man, it seems that you are strong, [/c$2Bershala/c*] was not easy to deal with, but you beat it. The Duke must be very happy with you."/> <字串 編號="33216" 文字="Tell the duke I will attend his shin dig. Thank you for telling me."/> <字串 編號="33301" 文字="I am the assistant in the east Darkness Pumpkin field, our pumpkins are very special. The harvest time is coming soon so I must take good care of them."/> <字串 編號="33302" 文字="I have come to get the growth report."/> <字串 編號="33303" 文字="Are you afraid of those bats?"/> <字串 編號="33304" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33305" 文字="Here is the report. Thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="33306" 文字="I am the assistant in the east Darkness Pumpkin field, our pumpkins are very special, they taste great! "/> <字串 編號="33307" 文字="[/c$2One-eyed Bat/c*] are staring at our Darkness Pumpkins, they want to suck out the sweet juice. If they do, my pumpkins will be ruined and my painstaking efforts will be wasted, too."/> <字串 編號="33308" 文字="Who can drive those One-eyed Bats away?"/> <字串 編號="33309" 文字="I will do it."/> <字串 編號="33310" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33311" 文字="Those One-eyed Bats are too ferocious for you! Come to see me after you reach level/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="33312" 文字="Please defeat/c$2 20/c* One-eyed Bats, they are flying around the field, I am too scared of them, sometimes I don't dare go home. It's too cold to sleep in the fields."/> <字串 編號="33313" 文字="You didn't defeat enough One-eyed Bats, come to see me after you get rid of/c$2 20/c* One-eyed Bats."/> <字串 編號="33314" 文字="Well done, I won't be worried anymore. I can sleep well now."/> <字串 編號="33315" 文字="Thank you for helping me. Please take this prize."/> <字串 編號="33316" 文字="I am the assistant in the east Darkness Pumpkin field, our pumpkins are very special, raising them takes a lot of painstaking effort. The harvest time is coming, I am expectant of it."/> <字串 編號="33401" 文字="What can I do? I can't explain this to the Duke. "/> <字串 編號="33402" 文字="What's wrong with you?"/> <字串 編號="33403" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33404" 文字="I am in charge of the Executive Orders between the Dark City and the Degula Duke Mansion. The duke asked me to give this [/c$2Executive/c*] to the Central Official in Dark City. But it was taken by a group of leeches."/> <字串 編號="33405" 文字="The leeches have strength in numbers. I don't know what to do. Wah!"/> <字串 編號="33406" 文字="I will get it back for you."/> <字串 編號="33407" 文字="I have no idea. Sorry."/> <字串 編號="33408" 文字="Each of them has great ability, don't go there if you haven't reached level/c$2 20 /c*yet."/> <字串 編號="33409" 文字="Great! Get the [/c$2Executive/c*] back for me! They are going along to the north."/> <字串 編號="33410" 文字="Did you find the Executive? Is it broken? One of the leeches has it."/> <字串 編號="33411" 文字="Wow! This is my Executive! Thank you, risker! I am so happy to see it."/> <字串 編號="33412" 文字="I can finish my task now! Thank you very much! "/> <字串 編號="33413" 文字="I will keep the Executive with me, always! No one can take it from me again."/> <字串 編號="33414" 文字="I am the Executive, on orders from the Degula Duke Mansion, I am going to the Dark City."/> <字串 編號="33501" 文字="Every month I bring toys here to mourn for my little son. But I never would have thought that some one would steal them. I haven't come here for a while but when I did found the [/c$2offering and the toys/c*] were missing."/> <字串 編號="33502" 文字="The management here is getting worse and worse, there is only an old shop keeper and some employees, how can they deal with the Corpses and Wildcats?"/> <字串 編號="33503" 文字="Give the toys to the sad man."/> <字串 編號="33504" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33505" 文字="Is this my little son's [/c$2toy/c*]? It was eaten by the Porky Men! Maybe my offerings and the toys were eaten by them."/> <字串 編號="33506" 文字="The Porky Men like to eat the offerings, it's immoral. Alas, these things remind me of my boy. If he were alive today he would be about the same age as you."/> <字串 編號="33507" 文字="Thank you for getting the toy back for me, please take this prize."/> <字串 編號="33508" 文字="I come here to see my little son's grave, it is forever emblazoned in my heart, I will never forgot it."/> <字串 編號="33509" 文字="Foreign risker, does someone you care about sleep here?"/> <字串 編號="33601" 文字="My salary is so low the things keep coming one by one! It's annoying me! I am thinking about quitting to find another job in Dark City. It seems to be better to be a gardener in Degula Duke Mansion rather than a Graveyard Keeper."/> <字串 編號="33602" 文字="Do you have any problems?"/> <字串 編號="33603" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33604" 文字="The thing is like that..."/> <字串 編號="33605" 文字="There is a group of [/c$2Porky Men/c*] who like to eat the offerings in the east of the Memory Cave. They don't like washing and they smell terrible. It's the reason that no one wants to come here."/> <字串 編號="33606" 文字="I will drive them away for you."/> <字串 編號="33607" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33608" 文字="Don't try to trick me! Come to see me after you reach level/c$2 22 /c*."/> <字串 編號="33609" 文字="Good idea! I hate their smell much more than their actions! Please drive them away quickly, come to see me if you get rid of/c$2 20/c* Porky Men."/> <字串 編號="33610" 文字="Did you drive/c$2 20/c* Porky Men away? You must teach them a lesson."/> <字串 編號="33611" 文字="Not bad! Those Porky Men must be badly battered! Do you want to be a Graveyard Keeper here?"/> <字串 編號="33612" 文字="Ha-ha, I am joking. Thank you for helping me, please take this gift."/> <字串 編號="33613" 文字="My salary is so low and the things keep coming one by one! It's annoying me! Foreign visitor, go to find our Administrators, I am just an employee."/> <字串 編號="33701" 文字="Did you see a group of Slim-Jims, who carry a cross with them, pass by? They like to talk about their beliefs with the visitors. Making the people complain terribly!"/> <字串 編號="33702" 文字="The family numbers of these decedents must be sad, there is no need to disturb them. I want to drive those fools away to the Bottomless Pit."/> <字串 編號="33703" 文字="I will help you to solve the problem."/> <字串 編號="33704" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33705" 文字="Didn't you see the huge cross they carried? Those [/c$2Crossed Desecrator/c*]are very Herculean, go there after you reach level/c$2 22 /c*."/> <字串 編號="33706" 文字="Drive/c$2 20/c* Decrusaders away! I don't want to see the Memory Cave becoming as jumbled as the Bottomless Pit."/> <字串 編號="33707" 文字="Those [/c$2Crossed Desecrator/c*] have been appearing in the north and south parts of the Memory Cave. They are easy to spot due to the huge cross that they carry."/> <字串 編號="33708" 文字="Not bad! You finished it so quickly."/> <字串 編號="33709" 文字="This is the prize for you, thank you for driving those crazy men away."/> <字串 編號="33801" 文字="It's vile! Who dug up my husband's grave? He was defeated by the Evil Leeches, but even after death he can't get peace. I came from the Dark City to visit him but now his grave is in turmoil."/> <字串 編號="33802" 文字="Who do you think dug up the grave?"/> <字串 編號="33803" 文字="Give the Skull to the woman."/> <字串 編號="33804" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33805" 文字="It must be the Cats who have done this. I saw some Cat's hair near the grave.. Yes, those [/c$2Magic Cats/c*] dug the grave! They grabbed my husband's skull in their mouths and took it away!"/> <字串 編號="33806" 文字="I will get it back for you."/> <字串 編號="33807" 文字="I am sorry to hear that."/> <字串 編號="33808" 文字="You aren't strong enough, you may break my husband's skull. I will ask you for help after you have reached level/c$2 22 /c*."/> <字串 編號="33809" 文字="Please find [/c$2my husband's skull/c*] for me, it must have been taken by one of the Magic Cats. "/> <字串 編號="33810" 文字="The Magic Cats are appearing all around the graveyard. Wah! My poor husband! He was afraid of the Cats when he was alive."/> <字串 編號="33811" 文字="Yes! This is my husband's skull, the crack here proves it! Once I quarreled with him and accidentally hit his head with a Wolf-teeth Mace! This must be his skull."/> <字串 編號="33812" 文字="Thank you young man! This money is for you, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="33813" 文字="You need to rebuild your husband's grave, what style would you like? Obviously one that is impervious to attack by a Cat."/> <字串 編號="33814" 文字="You need to rebuild your husband's grave, what style would you like? Obviously one that is impervious to attack by a Cat. Foreign visitor, which kind of grave is most popular in your country?"/> <字串 編號="33901" 文字="My goodness! The overhead expenses can't be met. The Magic Cats have great destructive force."/> <字串 編號="33902" 文字="The Magic Cats?"/> <字串 編號="33903" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33904" 文字="Those Magic Cats have been appearing in the west of the graveyard. They often use the gravestones as scratching posts for their claws! But they are so powerful they destroy the head stones. And it costs too much money to get them fixed."/> <字串 編號="33905" 文字="Is there anyone who will drive the Magic Cats away for me?"/> <字串 編號="33906" 文字="I will do it."/> <字串 編號="33907" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="33908" 文字="The Magic Cats are lightening fast and their claws are razor sharp, I won't let you get injured by them. So come to see me after you reach level/c$2 22 /c*."/> <字串 編號="33909" 文字="Come to see me after you defeat/c$2 20/c* Magic Cats, their den is in the west of the graveyard."/> <字串 編號="33910" 文字="Great! They need to be taught a lesson."/> <字串 編號="33911" 文字="Thank you for your help, you can be buried here for free after you die!"/> <字串 編號="33912" 文字="Due to the overhead expenses, not only the upkeep of the graves, but also the salaries of my workers will have to be cut back. Hum! "/> <字串 編號="33913" 文字="You don't come from the Dark City, do you? Are your friends buried here? If the answer is yes then you must pay the management charge."/> <字串 編號="34001" 文字="Young man, what have you come here for? Please check in here, nowadays few people come here. They all seem to becoming distant and selfish. This used to be a place of memory, but now it's just full of forgotten decedents."/> <字串 編號="34002" 文字="What memories?"/> <字串 編號="34003" 文字="Give the invitation to the keeper."/> <字串 編號="34004" 文字="Give the Time Box to the keeper."/> <字串 編號="34005" 文字="Give the Magic Music Box to the keeper."/> <字串 編號="34006" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="34007" 文字="Ha-ha, it was long time ago, you weren't born at that time. If you are interested in the story I will tell you. "/> <字串 編號="34008" 文字="Ah! It was the time that Mushroom Forest spreads Dew and Fog, I was always walking and chatting in the Fungus Forest South with my wife, we loved each other very much. She was unwell at that time, but under my care, her health didn't get worse."/> <字串 編號="34009" 文字="Until one day, the Dark City and Iron Castle subscribed to the [/c$2Technique Exchanges Agreement/c*]. The Dark City decided to accept the new science and technology and researched into the Magic Arcanum. And I was honored to be one of the training students."/> <字串 編號="34010" 文字="I took the training in Iron Castle for ten days. When I returned I found that my wife had fallen more ill when I had left the Dark City! She had asked the doctor kept it a secret. She didn't want me to worry about her too much and miss my great opportunity."/> <字串 編號="34011" 文字="But I always regret not spending her last ten days of life by her side."/> <字串 編號="34012" 文字="I decided to use my whole life to keep her memory alive. So I gave up the research work, which is well-paid, to become a grave keeper here. Until now, I visited her grave and talked with her everyday."/> <字串 編號="34013" 文字="We must stop talking or my tears will fall down. Oh, can you do me a favor? The day when my wife and myself had agreed to share our secrets is coming soon, can you get some things for me?"/> <字串 編號="34014" 文字="30 years ago, my wife and I put gifts into a box, we called it the [/c$2Time Box/c*]. We buried it under a tree in the [/c$2Degula Maze/c*] and we made a deal to open it after 30 years. My wife couldn't wait for 30 years, but I am more patient. It's the time to dig it up."/> <字串 編號="34015" 文字="I will help you."/> <字串 編號="34016" 文字="I need to go first, I have something else to do."/> <字串 編號="34017" 文字="Thank you for helping me, I am too old to do this by myself. The box is under a tree in the center of the [/c$2Degula Maze/c*]."/> <字串 編號="34018" 文字="The [/c$2Time Box/c*] is under a tree in the center of the Degula Maze."/> <字串 編號="34019" 文字="There is a little hillock under the tree. But be careful to investigate thoroughly as there is fungus covering it completely."/> <字串 編號="34020" 文字="Dig up the little hillock."/> <字串 編號="34021" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="34022" 文字="I found an old box in the earth."/> <字串 編號="34023" 文字="Ah! It's my box, risker, thank you!"/> <字串 編號="34024" 文字="I am sorry to trouble you again, but I so look forward to seeing the gift."/> <字串 編號="34101" 文字="My wife left a secret letter in the box, it reminds me of her love and wonderfulness."/> <字串 編號="34102" 文字="Oh? What does she say in it?"/> <字串 編號="34103" 文字="Sorry, I am not interested in it."/> <字串 編號="34104" 文字="The letter reads as follows: [Dear husband, I'm so excited to bury the time box with you! Before this I was racking my brains about what present I should give to you. Then at last I knew! It's just the perfect thing! How clever I am!]"/> <字串 編號="34105" 文字="[I decided to play a game with you! I've hidden the present somewhere and after we get old, we can find it together. It will be interesting to see your ponderous face, I drew the Treasure Map on the back of this letter. I am looking forwards to the day which comes 30 years later. Love for always your wife.]"/> <字串 編號="34106" 文字="The Executive Chief turns over the letter, there is a map sketched. It is a little bit difficult to read because of age."/> <字串 編號="34107" 文字="So cute! But her riddle is too easy for me. As soon as I saw the map, I knew where she had hidden the present. When I was young I was very cowardly, she must have hidden it in a place where I was afraid to go at night. But by a quirk of fate, I now work in the [/c$2Memory Cave/c*] everyday, the very place that I was afraid to go before."/> <字串 編號="34108" 文字="The gift is hidden in the [/c$2eastern graveyard of the Memory Cave/c*], there are too many Porky Men there, can you get the gift for me?"/> <字串 編號="34109" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="34110" 文字="Sorry, I am so busy."/> <字串 編號="34111" 文字="The place she hid the gift is in the left corner of the eastern Graveyard, I'll leave all that to you."/> <字串 編號="34112" 文字="This is a hole dug by strong force, and there are slobber marks all around the hole. Was the hole dug by a Monster stronger than the Porky Men?"/> <字串 編號="34113" 文字="Is it a music box?"/> <字串 編號="34201" 文字="When the Executive Chief opens the music box, beautiful music fills the room. Many tiny point of light gather together and form the shape of a human."/> <字串 編號="34202" 文字="Wife, it's you..."/> <字串 編號="34203" 文字="Dear husband! Did I give you a shock? This is a supernatural music box that can keep an image! Darling, aren't you touched by seeing me from 30 years ago? I don't know what I must look like now? "/> <字串 編號="34204" 文字="However, I know my love for you hasn't change! My weak health troubles you so much, but you take care of me so carefully, so I want to say that..."/> <字串 編號="34205" 文字="husband, I love you."/> <字串 編號="34206" 文字="at this time, you must give a hug to the old woman beside you. I hope you and I can live happily together."/> <字串 編號="34207" 文字="After saying this, the human shape disappears gradually, only the soft music circles the empty room."/> <字串 編號="34208" 文字=".................."/> <字串 編號="34209" 文字="It's an indescribable feeling, I am so happy yet also aching after seeing her again."/> <字串 編號="34210" 文字="risker, thank you for giving me this memorable experience, I will keep this music box forever! This is your prize, please choose anyone you like."/> <字串 編號="34211" 文字="I don't know how long can love last, one year? Two years? Ten years? But I believe some may stay in your heart forever."/> <字串 編號="34301" 文字="I am the Executive Puyi in Dark City, you must obey the rules of Dark City. If you violate the laws, I won't forgive you."/> <字串 編號="34302" 文字="Of course, the area around the Dark City is our precinct. You must deal with all of the Monsters, Beasts and Prisoners there at once. "/> <字串 編號="34303" 文字="How can I help?"/> <字串 編號="34304" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="34305" 文字="We got a message that somebody found the trail of [/c$2Skull Leader/c*] in Shadowy Path, if you can get rid of them, the Aurora Guards will give you a great prize."/> <字串 編號="34306" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="34307" 文字="It's too dangerous. I quit."/> <字串 編號="34308" 文字="I will wait for you here, I hope you can beat those [/c$2Skull Leaders/c*] and finish my task."/> <字串 編號="34309" 文字="Foreign visitor, you must obey the rules of Dark City or I won't forgive you."/> <字串 編號="34310" 文字="You really beat those [/c$2Skull Leader/c*], you succeeded"/> <字串 編號="34311" 文字="This the prize for you, please take it."/> <字串 編號="34312" 文字="I am the Executive Puyi in Dark City, you must obey the rules of Dark City.
