I quit."/> <字串 編號="35708" 文字="I will wait for you here, I hope you can beat those Decrusaders and finish my task."/> <字串 編號="35709" 文字="Foreign visitor, you must obey the rules of Dark City or I won't forgive you."/> <字串 編號="35710" 文字="You really beat those Decrusaders , you succeeded"/> <字串 編號="35711" 文字="This the prize for you, please take it."/> <字串 編號="35901" 文字="Hello, /c$2%1/c*! It seems that you have really grown up. I think it's time to give you some important tasks."/> <字串 編號="35902" 文字="The Angel Lyceum in Eden asked many Spy Angels to watch the actions of the [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*]. It's said that maybe the Spy Angels need your help."/> <字串 編號="35903" 文字="Go to talk with the Spy Angel in the [/c$2Bottomless Pit/c*]! He will tell you everything he knows."/> <字串 編號="36001" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, it isn't the right time to talk to me."/> <字串 編號="36002" 文字="Little Angel, I am the Spy Angel, I'm in charge of asking about the information of [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*], Angel Spy Office needs your help."/> <字串 編號="36003" 文字="What's the information?"/> <字串 編號="36004" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="36005" 文字="the Evil Lyceum will choose the suited evil soul to go to the hell, they sent their [/c$2student union leader/c*] to Eden. Now the student union leader choose some of the soul, your task is stopping him."/> <字串 編號="36006" 文字="this task is very dangerous, although you get the permission of the Dark City Angel, in order to avoiding the failure I must check your ability again."/> <字串 編號="36007" 文字="Ok, no problem."/> <字串 編號="36008" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="36009" 文字="Please defeat the Fire Mimics in the Bottomless Pit! Finish this task as quickly as you can!"/> <字串 編號="36010" 文字="Come to see me if you defeat most of the Fire Mimics."/> <字串 編號="36011" 文字="Good! Little Angel, you certainly have ability. It's so uncommon that the Angel Lyceum brings up a person with your talents."/> <字串 編號="36012" 文字="Take a break! I will give the task to you."/> <字串 編號="36101" 文字="The Evil Lyceum's student union leader is called [/c$2Asmode/c*], he is their most outstanding student in the Evil Lyceum. He is fierce and has no conscience. He has come to Eden to recruit students under the commission of [/c$2Satan/c*], we must stop him."/> <字串 編號="36102" 文字="A head-on collision is bad for our Spy Work, so we have a battle plan. At first, you must gain the [/c$2Asmode's confidence/c*]. Are you ready?"/> <字串 編號="36103" 文字="I am ready."/> <字串 編號="36104" 文字="Not yet."/> <字串 編號="36105" 文字="Asmode's aim are the members of the Riprap Pirates, you can gain his confidence if you pretend to be an Evil Leech. Get the [Bat Badge] from the Evil Leeches!"/> <字串 編號="36106" 文字="Come to find me after you get the [/c$2Bat Badge/c*] from the Evil Leeches! They have been appearing in the Degula Maze."/> <字串 編號="36107" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, you are very good, you can gain Asmode's confidence after getting the [/c$2Bat Badge/c*]. "/> <字串 編號="36108" 文字="Then, I will tell you where Asmode's Den is."/> <字串 編號="36201" 文字="The Evil Lyceum leader, [/c$2Asmode/c*] pretends to be a farmer in the Degula Maze, he looks for and chooses the leeches for the Evil Lyceum every day."/> <字串 編號="36202" 文字="Take the [/c$2Bat Badge/c*] to find Asmode! You can catch his attention."/> <字串 編號="36203" 文字="Go away, kid! Don't disturb me when I am farming, or I will hit you!"/> <字串 編號="36204" 文字="Little pretty girl, what's your name? Do you want to go tilling with me? Ha-ha, we can do something else after farming."/> <字串 編號="36205" 文字="Give the Bat Badge to Asmode."/> <字串 編號="36206" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="36207" 文字="Oh, you are the Evil leech! The badge shows your status."/> <字串 編號="36208" 文字="Did you get the information from your leader? I am preparing to build a leech branch, I need a person with abilities just like yours."/> <字串 編號="36209" 文字="Your are welcome to join in Asmode's plan, please!"/> <字串 編號="36301" 文字="You are welcome to join my team, why are you look different from the other leeches? Are you the underling of Michael?"/> <字串 編號="36302" 文字="Mi, Michael? I didn't get you..."/> <字串 編號="36303" 文字="I must go first."/> <字串 編號="36304" 文字="Oh, nothing, Michael is the most handsome boy I have ever seen. I yearn day and night for his friendship, but he dislikes me. Ah, he doesn't like me at all."/> <字串 編號="36305" 文字="I am worried about you, because you didn't look like a Leech. In order to prove you are a real evil Leech, go to the [/c$2Memory Cave/c*] in the eastern Riprap Coast and dig up some bones for me!"/> <字串 編號="36306" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="36307" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="36308" 文字="When you have broken up all of the graves and dig up all of the skulls, come back to find me."/> <字串 編號="36309" 文字="It seems that you met unexpected difficulties! Asmode is not as easy to fool as we thought. He is careful that get the credit from Evil Lyceum's Tutor [/c$2Satan/c*]."/> <字串 編號="36310" 文字="Go to find the woman in [/c$2Memory Cave/c*]! Her husband was defeated by the Leeches, she must hate them deeply, tell her if she wants to avoid the Leeches transforming into an even more ferocious evil, she will have to help us."/> <字串 編號="36311" 文字="Kind risker, my husband's grave is rebuilt. No one can break into the grave especially the Magic Cats. "/> <字串 編號="36312" 文字="You want to stop the Leeches."/> <字串 編號="36313" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="36314" 文字="Young man, I'm not quite clear about this, the Leech will become more evil? [/c$2the Evil Lyceum/c*]? It all sounds a bit complicated..."/> <字串 編號="36315" 文字="It's all right. You did me a great favor by finding my husband's skull, now you may borrow it to finish your task."/> <字串 編號="36316" 文字="Give the husband's skull to Asmode."/> <字串 編號="36317" 文字="You're so ruthless, you dug up such a large skull, you are sicker than I thought."/> <字串 編號="36318" 文字="You are really bad! But I like it."/> <字串 編號="36319" 文字="Stop Asmode's plan, please."/> <字串 編號="36401" 文字="Very good, I completely believe that you are one of the Evil Leeches, Please take this magic stone."/> <字串 編號="36402" 文字="Now you must go to [/c$2Memory Cave/c*],there is a [/c$2Monkey Statue Holding An Egg/c*] in the west of grave, remember to use the magic stone there. My friends will wait there to hold a great welcoming ceremony for you!"/> <字串 編號="36403" 文字="Go ahead! I'll stay here to clean up the field!"/> <字串 編號="36404" 文字="There is a incantation written on the egg, I don't know the purpose, I feel weak when I put my hand close to the eggshell."/> <字串 編號="36405" 文字="Put the magic stone close to the egg."/> <字串 編號="36406" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="36407" 文字="The Magic Stone gives off a purple light and shakes violently in your hand, you have to hold it tightly. "/> <字串 編號="36408" 文字="At the same moment, you are surrounded by purple light!! That light is too bright to open your eyes."/> <字串 編號="36409" 文字="When you open your eyes, you find yourself trapped in a dark cave. And [/c$2Asmode/c*] is standing in front of you."/> <字串 編號="36501" 文字="Haw-haw. I am the genius evil from the Evil Lyceum--[/c$2Student Leader Asmode/c*]!Do you see it? These are my underlings. You have the honor to be one of them."/> <字串 編號="36502" 文字="Here is my Magic Formation! Contribute your soul. And I will bring you to hell."/> <字串 編號="36503" 文字="What! I have actually been defeated by mere humans!"/> <字串 編號="36504" 文字="!! (Asmode seems to understand something...)"/> <字串 編號="36505" 文字="There is only one person who has this power."/> <字串 編號="36506" 文字="Before Asmode can finish his words, he disappears in black smoke into the air."/> <字串 編號="36507" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, the news about you beating Asmode has been spread all over."/> <字串 編號="36508" 文字="You have done a great job for the Angel Lyceum! The Lyceum leader, Michael, is very happy because you have destroyed the Evil College's recruitment plan."/> <字串 編號="36509" 文字="Pick one present which the Lyceum leader, Michael, has arranged for you! They are all precious [/c$2Heaven Weapon/c*]."/> <字串 編號="36510" 文字="You can go back to find the [/c$2Aurora Angel/c*] now. Thank you for your help. Angel Spy Office will record your contribution."/> <字串 編號="36511" 文字="I am the Spy Angel. I will collect all the information about the Evil Lyceum for the Heaven."/> <字串 編號="36512" 文字=".............................."/> <字串 編號="40001" 文字="Hello, /c$2%1/c*! We welcome to be the Guard Angel in Iron Castle, I am the Angel here and I come to help you to become the highest level Guard Angel."/> <字串 編號="40002" 文字="I have come here to reporting."/> <字串 編號="40003" 文字="Tell me about the mission of the Guard Angel."/> <字串 編號="40004" 文字="What is the Angel Contribution?"/> <字串 編號="40005" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40006" 文字="You came here in time, Good!"/> <字串 編號="40007" 文字="I am your first guide here in Eden. I will point out the right way at the proper time."/> <字串 編號="40008" 文字="There are many people who need help in the Iron Castle, but your abilities are limited. Begin your adventure by collecting the information from here."/> <字串 編號="40009" 文字="There are two knowledgeable Iron Castle residents in this house. They are the [/c$2Merchant Saleen/c*] and the [/c$2Pioneer Ocadon/c*]. Saleen knows all about the product distribution and the store goods in Iron Castle. Just like the back of his hand. You can ask him any questions about them."/> <字串 編號="40010" 文字="Ocadon is an excellent adventurer. And he knows the geographical conditions and the characters of the Ogres in Iron Castle, he also knows about battle and magic information as well. You can ask him anything about them."/> <字串 編號="40011" 文字="As a Guard Angel in Iron Castle, you must try your best to help lead the people here away from suffering, help them to solve their problems. And help to bring happiness to every nook and cranny of this land. That is the job of a Guard Angel."/> <字串 編號="40012" 文字="But, now people do not believe in the existence of Angels anymore. So you have to come to them in the form of a human! The road before you reach your goal is a long and perilous one! Please fight!"/> <字串 編號="40013" 文字="[/c$2Angel Contribution/c*] is the score to compare for Angel. Every country--- Aurora City, Dark City, Breeze Jungle and Iron Castle-- have their own [/c$2Angel Contribution/c*]. We will decide how much Angel Contribution they can get according to their contribution."/> <字串 編號="40014" 文字="Now, you can help the citizens of Iron Castle to solve their problems, complete the assignments that they give to you to get Angel Contribution, and in the future you can join the Guard Angel's competition to accumulate more Angel Contribution. When the Angel Contribution reaches a certain amount, [/c$2Status/c*] will increase too!"/> <字串 編號="40015" 文字="When your total [/c$2Angel Contribution/c*] reaches a certain amount, you can come to me to take a Heaven assignment. After finishing these assignments, you will be promoted to a higher level of Guard Angel, and at the same time you will get the presents and blessing for Heaven. "/> <字串 編號="40016"/> <字串 編號="40017" 文字="Talk to them now. If you accumulate more experience and upgrade your character level to/c$2 20/c* and your Angel level to/c$2 2 /c*, you can come to see me and take the first mission for Iron Castle as a Guard Angel."/> <字串 編號="40018" 文字="Go back to the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="40019" 文字="I will send you back to Angel Lyceum. If you want to come back here, go to find [/c$2Director Wolay/c*]."/> <字串 編號="40020" 文字="You are strong enough, so you don't need to come back to the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="40101" 文字="Hello, I am the Desert Merchant, I sell all kinds of the products in desert, and I collect rare furs. Having a rest in the oasis is so cool."/> <字串 編號="40102" 文字="Tell me about the leather."/> <字串 編號="40103" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40104" 文字="Do you have any leather? I lack Lizard Skin, the sundried Lizard Skin is very popular! The Armor which is made from it is so light and tough! If you can get/c$2 10/c* Lizard Skins for me, I can change it into anything."/> <字串 編號="40105" 文字="Ok, I will get the Lizard Skins for you."/> <字串 編號="40106" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="40107" 文字="Do you know how to get the lizard skins? You can get them from the [/c$2Lizards/c*] which appear in the desert."/> <字串 編號="40108" 文字="Look at you, you can't deal with those Lizards, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="40109" 文字="Come to see me after you collect/c$2 10/c* Lizard Skins, they are appearing to the southwest of the sand dune."/> <字串 編號="40110" 文字="Ha-ha! You finished the task! Thank you for collecting/c$2 10/c* Lizard Skins for me."/> <字串 編號="40111" 文字="This is the prize for you! Please take it! Thank you, risker!"/> <字串 編號="40112" 文字="Foreign visitor, it's difficult for you to get across the desert and reach here!"/> <字串 編號="40201" 文字="Do you have any leather? I lack Toad Skin, the use of the sundried Toad Skin is different from the Lizard Skin! The medicine made from the Toad skin sell like hot cakes! If you can get/c$2 10/c* Toad Skins for me, I can change it into anything."/> <字串 編號="40202" 文字="Ok, I will get the Toad Skins for you."/> <字串 編號="40203" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="40204" 文字="Do you know how to get the Toad skins? You can get them from the [/c$2Ochre Toads/c*] which appear to the southeast of the oasis or around the pool."/> <字串 編號="40205" 文字="Look at you, you can't deal with those Toads, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 6 /c*."/> <字串 編號="40206" 文字="Come to see me after you collect/c$2 10/c* Toad Skins, the Ochre Toads are appearing to the southwest of the sand dune or near the oasis."/> <字串 編號="40207" 文字="Ha-ha! You finished the task! Thank you for collecting/c$2 10/c* Lizard Skins for me."/> <字串 編號="40208" 文字="This is the prize for you! Please take it! "/> <字串 編號="40301" 文字="It's too hot, today! As a Desert Merchant, I must bear the boiling day and pay attention to the sudden occurrences on the road."/> <字串 編號="40302" 文字="What sudden occurrences?"/> <字串 編號="40303" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40304" 文字="We make a living on carrying and selling things on the road, but those cunning [/c$2Desert Mice/c*] like to eat our products and rice, it's impossible to defend ourselves against them."/> <字串 編號="40305" 文字="I am so lucky that I haven't seen them today, but it really puzzles me. I don't know why?"/> <字串 編號="40306" 文字="I can defeat the Desert Mice for you."/> <字串 編號="40307" 文字="Sorry, I am helpless to try."/> <字串 編號="40308" 文字="Great! Please defeat those Desert Mice for me! They are appearing to the north of the Wishing Tear! Or we will be in a state of anxiety."/> <字串 編號="40309" 文字="Foolish risker, maybe you can't do this, it's too dangerous for you because you haven't reached level/c$2 6 /c*yet."/> <字串 編號="40310" 文字="risker, Please defeat those Desert Mice for me! They have been appearing in the north of the Wishing Tear! "/> <字串 編號="40311" 文字="Thank you, risker! My partner said that the Desert Mice are decreasing by numbers to the north of the Wishing Tear! "/> <字串 編號="40312" 文字="My partner and I will give you a prize, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="40313" 文字="I hope those Desert Mice will diminish in number, so we can be more safe on the road!"/> <字串 編號="40314" 文字="Have you come from another place in the country! There are many Desert Mice here, they always attack the Businessmen."/> <字串 編號="40401" 文字="Hello, I am a citizen of Scrap Iron Village, do you want to go to [/c$2Scrap Iron Village/c*]? Go along this road to the north and you will reach the village! Sorry, I can't take you there, because I have so much work to do."/> <字串 編號="40402" 文字="Tell me about Scrap Iron Village."/> <字串 編號="40403" 文字="What work are you doing?"/> <字串 編號="40404" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40405" 文字="The Scrap Iron Village is a precinct of Iron Castle, the villagers make a living by dealing in Scrap Iron and metal. There are many Robots to help the villagers to do this work."/> <字串 編號="40406" 文字="These days, however, the Robots suddenly revolted! I could no longer work there securely, so I came to the Wishing Tear!"/> <字串 編號="40407" 文字="Last page."/> <字串 編號="40408" 文字="I was carrying Scrap Iron from Iron Castle to the Scrap Iron Village, but those desert mice attacked me and took the Scrap Iron away, I must get it back."/> <字串 編號="40409" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="40410" 文字="I have something else to do, I must go! "/> <字串 編號="40411" 文字="You think poorly of those desert mice, it's too dangerous for you if you haven't reached level/c$2 6 /c*yet."/> <字串 編號="40412" 文字="I am sorry to trouble, if you can get/c$2 10/c* pieces of Iron Scrap for me, I will give you the prize."/> <字串 編號="40413" 文字="You didn't collect enough Iron Scrap! The Desert Mice are appearing to the north of the oasis."/> <字串 編號="40414" 文字="Oh! You finished it! Thank you for your help! "/> <字串 編號="40415" 文字="This is your prize, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="40416" 文字="Hello, I am a citizen of Scrap Iron Village, do you want to go there? Go along this road to the north and you will reach the village! "/> <字串 編號="40501" 文字="The fresh and tender cutlets on the thin pancake... it makes my mouth water when I think about it! Hey, why are you staring at me?"/> <字串 編號="40502" 文字="Look, you are drooling."/> <字串 編號="40503" 文字="I have nothing to say. I quit."/> <字串 編號="40504" 文字="Really? I am sorry! I was thinking about the Baked Lizard Cake. Can you help me to collect some lizard meat, I want to make some Baked Lizard Cake."/> <字串 編號="40505" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="40506" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="40507" 文字="[/c$2Desert Lizard/c*] is appearing to the southeast of the oasis, they are brown and have an umbrella like piece of skin around their necks. That is the most delicious part of the animal! "/> <字串 編號="40508" 文字="Sorry, my request is so disrespectful, come to help me after you reach level 6. "/> <字串 編號="40509" 文字="You didn't collect enough lizard meat! You must defeat as many as you can."/> <字串 編號="40510" 文字="Wow! A bag of the lizard meat, I must deal with this quickly! "/> <字串 編號="40511" 文字="I am so happy! Thank you, risker! This is my prize for you, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="40512" 文字="Ha-ha! This meat is enough for several days! I feel so happy!"/> <字串 編號="40513" 文字="Foreign visitor, there are a lot of amazing treasures hidden in the Wishing Tear! Especially the tasty meat! Ha-ha."/> <字串 編號="40601" 文字="Hello, risker, I am the Researcher Kente, I came here to investigate the pollution in Wishing Tear."/> <字串 編號="40602" 文字="Wishing Tear?"/> <字串 編號="40603" 文字="Tell me about the pollution in Wishing Tear?"/> <字串 編號="40604" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40605" 文字="This oasis is called Wishing Tear. In the deadly desert, the oasis can provide the Businessmen with water and a resting place. It creates the hope for the people and the spring here is as clear as the tears of a goddess. So people called here Wishing Tear."/> <字串 編號="40606" 文字="Oh, why did I waste so much time telling you about this? I must continue my research work."/> <字串 編號="40607" 文字="Last page."/> <字串 編號="40608" 文字="It seems that the Wishing Tear has been polluted. I must get some samples. But I forget to bring the Gear, so the equipment won't work. risker, can you help me?"/> <字串 編號="40609" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="40610" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="40611" 文字="Go to the [/c$2Science Research Center/c*] in Iron Castle and take the model TX-116 Gear from the Researcher Along, I am waiting here for you."/> <字串 編號="40612" 文字="Go to the Science Research Center and bring me the model TX-116 Gear, Researcher Along knows where is it."/> <字串 編號="40613" 文字="Oh, you got the gear. Thank you for your help, I can carry on working now."/> <字串 編號="40614" 文字="This is the prize for you, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="40615" 文字="Foreign risker, there is something wrong with the riverhead of Wishing Tear, don't drink the water, or you may regret it!...."/> <字串 編號="40616" 文字="This is the Science Research Center, I am Researcher Along, what can I do for you? You can look around, but don't touch the equipment."/> <字串 編號="40617" 文字="Researcher Kente asked me to fetch Gear."/> <字串 編號="40618" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40619" 文字="That careless man, how could he actually forget such an important part, here you are! Please give it to him. "/> <字串 編號="40620" 文字="This is the Science Research Center, I am Researcher Along. You can look around, but don't touch the equipment."/> <字串 編號="40701" 文字="I am Researcher Kente, I collected some fountain sample just now, but I still need some life-form samples."/> <字串 編號="40702" 文字="Why do you need the life-form samples?"/> <字串 編號="40703" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40704" 文字="Because all of the life-forms here will have drunk the water. I want to get some bodies to study. They will me to understand the influence of the pollution. Can you collect 10 Toad and 10 Lizard bodies for me?"/> <字串 編號="40705" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="40706" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="40707" 文字="I forgot to tell you that you can't take this task, because you haven't reached level/c$2 6/c* yet."/> <字串 編號="40708" 文字="The Desert Lizards and Ochre Toads are appearing around the oasis, I'll leave the rest to you. "/> <字串 編號="40709" 文字="You didn't collect enough bodies, I need/c$2 10/c* Toads and Lizards each, that will be/c$2 20/c* in all."/> <字串 編號="40710" 文字="Hum, it seems that you finished the task, now I have enough samples."/> <字串 編號="40711" 文字="Thank you for your help, please accept this gift."/> <字串 編號="40801" 文字="I am the Researcher, Kente, whilst I was studying the data of the fountain and the soil, a shadow appeared and some disgusting purple foam floated on top of the fountain."/> <字串 編號="40802" 文字="you suspect someone poisoned the water?"/> <字串 編號="40803" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40804" 文字="It's quite probable! But I didn't see that shadow clearly, however, footprints lead towards to the [/c$2southern Scrap Iron stack/c*], it must be hiding there. Judging by the prints it must be a robot. Can you help me?"/> <字串 編號="40805" 文字="Yes, I will do it for you."/> <字串 編號="40806" 文字="Sorry, I can't."/> <字串 編號="40807" 文字="Thank you! Go to take a look at the southern Scrap Iron stack, if it's a robot, you must be careful, ask someone for help."/> <字串 編號="40808" 文字="Can't you find the southern Scrap Iron stack? Go along to the Scrap Iron Village and you will see the Scrap Iron stack."/> <字串 編號="40809" 文字="It was done by a robot. I heard that the Robots in Scrap Iron Village suddenly revolted. Maybe they come to make trouble in Wishing Tear."/> <字串 編號="40810" 文字="Give the Robot's Name Card to the researcher."/> <字串 編號="40811" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40812" 文字="Name Card? This is the Soldier's Name Card! Why did this kind of Robot come here?"/> <字串 編號="40813" 文字="Do they...? No, it's impossible! I am thinking too much! Thank you for finding the culprit of the fountain pollution, we will find out the way to resume the water quality, please take this prize."/> <字串 編號="40814" 文字="I hope the pollution won't worsen."/> <字串 編號="40901" 文字="Oh, yes. Can you give the data of the fountain to the [/c$2Scientist Edison/c*] in Scrap Iron Village? He is a genius, maybe he can find out a way to resume the water quality."/> <字串 編號="40902" 文字="Ok, no problem."/> <字串 編號="40903" 文字="I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="40904" 文字="Thank you! The Scrap Iron Village is to the south of the Wishing Tear. It's a village where they deal with the Scrap Iron and metal, Edison lives there."/> <字串 編號="40905" 文字="Go along to the south and you will see the way to Scrap Iron Village."/> <字串 編號="40906" 文字="I am the Researcher, Kente, I hope I can analyze the spring data and find out a way to renew the water quality."/> <字串 編號="40907" 文字="I am Edison, don't treat me like a Scientist! I hate that old title, I just feel like thinking."/> <字串 編號="40908" 文字="Give him data of spring in Wishing Tear."/> <字串 編號="40909" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="40910" 文字="Oh, did the researcher ask you to come here? Those silly guys always used to study weapons, when did they begin to care about the environment?"/> <字串 編號="40911" 文字="Ok! I will look at this data, thank you for giving it to me."/> <字串 編號="40912" 文字="I am Edison, don't treat me like a Scientist! I hate that old title, I just feel like thinking. Does your country have the other scholars that can communicate with me?"/> <字串 編號="41001" 文字="What can I do? Did you see the strange Buccinal Robots there? They don't work anymore they just attack people!"/> <字串 編號="41002" 文字="Why do they do that?"/> <字串 編號="41003" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41004" 文字="Maybe their hardware is broken, but why they conked out? I just don't know! I remain perplexed despite much thought. But someone must solve the problem, or the village will be destroyed by them. Someone must beat them and take them back to the workshop."/> <字串 編號="41005" 文字="I will do it for you."/> <字串 編號="41006" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41007" 文字="Risker, I admire you! The village needs more brave people like you, please beat those broken Buccinal Robots !"/> <字串 編號="41008" 文字="I know you are warmhearted, but I don't want you to be injured, come to find me after you reach level/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="41009" 文字="Those Buccinal Robots are making trouble in western Refuse Disposal Plant, the employees are in danger."/> <字串 編號="41010" 文字="The trumpet sound is growing weaker and weaker! Thank you for beating them! On behalf of the village, I will thank you! We will find the malfunctions and repair them."/> <字串 編號="41011" 文字="This is the prize, please take it."/> <字串 編號="41012" 文字="Have you come from another place? These days, the Robots in Scrap Iron Village have suddenly revolted and they will attack the passersby, be careful!"/> <字串 編號="41101" 文字="Hello, I am the Scrap Collector, do you see those Slarms to the north of the Scrap Iron Village? That area is full of radioactive Slarms!"/> <字串 編號="41102" 文字="The Slarms are full of radiation?"/> <字串 編號="41103" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41104" 文字="Hum, there is something wrong with the sewage system in Scrap Iron Village, many radioactive substances pour out from the pipes, and the Slarms have become more and more out of control."/> <字串 編號="41105" 文字="I will defeat those Slarms."/> <字串 編號="41106" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="41107" 文字="Oh? Really? I don't believe you, but if you can get/c$2 10/c* Slarm's Germs from them, then I will believe you."/> <字串 編號="41108" 文字="Sorry, you haven't reached level/c$2 10/c* yet, this work is too dangerous."/> <字串 編號="41109" 文字="The radioactive Slarms are appearing in the north of the village. Due to the radioactive mutation, they have grown two terrible hands, so they are easy to recognize."/> <字串 編號="41110" 文字="Well done! You got/c$2 10/c* Slarm's Germs."/> <字串 編號="41111" 文字="Thank you for killing those mutants from Scrap Iron Village, This the prize for you, please take it."/> <字串 編號="41112" 文字="Hello, I am the Scrap Collector, I am busy dealing with the Scrap Iron and watching out for the Slarms."/> <字串 編號="41201" 文字="Hello, Risker, I am the Repair Worker, I can make Abandoned Parts look brand-new with my light hand. Oh? My parts are all used up."/> <字串 編號="41202" 文字="What kind of parts?"/> <字串 編號="41203" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41204" 文字="Just now I am mending a broken RA-2 turbo generator, the client said that I must finish it in the time limit, but the parts have all been used up, what can I do? Ah! Maybe I can get more from the broken Robots, but I am so busy now. alas."/> <字串 編號="41205" 文字="Maybe I can help you."/> <字串 編號="41206" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="41207" 文字="I'm really sorry to trouble, you can get the [/c$2UME Frame/c*] and the [/c$2Kerosene Tank/c*] from those broken Fat Robots , if you get them, come to find me, thank you."/> <字串 編號="41208" 文字="No, Risker! It's too dangerous for you! Come to take this task after you reach level/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="41209" 文字="Can't you remember the name of the parts? It's a bit complicated to remember, it's UME Frame and Kerosene Tank, come to see me if you get them!"/> <字串 編號="41210" 文字="Wow! It's high time I was finished! Thank you very much, kind Risker!"/> <字串 編號="41211" 文字="You saved my business, please take my prize."/> <字串 編號="41212" 文字="It is unadvisable to use old parts for him. However, it's Ok if he doesn't find out."/> <字串 編號="41213" 文字="Have you come from another place? Do you have anything needing to be mended? I am the Maintenance Worker, if you don't need help, you can look around here."/> <字串 編號="41301" 文字="What can I do? How can I explain to the Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="41302" 文字="What's happening?"/> <字串 編號="41303" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41304" 文字="The thing is like this, I was asked to make a valve for a thruster by a person from Iron Castle, I was about to do it, but the Fat Robots attacked me and stole the Blueprint!"/> <字串 編號="41305" 文字="But I don't know which of them took the Blueprint! How can I make the valve without the Blueprint?"/> <字串 編號="41306" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="41307" 文字="I am sorry to hear that."/> <字串 編號="41308" 文字="You are so kind! Please find the [/c$2Fat Robots/c*] who took my Blueprint , I will give you the prize!"/> <字串 編號="41309" 文字="I am so happy to hear that, but you can't beat them until you reach level/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="41310" 文字="The Fat Robots are appearing to the south-southeast area, they are very huge, be careful! If you get the Blueprint, please come to see me. Thank you."/> <字串 編號="41311" 文字="Yeah! These are my Blueprints! They haven't been badly damaged, great!"/> <字串 編號="41312" 文字="I don't know how to express my appreciation, please take this prize!"/> <字串 編號="41313" 文字="The Iron Castle will make a vehicle which can move across the desert.Oh,stop thinking that, I must finish the brake set for a thruster."/> <字串 編號="41314" 文字="What can I do? How can I explain to the Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="41401" 文字="I am Edison, don't treat me like a Scientist! I hate that old title, I just feel like thinking. I have a theory that needs to be proven, if I succeed, it will be a great discovery."/> <字串 編號="41402" 文字="What is your theory?"/> <字串 編號="41403" 文字="I am not interested in it."/> <字串 編號="41404" 文字="In short, the deceased great scientist of Iron Castle, Newton said, water is the beginning of the universe. But what is there most around Scrap Iron Village? Isn't it Scrap Iron? And what does the desert lack most? Isn't it water? If my theory can be proved, I'll distill water from the Scrap Iron!"/> <字串 編號="41405" 文字="To distill water from Scrap Iron, don't you think it's valuable research? For the citizens in Iron Castle, even the whole world, it will bring great influence!"/> <字串 編號="41406" 文字="But this theory needs to be proven. I need two things to make the equipment work, I must stay here to control the equipment, if you have time, can you do me a favor?"/> <字串 編號="41407" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="41408" 文字="I am not interested in it."/> <字串 編號="41409" 文字="Go to find the renowned scientist [/c$2Einstein/c*] in Research Center im Iron Castle and take the Metal Distillate back. Bring this letter, he will give you the thing."/> <字串 編號="41410" 文字="You haven't brought the thing back, go to the Research Center in Iron Castle and find Einstein."/> <字串 編號="41411" 文字="Hum, you brought the thing back, let me see, it's the Metal Distillate, thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="41412" 文字="Please take my prize."/> <字串 編號="41413" 文字="Risker, I am the renowned scientist in the Science Research Center, my name is Einstein, what can I do for you? If you want to look around here, you must obey the rules. For there are many secrets here, don't ask about them. "/> <字串 編號="41414" 文字="Tell me about the Science Research Center."/> <字串 編號="41415" 文字="Give the letter to Einstein."/> <字串 編號="41416" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41417" 文字="The science Research Center is the birthplace of science in Iron Castle. We study new technology day and night, not only the people's livelihood, but also military affairs. We have battled with the Gebuer for thousand years, the Chief always puts pressure to bear on us."/> <字串 編號="41418" 文字="They hope we can invent a weapon to eradicate the Gebuers, ah, why do I tell you this?"/> <字串 編號="41419" 文字="This letter? Edison had told me that he wants a [/c$2Metal Distillate/c*], I have prepared it for him, please give this to him."/> <字串 編號="41420" 文字="What experiment does he want to do? But he is an adventurous scientist who has great potential, I am glad to give him this."/> <字串 編號="41421" 文字="Risker, I am the renowned scientist of the Science Research Center, my name is Einstein, what can I do for you? If you want to look around here, you must obey the rules. For there are many secrets here, don't ask about them. "/> <字串 編號="41501" 文字="Risker, after you get the Metal Distillate, I still need more material, or I can't begin my experiment."/> <字串 編號="41502" 文字="What do you need?"/> <字串 編號="41503" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41504" 文字="My equipment needs the Metal Distillate as the Core material, and I need a lot for the power source, I think that only the [/c$2Turbo Robot/c*]'s Cyclone Furnace can provide me enough power for my experiment."/> <字串 編號="41505" 文字="I can get the Cyclone Furnace for you."/> <字串 編號="41506" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41507" 文字="No, it's too dangerous for you! Come to take this task after you reach level/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="41508" 文字="Really? I admire you, I invented the Turbo Robot and I know it's power. It may be damaged, but it still has an intense attack, you must try your best if you want to get the Cyclone Furnace from it."/> <字串 編號="41509" 文字="Sorry to trouble you, the Turbo Robots have been appearing in the east of the Scrap Iron Village, come to see me if you get the Cyclone Furnace."/> <字串 編號="41510" 文字="You did it! Brave Risker! It's difficult to beat the Turbo Robots, even the Pestle Soldier are not likely to be able to."/> <字串 編號="41511" 文字="Thank you for your contribution, choose any prize you like!"/> <字串 編號="41512" 文字="Thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="41601" 文字="I am so careless, why did I make such a mistake? I didn't think it over."/> <字串 編號="41602" 文字="What mistake did you make?"/> <字串 編號="41603" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41604" 文字="I collected all of the materials and outfits, but I found that I ignored a variable. And it relates to the success of the experiment. "/> <字串 編號="41605" 文字="In order to control this variable, I must add an activator in the directions, that is the [/c$2Lizardmen's scale/c*]! The Lizardmen have been appearing in the [/c$2Cactus Plain/c*], can you get the scales for me? I am sorry to trouble you."/> <字串 編號="41606" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="41607" 文字="Sorry I am too busy."/> <字串 編號="41608" 文字="Thank you, go along to the east of the Wishing Tear, you will enter the Cactus Plain, go to the center of the plain, you will see many Javelin Lizardmen. Defeat some of them and bring their scales back for me!"/> <字串 編號="41609" 文字="The Cactus Plain is in the east of the Wishing Tear, defeat some Javelin Lizardmen and bring their scales back for me!"/> <字串 編號="41610" 文字="Oh, you have come back! These scales are plenty, thank you for your help!"/> <字串 編號="41611" 文字="Risker, please take this gift."/> <字串 編號="41612" 文字="Everything is ready, I hope I can finish the experiment quickly. The pollution will get better and people can use the clean water."/> <字串 編號="41701" 文字="We have got the Gebuer's Fighting Itemosal. The Science Research Center says that the weapon research has made a great breakthrough, the time to attack the Gebuer Vale is coming soon."/> <字串 編號="41702" 文字="In order to making the riverhead clean and eradicate the Gebuers, we must do our very best! But that Edison in Scrap Iron Village will be a problem, if his experiment succeeds, we have no reason to attack the Gebuer, and it will make us demoralized."/> <字串 編號="41703" 文字="The Pestle Corps will take action. Ah? Why did I think aloud in front of you?"/> <字串 編號="41704" 文字="Risker, I am the captain of the Iron Castle, General Alexander, why have you come here?"/> <字串 編號="41705" 文字="It's you! You come here at the right time! I am going to do the last step of the experiment, if I can finish it, the experiment is a success!"/> <字串 編號="41706" 文字="ah...(there is a wail coming from outside the door)"/> <字串 編號="41707" 文字="Did you hear anything? It seems that there is a group of people shouting."/> <字串 編號="41708" 文字="Aim, Edison, do it inside, cleanup..."/> <字串 編號="41709" 文字="Do you see? This robot wants to defeat me."/> <字串 編號="41710" 文字="Luckily, you are here, or I wouldn't know what to do."/> <字串 編號="41711" 文字="This Robot is the elite machine from Pestle Corps, it's difficult to beat it. But why do they want to hurt me?"/> <字串 編號="41712" 文字="Tell Edison what did General Alexander said."/> <字串 編號="41713" 文字="It's too dangerous, I quit."/> <字串 編號="41714" 文字="So it is. Now I know why did they want to defeat me. The Pestle Corps attacks the Gebuer only because of the riverhead. They use it as their excuse of dispatch troops. If I am right, the oasis in Wishing Tear was polluted by them."/> <字串 編號="41715" 文字="They don't want me to solve the problem of the water pollution, but why do they attack the Gebuer and pollute the oasis? I don't understand?"/> <字串 編號="41716" 文字="Alas, everything must be started over. However, Risker, you save my life!"/> <字串 編號="41717" 文字="I will give you the prize, please take it!"/> <字串 編號="41718" 文字="I am Edison, I live to prove my theories, no matter what difficulties come my way. Even death can't stop my experiment!"/> <字串 編號="41719" 文字="What is your theory?"/> <字串 編號="41720" 文字="I am not interested in it."/> <字串 編號="41721" 文字="In short, the deceased great scientist of Iron Castle, Newton said, water is the beginning of the universe. But what is there most around Scrap Iron Village? Isn't it Scrap Iron? And what does the desert lack most? Isn't it water? If my theory can be proved, I'll distill water from the Scrap Iron!"/> <字串 編號="41722" 文字="To distill water from Scrap Iron, don't you think it's valuable research? For the citizens in Iron Castle, even the whole world, it will bring great influence!"/> <字串 編號="41801" 文字="I'm the Chief of Pestle Corps in the Cactus Plain, I'm in charge of monitoring everything that happens here. It's hard work! Not only do the Lizardmen make trouble for me, but also the wild monkeys! Both of them are so annoying, they give me a splitting headache!"/> <字串 編號="41802" 文字="Tell me about the Lizardmen."/> <字串 編號="41803" 文字="Tell me about the annoying creatures."/> <字串 編號="41804" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41805" 文字="The head city of Gebuer-[/c$2Decadence City/c*]-is in the north of Cactus Plain. After Iron Castle won the victory in the battle hundred years ago, Gebuer had to fall back to the east of [/c$2Gebuer Vale/c*] through the secret passage. They survived by the natural barrier. The Decadence City sealed by their magic, nobody can not get in. "/> <字串 編號="41806" 文字="The Lizardmen came out from the burrow underground after the Gebuers withdrew. Under the [/c$2Lizard Lisad/c*]'s direct command, they attacked our soldiers with javelins and balls, the extent of their cruelness doesn't lose out to Gebuer! They are the most violent Monsters, after the Gebuer, for our Pestle Corpss."/> <字串 編號="41807" 文字="Those Javelin Lizardmen hurt my brothers today, I am so angry! They will pay for that."/> <字串 編號="41808" 文字="I will do it for you."/> <字串 編號="41809" 文字="I quit."/> <字串 編號="41810" 文字="You can't do it, you are too weak to deal with them, come to see me after you reach level/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="41811" 文字="Good! I admire you! You are so brave! Help me to defeat/c$2 20/c* Javelin Lizardmen!"/> <字串 編號="41812" 文字="You didn't defeat enough Javelin Lizardmen! I know you can do it!"/> <字串 編號="41813" 文字="Well done! Those Javelin Lizardmen have learned their lesson. Do you want to join the Pestle Corps?"/> <字串 編號="41814" 文字="I wouldn't lie to you, this prize is for you! Please take it!"/> <字串 編號="41815" 文字="Foreigner, you must obey the rules here, if the Lizardmen attack you, I won't be able to save you!"/> <字串 編號="41901" 文字="There is a group of [/c$2Plateau Monkeys/c*] at north of Cactus Plain. Their food is the Cactus Fruit. However, they steal solid food from our soldiers. It's very distressing for us."/> <字串 編號="41902" 文字="I want to drive them away."/> <字串 編號="41903" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="41904" 文字="Oh, good guy! I believe you can drive the Monkeys away!"/> <字串 編號="41905" 文字="Oh, it's too bad that you haven't reached Level/c$2 15/c* yet. You cannot defeat the Monkeys. Come here again when you have grown more powerful."/> <字串 編號="41906" 文字="I can hear the Monkeys' chatter. Have you see the Plateau Monkeys? They are at north of Cactus Plain. "/> <字串 編號="41907" 文字="I hear that the number of Plateau Monkeys has decreased along the way. I think it's due to your contribution."/> <字串 編號="41908" 文字="This is the reward for your help. Thank you!"/> <字串 編號="42001" 文字="Oh! How heinous the monkeys are... "/> <字串 編號="42002" 文字="What's happened?"/> <字串 編號="42003" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42004" 文字="Today I was patrolling and I needed to defend myself against the Lizardmen's attack. However, a Plateau Monkey stole my [/c$2Necklace/c*]."/> <字串 編號="42005" 文字="And I can't find the monkey or my necklace. My wife will be very angry about it. You see, the necklace is a token of our love, but I've lost it... "/> <字串 編號="42006" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="42007" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42008" 文字="Oh, it's too bad that you haven't reached Level/c$2 15/c* yet. You cannot defeat the monkeys. Come here again when you have grown more powerful."/> <字串 編號="42009" 文字="Thanks. But I don't have any clue about the whereabouts of my necklace. I just know that the Monkeys are at north of Cactus Plain."/> <字串 編號="42010" 文字="You haven't found the necklace? I think it is being stored by a Monkey..."/> <字串 編號="42011" 文字="Oh, great! You got it back. I think I'd better not tell my wife about the whole sorry affair!"/> <字串 編號="42012" 文字="Thanks. This is a reward for you!"/> <字串 編號="42013" 文字="I want to protect this necklace carefully and glue it to my neck... "/> <字串 編號="42101" 文字="My name is Francise, the Historian from Iron Castle. I think the leadership here draws too mush attention to logical sciences and neglects the Humanities. They don't know how precious they are."/> <字串 編號="42102" 文字="Give the Mystic Pieces to the Historian."/> <字串 編號="42103" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42104" 文字="This is... Oh, my goodness. How precious it is!! Hundreds years ago, during the war between Iron Castle and Gebuer. Gebuer was defeated but he also sealed up his capital now [/c$2Decadence City/c*]. Nobody can enter there."/> <字串 編號="42105" 文字="To open the door of Desert City, you need the Magic Key. But it has been divided into several parts... "/> <字串 編號="42106" 文字="I think the words on this piece are written in Gebuer Characters. And maybe, it is one part of the Magic Key. If you can find more clues, we may enter the main city of Gebuer. It's said that there are many treasures there."/> <字串 編號="42107" 文字="I want to spend all my life in the precious treasures in Gebuer. If only I could enter it one day."/> <字串 編號="42201" 文字="I'm a Biologist from Iron Castle. I want to research the Ball Lizardmen and find their weaknesses. This will help the Pestle Corps to defeat them. "/> <字串 編號="42202" 文字="The weakness of the Ball Lizardmen?"/> <字串 編號="42203" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42204" 文字="Yes, the [/c$2Ball Lizardmen/c*] are stronger than the Javelin Lizardmen and it's difficult for our corps to defeat them. I'm researching them and I need some their bones... "/> <字串 編號="42205" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="42206" 文字="Sorry, I have no time."/> <字串 編號="42207" 文字="Oh, thank you. I need fresh bones."/> <字串 編號="42208" 文字="Oh, it's too bad that you haven't reached Level/c$2 15/c* yet. You cannot defeat the Lizardmen. Come here again when you have grown more powerful."/> <字串 編號="42209" 文字="You haven't got enough bones. You can find the [/c$2Ball Lizardmen/c*] in their lairs."/> <字串 編號="42210" 文字="Oh, you've collected enough bones. Thanks very much."/> <字串 編號="42211" 文字="This is a reward for your help."/> <字串 編號="42212" 文字="The Ball Lizardmen's bones are different from the Javelin Lizardmen's. I need to research further... "/> <字串 編號="42213" 文字="I'm a Biologist from Iron Castle. I want to research the Ball Lizardmen here. You don't know how violent the Ball Lizardmen are. You should be careful."/> <字串 編號="42301" 文字="It's very hot today!! I need some Cactus Juice... "/> <字串 編號="42302" 文字="Where is the Cactus Juice?"/> <字串 編號="42303" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42304" 文字="Cactus Juice is made from the Cactus Fruit. However, they are the favorite food of the Plateau Monkeys. But I think you can find some which have been taken by them."/> <字串 編號="42305" 文字="I can help you to find some Cactus Fruits."/> <字串 編號="42306" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42307" 文字="I think you cannot defeat the monkeys if you haven't reached Level/c$2 15 /c*. Come here again when you have grown more powerful."/> <字串 編號="42308" 文字="Please collect/c$2 3/c* Cactus Fruits from the Plateau Monkeys for me. "/> <字串 編號="42309" 文字="You cannot find the fruit? They are taken by the monkeys. I want to drink Cactus Juice... "/> <字串 編號="42310" 文字="Oh, is it Cactus Fruit? It's bound to be delicious."/> <字串 編號="42311" 文字="This is a reward for your help."/> <字串 編號="42312" 文字="What are you doing here? Foreigner?"/> <字串 編號="42401" 文字="Oh, delicious juice. I want to do my job, but... "/> <字串 編號="42402" 文字="What?"/> <字串 編號="42403" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42404" 文字="I don't have enough courage to fight with the Lizardmen. But I hope I can... "/> <字串 編號="42405" 文字="I know I am the soldier who is afraid of war. I think I will be on patrol forever. If I can defeat the [/c$2Lizard Lisad/c*] and get it's head, I will be a hero. But I know that's just a dream... "/> <字串 編號="42406" 文字="I can help you to defeat it."/> <字串 編號="42407" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42408" 文字="Really? Lizard Lisad is the lord of the Lizardmen. It's a tough mission. There are many Ball Lizardmen protecting it."/> <字串 編號="42409" 文字="If you can defeat the Lizard Lisad, I can escape the life with the troublesome monkeys here."/> <字串 編號="42410" 文字="The den of Lizard Lisad is at southeast of the tableland. I think you need more friends."/> <字串 編號="42411" 文字="Give Lizard Lisad's head to him."/> <字串 編號="42412" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42413" 文字="You are great!! It's Lizard Lisad's head. You defeated the crucial trouble of Pestle Corps."/> <字串 編號="42414" 文字="I want to reward you this sword, I thought I could defeat all the Monsters with it. But now, I think it's suitable for you. What? You don't want it?"/> <字串 編號="42415" 文字="I understand, I'll protect my country with this sword as my father did. But I don't know what can I reward you with."/> <字串 編號="42416" 文字="Oh, I remember that I have several ancient items, you can choose one of them."/> <字串 編號="42417" 文字="I want to be the same kind of man as you and my father."/> <字串 編號="42501" 文字="Err... great man, I think I need your help again... "/> <字串 編號="42502" 文字="My pleasure"/> <字串 編號="42503" 文字="Sorry, I have no time."/> <字串 編號="42504" 文字="I hope you can give the information about the death of Lizard Lisad to the Commander at [/c$2Burning Desert/c*]. I think I may be promoted."/> <字串 編號="42505" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="42506" 文字="Sorry, I have no time."/> <字串 編號="42507" 文字="Thanks. Burning Desert is at the west of Wishing Tear."/> <字串 編號="42508" 文字="You've told the death of Lizard Lisad to General Alexander. I think I will be promoted quickly."/> <字串 編號="42509" 文字="I'm General Alexander, the guide west of Iron Castle. Why do you come here?"/> <字串 編號="42510" 文字="Tell me about the battlefront... "/> <字串 編號="42511" 文字="Tell me bout the death of Lizard Lisad"/> <字串 編號="42512" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42513" 文字="This is the battlefront between Iron Castle and [/c$2Gagabu Clan/c*]. Gebuers are hiding in the vale behind the sandstorm. We are patroling here to give them no chance for counterattack."/> <字串 編號="42514" 文字="Oh, the Lizard Lord is dead?? It's quite a surprise. Who defeated the lord. "/> <字串 編號="42515" 文字="Sam at Cactus Plain? I think I need a soldier like him. In this case, the pressure in the east will be lightened. We cannot defeat by them!!"/> <字串 編號="42516" 文字="This is the reward for your information."/> <字串 編號="42517" 文字="I'm General Alexander ,the guide west of Iron Castle. Why do you come here?"/> <字串 編號="42601" 文字="I'm the Captain of corps here. Besides the Gebuer, there are many other Demons here."/> <字串 編號="42602" 文字="Tell me about the Demons... "/> <字串 編號="42603" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42604" 文字="The war between Gagabu Clan and us is still raging. And unfortunately, many brave soldiers have been demonized and become filthy Mummies and Pharaohs."/> <字串 編號="42605" 文字="We want peace for their souls so they can die with dignity."/> <字串 編號="42606" 文字="I can do this job."/> <字串 編號="42607" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42608" 文字="You are brave, but I don't think you are powerful enough. You should reach at Level/c$2 20/c* and then go to defeat them."/> <字串 編號="42609" 文字="I hope you can defeat */c$2 20/c* Mummies or Pharaohs."/> <字串 編號="42610" 文字="The Mummies and Pharaohs are wandering around the Ancient Battlefield in the south. Defeat/c$2 20/c* of them and then come back. I'll reward you."/> <字串 編號="42611" 文字="You are very good. You've done the job perfectly."/> <字串 編號="42612" 文字="This is the reward for your help."/> <字串 編號="42613" 文字="This is the battlefront between the Iron Castle and Gebuer. You'd better leave here quickly if you haven't any purpose to be here!"/> <字串 編號="42701" 文字="There are a group of Toxic Spider who always eat the corpses at the East Dune. However, they also attack our soldiers. We try our best to defeat them, but they just keep multiplying."/> <字串 編號="42702" 文字="It's said that there are giant spiders, Black Widows at that dune. It's too difficult to defeat them."/> <字串 編號="42703" 文字="I think I can help you."/> <字串 編號="42704" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42705" 文字="Please help us to defeat/c$2 20/c* Toxic Spiders at the East Dune. Thanks."/> <字串 編號="42706" 文字="I don't think you are powerful enough. You should reach at Level/c$2 20/c* and then go to defeat them."/> <字串 編號="42707" 文字="Please help us to defeat/c$2 20/c* Toxic Spiders at the East Dune and then come back to me."/> <字串 編號="42708" 文字="You've finished the quest. You have served us greatly indeed!"/> <字串 編號="42709" 文字="This is the reward for you."/> <字串 編號="42801" 文字="Hello, I'm the Surgeon of Pestle Corps. But I met a hard nut to crack recently... "/> <字串 編號="42802" 文字="What's happened?"/> <字串 編號="42803" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42804" 文字="Haven't you heard about the [/c$2Toxic Spiders/c*]? It's a poisonous giant spider living in the further den. They always attack the people who pass by there. Some of our soldiers have been injured or killed by them."/> <字串 編號="42805" 文字="I can deal with the poison but the toxic people are growing more and more. I've not got enough serum. I hope you can defeat the Toxic Spiders and collect their Spider's Venom Sac, which are the material for making the serum."/> <字串 編號="42806" 文字="Ok, no problem!"/> <字串 編號="42807" 文字="Sorry, it's too dangerous"/> <字串 編號="42808" 文字="Thank you! Please collect/c$2 5/c* Spider's Venom Sac for me. The Poisonous Spiders are at the den in the east."/> <字串 編號="42809" 文字="You haven't reached Level/c$2 20 /c*yet , I think you cannot defeat them."/> <字串 編號="42810" 文字="Thanks very much! The Spider's Venom Sac are just what I need."/> <字串 編號="42811" 文字="Thanks for your help."/> <字串 編號="42812" 文字="Hello, I'm the Surgeon of Pestle Corps. I need to cure all the illnesses here."/> <字串 編號="42901" 文字="I'm General Alexander, the guide west of Iron Castle. Why do you come here?"/> <字串 編號="42902" 文字="Tell me about the battlefront... "/> <字串 編號="42903" 文字="Tell me about the Gebuer"/> <字串 編號="42904" 文字="I am looking for a job"/> <字串 編號="42905" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42906" 文字="This is the battlefront of Iron Castle and the [/c$ 2 Gagabu Clan/c*]. A group of Gebuers are at the canyon behind the dust devils. I want to watch for their counterattack."/> <字串 編號="42907" 文字="Leave is also called Gagabu. They are short and have an ugly appearance. They have their own language and culture, they still cannot be mentioned in the same breath with our Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="42908" 文字="Hundreds of years ago, there was a war between our ancestors and the Gebuer. The Gebuer were defeated and hid in the canyon in the north. Dependant on the natural barrier-Burning Desert. So we built the outpost and observed them."/> <字串 編號="42909" 文字="Sources pointed out that they have an excellent Leader who wants to make a counterattack. I'll defeat all of them when we can cross over the quicksand."/> <字串 編號="42910" 文字="You want to make a battle achievement? I think you can sneak into [/c$2Gebuer Vale/c*] though we cannot dispatch our army to enter it directly. You should go along the valley but be careful of the quicksand along the way."/> <字串 編號="42911" 文字="I hope you can defeat the troublesome Gebuer. If you do then I'll reward you."/> <字串 編號="42912" 文字="Ok, no problem!"/> <字串 編號="42913" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="42914" 文字="The Gebuers inhabit Gebuer Vale. We cannot underestimate them, especially now their power is growing."/> <字串 編號="42915" 文字="Oh, let me see... I don't think you are powerful enough to defeat the Gebuer. When you reach at Level/c$2 25/c* then come back."/> <字串 編號="42916" 文字="I'm sure that you haven't defeated enough Gebuers. You should make extra effort."/> <字串 編號="42917" 文字="After I heard the wail of Gebuers I knew that you'd finished the quest."/> <字串 編號="42918" 文字="Do you wish to join our Pestle Corps? This is the reward for you."/> <字串 編號="43001" 文字="There is an ancient gravestone, covered by sand."/> <字串 編號="43002" 文字="Read the words on it."/> <字串 編號="43003" 文字="Pour the Gebuer's blood on the gravestone."/> <字串 編號="43004" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43005" 文字="The words on it is: Use the Gebuer's blood to comfort the Pestle Corps's souls."/> <字串 編號="43006" 文字="The blood is poured on the gravestone and the color of it turns to match the liquid."/> <字串 編號="43007" 文字="There is some fog emanating from the gravestone, I think the blood will comfort the soldier's soul."/> <字串 編號="43101" 文字="The Chief don't want to search for him. I think his parents are worried about him."/> <字串 編號="43102" 文字="Who?"/> <字串 編號="43103" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43104" 文字="My fellow Takice. Several days ago, after patrolling the east area, we came back. On the way home, we were attacked by the Toxic Spiders and dragged into the sandy cave. I escaped. But... "/> <字串 編號="43105" 文字="At that moment, I just wanted to escape, and after running all the way home, I found Takice was gone. I told the Chief when I came back, but he said Takice could take care of himself."/> <字串 編號="43106" 文字="But I've not heard anything from him. I haven't told his parents yet either."/> <字串 編號="43107" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="43108" 文字="What a pity. Leave"/> <字串 編號="43109" 文字="Great. But the Toxic Spiders' den is in the east... You should be careful."/> <字串 編號="43110" 文字="I don't want you to have the same fate as Takice. I think you'd better come back after you reach Level/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="43111" 文字="The place we were attacked is the East Dune. I think there are some clues there."/> <字串 編號="43112" 文字="Did you find any clues?"/> <字串 編號="43113" 文字="Give Dinot the Bracelet."/> <字串 編號="43114" 文字="I haven't yet. Leave."/> <字串 編號="43115" 文字="~This is Takice's bracelet. Where did you find it? Oh no! In the stomach of Poisonous Spider? I think... Takice... "/> <字串 編號="43116" 文字="Takice... It's sad news. Anyway, this is the reward for your help."/> <字串 編號="43117" 文字="risker, you should be careful. The Toxic Spider of the east is very strong."/> <字串 編號="43201" 文字="Our chief doesn't want to deal with this accident, I hope you can help me."/> <字串 編號="43202" 文字="What are you going to do?"/> <字串 編號="43203" 文字="Sorry, I have no time."/> <字串 編號="43204" 文字="I think defeating the Leader of the Toxic Spiders must be the best way. I known there is a giant [/c$2Black Widow/c*] who is the mother of all of the Spiders. What you should do is to defeat it first."/> <字串 編號="43205" 文字="Generally speaking, the Black Widow lays its eggs in the den which is made from skeletons. It can incubate them with the protection of the skeletons."/> <字串 編號="43206" 文字="I think the Black Widow will come out from the den if its eggs are destroyed. I hope you can defeat it."/> <字串 編號="43207" 文字="Ok, I will."/> <字串 編號="43208" 文字="Sorry, I have no time."/> <字串 編號="43209" 文字="I believe you can defeat the Black Widow."/> <字串 編號="43210" 文字="Black Widow will come out if its eggs are destroyed around the den."/> <字串 編號="43211" 文字="You've destroyed the eggs, but why won't the Black Widow come out?"/> <字串 編號="43212" 文字="You've destroyed the eggs."/> <字串 編號="43301" 文字="Maybe, the Black Widow is sleeping?... let me see... I know how to wake it up."/> <字串 編號="43302" 文字="Tell me what do you think?"/> <字串 編號="43303" 文字="Sorry, I'm tired."/> <字串 編號="43304" 文字="I think you can use some Pork-pieces. You can collect some from the Mummies and Pharaohs at the cemetery in the west."/> <字串 編號="43305" 文字="Ok, no problem!"/> <字串 編號="43306" 文字="Sorry, I have no time."/> <字串 編號="43307" 文字="Go to collect/c$2 3/c* Carrion at the cemetery in the west and then come back."/> <字串 編號="43308" 文字="This Carrion is not enough. You should collect more."/> <字串 編號="43309" 文字="I'll wipe some poison on the Carrion. So that when the Black Widow eats it she will die!"/> <字串 編號="43310" 文字="I believe the Black Widow will come out if she smells the Carrion."/> <字串 編號="43401" 文字="There is a stone platform... "/> <字串 編號="43402" 文字="Place the Carrion on the platform"/> <字串 編號="43403" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43404" 文字="I can see a huge shadow creeping out of the den."/> <字串 編號="43405" 文字="Have you found the Black Widow?"/> <字串 編號="43406" 文字="I've defeated it."/> <字串 編號="43407" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="43408" 文字="Great! I think nobody in the Pestle Corps can do as good a job as you!"/> <字串 編號="43409" 文字="Thank you very much. You can choose one of these items as reward."/> <字串 編號="43410" 文字="This is the reward for you help."/> <字串 編號="43411" 文字="I want to tell all of my friends what you've done for us. Thank you!"/> <字串 編號="43412" 文字="I want to tell all of my friends what you've done for us. Thank you!"/> <字串 編號="43601" 文字="It is an Archaic Totem covered by lichen. Although it has suffered from time and weather, it is still emanating a slight golden light on its surface ..."/> <字串 編號="43602" 文字="Touch this Totem."/> <字串 編號="43603" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43604" 文字="A jolt of electricity passes through your body suddenly; an image of big dark bird emerges in your mind; but you cannot understand it."/> <字串 編號="43605" 文字="None"/> <字串 編號="43606" 文字="You checked the Archaic Totem carefully, but found nothing."/> <字串 編號="43607" 文字="Put the Rotten Bird's Feather under the totem."/> <字串 編號="43608" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43609" 文字="The feather glows in front of you, and the glaring light spreads suddenly."/> <字串 編號="43610" 文字="A pack appeared in where the feather used to be."/> <字串 編號="43611" 文字="It is an Archaic Totem covered by lichen. Although it has suffered from time and weather, it is still emanating a slight golden light on its surface ..."/> <字串 編號="43701" 文字="Hi, risker, I am a Businessman traveling between Burning Desert and Wishing Tear. Are you interested in my goods? May I remind you of those quick sands in the desert? Once up a time, I was involved in and came close to death~"/> <字串 編號="43702" 文字="Even now when I think about it I feel pain in my heart. ~~ A sprat saved me, but he was wearing a mantle, so I couldn't see his face. I gave him a ring as a reward. It is strange that he scampered off towards Gebuer Vale which is the Gebuer's territory. Dangerous ..."/> <字串 編號="43703" 文字="Give him the ring"/> <字串 編號="43704" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43705" 文字="Oh! It is the one I gave to my lifesaver. Why it is here? Did you get it from the Gebuer?"/> <字串 編號="43706" 文字="So ... the little silhouette of my lifesaver ... I see, that is a Gebuer who saved me! To my surprise, the Gebuer are amicable to Iron Castle in fact, but ... why do we fight them?"/> <字串 編號="43707" 文字="Maybe it is the harshness of reality! However, you got the ring ... you defeated my lifesaver!? Alas, forget it. Despite ourselves, we don't know when to be friends or enemies. That is destiny."/> <字串 編號="43708" 文字="Hi, risker, I am a Businessman traveling between Burning Desert and Wishing Tear. What a cruel irony of fate~~~~"/> <字串 編號="43709" 文字="Hi, risker, I am a Businessman traveling between Burning Desert and Wishing Tear. Are you interested in my goods? May I remind you of those quick sands in the desert? Once up a time, I was involved in and came close to death~"/> <字串 編號="43801" 文字="I am Spy Sungier from Pestle Corps, and my task is to spy on the enemy. But I am willing yet unable!"/> <字串 編號="43802" 文字="What was the matter with you?"/> <字串 編號="43803" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43804" 文字="Pestle Aide sent me to [/c$2Gebuer Vale/c*] to change over with the investigator there. Our task is to investigate the waterhead in the mountain. Iron Castle developed its technology too fast, meanwhile the abundant pollution can not be disposed of. In addition, the oasis in Wishing Tear has also been polluted."/> <字串 編號="43805" 文字="So the waterhead in Gebuer Vale became our new hope, moreover, we can spy on the Gebuer secretly. But ... I sprained my ankle yesterday and can't complete my task on time. What can I do? "/> <字串 編號="43806" 文字="Let me do it instead of you."/> <字串 編號="43807" 文字="I am afraid I can't. Leave"/> <字串 編號="43808" 文字="Really? Please head for the waterhead in north of Gebuer Vale, and look for the Spy Lude. Let him know I am injured, and he has to stay for a couple more days. I will repay him as soon as my ankle recovers."/> <字串 編號="43809" 文字="Lude is hiding in the riverside in the north of Gebuer Vale to keep himself unobserved."/> <字串 編號="43810" 文字="You! Who are you? Sh~ Gently! The Gebuer may find you."/> <字串 編號="43811" 文字="I am the Spy Lude. Why did you take a risk to come here? What do you want?"/> <字串 編號="43812" 文字="What are you doing?"/> <字串 編號="43813" 文字="The Spy Sungier asked me to find you."/> <字串 編號="43814" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43815" 文字="I am monitoring the behavior of the Gebuer. It is said that an inspiring Leader rose from them, and he is preparing to counterattacking Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="43816" 文字="Sungier sprained his ankle? Haw-haw, am I an outsider? We are brothers who dared to walk the path of the dead! I don't mind if he comes to take over my work later. Tell Sungier: have a good rest!"/> <字串 編號="43817" 文字="Hoo hoo, I am the Spy Lude. Gently! The Gebuer may find you!"/> <字串 編號="43818" 文字="You are back! You must have had a hard time. Lude is a real friend. I will cure my leg injury as soon as possible."/> <字串 編號="43819" 文字="Well, could you do me a favor again? Report to the Pestle Aide that the waterland at Gebuer Vale is in good condition."/> <字串 編號="43820" 文字="I am the Spy Sungier from the Pestle Corps and my task is to spy on the enemy. I need to rest and help my injury to recover as soon as possible, otherwise Lude will have to stay in Gebuer Vale for a long time."/> <字串 編號="43821" 文字="Hi, travelling risker, I am the Spy Sungier from the Pestle Corps and my task is to spy on the enemy."/> <字串 編號="43901" 文字="risker, I am the Pestle Aide Fert of Iron Castle. Why have you come to the battlefront?"/> <字串 編號="43902" 文字="Tell me about the waterhead at Gebuer Vale."/> <字串 編號="43903" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43904" 文字="What? Sungier sprained ankle? Well then he needs to rest. Thank you for bringing the message about the waterhead."/> <字串 編號="43905" 文字="Since you did our spy a favor, you must hate the Gebuer too. Do you know that the Gebuer are preparing for a counterattack?"/> <字串 編號="43906" 文字="Several days ago, Lude sent back a message from Gebuer Vale that the Gebuer have made a [/c$2Fighting Proposal/c*]. The General has received my report, and he wants that proposal, but doesn't know how to get it..."/> <字串 編號="43907" 文字="I will find the proposal."/> <字串 編號="43908" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="43909" 文字="Come on, you can't get the proposal from those Gebuer Warriors. If you want to try it, you must first get to level 25."/> <字串 編號="43910" 文字="How can you be so sure? Well then get the Gebuer Fighting Proposal. It will be with the high-level Gebuer Cadres."/> <字串 編號="43911" 文字="Go to Gebuer Vale and find the Fighting Proposal. The Generic Gebuer Soldiers do not have such secret file, try some of the Gebuer Cadres of high level."/> <字串 編號="43912" 文字="You got the Fighting Proposal finally! What a big success! On behalf of western Pestle Corps, I thank you for what you have done! General Alliewill be satisfied."/> <字串 編號="43913" 文字="It is a reward for your contribution. Please take it!"/> <字串 編號="43914" 文字="I need someone who knows the Gebuer language translate the Fighting Proposal, and then forward it to General Allieimmediately."/> <字串 編號="43915" 文字="Young traveler, this is the battlefront. Please leave quickly if you have no purpose here."/> <字串 編號="44001" 文字="It looks like the den of some giant Creature, and Skeletons are strewn all around ..."/> <字串 編號="44002" 文字="Investigate nearby"/> <字串 編號="44003" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="44004" 文字="You found a black bird feather, which is much bigger than that of the Rotten Bird."/> <字串 編號="44005" 文字="I am the Myth Scholar from Iron Castle, I came here to investigate the Monsters of Burning Desert. I'd like to enter Gebuer Vale, for it is supposed to have many Legendary Monsters there."/> <字串 編號="44006" 文字="Give him the black feather."/> <字串 編號="44007" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="44008" 文字="Where did you get the feather? Oh, Gebuer Vale!? There are a flock of Rotten Birds. I think this must belong to the Giant Rotten Bird."/> <字串 編號="44009" 文字="Rotten Birds are a kind of fierce carnivore. If there is such a giant Monster, it must make a lot of trouble for the Gebuer in that vale, I think."/> <字串 編號="44101" 文字="It will be the climax of my career to see such a Monster, but can I survive doing so?"/> <字串 編號="44102" 文字="I want to see the Giant Rotten Bird."/> <字串 編號="44103" 文字="I got to leave for something else."/> <字串 編號="44104" 文字="You want to commit suicide? Don't involve yourself in danger for the sake of curiosity! Come back to me when you have reached level/c$2 25 /c*."/> <字串 編號="44105" 文字="It can not be found usually, but this is the breeding season of the Rotten Birds. I've got an idea to attract them with this [/c$2Hormone Potion/c*]. The potion sends out the strong smell of female Rotten Birds. The males are sure to go crazy for it!"/> <字串 編號="44106" 文字="I can make it for you if you get enough of the materials I need. Which are/c$2 10/c* Gebuer's Teeth and/c$2 10/c* Lizardmen's Tail."/> <字串 編號="44107" 文字="I need/c$2 10/c* Gebuer's Teeth and/c$2 10/c* Lizardmen's Tail to make Hormone Potion. Go to collect them for me.."/> <字串 編號="44108" 文字="You got them all? Good, just a moment, I need a couple of minutes to prepare."/> <字串 編號="44109" 文字="It's done. Pour it at the den, the Giant Rotten Birds will come to it."/> <字串 編號="44110" 文字="Take the potion to Gebuer Vale. You will see the Giant Rotten Birds in no time!"/> <字串 編號="44201" 文字="It looks like a den of some Giant Creature, and skeletons are strewn all around ..."/> <字串 編號="44202" 文字="Use the Hormone Potion."/> <字串 編號="44203" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="44204" 文字="You are back, risker, did you see the Giant Rotten Bird!? What...You defeated it? You are so powerful. It must be an unforgettable memory!"/> <字串 編號="44205" 文字="Choose anyone you like. Thank you for showing me what real courage is."/> <字串 編號="44206" 文字="I am the Monster scholar from Iron Castle, and I have come here to investigate the Monsters of Burning Desert. I'd like to enter Gebuer Vale, for it is supposed to have many legendary Monsters there."/> <字串 編號="44207" 文字="Haw-haw! Come on! There are Monsters all over the world waiting for your challenge. Come on!"/> <字串 編號="44301" 文字="I am the Chief Assistant in charge of maintaining order in Iron Castle. Here, all of the rules must be complied with carefully. I won't forgive you if you disobey them."/> <字串 編號="44302" 文字="Certainly, the territory around Iron Castle is also under the control of the Hammer Corps. However, Beasts, Monsters and Criminals appear in all of these places from time to time. This problem must be dealt with rapidly!"/> <字串 編號="44303" 文字="Tell me what can I do for you."/> <字串 編號="44304" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="44305" 文字="Presently, we received a message that traces of the [/c$2Crystal Lizard/c*] were found in Wishing Tear. If you can destroy them, the Hammer Corps will give you favorable reward."/> <字串 編號="44306" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="44307" 文字="It is too dangerous, leave."/> <字串 編號="44308" 文字="Well, I will wait for you here. I hope that you can defeat the [/c$2Crystal Lizards/c*] successfully and accomplish the mission I assigned."/> <字串 編號="44309" 文字="Young traveler, comply with the rules carefully in Iron Castle, otherwise I will punish you severely."/> <字串 編號="44310" 文字="You have had a great success in defeating the [/c$2Crystal Lizards/c*] as expected."/> <字串 編號="44311" 文字="This is a reward for what you have done to maintain and improve the surrounding environment of Iron Castle. I hope that you would defeat those Ball Lizardmens successfully and accomplish the mission I assigned."/> <字串 編號="45109" 文字="Young traveler, comply with the rules carefully in Iron Castle, otherwise I will punish you severely."/> <字串 編號="45110" 文字="You have had a great success in defeating those Ball Lizardmens as expected."/> <字串 編號="45111" 文字="This is a reward for what you have done to maintain and improve the surrounding environment of Iron Castle. Take it!"/> <字串 編號="45201" 文字="I am the Chief Assistant in charge of maintaining the order in Iron Castle. Here, all of the rules must be complied with carefully. I won't forgive you if you disobey them."/> <字串 編號="45202" 文字="Certainly, the territory around Iron Castle is under the control of the Hammer Corps. However, Beasts, Monsters and Criminals appear at all of these places from time to time. They must be dealt with rapidly."/> <字串 編號="45203" 文字="Tell me what can I do for you."/> <字串 編號="45204" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="45205" 文字="Presently, we received a message that traces of the [/c$2Undying Lord/c*] was found in Burning Desert. I hope that you would defeat those Gebuer Cadres successfully and accomplish the mission I assigned."/> <字串 編號="45709" 文字="Young traveler, comply with the rules carefully in Iron Castle, otherwise I will punish you severely."/> <字串 編號="45710" 文字="You have had a great success in defeating those Gebuer Cadres as expected."/> <字串 編號="45711" 文字="This is a reward for what you have done to maintain and improve the surrounding environment of Iron Castle. Take it!"/> <字串 編號="45801" 文字="I am the Chief Assistant in charge of maintaining the order in Iron Castle. Here, all of the rules must be complied with carefully. I won't forgive you if you disobey them."/> <字串 編號="45802" 文字="Certainly, the territory around Iron Castle is under the control of the Hammer Corps. However, Beasts, Monsters and Criminals appear at all of these places from time to time. They must be dealt with rapidly."/> <字串 編號="45803" 文字="Tell me what can I do for you."/> <字串 編號="45804" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="45805" 文字="Presently, we received a message that abundant traces of Rotten Bird were found in Gebuer Vale. If you can destroy them, the Hammer Corps will give you a favorable reward."/> <字串 編號="45806" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="45807" 文字="It is too dangerous, leave."/> <字串 編號="45808" 文字="Well, I will wait for you here. I hope that you would defeat those Rotten Birds successfully and accomplish the mission I assigned."/> <字串 編號="45809" 文字="Young traveler, comply with the rules carefully in Iron Castle, otherwise I will punish you severely."/> <字串 編號="45810" 文字="You have had a great success in defeating those Rotten Birds as expected."/> <字串 編號="45811" 文字="This is a reward for what you have done to maintain and improve the surrounding environment of Iron Castle. Take it!"/> <字串 編號="45901" 文字="Hi, /c$2%1/c*, I witnessed what you have done during this period. It seems that you have grown up, and it is time to assign some significant missions to you."/> <字串 編號="45902" 文字="In the Garden of Eden, Angel Lyceum dispatched lots of Spy Angels to monitor the behavior of the Evil Lyceum. According to the reliable information sent back recently, the Spy Angels may need your help..."/> <字串 編號="45903" 文字="Go to [Cactus Plain] and talk with the Spy Angel. He will give you the information collected."/> <字串 編號="46001" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, now is not the time to talk with you ..."/> <字串 編號="46002" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, here you are! I am the Spy Angel in charge of collecting any information about the [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*]. The Angel Spy Office needs your help..."/> <字串 編號="46003" 文字="What information?"/> <字串 編號="46004" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="46005" 文字="The Evil Lyceum has dispatched their [/c$2Student Union Leader/c*] to the Garden of Eden to pick out souls to be converted to Evil in Hell. He has pin pointed some clans to be recruited. Your mission is to stop him."/> <字串 編號="46006" 文字="But this mission could be very dangerous. Although you have been approved by the Iron Castle Angel, I have to confirm your ability in order to protect you from danger. If you fail, all our previous efforts will be wasted."/> <字串 編號="46007" 文字="Ok, no problem."/> <字串 編號="46008" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="46009" 文字="Clean up all of the [/c$2Plateau Monkey/c*] in Cactus Plain! Show your speed and power!"/> <字串 編號="46010" 文字="You have to face lots of Plateau Monkeys. Return to me after completing the mission."/> <字串 編號="46011" 文字="Well done, Angel /c$2%1/c*, you have some abilities indeed. It is not easy for the Angel Lyceum to train such a talent like you."/> <字串 編號="46012" 文字="Take a breath! Get ready for this mission..."/> <字串 編號="46101" 文字="It goes in this way, Student Union Leader of Evil Lyceum is [/c$2Asmode/c*], who is an outstanding student in Evil Lyceum, but cruel and randy, and commits all manners of crimes. He came to the Garden of Eden to recruit students, which is a mission assigned by Tutor of Evil Lyceum [/c$2Satan/c*]. We must stop him."/> <字串 編號="46102" 文字="A head on conflict is unfavorable to our future spy plan, so Angel Spy Office made a tactical plan. First of all, you must have credit with [/c$2Asmode/c*]. Are you ready now?"/> <字串 編號="46103" 文字="I am ready."/> <字串 編號="46104" 文字="Not yet."/> <字串 編號="46105" 文字="Asmode's target is to recruit the Gebuer, the enemy of Iron Castle. As long as you prove that you are one of them, you will have credit with Asmode. Try to get an [/c$2Army Badge/c*] from the Gebuer!"/> <字串 編號="46106" 文字="Go and get an [/c$2Army Badge/c*] from the Gebuer Cadres that appear in Gebuer Vale, then return to me!"/> <字串 編號="46107" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*,well done! You can gain Asmode's trust with this [/c$2Army Badge/c*]."/> <字串 編號="46108" 文字="Then, I will let you know where Asmode is..."/> <字串 編號="46201" 文字="The Student Union Leader of the Evil Lyceum, Asmode is pretending to be a soldier patrolling in Burning Desert. Everyday he observes and picks suitable Gebuers and tricks them into entering the Evil Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="46202" 文字="Take the [/c$2Army Badge/c*] to Asmode. It will get his attention..."/> <字串 編號="46203" 文字="Tyke, never bother me again. I will punch your nose if you make me unhappy. Roll!"/> <字串 編號="46204" 文字="Pretty little girl, what's your name? Do you want to have a good time here with me? Haw-haw. We can get know each other better after patrol..."/> <字串 編號="46205" 文字="Give Asmode the Army Badge."/> <字串 編號="46206" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="46207" 文字="Oh oh oh, you are one of the Gebuer! This badge represents that you are of a high position."/> <字串 編號="46208" 文字="Your cadres told you I am recruiting? I am building a high-tech Gebuer Corps. Haw-haw, I need some talented guys like you."/> <字串 編號="46209" 文字="You must stop Asmode from carrying out his plan. We need you!"/> <字串 編號="46301" 文字="You are welcome to join us. But...why don't you dress like the other Gebuers? Are you from Michael's troops?"/> <字串 編號="46302" 文字="Mi, Michael? I didn't get you..."/> <字串 編號="46303" 文字="I have to go. I got something else to do."/> <字串 編號="46304" 文字="Oh, nothing, Michael is the most handsome boy I have ever seen. I yearn day and night for his friendship, but he dislikes me. Ah, he doesn't like me at all."/> <字串 編號="46305" 文字="But I still have a few misgivings, you don't look like a Gebuer. Say, show me your villainy and prove it. Go to the camp near Burning Desert and defeat some Iron Castle Soldiers. They are your enemies."/> <字串 編號="46306" 文字="O...Ok."/> <字串 編號="46307" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="46308" 文字="Defeat some Iron Castle Soldiers, and then return to me."/> <字串 編號="46309" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, it seems that you got some unexpected troubles. [/c$2Asmode/c*] is not easy to cheat. He is very cautious. No wonder he can be trusted by Director Wolay of Evil Lyceum Satan."/> <字串 編號="46310" 文字="Find the Surgeon in Burning Desert! Many comrades who been wounded whilst fighting against the Gebuer need his treatment everyday. He must hate leeches. Let him know we need his help to prevent Gebuer from becoming a ferocious evil."/> <字串 編號="46311" 文字="Virtuous risker, thanks for collecting Venom Sacs for me last time, which I used to make the serum. What can I do for you this time?"/> <字串 編號="46312" 文字="You want to stop the Gebuer."/> <字串 編號="46313" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="46314" 文字="Ha ha, risker, I don't get your meaning. Gebuer becomes Evil? Evil Lyceum? I am confused ..."/> <字串 編號="46315" 文字="Never mind, you did do me a big favor. I have many [/c$2Tin Card/c*] that belonged to those dead soldiers. You can take them to complete your mission. I believe they will be happy to know that they still can make contribution to Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="46316" 文字="Give the Tin Cards to Asmode."/> <字串 編號="46317" 文字="Ha-ha, you are so cruel even though you don't look it. You defeated so many soldiers and stole the Tin Cards around their neck, really beyond my imagination. Ha ha ha ~"/> <字串 編號="46318" 文字="Your are so bad, but I like it......."/> <字串 編號="46319" 文字="You must stop Asmode from carrying out his plan. We need you!"/> <字串 編號="46401" 文字="Very good, I completely believe that you are one of the Gebuer. Here take this Magic Stone!"/> <字串 編號="46402" 文字="Go to [/c$2Gebuer Vale/c*], there is a [/c$2Monkey Statue Holding An Egg/c*] near the cliff on the north. Remember to use the Magic Stone there, my friends are waiting to hold a grand welcoming ceremony for you!"/> <字串 編號="46403" 文字="Go ahead! Ha-ha~~, I have to carry on patrolling!"/> <字串 編號="46404" 文字="There is an elaborate incantation marked on the egg. But you have no idea what it is for. A chill strikes your hand when you touch the egg."/> <字串 編號="46405" 文字="Put Magic Stone close to this egg"/> <字串 編號="46406" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="46407" 文字="The Magic Stone gives off a purple light and shakes violently in your hand, you have to hold it tightly. "/> <字串 編號="46408" 文字="At the same moment, you are surrounded by a purple light!! It is too bright to open your eyes."/> <字串 編號="46409" 文字="When you open your eyes, you find yourself trapped in a dark cave. And [/c$2Asmode/c*] is standing in front of you."/> <字串 編號="46501" 文字="Haw-haw. I am the genius evil from the Hell Lyceum--[/c$2Student Union Leader Asmode/c*]!Do you see it? These are my underlings.
