You have the honor to be one of them."/> <字串 編號="46502" 文字="Here is my Magic Formation! Contribute your soul. And I will bring you to hell."/> <字串 編號="46503" 文字="What! I have actually been defeated by mere humans!"/> <字串 編號="46504" 文字="!! (Asmode seems to understand something...)"/> <字串 編號="46505" 文字="There is only one person who has this power."/> <字串 編號="46506" 文字="Before Asmode can finish his words, he disappears in black smoke into the air."/> <字串 編號="46507" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, the news about you beating Asmode has been spread all over."/> <字串 編號="46508" 文字="You have done a great job for the Angel Lyceum! The Lyceum leader, Michael, is very happy because you have destroyed the Evil Lyceum's recruitment plan."/> <字串 編號="46509" 文字="Pick one present which the Lyceum leader, Michael, has arranged for you! They are all precious [/c$2Heaven Weapon/c*]."/> <字串 編號="46510" 文字="Now you can go back to the [/c$2Iron Castle Angel/c*]. Thank you for your help. The Spy Angels will record your contribution!"/> <字串 編號="46511" 文字="I'm the Spy Angel. I insist on collecting all of the information about the Evil Lyceum!"/> <字串 編號="46512" 文字="..............................."/> <字串 編號="50001" 文字="/c$2%1/c* Hello! You are welcome to become the Angel Protector of Breeze Jungle. I'm the Angel who will help you to become an Angel Protector of highest level..."/> <字串 編號="50002" 文字="I have come here to register!"/> <字串 編號="50003" 文字="Tell me about the Angel Protector's mission?"/> <字串 編號="50004" 文字="Tell me about the Angel Contribution?"/> <字串 編號="50005" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50006" 文字="Good, you have come to register!"/> <字串 編號="50007" 文字="I'm your first guide in the Garden of Eden. I'll give you more instruction in appropriate situations..."/> <字串 編號="50008" 文字="There are many people needing your help in Breeze Jungle. But since you are new here, your ability is limited. It's better to collect some information before starting your venture!"/> <字串 編號="50009" 文字="There are two learned people in Breeze Jungle: the [/c$2Real Expert Tailor/c*] and the [/c$2Explorer Gulin/c*]. Tailor is very familiar with the distribution of items in Breeze Jungle. You can consult him in these ways!"/> <字串 編號="50010" 文字="As an excellent explorer, Gulin is very familiar with geological environment and Monsters' specialty in Breeze Jungle. Besides, he has sufficient knowledge of battle and magic. You can consult him in these ways!"/> <字串 編號="50011" 文字="As an Angel Protector in Breeze Jungle, you must try to relieve people's misery. It's the Angel Protectors' duty to help them to overcome difficulties and even fight against the pawns of the Evil Lyceum and bring happiness to every corner of this land."/> <字串 編號="50012" 文字="But, now people do not believe in the existence of Angels anymore. So you have to come to them in the form of a human! The road before you reach your goal is a long and perilous one! Please fight!"/> <字串 編號="50013" 文字="The [/c$2Angel Contribution/c*] is the measuring standard of the Angels. Every country has its own Angel Contribution, whether Aurora City or Dark City, whether Breeze Jungle or Iron Castle...we decide how many points Angels get according to their contributions."/> <字串 編號="50014" 文字="At present you can get an Angel Contribution by helping people in Breeze Jungle with their worries and finishing the quests given to you by them. In addition, you can also get more by attending the Angel Protector Competetion held regularly in the future. You will improve your [/c$2status/c*] after your Angel Contribution improves. "/> <字串 編號="50015" 文字="When your Angel Contribution reaches a given amount, you can come to me for quests. After finishing them, you'll be promoted to Angel Protector with higher status and receive presents and blessing from heaven..."/> <字串 編號="50016"/> <字串 編號="50017" 文字="Now, go to talk with them. You come back to me when you have accumulated more experience, your level has reached/c$2 20/c* and your status is upgraded to/c$2 2 /c*. Then I'll instruct you to start the first mission that Heaven assigns to the Angel Protector in Breeze Jungle!"/> <字串 編號="50018" 文字="Go back to the Angel Lyceum"/> <字串 編號="50019" 文字="Now I will transport you back to the Angel Lyceum. You can ask [/c$2Director Wolay/c*] to help you come back if you want to~"/> <字串 編號="50020" 文字="You needn't go back to the Angel Lyceum because your level is high enough!"/> <字串 編號="50101" 文字="Hello, risker. I'm Hebu. I specialize in planting herbs. This place is regarded as treasure given to us by nature because of the warm climate and the variety of plants! Only unfortunately...regrettable things always occur..."/> <字串 編號="50102" 文字="Tell me about the regrettable things "/> <字串 編號="50103" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50105" 文字="I collected many special seeds from all the corners of the forest and planted them in the garden outside my house to observe their growth closely. But some disgusting [/c$2Forest Monkey/c*] like to destroy my garden when I'm not looking. It upsets me very much. So I wonder who can help me drive away those Monkeys."/> <字串 編號="50106" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="50107" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50108" 文字="No, you can not. Those monkeys are not fierce beasts, but they are very sly so that they will play tricks on you without restriction. Come back here when your level reaches/c$2 6 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="50109" 文字="Really!? Then help me deal with those Forest Monkey. I hope they are punished so that they will not dare to make trouble in my garden."/> <字串 編號="50110" 文字="I saw a Forest Monkey jumping through the trees just now, it seems you have not driven them all away yet! Make more effort!"/> <字串 編號="50111" 文字="Thank you for your driving away those disgusting Monkeys..."/> <字串 編號="50112" 文字="This is a reward for you. Please accept it~"/> <字串 編號="50113" 文字="Tourists are seldom seen here. This jungle is very big, so you should be careful not to get lost~"/> <字串 編號="50201" 文字="I found just now that the rare [/c$2Mushroom/c*] is missing from my garden. I spent so much time and energy growing it...I saw some feathers and leaves on the ground...I think I know who did it.."/> <字串 編號="50202" 文字="Who did it?"/> <字串 編號="50203" 文字="Report it to the Militia Army."/> <字串 編號="50204" 文字="Have you heard of the [/c$2Nest Tree Elf/c*]? They inhabit the deep of forest and feed only on grass. But after seeing my rare herbs, their appetites will have been whetted. I think they took my Mushrooms. But I don't know who can help me..."/> <字串 編號="50205" 文字="Maybe I can help."/> <字串 編號="50206" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50208" 文字="Can you help me get my Mushrooms back? Terrific! It should be in stomach of a certain Tree Elf. It will be ok if I can even just get some of it's residue..."/> <字串 編號="50209" 文字="You can find the trail of the Tree Elves in the south of forest. Help me punish them since they dared to steal and eat my Mushrooms. Come back quickly if you find my Mushrooms~"/> <字串 編號="50210" 文字="Yee! My Mushrooms, they looks intact. Thank goodness! I spent too much time and energy growing them.."/> <字串 編號="50211" 文字="Risker, thank you very much! I don't know how to repay you. Please accept my little present."/> <字串 編號="50301" 文字="Risker, have you heard about the most wonderful plant [/c$2Flame Lily/c*] in this forest?"/> <字串 編號="50302" 文字="Flame Lily?"/> <字串 編號="50303" 文字="I have no interest, I'm going."/> <字串 編號="50304" 文字="This is a flower monster with magical powers. It's said that her Pistil can bring the dead person back to life and that her Pollen can be made into gun powder and that her Petals can be made into warm clothes! I'd like to create a medicine from the Mushroom and the Pistil. I know it's dangerous, but I wonder whether you will help me again?"/> <字串 編號="50305" 文字="No problem."/> <字串 編號="50306" 文字="Sorry, it's too dangerous."/> <字串 編號="50307" 文字="The [/c$2Flame Lily/c*] always appears in the southeast corner of forest. Her power is definitely far stronger than that of all of the Monsters you've met. So I suggest you'd better ask some companions to go with you."/> <字串 編號="50308" 文字="Not found the Flame Lily yet? She is certain to show up in the southeast corner of forest. Wait for her patiently. Come back to me if you get her Pistil~"/> <字串 編號="50309" 文字="You have succeeded in finishing the quest I entrusted to you! You are so great! Thank you for getting Fiery Bud for me~"/> <字串 編號="50310" 文字="To express my thanks to you, please accept this reward!"/> <字串 編號="50311" 文字="There is only one step left before success. Ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="50401" 文字="Now Mushroom and Fiery Buds are all here. But one more medicinal ingredient is still needed before I can make the medicine. Could you do me another favor?"/> <字串 編號="50402" 文字="What do you need me to do?"/> <字串 編號="50403" 文字="Sorry, I have something else to do."/> <字串 編號="50404" 文字="My assistant is collecting Mushroom Spores in the [/c$2Mushroom Forest/c*]. But he has been there for days. Now I'm only short of the ingredient that he's collecting. Please give him this letter. I written to him telling that he speed up his work."/> <字串 編號="50405" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50406" 文字="Sorry, I will not."/> <字串 編號="50407" 文字="Go to northwest of Dense Forest and then you will reach Mushroom Forest, a swamp full of Mushrooms and Fungi. My assistant should be near the entrance."/> <字串 編號="50408" 文字="Can't you find the entrance to the Mushroom Forest? You will see it if you go northwest."/> <字串 編號="50409" 文字="Kind risker, we meet again. I can continue with the experiment to refine medicine after my assistant comes back..."/> <字串 編號="50410" 文字="Alas...I can not finish the job given to me by my Boss on time..."/> <字串 編號="50411" 文字="Hand the letter to the assistant"/> <字串 編號="50412" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50413" 文字="Is this my Boss's letter...let me have a look...Oh! he has managed to collect the [/c$2Fiery Bud/c*]. How did he do it? I thought you would not succeed until I had finished collecting Spores."/> <字串 編號="50414" 文字="Now he is only short of the spores that I'm collecting. But it's not easy to collect sufficient amounts! Anyway I thank you. I will finish my work as soon as possible."/> <字串 編號="50501" 文字="The idea of preserving health has surged in Breeze Jungle recently. Are you interested in Healthcare Products? I sell unique Healthcare Products made from all natural materials. My products are popular with customers! But I'm really too busy so that I require someone to help me."/> <字串 編號="50502" 文字="What do you need them to do?"/> <字串 編號="50503" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50504" 文字="I'm not free to collect the materials needed to make our Healthcare Products, so I need someone to collect/c$2 10/c* Petals from the Wild Lily. Because our face mask, made of these Petals, sells so well we have run out of the raw materials. Where can I find someone to help me?"/> <字串 編號="50505" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="50506" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50507" 文字="Risker, you are not up to this job. Those Wild Lilies are not common flowers and are quite offensive. You may be eaten by them if you are even slightly careless Come back when your level reaches/c$2 6 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="50508" 文字="Collect/c$2 10/c* complete Petals from Wild Lilies! Come back to me when you finish it and I will reward you."/> <字串 編號="50509" 文字="You have not collected/c$2 10/c* complete Petals yet! You can get them from the Wild Lilies around the forest!"/> <字串 編號="50510" 文字="You are back! Thank you. I would not have anything to sell if it wasn't for your help..."/> <字串 編號="50511" 文字="Please accept this reward."/> <字串 編號="50512" 文字="The idea of preserving health has surged in Breeze Jungle recently. Are you interested in Healthcare Products? I sell unique Healthcare Products made from all natural materials. My products are popular with customers! "/> <字串 編號="50513" 文字="Traveler, are you not interested in Healthcare Products? Our beauty aids are produced in Breeze Jungle from entirely natural~~~"/> <字串 編號="50601" 文字="I'm Militia Chief of Breeze Jungle. To prevent the [/c$2Magic Eye/c*] from sneaking in, regular patrol is important. But I don't know whether the soldiers are defending their posts."/> <字串 編號="50602" 文字="What is the Breeze Jungle Militia Army?"/> <字串 編號="50603" 文字="What are the Magic Eye?"/> <字串 編號="50604" 文字="Do you need my help?"/> <字串 編號="50605" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50606" 文字="Are you sure you are from Breeze Jungle? How have you not heard of the Breeze Jungle Militia Army? It's our duty to protect forests around here. We even protect the ancient legacy of the forest."/> <字串 編號="50607" 文字="Belonging to the Elders of Breeze Jungle, I must abide by their orders and instructions. We have been disturbed by the Northwestern Giants and the Mysterious [/c$ 2 Magic Eye/c*]. It is too hard to defeat them......so we hope we can recruit more and more excellent people to strengthen our forces."/> <字串 編號="50608" 文字="The [/c$2Magic Eye/c*] are a robber league. They crazily love treasure and ancient relics. So they always dig ancient tombs for valuable mortuary objects and treasure. Now I am chasing after the members of the Magic Eye as the Elders ordered."/> <字串 編號="50609" 文字="It's said that they camp in the western [/c$2Jade Vale/c*]. But we don't know the specific position...In a word, you'd better not associate with those guys."/> <字串 編號="50610" 文字="Can you carry this bulletin to the other soldiers? The Elders have declared some regulations. I hope they can carry them out and abide by them seriously."/> <字串 編號="50611" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="50612" 文字="Sorry, I'm not free."/> <字串 編號="50613" 文字="There are 2 soldiers in total: one is at the exit of the [/c$2Mushroom Forest/c*] and the other is at the exit of the [/c$2Cryptic Moon Swamp/c*]. You can also ask other people for directions if you get confused. Will you help me?~"/> <字串 編號="50614" 文字="You can not find them? Those 2 soldiers are at the exit of the Mushroom Forest and the Cryptic Moon Swamp respectively."/> <字串 編號="50615" 文字="Thank you for your help. I believe they will certainly carry out the Elder's orders seriously..."/> <字串 編號="50616" 文字="The Dense Forest needs to be defended more heavily, in case those guys from the [/c$2Magic Eye/c*] sneak into Breeze Jungle and disgrace the Militia Army."/> <字串 編號="50617" 文字="I'm the Militia Chief of Breeze Jungle, responsible for watching Dense Forest in case the [/c$2Magic Eye/c*] sneak in. So regular patrol is considerably important."/> <字串 編號="50618" 文字="I'm the the Militia Chief of Breeze Jungle, remember, even foreign people must abide by our regulations in the forest."/> <字串 編號="50619" 文字="I'm a member of the Militia Army of Breeze Jungle. It's my duty to control the people passing in and out of the Mushroom Forest and the Dense Forest."/> <字串 編號="50620" 文字="I'm a member of the Breeze Jungle Militia. It's my duty to control those people passing in and out of the Cryptic Moon Swamp and the Dense Forest."/> <字串 編號="50621" 文字="Hand the bulletin to team members"/> <字串 編號="50622" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50623" 文字="Did our Captain ask you to bring this? The Elders now have another new bulletin. We will have to work overtime...Woo~"/> <字串 編號="50624" 文字="Tell him to count on me. I am sure to guard this place safely!"/> <字串 編號="50625" 文字="I'm a member of the Breeze Jungle Militia. You are not local? Are you a Giant or a Spy from the Magic Eye? Well, I'm watching you, so you'd better behave yourself..."/> <字串 編號="50701" 文字="More and more young people forget where happiness comes from...they don't realize that our steady lives, nowadays are due to our ancestors and have forgotten all the sacrifice rituals...alas~"/> <字串 編號="50702" 文字="Tell me about the sacrifices."/> <字串 編號="50703" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50704" 文字="It's like so..."/> <字串 編號="50705" 文字="To hold the ritual to worship the Flame Ancestor Spirit. I need/c$2 10/c* tufts of Monkey Hair as the guiding drug. They are be available from the Forest Monkey. But I'm short of helpers now. I think only few people are willing to attend the ritual..."/> <字串 編號="50706" 文字="I can help"/> <字串 編號="50707" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50708" 文字="Although you are willing to help, you are not able to take the hair from the Monkeys. Come again when your level reaches/c$2 6 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="50709" 文字="Good, I appreciate you very much. Help me collect/c$2 10/c* tufts of Monkey Hair! They can be got from the Forest Monkeys who leap around the forest."/> <字串 編號="50710" 文字="Report back to me after you get/c$2 10/c* tufts of Monkey Hair."/> <字串 編號="50711" 文字="Good, you finished quest I gave you. Such a young person like you is quite rare in Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="50712" 文字="On behalf of the Elders, I express thanks to you. Please accept this reward!"/> <字串 編號="50713" 文字="Foreign citizen, welcome to this forest. I'm Priest of Breeze Jungle. Please abide by relevant regulations because we will hold a fiesta soon."/> <字串 編號="50801" 文字="To hold the ritual to worship the Wind Ancestor Spirit, I need/c$2 10/c* Wind Leaves as the guiding drug. They can be found near the Nest Tree Elves. But I'm short of helpers now. I think only a few people are willing to attend the ritual..."/> <字串 編號="50802" 文字="I can help"/> <字串 編號="50803" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50804" 文字="Although you are willing to help, you are not able to take Wind Leaf from the Nest Tree Elves. Come again when your level reaches/c$2 6 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="50805" 文字="Good, I appreciate you very much. Help me to collect/c$2 10/c* Wind Leaves! They can be got from the Nest Tree Elves who totter in the deep of the forest."/> <字串 編號="50806" 文字="Report to me after you get/c$2 10/c* Wind Leaves."/> <字串 編號="50807" 文字="Good, you finished the quest I gave you. Such a young person like you is quite rare in Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="50808" 文字="On behalf of the Elders, I express thanks to you. Please accept this reward!"/> <字串 編號="50901" 文字="To hold ritual to worship the Water Ancestor Spirit, I need/c$2 10/c* Icy Petals as the Guiding Drug. They can only be found on the Wild Lily. But I'm short of helpers now. I think only few people are willing to attend the ritual..."/> <字串 編號="50902" 文字="I can help"/> <字串 編號="50903" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="50904" 文字="Although you are willing to help, you are not able to take the Petals from the Wild Lily. Come again when your level reaches/c$2 6 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="50905" 文字="Good, I appreciate you very much. Help me to collect/c$2 10/c* Icy Petals. They can be found from the Huge Flower Monster."/> <字串 編號="50906" 文字="Report to me after you get/c$2 10/c* Icy Petals."/> <字串 編號="50907" 文字="Good, you finished the quest I give you. Such a young person like you is quite rare in Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="50908" 文字="On behalf of the Elders, I express thanks to you. Please accept this reward!"/> <字串 編號="51001" 文字="Alas...I can't finish all of the work my Boss set me on time..."/> <字串 編號="51002" 文字="Hand the letter to the assistant"/> <字串 編號="51003" 文字="What are you worried about?"/> <字串 編號="51004" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51005" 文字="I'm the assistant of the herbalist Hebu. He is working on making a new potion, so he needs a lot of materials. He sent me to Mushroom Forest to collect the high quality Spores."/> <字串 編號="51006" 文字="The [/c$2Red Mushroom/c*] here is considerably offensive. I can't collect enough of the best quality Spores from them with ease. So my work is progressing too slowly..."/> <字串 編號="51007" 文字="I'll help you to collect some"/> <字串 編號="51008" 文字="Take care"/> <字串 編號="51009" 文字="You look like an inexperienced risker. You'd better not to try your luck. I'll look for another way. Come to help me after your level exceeds/c$2 10 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="51010" 文字="You are so warm-hearted! To share the burden of my work! Collect/c$2 10/c* Good Spores from the Red Mushroom at the south of the Forest~"/> <字串 編號="51011" 文字="You have not collected enough Spores yet. Make an extra effort! Come to me after you collect/c$2 10/c* Spores~"/> <字串 編號="51012" 文字="Oh, Thank you for collecting these Spores! Hu~the work has finally made progress, but it is still a way from being finished..."/> <字串 編號="51013" 文字="Anyway I should thank you for your help. Here is an award. Please accept it."/> <字串 編號="51014" 文字="Risker, is this your first time to Mushroom Forest? Are you amazed to find so many Mushrooms growing here?"/> <字串 編號="51101" 文字="My name is Pan, a member of the [/c$2Rolling Tail Guild/c*]. The leader sent me to investigate how many [/c$2Golden Matsuake/c*] are growing here."/> <字串 編號="51102" 文字="What is the Rolling Tail Guild?"/> <字串 編號="51103" 文字="What is the Golden Matsuake?"/> <字串 編號="51104" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51105" 文字="I'll tell you~The Rolling Tail Guild is a Cate League in Breeze Jungle. Our favorite food is the tasty Mushroom. But some disgusting boars love to destroy them. Our duty is to protect them until they mature."/> <字串 編號="51106" 文字="We will pick and cook them when all of the Matsuake mature. We share delicious food with everyone by holding a party. But not all kinds of Mushrooms can be made into tasty dish. There are many poisonous and offensive Mushrooms in Mushroom Forest!"/> <字串 編號="51107" 文字="The [/c$2Golden Matsuake/c*] is the most popular delicacy in our League. they are very precious because they only mature at this time annually, in small quantities. Estimating that there are more matsuakes this year than previous years, our leader sent me here to record quantity."/> <字串 編號="51108" 文字="Strangely, I've not found any traces of Golden Matsuake at all. I remember I have seen one or two Matsuake here! Can you help me ask other companions if they have found any of them."/> <字串 編號="51109" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="51110" 文字="Sorry, I have no time"/> <字串 編號="51111" 文字="One is near the entrance of the [/c$2Mysterious Garden/c*], the other is near the entrance of the [/c$2Jade Vale/c*] at the west. They have been looking for the Golden Matsuake for a long time, just like me. I wonder if they have any news about them or not."/> <字串 編號="51112" 文字="My companions are at the entrances of the Mysterious Garden and the Jade Vale. Please find them for me~"/> <字串 編號="51113" 文字="My name is Pan, a member of the [/c$2Rolling Tail Guild/c*]. My favorite food is Mushroom Cake~Do you like it?"/> <字串 編號="51114" 文字="Pan let me ask you about Golden Matsuake"/> <字串 編號="51115" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51116" 文字="It's like this...I've not found any trace of the Golden Matsuake yet~I'm afraid that they were eaten by those vile boars."/> <字串 編號="51117" 文字="Please tell Pan I will continue to look for them."/> <字串 編號="51118" 文字="My name is Hei, a member of the [/c$2Rolling Tail Guild/c*]. My favorite food is the Needle Mushroom Biscuit~Do you like it?"/> <字串 編號="51119" 文字="It doesn't seem to be optimistic. Where are those former Golden Matsuakes!? Were they eaten by those detestable boars?"/> <字串 編號="51120" 文字="Anyway I thank you for your help. This is an award. Please accept it."/> <字串 編號="51121" 文字="My name is Pan, a member of the [/c$2Rolling Tail Guild/c*]. Have you heard of us in Breeze Jungle?"/> <字串 編號="51201" 文字="I think the Golden Matsuakes were certainly taken by those boars. But I'm short of evidence!"/> <字串 編號="51202" 文字="Who took them?"/> <字串 編號="51203" 文字="Hand the residue of the Matsuake to Pan"/> <字串 編號="51204" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51205" 文字="Those [/c$2Mane Boar/c*] in Mushroom Forest! They used to eat our long-expecting Mushrooms so that we had to eat dried Mushrooms with a flavor much worse than fresh ones in the festivals of that year."/> <字串 編號="51206" 文字="I doubt that the Golden Matsuake was destroyed by them! But I don't know how to collect evidence..."/> <字串 編號="51207" 文字="Let me collect evidence."/> <字串 編號="51208" 文字="Make an extra effort, go."/> <字串 編號="51209" 文字="Those boars are so brutal that you may be hurt by their thorns, or even heavily wounded due to their violent hits. Come again when your level exceeds/c$2 10 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="51210" 文字="I am sorry to trouble you to do it! I hope that the Matsuakes were not eaten by them."/> <字串 編號="51211" 文字="You can find some clues about the Golden Matsuake from the Mane Boars..."/> <字串 編號="51212" 文字="Oh I how I didn't want this to be so! Those vile Mane Boars have really eaten our Golden Matsuake!!"/> <字串 編號="51213" 文字="I'm too angry! I will surely tell the leader that Rolling Tail Guild must challenge the Mane Boars to protect our right to enjoy Mushrooms!"/> <字串 編號="51214" 文字="Hu~Sorry, I'm too excited. Thanks a lot for what you've done for our guild. Please accept this present."/> <字串 編號="51301" 文字="It's a fact that the Golden Matsuakes have all been eaten. To avoid the reoccurrence of such a thing, the Rolling Tail Guild must punish the Mane Boars."/> <字串 編號="51302" 文字="What do you plan to do?"/> <字串 編號="51303" 文字="Hand Golden Matsuake to Pan"/> <字串 編號="51304" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51305" 文字="Those Matsuakes have been eaten by the Boars certainly under the orders of the Boar Head, [/c$2Iron Mane Blaic/c*], in Mushroom Forest. Those Mane Boars will not make trouble only if their Head is defeated."/> <字串 編號="51306" 文字="Let me defeat it."/> <字串 編號="51307" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51308" 文字="You are really a kind and brave risker! But the [/c$2Iron Mane Blaic/c*] is very fierce, unlike common Boars. You'd better find some helpers if you want to defeat him."/> <字串 編號="51309" 文字="The Iron Mane Blaic often shows up near the bank in the northwest. You can surely find him there."/> <字串 編號="51310" 文字="You succeed in defeating Boar Head! Let me have a look...what's in your hand...?"/> <字串 編號="51311" 文字="Wow! How did you get a complete [/c$2Golden Matsuake/c*]? Too terrific! Let me cheer for you!~"/> <字串 編號="51312" 文字="Please select your favorite one from these presents! Don't refuse me! You deserve it."/> <字串 編號="51313" 文字="Luckily all the Matsuakes have not been eaten by the Boars. Although only one is left, it's lucky enough. Our annual party will be held as usual..."/> <字串 編號="51314" 文字="Can you help me hand my invitation to the [/c$2Pontiff Shiwand/c*] of the Cryptic Moon Swamp? He is a distinguished guest, that the Rolling Tail Guild must invite annually ~"/> <字串 編號="51315" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="51316" 文字="I have another thing to do."/> <字串 編號="51317" 文字="Thank you! Such an ardent man like you is rare in Breeze Jungle. The [/c$2Cryptic Moon Swamp/c*] is located to the east of the Dense Forest. Pontiff Shiwand is by the altar at the north of swamp."/> <字串 編號="51318" 文字="Pontiff is at the altar at the north of Cryptic Moon Swamp. Please hand the letter to him~"/> <字串 編號="51319" 文字="We are looking forward to the annual Rolling Tail Party! I don't know what food will the Golden Matsuake be made into? Hand-pulled Noodles?Pizza? Cake? It makes my mouth water just thinking about it~~"/> <字串 編號="51320" 文字="What's the matter? We will hold a large-scale fete activity soon. We are collecting the necessary materials for the ritual in the Forest...do you want to help?"/> <字串 編號="51321" 文字="Please hand the letter to Pontiff "/> <字串 編號="51322" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51323" 文字="Ha-ha~those cute Boars! Their enthusiasm for the Matsuake is beyond my imagination. I admire their persistence in the search for delicious food~"/> <字串 編號="51324" 文字="Thank you for passing on the letter to me."/> <字串 編號="51325" 文字="Thanks a lot! The Rolling Tail Guild will certainly remember your deeds!"/> <字串 編號="51401" 文字="Hello, I'm the Newbie Wizard of Breeze Jungle. According to my magic book, the Purple Mushroom can be refined into a valuable Magic Catalyst. So I want to collect a great deal as spares in the future."/> <字串 編號="51402" 文字="What is a Magic Catalyst?"/> <字串 編號="51403" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51404" 文字="Yes. Wizards need some materials to use magic. Sometimes excellent Catalysts can help enforce magic, so the Purple Mushroom Venom is a good thing for Wizards to have. But...they are so brutal that you can not take the venom from them with ease."/> <字串 編號="51405" 文字="I can help you to collect venom."/> <字串 編號="51406" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51407" 文字="It's too dangerous for you to deal with those cruel Purple Mushroom because of your insufficient power. Come back again after your level exceeds/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="51408" 文字="You are so kind. Please collect/c$2 10/c* Purple Mushroom Venom for me. They appear at the west of the Mushroom Forest. Remember, don't mix them up with the Red Mushrooms~"/> <字串 編號="51409" 文字="You have not collected enough venom yet~you can also look for them in the west of the Forest~"/> <字串 編號="51410" 文字="You came back so early! You're the man~Thank you for your collecting/c$2 10/c* Purple Mushroom Venom."/> <字串 編號="51411" 文字="I will give you a small present, to thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="51412" 文字="I'm the Newbie Wizard from Breeze Jungle. I wonder if there are people learning Wizardry in your country?"/> <字串 編號="51501" 文字="Are you... are you from Breeze Jungle? Are you a member of the Militia Army!?"/> <字串 編號="51502" 文字="I do not belong to the Militia Army..."/> <字串 編號="51503" 文字="You look too suspicious. Go away. "/> <字串 編號="51504" 文字="You..It doesn't seem like you are deceiving me. I'm hungry. Can you look for some food for me?"/> <字串 編號="51505" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="51506" 文字="Sorry, but you look suspicious."/> <字串 編號="51507" 文字="I will wait for you here. Remember, don't tell anyone you saw me. I need some meat and some mushrooms to regain my energy...Please..."/> <字串 編號="51508" 文字="You can get Pork-pieces from the [/c$2Mane Boar/c*] and get mushrooms from the [/c$2Red Mushroom/c*]. Don't bring me Purple Mushrooms."/> <字串 編號="51509" 文字="You are back. I almost died of hunger. Let me eat them quickly!"/> <字串 編號="51510" 文字="I'm too full but I feel comfortable~~~thank you for your help! Please accept my small present!"/> <字串 編號="51511" 文字="Are you...are you from Breeze Jungle? Are you a member of the Militia Army!? Go away! Go away!"/> <字串 編號="51601" 文字="I should begin to work after I'm full. Risker, I believe you do not belong to the Breeze Jungle Militia Army. Will you join us?"/> <字串 編號="51602" 文字="Yes."/> <字串 編號="51603" 文字="Not interested."/> <字串 編號="51604" 文字="By the way, I'm Hork from the [/c$2Magic Eye/c*]. You must have heard of our group!? We are investigating the matter of the [/c$2Faded Jungle/c*] because it is linked with the relics in west of the Jade Vale. I have sent many people there..."/> <字串 編號="51605" 文字="Having found some clues, we are still short of some key historical materials. There is a book titled the [/c$2Abyssal Sadness/c*] in the library of Breeze Jungle which records some history of the [/c$2Faded Jungle/c*]. Breeze Jungle is tightly defended. Can you help me take this book?"/> <字串 編號="51606" 文字="Yes."/> <字串 編號="51607" 文字="Not interested."/> <字串 編號="51608" 文字="Please go to the library of Breeze Jungle and take [/c$2Abyssal Sadness/c*] back for me."/> <字串 編號="51609" 文字="The [Abyssal Sadness] is in the library of Breeze Jungle. I will wait for you here."/> <字串 編號="51610" 文字="Good! We can enter into the [/c$2Faded Jungle/c*] soon with the help of this book. I, on behalf of the Magic Eye, thank you for what you've done for us."/> <字串 編號="51611" 文字="Please accept this award."/> <字串 編號="51612" 文字="Don't tell anyone where I am, especially those people of the Militia Army in Breeze Jungle......"/> <字串 編號="51613" 文字="There are a variety of ancient books in the book case..."/> <字串 編號="51614" 文字="Look for the book titled the [Abyssal Sadness]..."/> <字串 編號="51615" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51616" 文字="You find an old book written with the [/c$2Abyssal Sadness/c*] on the cover."/> <字串 編號="51901" 文字="I'm a member of the Militia in Breeze Jungle. This is a holy place, the [/c$2Cryptic Moon Swamp/c*] is where the annual sacrifice ritual is held. There are more and more Monsters here in recent years so that it's more tiring to clear up this place before the ritual. It would be perfect to have some helpers..."/> <字串 編號="51902" 文字="Tell me how I can help"/> <字串 編號="51903" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51904" 文字="I'm a member of the Militia in Breeze Jungle. This is a holy place, the [/c$2Cryptic Moon Swamp/c*] is where the annual sacrifice ritual is held. Non-local people must abide by relevant regulations and are not permitted to destroy anything here."/> <字串 編號="51905" 文字="This is the way it is..."/> <字串 編號="51906" 文字="Did you see the Elves flying over the swamp? They are so naughty and sometimes try to destroy altar for the ritual in Breeze Jungle. So we need someone to drive them away temporarily."/> <字串 編號="51907" 文字="Let me do it."/> <字串 編號="51908" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="51909" 文字="You can not. Those Elves may look cute, but they are offensive when losing their tempers. Come again after your level exceeds/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="51910" 文字="Please drive those Elves away! Report to me after finishing it and I'll give you reward."/> <字串 編號="51911" 文字="Those Elves appear on the islands to the north and the west of the swamp. They are so naughty and will push men into the water. You must be careful~~"/> <字串 編號="51912" 文字="Er~you are great to finish the quest in such a short time. The Cryptic Moon Swamp will be a lot quieter now thanks to you."/> <字串 編號="52001" 文字="Many [/c$2Marsh Frog/c*] unexpectedly appeared in the middle of the swamp. They have occupied the middle island and lay eggs crazily there destroying the ecological balance. The Militia decided to clear up these annoying eggs and creatures..."/> <字串 編號="52002" 文字="Let me do it."/> <字串 編號="52003" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="52004" 文字="You can not. I'm afraid you will be swallowed by them because they are really great in numbers. Come again after your level exceeds/c$2 15 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="52005" 文字="Please clear up those Marsh Frogs in the middle of the swamp! Report to me when you have defeated/c$2 20/c* Marsh Frogs~"/> <字串 編號="52006" 文字="You don't know how to get to the middle island? You can get there by walking along the bridge from the north or the south~"/> <字串 編號="52007" 文字="Err, you have done well! You must have defeated many Marsh Frogs because the croak on the middle island has almost died out."/> <字串 編號="52008" 文字="This is your prize. The Breeze Jungle Militia needs a warm-hearted person like you."/> <字串 編號="52101" 文字="Many [/c$2Mud Crab/c*] unexpectedly appeared at the sides of the swamp. They have occupied the wooden bridge and the small island in the southeast. They are so great in numbers that they are destroying the ecological balance here. Sometimes, many flamen are injured by their pincers when passing by."/> <字串 編號="52102" 文字="Let me clear up those Mud Crabs"/> <字串 編號="52103" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="52104" 文字="You can not defeat those Mud Crabs because they have hard shell and sharp pincers. Come again after your level exceeds/c$2 15 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="52105" 文字="Please clear up those Mud Crabs in the middle of the swamp! Report to me when you have defeated/c$2 20/c* Mud Crabs~"/> <字串 編號="52106" 文字="You will find many Mud Crabs on the southeastern island if you walk eastwards along the wooden bridge..."/> <字串 編號="52107" 文字="Thanks a lot. Those Mud Crabs will not disturb the passing flamen anymore."/> <字串 編號="52108" 文字="This is your reward. The Militia Army in Breeze Jungle needs such a warm-hearted person like you."/> <字串 編號="52201" 文字="I'm the Assistant Breeze helping the Elders with the sacrifice ritual. We are preparing for the activities of the Ancestor Fiesta, in the hope that we can get the ancestor's power through fiesta and thus defeat the Giant."/> <字串 編號="52202" 文字="Tell me about the Giant?"/> <字串 編號="52203" 文字="What is the Ancestor Fiesta?"/> <字串 編號="52204" 文字="Please hand the list to Breeze"/> <字串 編號="52205" 文字="Do you need my help?"/> <字串 編號="52206" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="52207" 文字="They is a crowd of giants living on the prairie to the northwest of forest. They are the enemy of the Breeze Jungle because they often pull up the trees in the forest which hold our ancestor's souls. They are really vile!"/> <字串 編號="52208" 文字="To strengthen the power of the Militia Army in Breeze Jungle, the Elders decided to hold a splendid fiesta to pray to the ancestors for help and thus help us to protect the forest from being damaged by the Giants."/> <字串 編號="52209" 文字="All people in the Breeze Jungle believe that they will change into balls of light after their deaths. They then become the guests of the wood seeds and grow into big trees to protect their offspring. Some of the Fiesta activities are in honor of their ancestors. They should be held to express gratitude to their ancestors for protecting them all the year round."/> <字串 編號="52210" 文字="A lot of materials are needed in the Fiesta ceremony, so we will collect all kinds of objects from all over in the forest before it begins."/> <字串 編號="52211" 文字="Risker, you are really enthusiastic! Then please help me to take this list, on which the materials needed in the ceremony are written, to the two Elders in the [/c$2North Altar/c*] and the [/c$2East Altar/c*] to have a check over. And I should tell the priests in the other places to collect these materials in a hurry."/> <字串 編號="52212" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="52213" 文字="Sorry, I'm not free."/> <字串 編號="52214" 文字="You can get to the North Altar along the bridge in the north, and walk on towards the east. Then you'll get to the East Altar. The matter of getting the list checked is your responsibility, please."/> <字串 編號="52215" 文字="I'm the assistant who assist the Elders to carry out the Fiesta ceremony. I'm preparing for the activities in honor of the ancestors. Are people in other places interested in the Fiesta in the Breeze Jungle?"/> <字串 編號="52216" 文字="I'm the Elder in charge of the North Altar, what's up?"/> <字串 編號="52217" 文字="I'm the Elder in charge of the East Altar, what's up?"/> <字串 編號="52218" 文字="Please give this list to the Elder."/> <字串 編號="52219" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52220" 文字="Wo~~~ need to check the materials? Actually everything is nearly ready. Wait, please. I must add something else to it."/> <字串 編號="52221" 文字="En, Ok, please send this list to the Assistant Breeze ."/> <字串 編號="52222" 文字="Thank you for having the list checked. Now I have a clear idea about the quantity of materials needed for the altar."/> <字串 編號="52223" 文字="These are my humble gifts to you. Please accept them! Sorry for troubling you to walk such a long distance."/> <字串 編號="52224" 文字="I'm the Assistant Breeze, who assists the Elders to carry out the sacrifice ceremony. At the moment, I'm preparing the Fiesta activities in honor of the ancestors. And I hope we can defeat the Giant with the help of the power which we may get from them."/> <字串 編號="52301" 文字="There is an old totem on which the drawings have been damaged. It's a disrespectful act by the offspring of the Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="52302" 文字="Examine the totem carefully."/> <字串 編號="52303" 文字="It's none of my business."/> <字串 編號="52304" 文字="Examining the marks which damaged the totem, we found sticky slobber and gauges cut by sharp claws...They may have been done by some kind of large Frogs or Crabs?"/> <字串 編號="52305" 文字="We must stop this."/> <字串 編號="52306" 文字="None of my business."/> <字串 編號="52307" 文字="We'd better eliminate boring Creatures"/> <字串 編號="52308" 文字="To protect the old totem, most of the frogs and crabs have been successfully driven away by you..."/> <字串 編號="52309" 文字="You needn't worry about the security of the totem...."/> <字串 編號="52401" 文字="My name is Stone. My hobby is fishing. There are plenty of fish here and they are delicious. I think it is the best place to fish in these forests. However, my friend Chark regards the Jade Vale as a better place to fish. I really can't imagine why?"/> <字串 編號="52402" 文字="Nothing is worth arguing over ."/> <字串 編號="52403" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52404" 文字="Because I made a bet with him that whoever will get more fish will be the winner for the week. The result. . .the [/c$2Mud Crab/c*]unexpectedly ate all my fish. So I have got nothing after fishing for such a long time. Bad luck!"/> <字串 編號="52405" 文字="I will help you drive away Soldier Crabs"/> <字串 編號="52406" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52407" 文字="Do you want to be swallowed by that group of Soldier Crabs? I can't imagine that you want to die like those fishes...Let's talk about it when your level reaches over/c$2 15 /c*."/> <字串 編號="52408" 文字="Then please do me a favor to get rid of the Mud Crabs/c$2 20 /c*,I will give you some awards. Don't worry, the awards won't be the bait."/> <字串 編號="52409" 文字="After you get rid of the Mud Crabs/c$2 20 /c*,you can come back to meet me. I will be right here waiting for you~~"/> <字串 編號="52410" 文字="WoWo~~~I have caught several fishes! You must have driven away the Mud Crabs. Great!"/> <字串 編號="52411" 文字="Thank you! Risker, these are some thankful gifts, please accept them! I must speed up so as not to lose the bet to Chark! Come on! Fish!"/> <字串 編號="52412" 文字="Are you a foreign visitor?! I'm Stone. Normally, my favorite hobby is fishing. In your country, are there any famous fish?"/> <字串 編號="52501" 文字="I'm the [/c$2Pontiff Shiwand/c*] of the Elders Committee of Breeze Jungle, I will preside over the Fiesta ceremony this year. The preparations in every place have been sorted out one by one. Only, some new leaders seem to disagree to the ceremony being held every year."/> <字串 編號="52502" 文字="Is it related to the Elders Committee?"/> <字串 編號="52503" 文字="Tell me about the leaders."/> <字串 編號="52504" 文字="Is anything wrong with the Fiesta ceremony?"/> <字串 編號="52505" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52506" 文字="In Breeze Jungle, the most advanced administration is the Elders Committee which is made up of a group of honorable Elders. Every week, we will get together to make some decisions for the off springs of Breeze Jungle. The purpose is to bring everybody a better and happier life."/> <字串 編號="52507" 文字="The members in the Elders Committee are old so I became the host of this years Fiesta ceremony because I'm relatively young. I hope we can ask the dead ancestors to protect us and enable us to become more powerful and confident to confront the Giant."/> <字串 編號="52508" 文字="As for the new leader, the Elders Committee has recommend the son of one of the most honorable Elders to be the leader of Breeze Jungle. So that the power can be handed down. The new leader's name is [/c$2Sharker/c*], he is an efficient and ambitious young man."/> <字串 編號="52509" 文字="It's a pity. He is too young to consider every aspect of this matter. In his opinion, he doubts it's practical effectiveness. He thinks that the most straight approach to fight against the Giant is to enlarge the militia and strengthen the equipment."/> <字串 編號="52510" 文字="What surprised us most is ...He turns out to want to use the [/c$2Spirits Power/c*] in the forest! Although the spirits power is strong, Breeze Jungle may fall under a curse and turn to ruin if it can't be well controlled. Alas!"/> <字串 編號="52511" 文字="The young people are too inexperienced to know the severe outcomes of things!"/> <字串 編號="52512" 文字="The Sachet needed for the ceremony have all run out. And all of the people have their own jobs, nobody is available..."/> <字串 編號="52513" 文字="Let me collect the Sachet for you."/> <字串 編號="52514" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52515" 文字="So? But your level hasn't reached/c$2 10 /c*,I can't assign you this errand. After you reach level/c$2 10 /c*,you can come and meet me!"/> <字串 編號="52516" 文字="Please go deep in to the forest to collect Pollen for menthe Pollen can be collected from the Wild Lily in the deep forest. You can come back to meet me after you have collected it."/> <字串 編號="52517" 文字="You haven't got enough Pollen, and you need to speed up because it needs to go through further treatments before it can be used in the ceremony."/> <字串 編號="52518" 文字="I will accept the Pollen and prepare it for the ceremony by treating it. Thank you!"/> <字串 編號="52519" 文字="The Elders Committee really appreciates such an enthusiastic young man like you. We always believe in repaying those who help us, this is your reward."/> <字串 編號="52601" 文字="The subsequent treatments of the Pollen are being made. However, I also found a wand which are used to pray in the Fiesta ceremony. It is a very precious icon."/> <字串 編號="52602" 文字="What is this Wand?"/> <字串 編號="52603" 文字="Hand the Wand to the Pontiff."/> <字串 編號="52604" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="52605" 文字="He is called [/c$2Sage's Staff/c*],and was possessed by a great Sage in ancient times. At that time, he was the strongest person at Magic in Breeze Jungle, no, all over the world. He trained himself in the Jade Vale all the year round. However one day he disappeared in the Faded Jungle to the south of Cryptic Moon Swamp, only the Wand was left of him....."/> <字串 編號="52606" 文字="We needn't talk too much, but I think I can trust you completely. Can you go and get the wand for me? Now it is possessed by the new leader [/c$2Sharker/c*].You can ask him for it with the help of this charm."/> <字串 編號="52607" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="52608" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52609" 文字="Sharker is now in the Breeze Jungle, go and find him!"/> <字串 編號="52610" 文字="I'm here waiting for you to get back [/c$2Sage's Staff/c*]"/> <字串 編號="52611" 文字="I'm Sharker, what's up? If you have ideas about Breeze Jungle, any constructive criticism will be welcomed."/> <字串 編號="52612" 文字="I'm here for the [Sage's Staff]"/> <字串 編號="52613" 文字="Tell me about the future of Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="52614" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52615" 文字="Did Pontiff Shiwand ask you to fetch the Sage's Staff? It must be for the Fiesta ceremony..."/> <字串 編號="52616" 文字="Here you are! It costs so much human resource for the preparation. I don't know how much benefit we can get from it?"/> <字串 編號="52617" 文字="The future world will be under the control of the young!You ought to have the same idea as me?! The Elders in the Elders Committee are too old. Although, they are successful and honorable, they are not ambitious and are only satisfied with temporary safety."/> <字串 編號="52618" 文字="Just like the Fiesta ceremony last year, people want to confront the fierce Giants with the help of power of the ancestors. It's really ridiculous. The Giants will destroy Breeze Jungle sooner or later. Breeze Jungle needs great power to support and I have planned how to acquire this sort of power..."/> <字串 編號="52619" 文字="Thank you for getting me the [/c$2Sage's Staff/c*]."/> <字串 編號="52620" 文字="In order to thank you for troubling you for walking such a long distance, please accept these gifts."/> <字串 編號="52701" 文字="Young man, what did Sharker talk to you about when you got [/c$2Sage's Staff/c*] from him?"/> <字串 編號="52702" 文字="He motioned something about the strong power."/> <字串 編號="52703" 文字="No. Leave."/> <字串 編號="52704" 文字="Alas...He motioned that thought before. I hadn't expected that he really wanted to use the ruin power of the spirits...The Elders must definitely stop him."/> <字串 編號="52705" 文字="Well! Please send the letter signed by all the Elders to [/c$2Sharker/c*],I hope the contents will persuade him to change his idea..."/> <字串 編號="52706" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="52707" 文字="Sorry, I'm not free."/> <字串 編號="52708" 文字="The task of delivering the letter is assigned to you. Please go there once again for the sake of the security of Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="52709" 文字="Hurry up! I believe that the letter can persuade Sharker."/> <字串 編號="52710" 文字="I wonder whether the letter from the Elders Committee can change Sharker's idea. Alas. . No matter what will happen, the Fiesta ceremony will be held as scheduled."/> <字串 編號="52711" 文字="I am Sharker, what's up? If you have some opinions toward Breeze Jungle, any constructive criticism will be welcomed!"/> <字串 編號="52712" 文字="Hand the letter from the Pontiff to him."/> <字串 編號="52713" 文字="Give him the three Essence."/> <字串 編號="52714" 文字="Tell me about the future of Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="52715" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52716" 文字="Letter from the Elders Committee? Show me..."/> <字串 編號="52717" 文字="Alas. . .What are the Elders thinking about? Don't they know that the Giants in the Megalith Plain plan to ruin Breeze Jungle? How can they still expect more from the Fiesta ceremony!"/> <字串 編號="52718" 文字="Risker, do you know? I have read all the books in the library which are related to Spirits Beckoning. And now I only need an article used for beckoning. So long as you collect the articles, I can surely have a control of the spirits! And the day when we can defeat the Giants is coming."/> <字串 編號="52719" 文字="I believer you must be able to shoulder the great responsibility! Help me to collect the articles!!Can you be trusted? Risker..."/> <字串 編號="52720" 文字="But, but, The Chief priests, they..."/> <字串 編號="52721" 文字="I'm not interested in it."/> <字串 編號="52722" 文字="I can sense the doubt in your eyes. Don't worry! I have good preparations! So long as you can help me to collect these articles, you will surely change the future of Breeze Jungle! Yes or no, it's up to you!"/> <字串 編號="52723" 文字="If you are willing, please help me to collect the [/c$2Essence of Wind/c*], the [/c$2Essence of Sand/c*] and the [/c$2Essence of Water/c*].These three articles can be collected from Elves, Marsh Frogs, Mud Crabs in the Cryptic Moon Swamp, but they are rarely seen in these recent years. However I believe you can succeed."/> <字串 編號="52724" 文字="Essence of Wind, Essence of Sand, Essence of Water, these three articles can be found on Elves ,Marsh Frogs, Mud Crabs in the Cryptic Moon Swamp. Breeze Jungle's security depends on you."/> <字串 編號="52725" 文字="Risker, you at last collected all of the articles!!Very good, very good~~"/> <字串 編號="52726" 文字="You are really outstanding! I should express our gratitude to you on behalf all the people in Breeze Jungle! You can choose one of these as your reward."/> <字串 編號="52727" 文字="The left is ...The last [/c$2Essence of Fire/c*]。"/> <字串 編號="52728" 文字="I'm Sharker. What's up? Thanks for your assistance. I will manage to get the Essence of Fire to call up spirits."/> <字串 編號="52901" 文字="I'm the Breeze Jungle Militia in charge of protecting the [/c$2Great Wiser Relic/c*],but the [/c$2Magic Eye/c*] has a lot of members. We are often involved in the tough war...And now, the relic in the north, however, has been occupied by them. We are thinking hard for the plan against it."/> <字串 編號="52902" 文字="What is the Great Wiser Relic?"/> <字串 編號="52903" 文字="Come on! Leave."/> <字串 編號="52904" 文字="The Great Wiser Relic lies in the north of the [/c$2Jade Vale/c*]where the strongest Wizard of Breeze Jungle trained himself in ancient times. After the Great Wizard disappeared into the [/c$2Faded Jungle/c*],the place became desolate, as it had no maintenance. But there are some mysterious treasures hidden in the relic."/> <字串 編號="52905" 文字="Now, the members of the Magic Eye are eager to dig up the relic..."/> <字串 編號="52906" 文字="I will protect the relic."/> <字串 編號="52907" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="52908" 文字="You? Don't play jokes! Judging from your level, I can be sure that you can't deal with the strong thieves. Let's talk about it when your level reaches/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="52909" 文字="Then please assist the Breeze Jungle Militia to defeat the soldiers of the Magic Eye who appear randomly in the north. When you defeat/c$2 20/c* members, you can come back to meet me."/> <字串 編號="52910" 文字="The members of the Magic Eye are distributed in the north of the Jade Vale. When your finish your task, come back to meet me."/> <字串 編號="52911" 文字="You did a very good job. You have defeated many members of the Magic Eye. Those thieves deserve what they got."/> <字串 編號="52912" 文字="In order to praise a brave risker like you, the Militia Army in Breeze Jungle have prepared this present for you. Accept it!"/> <字串 編號="52913" 文字="Although you don't seem to be the member of the Magic Eye you'd better abide by the rules in Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="53001" 文字="Young man, this vale is not only a beautiful environment but also a good training ground for the great Sages. There are many secrets and legacies here. But whatever I find, they belong to this forest and Breeze Jungle. However, the disgusting Magic Eyes are greedy."/> <字串 編號="53002" 文字="You are enthusiastic about the work~~"/> <字串 編號="53003" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53004" 文字="Yes! I have written down what I felt in the scroll bar while they were taken away in the mouths of a group of naughty [/c$2Unicorn Rabbit/c*]!I don't know which one did this. I was in mess at that time. Those Unicorn Rabbits broke into my camp, jumping and knocking everything around it made me really angry."/> <字串 編號="53005" 文字="Alas~~,it took me many year's hard work to get the scroll bar! And now, all is gone, it really makes me heartbroken..."/> <字串 編號="53006" 文字="Let me help you!"/> <字串 編號="53007" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53008" 文字="Only one of those sharp horns is hard to deal with, let alone a group of Unicorn Rabbits. Let's talk about it when your level reaches/c$2 20 /c*."/> <字串 編號="53009" 文字="Great, please help me to find the scroll which was taken away .It must be in one of the Unicorn Rabbits."/> <字串 編號="53010" 文字="When you find the scroll bar, come and meet me quickly! Thanks."/> <字串 編號="53011" 文字="Isn't this my scroll bar?!?Thank you very much! Young man! Without your help, I don't know what I would have done..."/> <字串 編號="53012" 文字="It's a humble gift, please accept it. Now I'm refreshed to work again."/> <字串 編號="53013" 文字="Nowadays, the antiques should not only be kept away from the Beasts but also from theft done by the Magic Eyes. Alas...It's really difficult to protect our culture."/> <字串 編號="53014" 文字="The travelers from the other areas, please don't harm any grass or wood of Breeze Vale! Otherwise, you will be condemned by the ancestors of the Breeze Jungle!"/> <字串 編號="53201" 文字="My name is Chark and my hobby is fishing. Recently I had a bet with one of my friend that person who gets the most fish in a week is the winner. The Jade Vale can't lose to the Cryptic Moon Swamp! But something was ..."/> <字串 編號="53202" 文字="What situation?"/> <字串 編號="53203" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53204" 文字="There are some meat-eating Lizards along the banks of the river which always eat up the fish in the river. Because of this, the abundant fish have become the food of the Lizards. I don't want to lose."/> <字串 編號="53205" 文字="Let me help you to drive away the Lizards."/> <字串 編號="53206" 文字="Come on. Get away."/> <字串 編號="53207" 文字="Are you mad? Be careful not to let the Lizards tear you into pieces. Let's talk about it after your level reaches over/c$2 20 /c*"/> <字串 編號="53208" 文字="Then please drive away the Green Lizards along the banks! Or I will lose the fishing competition~~."/> <字串 編號="53209" 文字="There are lots of Green Lizards beside the banks. After you drive away/c$2 20 /c*,please come back to meet me."/> <字串 編號="53210" 文字="You're back? Thank you for your help~ I got another fish just now. The Green Lizards have been reduced a lot owing to you!"/> <字串 編號="53211" 文字="This is my thankful gift, please accept it! I will tell you all about it when I get big fish. Ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="53301" 文字="There are some strange letters carved on the pillar whose shape looks magical... "/> <字串 編號="53302" 文字="I really hope that someone can interpret it!"/> <字串 編號="53303" 文字="Copy down the letters on the pillar."/> <字串 編號="53304" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53305" 文字="The idea that we copy down the letters in the pillar and give it to the Elder, who can understand this sort of letters to analyze, is good. However, the problem is that we don't have [/c$2ink and paper/c*] needed to copy..."/> <字串 編號="53306" 文字="Please copy down all the letters on the pillar with the ink and paper."/> <字串 編號="53401" 文字="Kekeke(sound of cough)I'm old and becoming weaker and weaker. I don't know how many Fiesta ceremonies I can take part in... Alas..."/> <字串 編號="53402" 文字="Please hand over the paper to the Pontiff."/> <字串 編號="53403" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53404" 文字="Well? Where did you find these letters? Let me examine them carefully..."/> <字串 編號="53405" 文字="Ha-ha~~ It's a spell which hasn't been handed down. In fact, the shape of the letters was distorted by magic. Without a kind of special medicinal liquid, the letters can't be interpreted. I can help you to interpret it, but you must collect the ingredients used to make it."/> <字串 編號="53406" 文字="Ok, what shall I collect?"/> <字串 編號="53407" 文字="I have no interest in it."/> <字串 編號="53408" 文字="It's none of your business. I think it too hard for you to collect these kinds of materials. Let's talk about it when your level reaches over/c$2 20 /c*"/> <字串 編號="53409" 文字="I need/c$2 10/c* scales from the Green Lizard of the Jade Vale and/c$2 10 /c horns from the Unicorn Rabbit. These two materials are required in making this medicinal liquid. Only with enough of them can it be made."/> <字串 編號="53410" 文字="Go to the Jade Vale to collect the scales from the Green Lizards and/c$2 10/c* horns from the Unicorn Rabbits. Come back to meet me if you finish it."/> <字串 編號="53411" 文字="EnEn, it seems that you have already collected all the materials. Then I will begin to make the mysterious medicinal liquid used to interpret the letters."/> <字串 編號="53412" 文字="Come to meet me in a moment."/> <字串 編號="53501" 文字="Young man, the medicinal liquid is finished. And now, splash the liquid onto the copied letters. Look! The letters are starting to distort... The magic attached to it is disappearing gradually and the letters are becoming what they were."/> <字串 編號="53502" 文字="Let me have a look at what the letters say."/> <字串 編號="53503" 文字="The story is that the great Sage become stronger and stronger with his magic and feared that the magic power would increase without limits and that he might be eroded by his magic. So he decided to seal himself in the [/c$2Faded Jungle/c*] in the south of the Cryptic Moon Swamp and set up powerful boundary to separate himself from the outer world."/> <字串 編號="53504" 文字="He has been waiting for someone who can stop his power all this time. A person who can pass the test of power will be entitled to enter the Faded Jungle. Risker, are you confident enough to accept the test of the great Sage?"/> <字串 編號="53505" 文字="Yes, I am."/> <字串 編號="53506" 文字="Sorry, I'm not."/> <字串 編號="53507" 文字="With these words, the copied paper becomes a block of symbol. It seems that the great Sage already knows of you... "/> <字串 編號="53508" 文字="Keke(sound of cough)...I think the great Sage heard what you said. Take this block of symbols to the relic of the Jade Vale."/> <字串 編號="53509" 文字="The relic of the Jade Vale is where you copied the letters. Put the block of symbols onto the pillar!"/> <字串 編號="53510" 文字="Keke(sound of cough)Have you passed the test of Sage? You are really great. Choose an article please! You can regard it as your gift."/> <字串 編號="53511" 文字="There are some strange letters carved on the pillar. The shape of the letters seems like a spell..."/> <字串 編號="53512" 文字="Inlay the symbol stone into the pillar."/> <字串 編號="53513" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53514" 文字="The symbol suddenly gives out a violent flash."/> <字串 編號="53515" 文字="I can hear clearly the words [/c$2The expected valiant, please show me your power/c*]"/> <字串 編號="53516" 文字="A huge Monster appeared behind the pillar it wasn't there before!!"/> <字串 編號="53517" 文字="You have succeeded in defeating the Monster which was summoned by the symbols."/> <字串 編號="53518" 文字="Just at this time, you hear the words [/c$2 passing valiant, please wait for new instructions/c*] again."/> <字串 編號="53519" 文字="I think the great Sage will give you instructions for the next phase of the task..."/> <字串 編號="53601" 文字="The flowers and plants here are not the same as them in other gardens. The leaves here quickly wither."/> <字串 編號="53602" 文字="Please check to see what is wrong."/> <字串 編號="53603" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53604" 文字="After looking into all the parts of the flowers and plants carefully, we can see that the stems have been hurt severely by an outside force. It looks like the mark caused by other vines."/> <字串 編號="53605" 文字="It must be the Flaming Rose that did this."/> <字串 編號="53606" 文字="It's none of my business."/> <字串 編號="53607" 文字="It's a pity that you can't help the beautiful flowers to resume their former beauty because of your current ability. Maybe the opportunity will come after your level reaches/c$2 22/c* "/> <字串 編號="53608" 文字="You should remember that you must get rid of the tyrant flowers which suck the nutrient from the other flowers."/> <字串 編號="53609" 文字="You succeeded in getting rid of large quantities of the Flaming Rose, at the same time, a stream of strange power enters into your body immediately..."/> <字串 編號="53610" 文字="The flowers and plants begin to recover gradually. Hopefully they blossom beautiful flowers some day."/> <字串 編號="53701" 文字="Well . . Who is it? Who bothers my good sleep?"/> <字串 編號="53702" 文字="Woori haven't seen living human beings for such a long time~ I'd like to introduce myself to you. I'm the Household Hark of the Mysterious Garden. What's your purpose to be here? Are you scared of me?"/> <字串 編號="53703" 文字="Tell me about the Mysterious Garden."/> <字串 編號="53704" 文字="No."/> <字串 編號="53705" 文字="Ghosts! Horrible~~"/> <字串 編號="53706" 文字="The Mysterious Garden was built by a world class Businessman named [/c$2Gaze/c*] one hundred years ago in order to please his Angel like wife. A luxurious house was located in the middle of the garden where his wife lived. I was in charge of a group of 50 servants who were responsible for his wife's daily life."/> <字串 編號="53707" 文字="His wife had an air of elegance and was friendly to all the staff. Everybody liked her. Although, something terrible happened later, we still can't bear to leave her even after our deaths. So we have been protecting Madame for more than one hundred years..."/> <字串 編號="53708" 文字="Aren't you frightened of ghosts? Good, good, you are brave enough...Then can you do me a favor and wake up the other Spirits who are now sleeping? Tell them to do their business. These days I find . . that some Rabbits and Flower Monsters are spoiling the original beauty of this place. It really makes me angry."/> <字串 編號="53709" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="53710" 文字="Sorry, I'm not available."/> <字串 編號="53711" 文字="The two long-hired Servants are nodding off at the west exit of the garden and at the pool in the east. Please go and wake them up!"/> <字串 編號="53712" 文字="There are two long-hired servants are at the west exit of the garden and at the pool in the northeast. Please go and wake them up!"/> <字串 編號="53713" 文字="Wu...I can hardly open my eyes! I'm too tired to live. Don't bother me."/> <字串 編號="53714" 文字="The Household Hark asked me to wake you up."/> <字串 編號="53715" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53716" 文字="What! The Household Hark sent you here?! Then I should get up immediately, or we may be cursed if he comes over and sees us sleeping."/> <字串 編號="53717" 文字="Wake up~~~See how big I have opened my eyes. Don't disturb me again. The strangers should get away from here~~Go, go.."/> <字串 編號="53718" 文字="You have woken both of them? Very good! They two are most likely to have a nap in the garden. We should keep an eye on them!"/> <字串 編號="53719" 文字="Thank you for helping me to go there. This article is your award."/> <字串 編號="53720" 文字="I'm the Household, Hark, in this Mysterious Garden. What's up?"/> <字串 編號="53801" 文字="This is a well-made statue, whose facial expression is so vivid. It's almost as though the eyes are trying to tell me something..."/> <字串 編號="53802" 文字="Examine the statue."/> <字串 編號="53803" 文字="Throw the Star Dust into the pool."/> <字串 編號="53804" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53805" 文字="The letters on the statue read [/c$2the romance of the Star Dust jumping into the sea/c*]. . What does it mean?"/> <字串 編號="53806" 文字="The Star Dust blended with water, throwing off a wonderful aroma which cycles around you..."/> <字串 編號="53807" 文字="If you breathe in deeply, you will suddenly feel comfort at every pore."/> <字串 編號="53901" 文字="It has been a long time since I have seen strangers...Are you scared Risker? I'm the owner of the garden, Marlin. Please forgive me if can't provide good service."/> <字串 編號="53902" 文字="Why do you smile with a kind of sorrow?"/> <字串 編號="53903" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53904" 文字="Do you know the story of this garden? My husband was a world famous rich man, [/c$2Gaze/c*] when he was alive. He cared about me very much, which made me feel so happy. To please me, he offered to build this garden, which enables me to live amid the flowers blossoming."/> <字串 編號="53905" 文字="The love he gave to me made me feel happy but I gradually felt a little lonely as time went by...Maybe I long for the outer world!? In order to protect me, my husband refused my proposals of going out several times. I felt very sad and I contracted hypochondria, at last I died and got away from my husband forever..."/> <字串 編號="53906" 文字="Maybe my husband became confused by why his love for me brought me unhappiness. Due his anger and puzzlement, he died soon after. I had thought we would meet in Hell but as time goes by I haven't met him yet... ."/> <字串 編號="53907" 文字="He must not want to see me any more. Alas... "/> <字串 編號="53908" 文字="Let me help your to look for your husband."/> <字串 編號="53909" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53910" 文字="Really? I don't know how to express my gratitude to you. But I don't know where he was buried... However I'm sure he must have been buried in this garden."/> <字串 編號="53911" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="53912" 文字="Sorry, I'm not free."/> <字串 編號="53914" 文字="If you find his body or his bones, please come back to tell me ."/> <字串 編號="53915" 文字="I really don't know where he was buried ,but it must be in this garden...."/> <字串 編號="53916" 文字="You have found my husband's tomb!? Great!! Risker, thank you~~~"/> <字串 編號="53917" 文字="I really want to have my bones buried with his~~ That way we will never be separated again."/> <字串 編號="53918" 文字="There is an old gravestone which is covered by thick dirt..."/> <字串 編號="53919" 文字="Wipe off the dirt with your hands."/> <字串 編號="53920" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="53921" 文字="It reads on the gravestone: [/c$2Gaze ,the King of the business circle/c*]"/> <字串 編號="54001" 文字="Alas, although I know where my husband's grave is, I still can't be with him in the same tomb."/> <字串 編號="54002" 文字="Why?"/> <字串 編號="54003" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="54004" 文字="One of my bones was taken away by the [/c$2Thunder Rabbit/c*],I don't know what to do. If I haven't got a set of intact bones, it doesn't make any sense to put our bones into one tomb... "/> <字串 編號="54005" 文字="I will help you to find it."/> <字串 編號="54006" 文字="It's a pity..."/> <字串 編號="54007" 文字="The sharp horn in the Thunder Rabbit's head is very dangerous, let's talk about it when your Role Grade reached/c$2 22 /c*."/> <字串 編號="54008" 文字="Then please help me to find my lost bone. If you find it, bring it back at once."/> <字串 編號="54009" 文字="The task of finding my lost bone will go to you. It must have been taken away by the Thunder Rabbit."/> <字串 編號="54010" 文字="Thank you for helping me to retrieve my bone so that my bones are intact.~~Risker! Thanks!"/> <字串 編號="54011" 文字="Please accept this present!"/> <字串 編號="54101" 文字="Now, my bones are intact. In addition, my husband's tomb has been found. Would you please put my bones and my husband's together?"/> <字串 編號="54102" 文字="No problem."/> <字串 編號="54103" 文字="Sorry, I'm not free."/> <字串 編號="54104" 文字="Thank you very much. Then please take my bones to my husband's tomb and put them together..."/> <字串 編號="54105" 文字="I will give this task to you so that my husband and I can stay in the same tomb forever."/> <字串 編號="54106" 文字="An old gravestone, on which there is some thick dirt... ."/> <字串 編號="54107" 文字="Wipe off the dirt with your hands."/> <字串 編號="54108" 文字="Push away the lid of the tomb slightly... "/> <字串 編號="54109" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="54110" 文字="It reads on it: [/c$2Gaze , the eternal King of the business circle/c*]"/> <字串 編號="54111" 文字="Who is it !? Who dares to disturb my sleep?!"/> <字串 編號="54112" 文字="Woo. . . ? Is this Marlin's Bone? Where did you get it?"/> <字串 編號="54113" 文字="What do you want to do to Marlin!? How can Marlin's bone be touched by an ordinary person like you? You will pay, if you insult her!"/> <字串 編號="54114" 文字="Let my complaining spirit eat you up! "/> <字串 編號="54115" 文字="Gaze. . . Don't . . . "/> <字串 編號="54116" 文字="Marlin!?Is it really you? Marlin!?"/> <字串 編號="54117" 文字="It's me. I'm here to accompany you. I have been missing you all this time. Do you know? In recent years, I regretted not having good communication with you. You are my beloved in this world and the next. . . "/> <字串 編號="54118" 文字="I am at fault too, Marlin. I don't think that the love I gave you was the love you needed. It was me, an arrogant man, who hurt you. . . "/> <字串 編號="54119" 文字="Don't say like that, Gaze. After all, we can now be with each other."/> <字串 編號="54120" 文字="Thanks to the Risker's help, without his help, I don't know when we could meet again. . . . "/> <字串 編號="54121" 文字="Thanks! Risker! I'm willing to present you the most precious treasure that I cherished when was alive. Thanks for your help. Without you, I would never meet my beloved Marlin."/> <字串 編號="54122" 文字="Please take this [/c$2key/c*]!There is a box in the middle of the luxurious house and you can open it with the key!"/> <字串 編號="54123" 文字="........."/> <字串 編號="54124" 文字="Thank you. I will show my great love to Marlin."/> <字串 編號="54125" 文字="........."/> <字串 編號="54126" 文字="Thank you. It's you who enabled me to meet Gaze again."/> <字串 編號="54127" 文字="The lock on the locked box cannot be opened even though he is an experienced thief."/> <字串 編號="54128" 文字="Use the key."/> <字串 編號="54129" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="54130" 文字="Open the treasure box!"/> <字串 編號="54131" 文字="This is a box which has already been unlocked."/> <字串 編號="54132" 文字="Apart from some equipment, there is something special. . ."/> <字串 編號="54201" 文字="I'm the Militia Chief who is assisting to maintain the Breeze Jungle's order. You should abide by the relevant rules of the Breeze Jungle. If you break the rules, I will not forgive you."/> <字串 編號="54202" 文字="Of course, the areas around the Breeze Jungle are also the Militia's responsibility. However, it is reported that some fierce Beasts, Monsters and Wanted Men have done wrongs here. They must be dealt with quickly and efficiently."/> <字串 編號="54203" 文字="Tell me how I can help."/> <字串 編號="54204" 文字="Leave."/> <字串 編號="54205" 文字="So far, we have got messages that the traces of the [/c$2Monkey Nassi/c*] were found in the Dense Forest. If you can get rid of them, the Breeze Jungle Militia Army will award you abundant presents."/> <字串 編號="54206" 文字="Ok."/> <字串 編號="54207" 文字="It seems dangerous. Leave."/> <字串 編號="54208" 文字="Then I will be here waiting for your news, I hope that you can defeat the [/c$2Monkey Nassi/c*] successfully and accomplished my assignments."/> <字串 編號="54209" 文字="You travelers, from other areas, must still abide by the rules of the Breeze Jungle. Otherwise I will punish you severely."/> <字串 編號="54210" 文字="You have defeated those [/c$2 Monkey Nassi/c*].It's really a great success."/> <字串 編號="54211" 文字="This award is for you because you have successfully helped to maintain the security around the Breeze Jungle. Please accept it."/> <字串 編號="54212" 文字="I'm the Militia Chief of Breeze Jungle. You should abide by the rules of the Breeze Jungle. If you violate them, you will not be forgiven. In addition, your contributions are welcomed. So long as you are an Risker whose level reaches/c$2 10 /c*."/> <字串 編號="54301" 文字="I'm the Militia Chief who is helping to guard the security of the Breeze Jungle. You should abide by the rules of the Breeze Jungle, if you violate the laws, you will not be forgiven."/> <字串 編號="54302" 文字="Of course, the areas around the Breeze Jungle are also the Militia's responsibility. However, it has been reported that some fierce Beasts, Monsters and Wanted Men have done wrongs here. They must be dealt with quickly and efficiently."/> <字串 編號="54303" 文字="About help."/> <字串 編號="54304" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="54305" 文字="So far, we have got the messages that the traces of the [/c$2Flame Lily/c*] has been found in the Dense Forest. If you can get rid of them, the Militia Army of the Breeze Jungle will present you with abundant awards."/> <字串 編號="54306" 文字="Ok"/> <字串 編號="54307" 文字="I feel it's very dangerous. Leave."/> <字串 編號="54308" 文字="Then I will be here waiting for your news. Congratulations."/> <字串 編號="55611" 文字="This is to reward you for your contributions to maintaining and improving the security in and around Breeze Jungle. Please accept it."/> <字串 編號="55801" 文字="Hello,/c$2%1/c*! It seems that you are mature enough. I think it's time to give you some important quests."/> <字串 編號="55802" 文字="Many Spy Angels are dispatched to observe the actions of [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*]. I heard a news recently. I think the Spy Angels need your help..."/> <字串 編號="55803" 文字="Goes to [/c$2Cryptic Moon Swamp/c*] and talks to Spy Angel. They will give you the information they collected."/> <字串 編號="55901" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, it is not the right time for you to talk to me..."/> <字串 編號="55902" 文字="Hello, /c$2%1/c*. I am the Spy Angel and I am responsible for collecting information about the [/c$2Evil Lyceum/c*]. Our department needs your help."/> <字串 編號="55903" 文字="What is the information"/> <字串 編號="55904" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="55905" 文字="The Evil Lyceum sent [/c$2Student Union Leader/c*] to the Garden of Eden to pick out the evil spirits. Now he has fixed the special races. You are reqired to stop his evil plan."/> <字串 編號="55906" 文字="But, this is a rather dangerous quest. Although you have been received by Breeze Jungle, I want to confirm your ability again to avoid all we have done being spoiled in the event that you are exposed to danger or the quest fails."/> <字串 編號="55907" 文字="Ok. No problem"/> <字串 編號="55908" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="55909" 文字="So you must kill all the [/c$2Marsh Frog/c*] in Cryptic Moon Swamp to show me your are competent enough to complete this quest."/> <字串 編號="55910" 文字="You must fight against lots of Marsh Frogs. After completing this task, come back to see me."/> <字串 編號="55911" 文字="Great. /c$2%1/c*, what a good job you have done. The Angel Lyceum should be proud of you."/> <字串 編號="55912" 文字="Take a deep breath. I want to assign you to complete this quest."/> <字串 編號="56001" 文字="[/c$2Asmode/c*]the Student Union Leader of the Evil Lyceum has been assigned by the [/c$2Satan/c*] to recruit students from the Garden of Eden. We must prevent him from doing this."/> <字串 編號="56002" 文字="Head-on conflicts are unfavourable for our future plans. Therefore, our detective department has drafted a plan. You must win [/c$2Asmode/c*]'s confidence first. Now, are you ready?"/> <字串 編號="56003" 文字="Yes."/> <字串 編號="56004" 文字="No."/> <字串 編號="56005" 文字="Asmode intends to enroll new students from the Magic Eye Member who are the enemies of Breeze Jungle. If you prove you are one of the Magic Eye Members, you can win his confidence. Try your best to get the [/c$2Robber's Badge/c*] from the Magic Eye Memeber"/> <字串 編號="56006" 文字="After you have obtained the [/c$2Robber's Badge/c*], come back to see me. You can find the Magic Eye Member in the northern part of Jade Vale."/> <字串 編號="56007" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, well done. Now you can win Asmode's confidence with the [/c$2Robber's Badge/c*]."/> <字串 編號="56008" 文字="I'm supposed to tell you where Asmode is?"/> <字串 編號="56101" 文字="Asmode is disguised as an archaeologist and is carrying out field studies in the [/c$2Jade Vale/c*]. But actually he is observing and selectig suitable Magic Eye Members to join the Evil Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="56102" 文字="You go to find Asmode, making sure to carry the [/c$2Robber's Badge/c*] with you."/> <字串 編號="56103" 文字="Hey, get off my back. You will slow down my reseach."/> <字串 編號="56104" 文字="Hey, young lady, what is your name? Are you interested in archeology? We can do other things besides work. Hehehe..."/> <字串 編號="56105" 文字="Give Asmode the Robber's Badge."/> <字串 編號="56106" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="56107" 文字="Ah, you are one of the Magic Eye Members. This badge means you are a senior member. Wonderful! Just wonderful... hehehehe..."/> <字串 編號="56108" 文字="You may learn that I need people from your supervisors. I am forming a robber gang to dig out the desert ruins. You are one of the ones I need very much. "/> <字串 編號="56109" 文字="It all depends on you to prevent Asmode's plan"/> <字串 編號="56201" 文字="You are welcome to join us. But you don't look like a member of the Magic Eye Members. Could it be that you are a subordinate of Michael? Hmmmmmm?"/> <字串 編號="56202" 文字="Michael? Who is Michael?"/> <字串 編號="56203" 文字="I have something to do, go first."/> <字串 編號="56204" 文字="I just admire Michael's fabulous looks. But he hates me very much. It seriously hurts my feelings."/> <字串 編號="56205" 文字="But I still can't trust you totally. Because you don't look like one of the Magic Eye Members. So you must go to Breeze Junge and steal some antiques to prove that you are a real robber. It should be a piece of cake for you."/> <字串 編號="56206" 文字="Ok. "/> <字串 編號="56207" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="56208" 文字="After robbing the antiques, come back to see me right away."/> <字串 編號="56209" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, it seems that you have met with some unexpected trouble. Just as I expected, that Asmode is very careful. No wonder he won the trust of Satan, the Tutor of the Evil Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="56210" 文字="Go to [/c$2Jade Vale/c*] to find the archaeologist. He detests the Magic Eye Members and methods of destroying ruins. You must ask him to help you to prevent the Magic Eye Members from destroying more ruins and antiques."/> <字串 編號="56211" 文字="Risker, thanks for helping me find the Primitive Rolling Bar. So what can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="56212" 文字="You want to stop the Magic Eye Members."/> <字串 編號="56213" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="56214" 文字="Risker, when I listen to you tell the story it seems to be quite complicated, robbers becoming evils? The Evil Lyceum?, I can't totally understand you..."/> <字串 編號="56215" 文字="You have helped me a lot and I am willing to lend you this antique I dug out recently and intended to send back to Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="56216" 文字="Give the antique to Asmode"/> <字串 編號="56217" 文字="Hey, not bad. You are quite good at stealing antiques from the well-guarded Breeze Jungle."/> <字串 編號="56218" 文字="I'm beginning to like you now."/> <字串 編號="56219" 文字="It all depends on you to prevent Asmode's Plan"/> <字串 編號="56301" 文字="That's great. Now I totally believe you are one of the Magic Eye Members. Please accept this magic stone."/> <字串 編號="56302" 文字="You go to the deep eastern [/c$2Mysterious Garden/c*] and find [/c$2Monkey Statue Holding An Egg/c*] there. Use this magic stone when you get there. My partner will be waiting for you and will hold a grand party to welcome you."/> <字串 編號="56303" 文字="Go! I have to continue my work."/> <字串 編號="56304" 文字="Sigils that look like spells are painted on the egg. Put your hand on it. You feel cold when touching it."/> <字串 編號="56305" 文字="Hold the magic stone close to the egg"/> <字串 編號="56306" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="56307" 文字="The magic stone sends out a purple light and begins to shake in you hand. You have to hold it tightly."/> <字串 編號="56308" 文字="At the same time, you are surrounded by the purple light and are blinded by the glare."/> <字串 編號="56309" 文字="When you open your eyes, you find you are in a dark cave. In front of you stands [/c$2Asmode/c*]"/> <字串 編號="56401" 文字="Hahaha,let me tell you. I am [/c$2Student Union Leader/c*] of the Evil Lyceum. You may notice that there are devils all around. They are subordinate to me. It is your honor to become one of them."/> <字串 編號="56402" 文字="This is the magic formation I set. Come to sacrifice your spirit and let me take you to hell."/> <字串 編號="56403" 文字="What?! I should not have been defeated by a human being. "/> <字串 編號="56404" 文字="!!(Asmode seems to realize something)"/> <字串 編號="56405" 文字="Only .........could possess such power.
