But...but, theres no way...no..."/> <字串 編號="56406" 文字="Asmode suddenly vanishes."/> <字串 編號="56407" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, the news of Asmodes defeat at your hands has been spread out."/> <字串 編號="56408" 文字="You have made great contributions to the Angel Lyceum. Michael is happy you destroyed the Evil Lyceum's plan to recruit students. "/> <字串 編號="56409" 文字="Select one of the rewards Michael prepared for you. These are rare weapons in the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="56410" 文字="Now you can go back to find Breeze Jungle. Thanks for your help. We will rember your contributions."/> <字串 編號="56411" 文字="I am the Spy Angel and will carry out my duty to collect information on the Evil Lyceum for the Angel Lyceum"/> <字串 編號="56412" 文字="…………………………."/> <字串 編號="60101" 文字="/c$2%1/c*, I heard that you have defeated Asmode. Well done. Now I have a more important quest to assign to you."/> <字串 編號="60102" 文字="Since Asmode was defeated by you, the Evil Lyceum seems to have stopped all invasion plans. But it is has been reported that lots of innocent people are going mad without reason. Even angels in the human world that graduated with you have been lost. We are concerned about them very much."/> <字串 編號="60103" 文字="Michael doubts that this is part of a scheme by the Evil Lyceum. Therefore he has sent the/c$2 Angel Inspector/c* to go to [/c$2Megalith Plain/c*] and take charge. But we still need more angels to help him."/> <字串 編號="60104" 文字="Please go to Megalith Plain, and help the/c$2 Angel Inspector/c* to find the truth and save these innocent victims."/> <字串 編號="60105" 文字="The/c$2 Angel Inspector/c* is waiting for you to arrive at [/c$ 2Megalith Plain/c*]. Hope you can make some great achievements and live up to our great expections."/> <字串 編號="60106" 文字="How's your quest coming? We're counting on you, don't let us down."/> <字串 編號="60107" 文字="Angel, don't forget your duty. A moment of relaxing may make regret forever."/> <字串 編號="60108" 文字="You are the most popular angel in the Angel Lyceum./c$2%1/c*, I am the Angel Inspector and I am glad for your support."/> <字串 編號="60201" 文字="I believe you completely understand the difficulties we are facing. More and more human being are going mad. The number of lost angels is still increasing. According to the latest news we have received, some lost angels have become the guardians of the Evil Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="60202" 文字="To be honest, our investigation is at a stand still. We are preparing to begin our investigation by collecting the victims' cases. But we are lacking enough hands to complete the job quickly. I hope that you can take charge of it."/> <字串 編號="60203" 文字="Agree to help"/> <字串 編號="60204" 文字="Pretend to be busy"/> <字串 編號="60205" 文字="I want to express our respect for you on behalf of all the teammates in our Detective Department, Angel. The four main cities of the four camps in the Garden of Eden have lots of patienst waiting for treatment. You may pay a visit to/c$2 Iron Castle/c* first to find out any valuable clues."/> <字串 編號="60206" 文字="The four main cities of the four camps in Eden have lots of patienst waiting for treatment. You may pay a visit to/c$2 Iron Castle/c* first to find out any valuable clues."/> <字串 編號="60207" 文字="Watch out, blasted Lizardmen, I will shoot you dead. Hahaha, you must know the feeling of fear now."/> <字串 編號="60208" 文字="I need more [Braised Wings] to become an Iron Superman."/> <字串 編號="60209" 文字="Excited Machel fainted because of fatigue. Now go to/c$2 Dark City/c* to investigate some other patients."/> <字串 編號="60210" 文字="One, two, two angels, flying fast, flying high."/> <字串 編號="60211" 文字="What! Are you an angel? You can't cheat me. If you were a real angel, give me the [Bloody Pudding]."/> <字串 編號="60212" 文字="Romier lost consciousness. It is too hard to try and communicate with her. Now go to/c$2 Breeze Jungle/c* to investigate some other patients."/> <字串 編號="60213" 文字="What can I do for you, traveler?"/> <字串 編號="60214" 文字="I know what you are. You are the devil from hell. Watch out, after I have the [Fluorescent Pickle] and become a Blazing Ironman Z, I will eat all of you."/> <字串 編號="60215" 文字="..."/> <字串 編號="60216" 文字="Why can't I change. The world was nearly destroyed by all of you."/> <字串 編號="60217" 文字="Although Michael looks qutie normal, he has actually gone quite mad. Now/c$2 Aurora City/c* is my last hope."/> <字串 編號="60218" 文字="I am full, but I am being forced to eat all the time. I feel terrible."/> <字串 編號="60219" 文字="Young man, could you please help me ask the/c$2 Chef Boship/c* to teach my servant to cook more dishes? I need some more delicious things to eat."/> <字串 編號="60220" 文字="Refuse."/> <字串 編號="60221" 文字="Hmmm, I have nothing but money. I can always find someone to do me a favor. But you will be on my black list after I leave the restaurant."/> <字串 編號="60222" 文字="When you finish the investigation, you must report to the Angel Inspector in/c$2 Megalith Plain /c*."/> <字串 編號="60223" 文字="Angel, did you make any important discoveries during your investigation?"/> <字串 編號="60224" 文字="You tell the Angel Inspector the results of your investigation."/> <字串 編號="60301" 文字="According to what you said, [dish] and [Boship] should be the key points of this case. In fact, I have began to investigate him. He has suddenly become famous rescently and can often be seen at the [/c$2Dragon Graveyard/c*] giving passers-by strange receipts."/> <字串 編號="60302" 文字="Now all the evidence we possess leads us to/c$2 Chef Boship/c* being the criminal we want. I want to ask you to investigate him again to find out more convincing evidence."/> <字串 編號="60303" 文字="Agree to Inspector."/> <字串 編號="60304" 文字="Consider for a while."/> <字串 編號="60305" 文字="You are really right-minded, angel. Now please go to the [/c$2Dragon Graveyard/c*] and make a thorough investigation of/c$2 Chef Boship /c*. Good luck."/> <字串 編號="60306" 文字="Now, please go to [/c$2Dragon Graveyard/c*] and make a thorough investigation of/c$2 Chef Boship /c*. Good luck."/> <字串 編號="60307" 文字="Haha, young man, do you want to taste the delicious [Poo Poo Icecream]? Although it looks disgusting and has a coffee favor, I can promise you it will be the most delicious ice cream you have ever had in the Garden of Eden."/> <字串 編號="60308" 文字="Haha, Young man, do you want to have a cup of delicious [Poo Poo Icecream]? Or how about a [Special Sausage]?"/> <字串 編號="60309" 文字="I want to learn cooking from you."/> <字串 編號="60310" 文字="No, I don't want any."/> <字串 編號="60311" 文字="You think that I will give my recipes to a stranger? By the way, you look like an angel. Are you sure you can stand my hell-like training?"/> <字串 編號="60312" 文字="Please believe me."/> <字串 編號="60313" 文字="(Discovered my indentity? Run away quickly!)"/> <字串 編號="60314" 文字="Cool, you are very resolute. I really respect you. Now let's begin by learning to cook [Soured Apple Pie] which tastes sticky and greasy. It is my most famous junior dish."/> <字串 編號="60315" 文字="But you must collect the materials first. You can rob nearby monsters of the required materials for cooking Soured Apple Pie. Please pay attention to the [/c$2Circus Tyrant/c*], [/c$2Tree Elf/c*], [/c$2North Lake Water Fairy/c*] and the [/c$2Savage Dogface/c*]. Defeat them and look for the materials."/> <字串 編號="60316" 文字="Have you got enough materials to cook a [Soured Apple Pie]? Rob [/c$2Circus Tyrant/c*], [/c$2Tree Elf/c*], [/c$2North Lake Water Fairy/c*] and [/c$2Savage Dogface/c*] of the materials required for cooking a soured apple pie."/> <字串 編號="60317" 文字="Young man, you're good..., bringing back the materials so quickly. Now I think you are qualified to learn how to cook from me."/> <字串 編號="60318" 文字="Let me show you my unparalleled cooking skills."/> <字串 編號="60319" 文字="Chef Boship is waving the pancake turner which can make others faint. There is a star mark at the bottom of the pan with the higher and higher temperature."/> <字串 編號="60320" 文字="Cool. Young man, have a look. This is the delicious [Soured Apple Pie]. Do you want to have some. ...You are not hungry? Alright, just remember its recipe. This is your reward to help encourage you."/> <字串 編號="60401" 文字="Practice it when you get back to your hometown. Remember you must keep a stall to sell the Soured Apple Pies you make. Let more people taste it. You will make lots of money. Believe me."/> <字串 編號="60402" 文字="You finally came back, angel. Did you make any special discoveries?"/> <字串 編號="60403" 文字="You tell the Angel Inspector that you were learning from Boship and give him the [Soured Apple Pie]"/> <字串 編號="60404" 文字="Oh my! A powerful mental spell has been added to the pie. Common people will go mad with just a small taste of it."/> <字串 編號="60405" 文字="It reminds me of the Angel Lyceum's most malevolent enemy during the war times, [/c$2Berssif/c*]..."/> <字串 編號="60406" 文字="Boship...Berssif...Could it be...? The situation is tenser than expected. Little Angel, please take the pie back to the/c$2 Angel Lyceum/c* and ask the/c$2 Medicine Lecturer/c* to test it. I have to stay here with my subordinate and keep an eye on him. "/> <字串 編號="60407" 文字="Take the pie back to the Angel Lyceum and ask the /c$ 2Medicine Lecturer/c* to test it. I never expected that we had to face such a formidable enemy again."/> <字串 編號="60408" 文字="Ask about Berssif"/> <字串 編號="60409" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="60410" 文字="Angel, you may have heard the story about/c$2 Lucifer /c*. In the old days, Lucifer, the Fallen Archangel abandoned the faith we angels believed in, led his trusted followers away from the Angel Lyceum and turned against the Angel Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="60411" 文字="Berssif was one of his loyal followers and was very good with poisons. But upon the death of Lucifer, Berssif disappeared. It is said he later became the chef in the Evil Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="60412" 文字="You can find large quantities of flies and dirty monsters where Berssif is hiding. Please be very careful."/> <字串 編號="60413" 文字="If you need medical care when you are injured, please come to the Clinic."/> <字串 編號="60414" 文字="Give [Soured Apple Pie] to Lecturer."/> <字串 編號="60415" 文字="Angel, it has been poisoned. Eating it will make you sick. What? It hides the secret to those people who went mad? Ok, let me test it... "/> <字串 編號="60416" 文字="This food is terribly poisonous. If the Evil Lyceum began to spread this food, human beings in the Garden of Eden would become the slaves of the devils. Angel, it is lucky you found it. Any delay will cause irrevocable damage."/> <字串 編號="60501" 文字="We must do something to prevent the devils from poisoning innocent human beings. Angel, I want you to help me. Please go to collect the detoxifying medicinal herb for me."/> <字串 編號="60502" 文字="If the poison in food was made by Berssif, according to the records of the Health mannual, an antidote must be a composite of [/c$2Evil Bolus/c*], [/c$2Shrub Bark/c*], [/c$2Nature Prime/c*] and [/c$2Pure Fire Crystal/c*]. You have to defeat monsters to get them."/> <字串 編號="60503" 文字="Please find the [Hook Barft], [Savage Priest], [Marsh Wind Fairy] and [Burning Monster]and defeat them. Hurry, there is not much time left. Act now, angel."/> <字串 編號="60504" 文字="After you defeat the [Hook Barft], [Savage Priest], [Marsh Wind Fairy]and [Burning Monster], the detoxifying medicinal herb may drop. If you are not clear how much medicinal herb is needed, open the Angel Quest List to confirm it."/> <字串 編號="60505" 文字="A injured Angel Pickets told me that the [Hook Barft]could be found at the Dragon Graveyard. Angel, you can go to there to find him."/> <字串 編號="60506" 文字="The PE teacher took students to the Thorn Wasteland and carried out combat training. They brought back many strange masks. Could it relate to the [Savage Priest]?"/> <字串 編號="60507" 文字="[Marsh Wind Fairy], judged by its name, it must live in the Mysterious Wetlands."/> <字串 編號="60508" 文字="Doesn't the [Burning Monster] often play with the Angel Lyceum drop-outs around Thunder Ruins? When you get there, don't forget to help Angel Pickets capture the Fallen Angels."/> <字串 編號="60509" 文字="Angel, have you collected enough detoxifying medicinial herbs?"/> <字串 編號="60510" 文字="Give them to Medicine Lecturer."/> <字串 編號="60511" 文字="Good job! You are indeed an excellent graduate of the Angel Lyceum. Wait for a moment please, I am going to make an antidote and ask the other angels to give it to the victimes."/> <字串 編號="60512" 文字="Besides, the Angel Inspector must be waiting for you to come back to/c$2 Megalith Plain /c*"/> <字串 編號="60513" 文字="I think that the Angel Inspector must be waiting for you to come back to/c$2 Megalith Plain /c*"/> <字串 編號="60514" 文字="You finally came back, angel. What did the Medicine Lecturer say?"/> <字串 編號="60515" 文字="It turns out that the frantic poisons have been added to the food. In this way, without being involved in war,the evil forces of the Evil Lyceum will dominate the world."/> <字串 編號="60516" 文字="In addition, the number of Angels who believed the rumor and disappeared or became unconscious and corrupted, has been increasing recently. If we are careful enough, we can easily discover that there is someone manipulating the situation behind the curtain..."/> <字串 編號="60517" 文字="I need to think about the solution carefully. Well, there're some minor awards and some recruits. Please accept them and take a rest. We will continue with our discussion after you have prepared."/> <字串 編號="60518" 文字="Ouch...I am dizzy... What's wrong with me? I can hardly recall anything that happened before...Is it because I'm too tired from my daily chores? "/> <字串 編號="60519" 文字="Hello, Risker, please listen to my song! Two Angels, two Angels, flying swiftly, flying swiftly~~~~~"/> <字串 編號="60520" 文字="Ha, you wicked devils! I swear with an iron fist, I will never allow you to intrude into my home!! "/> <字串 編號="60521" 文字="It seems that he made no difference after recovery..."/> <字串 編號="60522" 文字="Wow... My property is all gone! Who could have stolen it to buy food in such a short time?"/> <字串 編號="60523" 文字="Why not borrow some money from the bank so as to stage a comeback in other countries before the exposure of my bankruptcy."/> <字串 編號="60601" 文字="Now I am 100% certain of the fact that the embodiment of the/c$2 Bersica/c* is Chef Boship. After careful consideration, I think I can make an offensive attack to wipe out the base camp of Bersica rather than simply remain defensive. "/> <字串 編號="60602" 文字="But last time Asmode of the Evil Lyceum suffered huge losses, so they will have hidden their tracks more carefully and conservatively. We were able to find out from the gimmick of the Devil Dish that Bersica is so considerate! "/> <字串 編號="60603" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, I need you to win the trust of Bersica so as to find out the location of its base... After you get a positive ID on the location, call for your pals and peers to beat down Bersica. "/> <字串 編號="60604" 文字="No problem."/> <字串 編號="60605" 文字="I am out, goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="60606" 文字="Well done! You're worthy of the title of the elite main force of the Eden Purification Plan! Please return to the [/c$2Dragon Graveyard/c*], and ask/c$2 Chef Boship/c* to absorb you as one of his apprentices, so as to find out the location of his base!"/> <字串 編號="60607" 文字="Please return to [/c$2Dragon Graveyard/c*], and ask/c$2 Chef Boship/c* to absorb you as one of his official apprentices, so as to destroy its base!"/> <字串 編號="60608" 文字="I'd like to know more."/> <字串 編號="60609" 文字="It's the most skilled area for the investigation army to collect information. Little Angel, what would you like to know?"/> <字串 編號="60610" 文字="About the [Heaven War]"/> <字串 編號="60611" 文字="The identity of Bersica"/> <字串 編號="60612" 文字=" The missing Little Angels"/> <字串 編號="60613" 文字="That happened before your entrance into the Angel Lyceum, which was in turmoil duriung the ancient times. At that time, there was an advanced angel named [Lucifer], who also descended down to the earth to spread the care and gospel of Heaven. Therefore, those people under the shelter and protection of the Angels showed their respect to Lucifer."/> <字串 編號="60614" 文字="In order to memorialize Lucifer, people of all places contributed their money, material and strength to build the most magnificent castle in history on the border between what is now the countries of beasts and irons. After its foundation, Lucifer was supposed to be the leader, which was the apex of his popularity, and outstripped even Gods fame at the time."/> <字串 編號="60615" 文字="To our surprise, when Lucifer had gathered all this strength and power, he forgot to abide by the regulations he had sworn to obey, and fell in love with a human girl, which is the biggest taboo of Heaven. She was so beautiful that she could hardly be distinguished from her appearance even by angels. So Lucifer lavished upon her most of his care and love, far more than the share of respect he was supposed to give God."/> <字串 編號="60616" 文字="Then a misfortune happened. Another angel, a lower rank than him, who had come from another place, also fell in love with that girl occasionally. Of course, Lucifer couldn't accept this humiliation. After that, he became jealous and suspicious, and totally lost the tolerance and patience expected of an angel."/> <字串 編號="60617" 文字="Finally, Lucifer lost his mind, and gave endless torture to that pitiful lover with his power...The girl was smashed into morning dew, while the body of that angel was destroyed by thunder, only to leave his naked soul clinging to the sky from afar, and forced to give off weak light by burning himself."/> <字串 編號="60618" 文字="The dew and the star can only meet each other shortly before the transition of the sun and the moon."/> <字串 編號="60619" 文字="Of course Lucifer became an eyesore of Heaven and was deprived of his status as a revered Angel, for he had abused his power. But Lucifer wouldn't simply await his doom, and planned to unite the forces of evil to cause a mutiny, so that he could take Gods' place. A war against Heaven was then launched."/> <字串 編號="60620" 文字="Before the war, Lucifer decided to forget his past, including the endless care and love he had shown to that girl, and together with the power embodied in the castle, buried them underground...At that time, the formerly large city disappeared without any trace."/> <字串 編號="60621" 文字="The new leader Michael gathered all the other angels to fight the large army of the damned led by Lucifer. And this continuous war has also involved the whole of Eden inevitably..."/> <字串 編號="60622" 文字="The war launched by the angels did a great harm to the whole land. The sigh of God put the north of Eden into an atmosphere of freezing cold; the war also made the east of Eden opened to a great cliff which was hundreds of miles long; the fallen star made the ground like a flat sea; and the bodies piled up into a vast forest."/> <字串 編號="60623" 文字="At last, the rebellious angels couldn't stand against the whole strength of Creation, and were thrown into the deep pool after the gods burned and shredded their wings...This is all there is about the Heaven War. On the whole, the war left deep scars upon both Heaven and Hell, among which, the innocent human beings suffered the worst. They were forced to leave their homes, thus they didn't believe in God any more."/> <字串 編號="60624" 文字="Then, under Michael's lead, Heaven gradually returned to the prosperity it had before the war. And in order to cultivate more reserves, Michael set up the [Angel Lyceum] to recruit the pure spirits from the human world so as to form more newly born angels. But on the other hand, Lucifer's remaining forces established the [Evil Lyceum] in Hell, which absorbed the evil spirits in order to strengthen their forces."/> <字串 編號="60625" 文字="During the time of the Heaven War, besides Lucifer, who devoted himself entirely to the forces of darkness, there were seven devils whose strength was not inferior to that of a third level angel. Each of them symbolized one of the wickedest lusts of humans. They were in fact very frightful enemies. "/> <字串 編號="60626" 文字="Asmode, who was once defeated by you, was one of them. But strictly speaking, he was under the bottom level of the seven as far as experience was concerned, therefore, he was just the Student Union Leader in the Evil Lyceum."/> <字串 編號="60627" 文字="And Bersica, one of the enemies we would go on a punitive expedition, was also among the seven. He is specialized in producing dirtiness, virulence and disease. Although he is not too much stronger than Asmode, he could use some wicked means to mix rivals up. So to this extent, he is one we don't like to encounter. "/> <字串 編號="60628" 文字="According to the intelligence we got so far, Bersica is the chef of the Evil Lyceum. Because of it, I am certain that this affair has a close relationship with him. As for the rest of the five devils......They all made it hard for us to grasp their direction by hiding their tracks carefully, just like Lucifer."/> <字串 編號="60629" 文字="Little Angel, I believe you know about the continuous disappearances recently? If what I remember is right, there was a kind of myth after the defeat of Asmode that for the lovers, if they can find a kind of gem called the [Sunlight Tear], they can be a couple under the witness of God, thus having their permanent wish granted. "/> <字串 編號="60630" 文字="But some little angels who took part in the [Purification Plan for Eden] fell in love with each other after their graduation. What's more, they believed in the myth, therefore, they go everywhere to find the [Sunlight Tear]."/> <字串 編號="60631" 文字="Gradually, there's some news that prior to the Heaven War, among the ruins of the former residence of Lucifer, there may be some of this kind of gem. After that, some little angels broke into the Sealed City of Heaven."/> <字串 編號="60632" 文字="And the result is what we can find now, some have disappeared, some are unconscious, others throw themselves into the lap of the Evil Lyceum! It's said that these little angels became fat and swollen, with dull eyes."/> <字串 編號="60633" 文字="But as we talk about the "fat and swollen", after more consideration, isn't it designed by Bersica? If so, I have to admire his strategy! He set the traps to decrease the strength of Heaven and the Human World, which is much more superior and subtle than that of Asmode."/> <字串 編號="60634" 文字="If you want to help the unconscious angels back to consciousness, you can go back the Angel Lyceum to find Cupid who is in charge of caring for these miserable angels. "/> <字串 編號="60635" 文字="Hahaha, young guy, why do you return so urgently, do you have something to tell me?"/> <字串 編號="60636" 文字="Let me be your apprentice!"/> <字串 編號="60637" 文字="Just passing by..."/> <字串 編號="60638" 文字="Hehe, well, good! You've also begun to experience the endless charm of cooking? If you study it hard enough, I will pass all my knowledge down to you, young guy! Ha! What do you think of that!"/> <字串 編號="60639" 文字="My main kitchen is under the deep recesses of Eden, which is a good place for cooking because it is known for its vigorous flames. You should go directly from/c$2 the north cave of Dragon Graveyard/, by this way can you reach the splendid underground world!"/> <字串 編號="60640" 文字="But I have never let anyone without true skill be my apprentice! If you really want to, you have to pass the tests set by my three excellent apprentices, and then you can have the chance to enter into my kitchen to learn some truly profound cooking skills."/> <字串 編號="60641" 文字="The first test is given by the [/c$2Mayole/c*] who has tasted all the cuisines worldwide...... Machine is just waiting in the [/c$2Fiery Path/c*] underground. You should not keep him waiting too long!"/> <字串 編號="60642" 文字="Machine is just waiting in the [/c$2Fiery Path/c*] underground. You should not keep him waiting too long!"/> <字串 編號="60643" 文字="Why are you staring at me! I'm so busy! Don't bother me!!
"/> <字串 編號="60644" 文字="Wow, are you the newly accepted apprentice of Bersica? You seems too weak, without the due strength of a devil... Ok, forget it, just follow my teacher's instructions to test your abilities."/> <字串 編號="60701" 文字="Are you ready for the first test?"/> <字串 編號="60702" 文字="Senior, please start."/> <字串 編號="60703" 文字="Who is [Perssif]?"/> <字串 編號="60704" 文字="It's hot and tiring,I will be back later"/> <字串 編號="60705" 文字="You, the country man! [Perssif] is just the anonymn used by the master on earth, for he has a well-known reputation. In order to avoid unexpected incidents, he did it. "/> <字串 編號="60706" 文字="Hmmmph! Weak man, my teacher must have thought too highly of you! Out! You'd better never come back again!!"/> <字串 編號="60707" 文字="Listen carefully, you have to collect [Baked Black Sugar], [Dirt Fungus], [Crazy Whey], 6 pieces each, and then bring back to me for the carefully designed [Mayonnaise], so as to attend the cuisine competition on the school's anniversary held by the /c$2Evil Lyceum/c* this time."/> <字串 編號="60708" 文字="You did hear clearly the four unfortunate words the [Evil Lyceum] said by Machine just now..."/> <字串 編號="60709" 文字="You can find them from the monsters living underground. /c$2Heat Elf/c*, /c$2Hell Slave/c* and /c$2Evil Grass/c*, each has one kind among them. "/> <字串 編號="60710" 文字="Why are you daydreaming?! Move!! Don't make me repeat myself, you idiot!!!"/> <字串 編號="60711" 文字="You dare to come find me even though you haven't found them all? Do you like to be beaten? Listen carefully, the first test is to find the six pieces of [Baked Black Sugar], [Dirt Fungus] and [Crazy Whey] from /c$2Heat Elf/c*, /c$2Hell Slave/c* and /c$2Evil Grass/c*! Go quickly!"/> <字串 編號="60712" 文字="Well, you say you've found them all? Let me check them. If you're cheating me, I will have you tied and beaten!"/> <字串 編號="60713" 文字="Give the materials to the Machine"/> <字串 編號="60714" 文字="Turn back and leave."/> <字串 編號="60715" 文字="You idiot! Never come back again!"/> <字串 編號="60716" 文字="......It indeed tastes good, which is what I needed. You have passed the first test...barely. Although not as efficiently as I did. But it at least proved that you were not cheating me."/> <字串 編號="60717" 文字="Take it away, according to the master's instruction, which is the award for your passing the test."/> <字串 編號="60718" 文字="As for the second test, it was set by my peer [/c$2Ugly Saladan/c*]. Go quickly to [/c$2Lava Cave/c*] to find him, you should never keep him waiting too long."/> <字串 編號="60719" 文字="Don't walk around me, you really making me dizzy... [/c$2Ugly Saladan/c*] is still waiting for you at [/c$2Lava Cave/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="60720" 文字="Why... Why is the salad always so delicious...... Can you tell me, risker?"/> <字串 編號="60721" 文字="Well? Are you the new apprentice coming for the test? You should have some kind of ability since you have passed all the tortures of the Machine."/> <字串 編號="60722" 文字="Come here and accept this package of things. It was given by Mr. Perssif. Then, I will be in charge of testing your ability..."/> <字串 編號="60801" 文字="New apprentice, do you know what's the necessary ingredient of the most delicious salad you have ever tasted?"/> <字串 編號="60802" 文字="Ask him"/> <字串 編號="60803" 文字="Keep silent"/> <字串 編號="60804" 文字="It seems you need some time to consider. Come again after you have made a decision."/> <字串 編號="60805" 文字="Although to the public, salad is just a dispensable appettizer. But do you think you can taste the splendid flavor of the latter dishes without waking up your gustation before? Thus salad is the key to true appreciation of a great meal."/> <字串 編號="60806" 文字="In other words, a good salad should stimulate every nerve in your mouth but not too strongly, which is called fulfilling its own function...The point is to pepare the taste buds, not to be the main dish."/> <字串 編號="60807" 文字="Recently, I am developing a new cuisine: [Sour Salad Compote]. We need two basic materials [/c$2Rotten Caudex/c*] and [/c$2Acid Catsup/c*] so as to make it feel peppery and afterwards, refreshing! New apprentice, are you willing to help me find them?"/> <字串 編號="60808" 文字="Promise easily"/> <字串 編號="60809" 文字="That's great... Recently in order to test the different flavors repeatedly, I made my throat sticky and ready to vomit... RRRrreeeeaaaahhhh!...... Then I will vomit the bodily fluids, which makes me not as vigorous as before."/> <字串 編號="60810" 文字="Therefore I need you to help me find those materials. To find the [/c$2Rotten Caudex/c*], you can use the collection skill to collect it from the/c$2 Primrose Bush /c*, and as for the [/c$2Acid Catsup/c*], you can get a spoonful of it after you have beat down the /c$2God Fly Group/c*... Remember to seek for help from some skilled friends. Obtaining these materials is not as easy as it sounds."/> <字串 編號="60811" 文字="New apprentice, is everything going well? I have to remind you that to find the [/c$2Rotten Caudex/c*], you can use the collecting skill to collect it from the/c$2 Primrose Bush /c*, and as for the [/c$2Acid Catsup/c*], you can get a spoonful of it after you beat down the /c$2God Fly Group/c*...RRRrreeeaaahhh! Ah~~"/> <字串 編號="60812" 文字="Cough, I'm sorry, the salad last night was hard to digest, which made me vomit several times. I need to have a rest...I will leave the rest to you."/> <字串 編號="60813" 文字="Ah! This rotten stem and the disgusting smell... New apprentice, you indeed take back what I want."/> <字串 編號="60814" 文字="Congratulations! You finished the second test of Mr. Perssif, now you can head to the [/c$2Underground Square/c*] to find my peers the [/c$2Luxious Ba/c*], then you can continue with the last test."/> <字串 編號="60815" 文字="Congratulations! You finished all the tests, and have joined in the big family of Mr. Perssif..."/> <字串 編號="60816" 文字="The third test place is the [/c$2Underground Square/c*], there you can find the [/c$2Luxious Ba/c*] who will tell you what to do."/> <字串 編號="60817" 文字="Say something about your fellow students."/> <字串 編號="60818" 文字="Turn away to leave"/> <字串 編號="60819" 文字="Machine is an arrogant and aggressive guy. But to me he is only isolated and strong in self pride. So basically he is a good man, who is fond of cooking."/> <字串 編號="60820" 文字="Talking of Ba...Hey, I don't admire his careless style, for carelessness is not appreciated in cooking! He likes engorgement which is hard to identify. But just because of these characteristics, he can do well in the chef position of the Evil Lyceum's kitchen. Those devils are really good at eating."/> <字串 編號="60821" 文字="As to my character and interest, it really takes time to tell you, for they're so dazzling... RRrrreeaahhh~~~~~~~"/> <字串 編號="60822" 文字="Cough... Why do I always vomit at such important times? Salad, salad, you are so hard to grasp, why are you always flirting my body and spirit? It seems that I have to take a rest, let's chat next time, new apprentice..."/> <字串 編號="60823" 文字="AAHHH!......Where did you come from? Don't disturb me while I'm cooking!!"/> <字串 編號="60824" 文字="Tell him your purpose."/> <字串 編號="60825" 文字="Ah? Are you the new apprentice of Chef Perssif... Look at your fair hands, which makes me afraid of their safety when they hold something, say a scoop. Anyhow, it's really hard to pass the first two tests! So you must be ok..."/> <字串 編號="60826" 文字="Take these treasures, the chef has asked me to reward you if you ever came back here."/> <字串 編號="60901" 文字="Next, let's get down to the final test. I, in place of the chef will examine your response and speed , are you ready?"/> <字串 編號="60902" 文字="Ready."/> <字串 編號="60903" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="60904" 文字="We cook food for the kids of the Evil Lyceum. If they have a stomachache, we will suffer their revenge, and our fighting ability will also be affected. In order to make sure of the quality of dishes, I only use the freshest of ingredients."/> <字串 編號="60905" 文字="First, you have to buy a [/c$2Spell Storage Bag/c*] from me and then go to/c$2 attack the Underground Monsters /c*, and then put their edible parts into the bag."/> <字串 編號="60906" 文字="There is time limitation on the Spell Storage Bag. If no food is put into the bag within two hours, it will become invalid and be automatically destroyed."/> <字串 編號="60907" 文字="Defeat the [Rock Slarm],the [Terra Lampman],the [Evil Flower],the [Flame Mummy] and the [Fire Fly] and bring back all of the edible parts that I need. The more powerful Monsters will drop these parts more easily. Bring me/c$2 30/c* bags of parts! You can buy more storage bags from me at any time!"/> <字串 編號="60908" 文字="Have you finished the task? What else can I do for you? I am busy!"/> <字串 編號="60909" 文字="Ask to take the task again."/> <字串 編號="60910" 文字="Purchase a [Spell Storage Bag]."/> <字串 編號="60911" 文字="Did you not listen the first time? I'll say it again, defeat the [Rock Slarm], the [Terra Lampman], the [Evil Flower], the [Flame Mummy] and the [Fire Fly] and put their edible parts into the [/c$2Spell Storage Bag/c*]. Bring me back/c$2 30/c* bags!"/> <字串 編號="60912" 文字="Attention, please! The Storage Bag will be disappear automatically if it is not used within two hours and the more powerful Monsters will drop the parts more easily. Come on!"/> <字串 編號="60913" 文字="What a nuisance you are! I cannot even get a bite of my lunch without you disturbing me! Oh, you have come for a reason this time. O.k. I am waiting to get the bags. Did you find them all? "/> <字串 編號="60914" 文字="Hand over 30 full storage bags to Ba."/> <字串 編號="60915" 文字="Not yet..."/> <字串 編號="60916" 文字="Well done! I, in place of Evil Cook, declare that you've completed the final test!"/> <字串 編號="60917" 文字="Now you are qualified to learn from Evil Cook. Our kitchen headquarters are at the end of the [/c$2Magic Kitchen Path/c*] to the north of [/c$2Lava Cave/c*]."/> <字串 編號="60918" 文字="You should make an arrangement with the [/c$2Disgusting Attendant/c*] at the Restaurant near the Evil Lyceum kitchen in the portal of the Magic Kitchen Path. He can give you more information. Come on! After you have finished learning, you will be able give me a hand. So hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="60919" 文字="Pah! You are far too poor to be able to afford this restaurant! Go back home to eat your stale bread and water."/> <字串 編號="60920" 文字="Is the new apprentice that has passed the first three tests? You are? Good, but don't be so proud of yourself. The Evil Cook has asked me to give you another task. You cannot see him until you complete it."/> <字串 編號="61001" 文字="We always prepare Hell Red Wine to serve with our meals, it is made from fresh blood. However, some of the Angel Lyceum try to destroy our things. Thus, the Hell Red Wine is less and less."/> <字串 編號="61002" 文字="If you can find enough /c$2Human Blood/c*to complete your task you will get meet the Evil Cook."/> <字串 編號="61003" 文字="I accept the task."/> <字串 編號="61004" 文字="Ridiculous! Human Blood! No way!"/> <字串 編號="61005" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="61006" 文字="Do what you have promised to do, I am waiting for you. Don't delay too long, or else I will find you more things to do. Ha-ha..."/> <字串 編號="61007" 文字="To complete the Attendant's request would be unbearable. I think that I must ask the Medicine Lecturer in the /c$2Angel Lyceum/c* for help!"/> <字串 編號="61008" 文字="What is your opinion? But don't forget that this test will prove your loyalty to our cause. It's an honor that the Evil Cook give you a test. However, if you don't feel you can stomach the task, you can go back home. I will never force you."/> <字串 編號="61009" 文字="Little Angel, you still look as healthy as before. I am really glad to see you."/> <字串 編號="61010" 文字="Explain the Disgusting Attendant's request."/> <字串 編號="61011" 文字="How cruel! Are all the dining and social habits of Fiends in the Evil Lyceum so disgusting?"/> <字串 編號="61012" 文字="Actually, I have a way of extracting blood from humans without harm. Take this [Indolent Acus] it is used for examining health. It has no side effects and can barely be felt by the patient."/> <字串 編號="61013" 文字="I will you another [Nutritious Biscuit] Recipe. If you give it to the Little Angels who have the Cooking Skills then you ask them to make the biscuits for you. If you offer the humans a biscuit and a nice cup of tea they will be more willing to donate blood."/> <字串 編號="61014" 文字="If you are sincere you will find many humans willing to donate their blood. Especially in exchange for a [nutritious biscuit] and a nice cup of tea! And don't forget to take your [indolent acus] with you."/> <字串 編號="61015" 文字="Hey friend! Do you need fresh blood to help save people? If so I can help you."/> <字串 編號="61016" 文字="Sorry, I am in a hurry, I can't help you."/> <字串 編號="61017" 文字="I'm too afraid of needles, please don't put it in my body! "/> <字串 編號="61018" 文字="You've collected one bottle of pure human blood."/> <字串 編號="61019" 文字="Did you bring the human blood for making the Hell Red Wine that the Evil Cook requires? "/> <字串 編號="61020" 文字="Give the collected blood to the Attendant."/> <字串 編號="61021" 文字="Let me check the blood...How fresh it is!"/> <字串 編號="61022" 文字="You've passed the test. Go to the [/c$2Magic Kitchen Path/c*] through this stone door. The Evil Cook is in the deep kitchen. However, there may be other barriers on the way.... He-he-he..."/> <字串 編號="61023" 文字="If you are really trying to find healthy people that are all willing to donate blood. I know a strong fisherman on the /c$2North of Mirror Lake/c*. You may ask him."/> <字串 編號="61024" 文字="Ha-ha, it's a sunny day! What can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="61025" 文字="Donate blood? Free biscuit and a nice cup of tea? No problem, I am so strong that you could draw out two or three pints. Don't worry after you have taken it I will recover after a nap."/> <字串 編號="61026" 文字="You have drawn out a great amount of blood from Cliff. You thank him and leave."/> <字串 編號="61027" 文字="Hey, guy! Bring more friends here next time!"/> <字串 編號="61101" 文字="There is a metal gate, with evil faces carved onto it's front. You can't push it open, you must to find a special key."/> <字串 編號="61102" 文字="The sound of Berssif can be heard coming from the room behind the door...."/> <字串 編號="61103" 文字="[Eager apprentice, you must find the key in the [/c$2Gulp Room/c*]] before you can come to see me. It is hidden in some /c$2chests/c* there... Don't make me wait too long."/> <字串 編號="61104" 文字="The locked metal gate can't be opened until the key is found. The sound of Berssif can be heard coming from the room behind it."/> <字串 編號="61105" 文字="You are unable to open the chest with Flies painted on it. Maybe you have to get some instructions from a Demon before you can open it."/> <字串 編號="61106" 文字="This seems to be the chest Berssif mentioned. Inside you find a Pepper Pot. Maybe it can open the kitchen gate in Magic Kitchen Path..."/> <字串 編號="61107" 文字="Maybe the pepper pot you found in the chest can open the kitchen gate in [/c$2Magic Kitchen Path/c*]..."/> <字串 編號="61108" 文字="The fly key in your hand may be able to open the metal gate in the center of [Magic Kitchen Path]."/> <字串 編號="61109" 文字="You are welcome to Berssif's Devil Kitchen! Foolish Angels, do you really think that you can cheat the Evil Lyceum again?"/> <字串 編號="61110" 文字="Now we, Devils, will destroy you all! Ha-Ha-Ha!!!!!"/> <字串 編號="61111" 文字="It seems that you are stronger than anticipated. No matter I, Berssif, will deal with you myself!"/> <字串 編號="61112" 文字="Ha-ha-ha! You are not strong enough to defeat me! I will wait for you in [/c$2Gulp Room/c*]."/> <字串 編號="61113" 文字="Little Angel. Is the news really true? You defeated the Evil Berssif all by yourself? Our spies told us the news earlier, but it seems to good to be true. You are so brave!"/> <字串 編號="61114" 文字="The only flaw is that Berssif fled to the [/c$2Gulp Room/c*].However, it does not take away from your glory. Please accept this reward."/> <字串 編號="61115" 文字="If you wish to go after Berssif, discuss it with me later..."/> <字串 編號="61201" 文字="Berssif has had to give up his body. Now I need a brave volunteer to defeat him completely in the [/c$2Gulp Room/c*]."/> <字串 編號="61202" 文字="I volunteer to join the chase task."/> <字串 編號="61203" 文字="Talk Tell me about it later."/> <字串 編號="61204" 文字="Well done! Berssif is only a disembodied soul now. If all goes smoothly, we can destroy him completely. Our victory is in your hands!"/> <字串 編號="61205" 文字="Let me provide you with some information. The portal of the [/c$2Gulp Room/c*] is in one corner of the [/c$2Underground Square/c*]. The Gulp Room is an extremely dangerous place, you are cannot enter it alone, so you must team up with other Angels. Take care! Destroy Berssif! "/> <字串 編號="61206" 文字="Nooooo!! Curses!!! How did I fail?... I was to be the future leader... It's impossible!... Nooooo!!!!!!"/> <字串 編號="61207" 文字="Berssif turns into a pile of black ash and is gently blown away by the wind. Screaming as he goes."/> <字串 編號="61208" 文字="Little Angel, I knew that you would able to destroy Berssif! You are so great!"/> <字串 編號="61209" 文字="The aggressive plan of the Evil Lyceum has been stopped again. The people of the Garden of Eden and Angels in the Angel Lyceum can take a break from worrying Tell me about. For now...."/> <字串 編號="61210" 文字="Leader Michael asked me to praise you on his behalf and to award you this."/> <字串 編號="61211" 文字="Goodbye, Little Angel. Report all the details to the Angels in your faction city. I hope you will continue to help others."/> <字串 編號="61212" 文字="Ask about the remains of Berssif's cult."/> <字串 編號="61213" 文字="Even though the problem with Berssif has been solved, I am still confused Tell me about one thing..."/> <字串 編號="61214" 文字="It is said there are five Evil Generals who love nothing more than fighting."/> <字串 編號="61215" 文字="One of the five evil generals, [/c$2Bazac/c*] looks like a wild ox. It is said that he led a group of soldiers to burn Heaven down, just for the fun of it. Luckily, he was held back by Angels."/> <字串 編號="61216" 文字="Bazac's actions made their leader, Lucifer extremely angry, so he was demoted to the rank of soldier. Bazac, however, grew tired of following his Leader's orders and decided to make his own mark on the world. "/> <字串 編號="61217" 文字="The threat of Berssif is solved, but we haven't found any clue to the whereabouts of Bazac. I am afraid he will try to take the place of Berssif."/> <字串 編號="61218" 文字="Bazac is as powerful as Berssif at fighting. If he was not destroyed, I can only image what could happen in the future. Little Angel, if you are free, I hope you can return to the /c$2Gulp Room/c* and deal with him."/> <字串 編號="61219" 文字="Curses! The Evil Kitchen has been overthrown. I will get revenge for Berssif."/> <字串 編號="61220" 文字="Ah, Mr. Berssif, you have left us... How sad."/> <字串 編號="61221" 文字="Alas, even though Berssif has left us, the food supply to the Evil Lyceum must not be stopped..."/> <字串 編號="61222" 文字="Wu...he...he.."/> <字串 編號="61223" 文字="Along with the failure of Berssif, this avatar will also lose its consciousness."/> <字串 編號="61301" 文字="Do the Marriage Quest."/> <字串 編號="61302" 文字="Oh, elder brother, have you find your beautiful girl? My job is to unite true love. I will also give you an easy test!"/> <字串 編號="61303" 文字="I accept"/> <字串 編號="61304" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="61305" 文字="Do you know of the legendary couple, who were cursed by Lucifer and became the Dew and the Starlight? Ever since that day they can only see each other as night turns into day. Ah, too, too sad!"/> <字串 編號="61306" 文字="Leader Michael always wished to release them from their loneliness, but the curse of Lucifer is too strong to break."/> <字串 編號="61307" 文字="The Angel Lyceum needs this couple now. I need the [Star Soul] and the [Dew Crystal] to save them."/> <字串 編號="61308" 文字="So, I want you to go to Cactus Plain and get the [Star Soul]. If you can finish the task and take the [Dew Crystal] from your beloved. You and your true love will be ready to be married."/> <字串 編號="61309" 文字="Please go to Cactus Plain and get the [Star Soul]. If you can finish the task and take the [Dew Crystal] from your beloved. You and your true love will be ready to be married."/> <字串 編號="61310" 文字="Wow, Is this the [Star Soul]? If you also brought the [Dew Crystal], you can marry your beloved."/> <字串 編號="61311" 文字="The wind is so strong in the gorge. You can see a remote star glittering in the distance."/> <字串 編號="61312" 文字="Calmly listen to all of the movements around."/> <字串 編號="61313" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="61314" 文字="[As long as I can see you everyday, even if it only lasts for one second, I am satisfied...]"/> <字串 編號="61315" 文字="[Why do you come here?]"/> <字串 編號="61316" 文字="[You need my dark light to awaken your cursed friends? I still care Tell me about the world... I will try my best to help you...]"/> <字串 編號="61317" 文字="[I know Gebuers in Gebuer Vale always take a Magic Bottle along with them. If you can defeat them, you will be able to get it.]"/> <字串 編號="61318" 文字="[If you can get the Magic Bottle, I will burn brighter than I have ever done before to give off my light... Good luck!]"/> <字串 編號="61319" 文字="[Have got the bottle? Please point the bottle mouth towards to me]"/> <字串 編號="61320" 文字="Instantly, Starlight burns its soul, twinkling it pours into the bottle. You seal up the mouth quickly!"/> <字串 編號="61321" 文字="[...I have tried my best... I hope you can free your friends from trouble and that you and your true love can stay together forever... Good byeeeeee...]"/> <字串 編號="61322" 文字="Exhausted Starlight's weak voice gradually disappears into the air."/> <字串 編號="61323" 文字="Wow, you have got the [Star Soul] and the [Dew Crystal]! The dazed Angels can be saved!"/> <字串 編號="61324" 文字="Besides setting up the place for the resurrections, I also have to take care of patients full time. It's so unfair! On top of all that I am sure the Evil Lyceum is playing tricks with me as well."/> <字串 編號="61325" 文字="Oh, I forget one thing... Brother, please accept this [Sunlight Tear]. Take this gem with your beloved back to the Church of the Angel Lyceum, the Abbot will hold a wedding for you!"/> <字串 編號="61326" 文字="I will also wish you happiness. Goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="61327" 文字="Hurry to find the Abbot to hold your wedding ceremony! Remember to invite lots of relations!"/> <字串 編號="61328" 文字="Hum, I hate all of this amorous stuff! How can stand it? Doesn't it make you want to be sick? No! Well go away then. I don't want to talk with you!"/> <字串 編號="61329" 文字="Little Angel, have you found your beloved? As long as you accepted and completed the test from Heaven, you can step into the church and stay together forever."/> <字串 編號="61330" 文字="About marriage detail, process & benefit"/> <字串 編號="61331" 文字="I accept the marriage task."/> <字串 編號="61332" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="61333" 文字="What do you want to know?"/> <字串 編號="61334" 文字="Tell me about the conditions of marriage."/> <字串 編號="61335" 文字="Tell me about the process of marriage."/> <字串 編號="61336" 文字="Tell me about the things after marriage"/> <字串 編號="61337" 文字="No matter if you are male or female, if you are not already married and don't have any questions Tell me about marriage. You are able to accept the marriage test. After passing it. You both will obtain the Love token."/> <字串 編號="61338" 文字="That is to say, the two people who want to marry both have to complete the marriage task. The female has to finish her marriage task first and obtain the Spousal token [Dew Crystal]. Then give it to her true love then wait him finish his test. After that the two people are betrothed."/> <字串 編號="61339" 文字="After the man gets the [Sunlight Tear], the two can team up and go back to the church of the Angel Lyceum to look for the Abbot as your wedding witness. After exchanging the rings, the two people are a true couple. "/> <字串 編號="61340" 文字="However, before marrying, you should consider your future carefully. If you don't think you are suited for each other, you may discard the [Sunlight Tear] and the [Dew Crystal] before the wedding, then your relationship will be broken."/> <字串 編號="61341" 文字="The weddings are different according to different expenditures. If the two parts are willing to buy the [marriage certificate] in Item Mall, the two will enjoy the blessing from heaven, so will all of their guests! "/> <字串 編號="61342" 文字="Whereas, you are able to hold a plain wedding even if you don't pay for place. Although it is not so romantic, as long as you two are sincere, all the ceremony is not important."/> <字串 編號="61343" 文字="The couple will enjoy more convenience, such as online notice, PM, and even be able to embrace each other through the power of ring."/> <字串 編號="61344" 文字="The [Item Mall] also sell special Defeat Scrolls for couples, which benefits their future fights a lot."/> <字串 編號="61345" 文字="However, maybe one day you want to divorce. At that time, you have to buy the [Divorce Agreement] in the Item Mall."/> <字串 編號="61346" 文字="Do you know of the legendary couple, who were cursed by Lucifer and became the Dew and the Starlight? Ever since that day they can only see each other as night turns into day. Ah, too, too sad!"/> <字串 編號="61347" 文字="Leader Michael always wished to release them from their loneliness, but the curse of Lucifer is too strong to break."/> <字串 編號="61348" 文字="The Angel Lyceum needs this couple now. I need the [Star Soul] and the [Dew Crystal] to save them. Many couples have been tricked by the Evils and have disappeared. Some are lucky enough to be saved but are still in a waking daze. They are the victims of love."/> <字串 編號="61349" 文字="Only the [Star Soul] and the [Dew Crystal] can awaken them. Moreover, they must be used by a love struck couple so that they can perform perfectly."/> <字串 編號="61350" 文字="So, I want you to go to Cactus Plain and get the [Star Soul]. If you can finish the task and take the [Dew Crystal] from your beloved. You and your true love will be ready to be married."/> <字串 編號="61351" 文字="Please go to Cactus Plain and get the [Star Soul]. If you can finish the task and take the [Dew Crystal] from your beloved. You and your true love will be ready to be married."/> <字串 編號="61352" 文字="Wow, Is this the [Star Soul]? If you also brought the [Dew Crystal], you can marry your beloved."/> <字串 編號="61353" 文字="Good. The [Star Soul] and the [Dew Crystal] along with your deep feelings are certain to awaken the dazed Angels."/> <字串 編號="61354" 文字="Congratulations you on passing the test. Please accept this [Sunlight Tear]. Taking this gem with you beloved back to the Church of the Angel Lyceum, Abbot will hold a wedding for you!"/> <字串 編號="61355" 文字="I will also wish you happiness. Goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="61356" 文字="Hurry to find Abbot to hold a wedding ceremony! Remember to invite all of your relations!"/> <字串 編號="61357" 文字="As a man, devoting himself to one person is the most important. Don't let the other down. Cherish everything."/> <字串 編號="61401" 文字="Oh, sister, have you find your handsome love? My job is to unite those in love. I will also give you an easy test!"/> <字串 編號="61402" 文字="I accept the test."/> <字串 編號="61403" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="61404" 文字="Do you know of the legendary couple, who were cursed by Lucifer and became the Dew and the Starlight? Ever since that day they can only see each other as night turns into day. Ah, too, too sad!"/> <字串 編號="61405" 文字="Leader Michael always wished to release them from their loneliness, but the curse of Lucifer is too strong to break."/> <字串 編號="61406" 文字="The Angel Lyceum needs this couple now. I need the [Star Soul] and the [Dew Drop] to save them. Many couples have been tricked by the Evils and have disappeared. Some are lucky enough to be saved but are still in a waking daze. They are the victims of love."/> <字串 編號="61407" 文字="So I want you to find the [Dew Drop] that has dripped from the flower of the shape shifting girl in the Mysterious Garden. If you can bring it back to save the people. I will give you a special gem for your true love."/> <字串 編號="61408" 文字="So I want you to find the [Dew Drop] that has dripped from the flower of the shape shifting girl in the Mysterious Garden. If you can bring it back to save the people. I will give you a special gem for your true love."/> <字串 編號="61409" 文字="In a silent corner of the Mysterious Garden, there is a flower with shining bead on it's bud, like a drop of tear. "/> <字串 編號="61410" 文字="Touch the flower gently."/> <字串 編號="61411" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="61412" 文字="When you calm down, you seem to hear a girl's voice."/> <字串 編號="61413" 文字="[Ah, I really wish I had a pair of wings so I could fly to you and stay with you forever...]"/> <字串 編號="61414" 文字="[...I feel you are an Angel from heaven, too... What happened to you?]"/> <字串 編號="61415" 文字="[To my surprise, I can bring new vital force to Angels... I am willing to devote myself, but I hope you can help the flowers in the garden, as well.]"/> <字串 編號="61416" 文字="[The evil Flaming Roses are taking up all of the fertile soil, the other plants are in danger, including me.]"/> <字串 編號="61417" 文字="[Therefore, I want you to help us by defeating 50 Flaming Roses, then I, as this drop of dew can also attach myself to a petal and see my true love at sunrise as well...]"/> <字串 編號="61418" 文字="[Therefore, I want you to help us by defeating 50 Flaming Roses, then I, as this drop of dew can also attach myself to a petal and see my true love at sunrise as well...]"/> <字串 編號="61419" 文字="[Great!...You may also feel the happiness of flowers.]"/> <字串 編號="61420" 文字="[I will fall down onto the ground and await my resurrection tomorrow...Please wait here for the moment of the dew dripping and collect the fresh dew, that is what you want...]"/> <字串 編號="61421" 文字="Soon, the dew from the cursed maiden girl is dripping, you collect it carefully before it falls onto the ground. "/> <字串 編號="61422" 文字="Wow, it is really the [Dew Drop]! The dazed brothers and sisters can be saved!"/> <字串 編號="61423" 文字="Besides setting up the place for the resurrections, I also have to take care of patients full time. It's so unfair! On top of all that I am sure the Evil Lyceum is playing tricks with me as well."/> <字串 編號="61424" 文字="Oh, I forget one thing... Sister, please accept this [Dew Crystal]. I made it with the leftover dew. Give this gem to your beloved and help him to complete the test. Then you two can go back to the Church of the Angel Lyceum. Then the Abbot will hold a wedding for you!"/> <字串 編號="61425" 文字="I will also wish you happiness. Goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="61426" 文字="Give this gem to your beloved and help him to complete the test. Then you two can go back to the Church of the Angel Lyceum, the Abbot will hold a wedding for you!"/> <字串 編號="61427" 文字="Hum, I hate all of this amorous stuff! How can stand it? Doesn't it make you want to be sick? No! Well go away then. I don't want to talk with you!"/> <字串 編號="61428" 文字="Do you know of the legendary couple, who were cursed by Lucifer and became the Dew and the Starlight? Ever since that day they can only see each other as night turns into day. Ah, too, too sad!"/> <字串 編號="61429" 文字="Leader Michael always wished to release them from their loneliness, but the curse of Lucifer is too strong to break."/> <字串 編號="61430" 文字="The Angel Lyceum needs this couple now. I need the [Star Soul] and the [Dew Drop] to save them. Many couples have been tricked by the Evils and have disappeared. Some are lucky enough to be saved but are still in a waking daze. They are the victims of love."/> <字串 編號="61431" 文字="Only the [Star Soul] and the [Dew Crystal] can awaken them. Moreover, they must be used by a love struck couple so that they can perform perfectly."/> <字串 編號="61432" 文字="So I want you to find the [Dew Drop] that has dripped from the flower of the shape shifting girl in the Mysterious Garden. If you can bring it back to save the people. I will give you a special gem for your true love."/> <字串 編號="61433" 文字="So I want you to find the [Dew Drop] that has dripped from the flower of the shape shifting girl in the Mysterious Garden. If you can bring it back to save the people. I will give you a special gem for your true love."/> <字串 編號="61434" 文字="Great! The [Dew Drop] is the best healing medicine. I am sure it is can revive the dazed Angels!"/> <字串 編號="61435" 文字="Congratulations to you on passing the important test before marriage. Please accept this [Dew Crystal]. I made it with the leftover dew. Give this gem to your beloved and help him to complete the test. Then you two can go back to the Church of the Angel Lyceum. The Abbot will hold a wedding for you!"/> <字串 編號="61436" 文字="I will also wish you happiness. Goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="61437" 文字="Hurry to find the Abbot to hold a wedding ceremony! Remember to invite all of your relations!"/> <字串 編號="61438" 文字="As a man, devoting himself to one person is the most important. Don't let the other down. Cherish everything."/> <字串 編號="61439" 文字="Devoting yourself is the sincerest love virtue. Don't hesitate, even if you want to find another sensation, remember to divorce from your current partner first."/> <字串 編號="61440" 文字="You have just received a valuable [Dew Crystal], I cannot give you another one within such a short time. Please find me again after one day(24 hours)."/> <字串 編號="61501" 文字="Disgusting gross man... you want to mess with me? I will teach you a lesson some day!"/> <字串 編號="61502" 文字="Tell me the details."/> <字串 編號="61503" 文字="Quit quietly."/> <字串 編號="61504" 文字="Do you want to have a finger in the pie too? Ok, I need a hand now, are you interested in fighting the gross man Berssif for me?"/> <字串 編號="61505" 文字="Yes."/> <字串 編號="61506" 文字="No."/> <字串 編號="61507" 文字="Oh, he seems to be your target, too. I just wanted some more pudding at school. Because of this he laughed at me in front of my classmates. Such a bully!"/> <字串 編號="61508" 文字="Destroy five Evil Stoves on the [Magic Kitchen Path] for me! I will reward you!"/> <字串 編號="61509" 文字="Ha-ha, so pathetic. You can't even defeat the low-grade students, how can you defeat our Head Chef? practice more first then come back and find me after you have reached level 65."/> <字串 編號="61510" 文字="Do you want to go or not? You have just promised me to destroy five Evil Stoves on the [Magic Kitchen Path]."/> <字串 編號="61511" 文字="The stove gives off black and smelly smoke..."/> <字串 編號="61512" 文字="The stove gives off black and smelly smoke. It should be your target."/> <字串 編號="61513" 文字="Destroy it."/> <字串 編號="61514" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="61515" 文字="You hit the stove heavily and destroy it..."/> <字串 編號="61516" 文字="The ruined stove can no longer be used for cooking."/> <字串 編號="61517" 文字="Have you destroyed the stoves? Well done, are you interested in studying at our Evil Lyceum?"/> <字串 編號="61518" 文字="Anyway, even Devils must keep their promises...Here is your reward, take it!"/> <字串 編號="61519" 文字="Hah, would you consider coming to study at the Evil Lyceum? I am sure you will become popular soon."/> <字串 編號="61601" 文字="Thank you for your help, but I still have something to bother you with..."/> <字串 編號="61602" 文字="Listen to Athor."/> <字串 編號="61603" 文字="Pretend not to have heard."/> <字串 編號="61604" 文字="Just now I met the Sage Molin, but he was badly injured..."/> <字串 編號="61605" 文字="After he received first-aid, I know that he went to the Magic Kitchen Path to investigate the Devils. But unfortunately, he was discovered by the Rock God, Mendun and attacked by many Monsters. At last he managed to escape."/> <字串 編號="61606" 文字="I must take care of him, but I also wish to get revenge for him. So, I am pleading with you to defeat the Rock God, Mendun on the Magic Kitchen Path."/> <字串 編號="61607" 文字="Yes, I promise"/> <字串 編號="61608" 文字="No, sorry I don't feel like it."/> <字串 編號="61609" 文字="You are an upright Adventurer, just as I thought! Go to the Magic Kitchen Path to defeat the Rock God, Mendun. To prevent him harming more victims in the future."/> <字串 編號="61610" 文字="I just heard from Molin that you need a hand to help you to pass the Molten Lava at the mouth of the path. I will help you so that you can defeat Mendun. "/> <字串 編號="61611" 文字="I know you're sincere, but you are not strong enough... If you don't reach level 60, you are sure to fail."/> <字串 編號="61612" 文字="Ha-ha, pathetic weak man, I see you are eager to try the sensation of being engulfed by lava?"/> <字串 編號="61613" 文字="Wu! How can I ~"/> <字串 編號="61614" 文字="The Rock God, Mendun has sunk into the magma after giving off a blood curdling scream! You have succeeded in avenging Athor."/> <字串 編號="61615" 文字="Have you really defeated the Rock God, Mendun? I must heartily thank you. You not only have avenged Sage Molin, but have also protected many people."/> <字串 編號="61616" 文字="This is the best reward I can offer. We will appreciate you forever!"/> <字串 編號="61617" 文字="Your bravery and sincerity will live in our minds forever, Adventurer!"/> <字串 編號="61701" 文字="I am sure there are many Rats nearby judging by the smell."/> <字串 編號="61702" 文字="Tell me about hunting Rats."/> <字串 編號="61703" 文字="Hi, you must be an experienced Adventurer, judging from your appearance. I am the Rat Hunter. I chose this unusual career because, ever since I was a child I have hated those germ infested vermin. So I love my job and I get to meet many interesting people on my travels."/> <字串 編號="61704" 文字="Recently, many Adventurers have driven away the Rats of the Fungus Forest North and Dawn Harbor. Thus, I have shifted my goals to the Underground. There are countless Rats there, as I expected."/> <字串 編號="61705" 文字="According to my investigations, their leader, [Rat Mosi] is living on the [Magic Kitchen Path], would you please hunt it down for me?"/> <字串 編號="61706" 文字="No problem!"/> <字串 編號="61707" 文字="Nah! It seems very dangerous, I refuse."/> <字串 編號="61708" 文字="Please go to the [Magic Kitchen Path] and find the exact place of [Rat Mosi]. Don't let him harm others any more. Remember to find some friends to go with you."/> <字串 編號="61709" 文字="If you have reached lvl60 then I will be glad to share my troubles with you."/> <字串 編號="61710" 文字="Head for the [Magic Kitchen Path] and defeat [Rat Mosi]. I will be waiting for you here."/> <字串 編號="61711" 文字="You have defeated Rat Mosi? Great! Now, I am able to clear up the rest of the Rats."/> <字串 編號="61712" 文字="Please accept my reward, although it is not of great value. Thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="61713" 文字="Hunting Rats is my duty. Do you have any task that you wish to devote your whole life too? If the answer is YES, try your best to do it."/> <字串 編號="61801" 文字="Ouch! Nowadays, people are so cold, I even got a beating whilst begging for food. I, a poor vagrant, am destined to wait for death?"/> <字串 編號="61802" 文字="Care for him..."/> <字串 編號="61803" 文字="Kind man, you are the first passer-by to care for me. Actually, I am a common beggar, leading a miserable life."/> <字串 編號="61804" 文字="Because many Adventurers come here I follow them. The other day, I saw so much leftover food poured out from the Magic Kitchen Path I asked the workers for some food..."/> <字串 編號="61805" 文字="But they beat me heavily and threw me here, they want to see me starving to death."/> <字串 編號="61806" 文字=" If someone can teach rough-hearted people a lesson, the whole of society will become warmer."/> <字串 編號="61807" 文字="Help Harless!"/> <字串 編號="61808" 文字="It's not your business, leave him."/> <字串 編號="61809" 文字="Oh, kind man, you not only give me food, but also will teach them a lesson?"/> <字串 編號="61810" 文字="If you can defeat the [Hell Slave]*40 and the [Rotten Seeker]*30 on the Magic Kitchen Path, I will give the treasure I dug up last week. Come on!"/> <字串 編號="61811" 文字="Alas, you are not strong enough. You will end like me if you go to the Magic Kitchen Path now. Find me again when you have reached lvl55, but give me some food first."/> <字串 編號="61812" 文字="If you can defeat the [Hell Slave]*40 and the [Rotten Seeker]*30 on the Magic Kitchen Path, I will reward you! By the way, if you defeat the same Monsters outside Magic Kitchen Path, it is useless."/> <字串 編號="61813" 文字="Kind man, I didn't know you are so great! You have defeated so many Devils in such a short time! Wonderful! "/> <字串 編號="61814" 文字="This is the treasure I happened to dig up. Now it's yours. This is the only thing I can give you...Thank you, kind man."/> <字串 編號="61815" 文字="Kind man, we meet again. After rest, I don't feel pains any more. I have decided to stay in one place and find a job after my full recovery. I will never wander looking for charity again."/> <字串 編號="61816" 文字="Great, I am sure you can do it!"/> <字串 編號="61817" 文字="Leave with a smile."/> <字串 編號="61818" 文字="Thank you for your encouragement. Actually, it's your kind soul and strong will that enlighten me. So I must thank you!"/> <字串 編號="61901" 文字="I regret very much... I need help...to free me from curse..."/> <字串 編號="61902" 文字="Tell me about the help you need."/> <字串 編號="61903" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="61904" 文字="Adventurer, I was a great cook for many years. I was famous for a time, but lost my status gradually as I am out of date."/> <字串 編號="61905" 文字="In fact... I have a secret. I don't want others to know, but I cannot bear it. I hope you will listen to me and help me to complete my wish."/> <字串 編號="61906" 文字="Listen to Betty's secret."/> <字串 編號="61907" 文字="Quit, pretending not to have heard."/> <字串 編號="61908" 文字="25 years ago, I was eager to become a famous cook, but it did not go smoothly. One day, I made a contract with Devil in a dream..."/> <字串 編號="61909" 文字="I exchanged an ancestral recipe for a wish with Devil... Forgive me! I cannot tell you what the wish is. But my conscience has suffered a lot from then on!"/> <字串 編號="61910" 文字="Now, I decide to start from scratch, please get back the ancestral recipe for me, helping me free to be from the Devil."/> <字串 編號="61911" 文字="Try your best to help."/> <字串 編號="61912" 文字="It is doubtful, refuse."/> <字串 編號="61913" 文字="As I know, the ancestral recipe was broken into two parts and kept by the Strong Monsters' of [Magic Kitchen Path] and [Gulp Room] respectively. You must find the first half and then the second in that order."/> <字串 編號="61914" 文字="The first half is kept by the [Soul Slalin] of the [Magic Kitchen Path] and the second half is kept by the [Earl Makice] of the [Gulp Room]. Please go with your friends to get back my recipe."/> <字串 編號="61915" 文字="How can you help me with your current ability? You may help me after you have reached lvl65."/> <字串 編號="61916" 文字="This really is my ancestral recipe! I got it back at last! My life is looking a lot more hopeful now!"/> <字串 編號="61917" 文字="Betty is so glad to her recipe back! But suddenly, a tremendous roar can be heard [Human, do you want to break your promise? I favored you with twenty-year long good fortune. But now this period has passed, you want to change your mind? You know that wasn't the deal we made.]"/> <字串 編號="61918" 文字="Ah...ah... Master Devil, please listen to me..."/> <字串 編號="61919" 文字="[Hey, don't say any more, give your soul to me, letting my magic become more powerful!]"/> <字串 編號="61920" 文字="No, no! Please don't~"/> <字串 編號="61921" 文字="Once the shouting has disappeared, Betty has become numb. Although she still has breath in her body she appears no different from death. You warn yourself, don't make any deal with the Devil."/> <字串 編號="61922" 文字="I... eat...don't grasp...Xi-xi..."/> <字串 編號="61923" 文字="Betty has become a body without a soul."/> <字串 編號="62001" 文字="I didn't know the Underground of Eden would be so dirty, it makes me uncomfortable. I can't help wanting to clean it..."/> <字串 編號="62002" 文字="Tell me about your cleaning work."/> <字串 編號="62003" 文字="Quit"/> <字串 編號="62004" 文字="Little Angel, you come here for new tasks, right? I am pleading you to tidy up several extremely dirty places. Are you free to do it?"/> <字串 編號="62005" 文字="I promise I will try my best."/> <字串 編號="62006" 文字="Nah! Sorry I don't want to today."/> <字串 編號="62007" 文字="Good, you are model student and do the Lyceum credit. Recently the number of the Underground Flies has rapidly grown, even more than the ants. But soon I fear they will start to breed and the whole place will become infested with the filthy creatures. The result will be terrible."/> <字串 編號="62008" 文字="They mainly live in the smelliest places of the [Magic Kitchen Path]. I need you to decimate the [Hungry Fly]*30, the [Evil Fly]*20 and the [Flame Fly]*30. Try to reduce the quantity of flies. Report to me after finishing it..."/> <字串 編號="62009" 文字="Little Angel, you haven't reached lvl60, you are not strong enough to do this task. I dare not let you take the risk. These Flies are deadly!"/> <字串 編號="62010" 文字="Please can you go to the smelliest places of the [Magic Kitchen Path]. I need you to decimate the [Hungry Fly]*30, the [Evil Fly]*20 and the [Flame Fly]*30. Try to reduce the quantity of flies. Report to me after finishing it..."/> <字串 編號="62011" 文字="Well done, Little Angel. The number of flies has definitely been reduced. But judging by their breeding speed, defeating just the adults is not effective enough."/> <字串 編號="62012" 文字="After many long discussions, the Environmental Group decided to do research on their eggs to produce a pesticide that restrains their breeding."/> <字串 編號="62013" 文字="Now I need you go to the more dangerous [Gulp Room], do away with as many of the [Gold Fly] and the [Elite Gold Fly] as you can. Collect [Egg Samples]*10 from them and give them to me. Be careful!"/> <字串 編號="62014" 文字="Your task is to go to the [Gulp Room], do away with as many [Gold Fly] and [Elite Gold Fly] as you can. Collect [Egg Samples]*10 from them and give them to me. Generally speaking, the Elite Gold Fly is more likely to drop it's eggs."/> <字串 編號="62015" 文字="Yuk! These eggs are so disgusting...Little Angel, you are very efficient. I am very satisfied."/> <字串 編號="62016" 文字="This is your reward. I still have more work to give you later, if you are interested. But please come back to chat with me."/> <字串 編號="62101" 文字="Little Angel, although we have succeeded in restraining the breeding of the Flies, there are still so many environmental problems left to solve."/> <字串 編號="62102" 文字="Help the Heavenly Officer."/> <字串 編號="62103" 文字="Quit, pretending not to have heard."/> <字串 編號="62104" 文字="You love cleanliness too just like me. This time, our goal is the Underground Slarm. They can split infinitely, I'm leaving a trail of polluted grime and various peculiar bacteria in their wake."/> <字串 編號="62105" 文字="If we let these Slarms breed freely, the world will be soon be damaged by disgusting grime! I want you to go to the [Magic Kitchen Path] and clear out the [Soul-eating Worm]*60 derived from the [Soul Slalin]. Pay attention to the Soul Slalin, it is the leader of the Slarms and very strong. So it is too dangerous to go by yourself."/> <字串 編號="62106" 文字="Please go to the [Magic Kitchen Path] and clear out the [Soul-eating Worm]*60 derived from the [Soul Slalin]. The Soul Slalin is the leader of the Slarms. It is so strong that you 'd better team up."/> <字串 編號="62107" 文字="Little Angel, you haven't reached lvl65, it's early for you to accept this task... Continuing to practice is your current task."/> <字串 編號="62108" 文字="Everything goes well with your help! The number of the Soul-eating Worms has decreased greatly. Now, we should turn to the next target. That is the [Soul-eating Worm] in the [Gulp Room]. This one is much stronger."/> <字串 編號="62109" 文字="I need you to head for the [Gulp Room] and destroy the [Soul-eating Worm]*5, keep the Underground clean. Be careful whilst doing this task!"/> <字串 編號="62110" 文字="Your task is to head for the [Gulp Room] and destroy the [Soul-eating Worm]*5, the Gulp Room is one of the most dangerous Underground places. Don't go there without your friends and make sure you are fully prepared!"/> <字串 編號="62111" 文字="You have completed my task again. The whole Underground Environment has become much cleaner with all your efforts. The people who come to visit here will no longer fear getting sick."/> <字串 編號="62112" 文字="Please accept this reward! Without your help, our best work would not have gone so smoothly...Thank you very much!"/> <字串 編號="62113" 文字="Little Angel, thank you for your help! I hope you have an excellent performance later."/> <字串 編號="62201" 文字="Young traveler am the third generation of Vilo Family, who are famous for making Samples. I am going to the Underground to finding rare creatures."/> <字串 編號="62202" 文字="Tell me about making Samples."/> <字串 編號="62203" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="62204" 文字="Although there are many strange creatures there, I find the most attractive one to be the [Evil Beetle] in the [Gulp Room]. Their shining Shells are suitable for collecting and exhibiting."/> <字串 編號="62205" 文字="It is difficult to make a Sample. You should master the time, processing the insect quickly. The Monsters in Gulp Room are far too ferocious for me to deal with..."/> <字串 編號="62206" 文字="Help him."/> <字串 編號="62207" 文字="Quit quietly."/> <字串 編號="62208" 文字="I hope someone can help me to collect the Beetle Bone. I want you to defeat the [Evil Beetle] in the [Gulp Room], come back to me after you obtain the [Beetle Bone], within 20 minutes of getting it. I will then process it."/> <字串 編號="62209" 文字="I am sorry, if you want to defeat the Evil Beetle successfully, you must have reached lvl70. Find me again after you have practiced more."/> <字串 編號="62210" 文字="I need Sample*20, which depends on you, traveler!"/> <字串 編號="62211" 文字="Please defeat the [Evil Beetle] in the [Gulp Room], come back to me after you obtain the [Beetle Bone]*20, within 20 minutes of getting it. I will reward you."/> <字串 編號="62212" 文字="Give the [Beetle Bone] to Vilo 3."/> <字串 編號="62213" 文字="No problem, I will make it into a Sample immediately...Oh, finished! Take along the Sample, after you have collected 20, your task will be complete."/> <字串 編號="62214" 文字="You have collected 20 Evil Beetle Samples! My clan will be happy to see these precious Samples."/> <字串 編號="62215" 文字="This is your reward. Thank you very much, see you later!"/> <字串 編號="62216" 文字="Traveler, I haven't forgotten that you have collected [Evil Beetle] Bone for me. If I see any more of those ghastly beetles, I will ask you for help again."/> <字串 編號="62301" 文字="Nothing has any meaning for me now. Revenge is my only goal..."/> <字串 編號="62302" 文字="Tell me about your revenge."/> <字串 編號="62303" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="62304" 文字="My comrades lost their lives in the action, at the siege of the [Gulp Room]. Although I am alive, my body suffers from terrible injuries. I am unable to carry on with my mission now."/> <字串 編號="62305" 文字="The [Lion Dragon] and the [Evil Eye] are my enemies. Adventurer, would you do me the favor? I will reward you."/> <字串 編號="62306" 文字="I accept the task."/> <字串 編號="62307" 文字="Good. Go to the [Gulp Room] to eliminate the [Lion Dragon] and the [Evil Eye], revenge for my comrades. You'd better team up to defeat these strong opponents. Inform me as soon as you have finished."/> <字串 編號="62308" 文字="I admire your sincerity, but you have to reach lvl75 before you are able to defeat the two Devils."/> <字串 編號="62309" 文字="You forgot my request already? Go to the [Gulp Room] to eliminate the [Lion Dragon] and the [Evil Eye], revenge for my comrades. You'd better team up to defeat the strong opponents. Inform me as soon as you have finished."/> <字串 編號="62310" 文字="Ha-ha... ! My dream of revenge has been realized! Thanks a lot!"/> <字串 編號="62311" 文字="Please take the reward. I will never forget you, fighter!"/> <字串 編號="62312" 文字="I will never forget you, fighter!"/> <字串 編號="62401" 文字="He he...Bomb! Bomb! Let the magma blast! Ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="62402" 文字="Try to communicate with him."/> <字串 編號="62403" 文字="He's too deviant, leave quickly."/> <字串 編號="62404" 文字="Oh, do you want to carry out this great plan with me? Have you seen the old Castle Ruin? I want to bomb it!"/> <字串 編號="62405" 文字="Join his plan."/> <字串 編號="62406" 文字="Oh, I have found a friend now! Come on, take these four dynamite sticks and bury them in four corners of the [Gulp Room], then report to me. I will ignite them and bomb it, ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="62407" 文字="However, this dynamite will explode if it is exposed to air for more than 60 minutes... You will be bombed to pieces if you don't throw it. Buy more dynamite from me! Don't come back to me if you give up the task."/> <字串 編號="62408" 文字="Why are you in such a hurry! Come back to me after you have reached lvl75."/> <字串 編號="62409" 文字="Have you installed the dynamite? Hurry up! I can't wait any more! Bury the dynamite in the four corners of the [Gulp Room]."/> <字串 編號="62410" 文字="Purchase dynamite."/> <字串 編號="62411" 文字="Rubbish! How can you give up after accepting it? I will not give another chance today! Find me again after several days have passed. Maybe then I will be in a better mood so that I will let you try again."/> <字串 編號="62412" 文字="It seems that there is something buried in the strange corner."/> <字串 編號="62413" 文字="Maybe this is the corner where Luch asked you to bury the dynamite."/> <字串 編號="62414" 文字="Install dynamite."/> <字串 編號="62415" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="62416" 文字="You have buried the dynamite..."/> <字串 編號="62417" 文字="Have you installed the dynamite? I have waited a long time!"/> <字串 編號="62418" 文字="Bomb! Bomb! Bomb! Hahaha~"/> <字串 編號="62419" 文字="A period of low sound comes from the distance, the earth is shaking, but the city of Lucifer's former residence isn't heavily damaged..."/> <字串 編號="62420" 文字="No! It's impossible! Ah!"/> <字串 編號="62421" 文字="I failed! I failed! How can this be? I blame you!"/> <字串 編號="62422" 文字="These are for you! I will go to make much more powerful dynamite to bomb this city one day!"/> <字串 編號="62423" 文字=" I will go to make much more powerful dynamite to bomb this city one day!"/> <字串 編號="62501" 文字="I didn't think I would ever see another live person... Brave Adventurer, are you willing to complete my work?"/> <字串 編號="62502" 文字="Who are you?"/> <字串 編號="62503" 文字="I promise you!"/> <字串 編號="62504" 文字="Ignore him."/> <字串 編號="62505" 文字="My name is Hank, I am carrying out a secret task in the [Gulp Room] with my friends..."/> <字串 編號="62506" 文字="But we didn't predict the ferocity of those Devils and now all my friends are dead! I was knocked out and when I woke up, I was here! "/> <字串 編號="62507" 文字="I am unable to move because of my heavy injuries. If the Devils discover me, what is my fate? Lucky for me, I met you. Ha-ha."/> <字串 編號="62508" 文字="The thing is that, I was ordered here to get the Demon Sap Sample for research. But when we reached half way, we were surrounded by a large number of Devils, the team almost failed."/> <字串 編號="62509" 文字="The three Sap Samples that we managed to collect were taken by the Monsters. I implore you to recapture the samples."/> <字串 編號="62510" 文字="I promise that I will try my best."/> <字串 編號="62511" 文字="Refuse."/> <字串 編號="62512" 文字="Thank you! The Monsters are the [Dark Protector], the [Elite Fire Mummy] and the [Bloody Demon]. You can recapture the three Sample test tubes by defeating them. They are so strong that you'd better team up."/> <字串 編號="62513" 文字="You are too weak to do this task! Find me again after you have reached lvl75... "/> <字串 編號="62514" 文字="Have found all of the Sample test tubes? You can recapture all of the three Sample test tubes by defeating the [Dark Protector], the [Elite Fire Mummy] and the [Bloody Demon]."/> <字串 編號="62515" 文字="Adventurer, you have finished the hard task, I admire you! If I was strong like you, maybe the tragedy would not have happened."/> <字串 編號="62516" 文字="Three Sample test tubes have been recaptured. But I still have another important thing that I must do. Would you do me a favor again?"/> <字串 編號="62517" 文字="Ok, go ahead."/> <字串 編號="62518" 文字="Are you joking? Goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="62519" 文字="Ha, if you are really willing to help me, I don't know how to praise your enthusiasm. So please listen to me carefully..."/> <字串 編號="62520" 文字="According to reliable sources, there is a abhorrent Monster called the [Demon Kidace] in the [Gulp Room].
