He is the most dangerous Monster there. In order to research the reason behind his abhorrence, I need a slice of his skin."/> <字串 編號="62521" 文字="Please take along this Culture Vessel, cut off a slice of his skin after you defeat [Demon Kidace] and bring it to me."/> <字串 編號="62522" 文字="Is this the skin of [Demon Kidace]? Actually, your fighting ability is way beyond normal. If I knew there was a strong man like you, I would not have joined the special army."/> <字串 編號="62523" 文字="Now you have finished all tasks...but I am still unable to walk, would you help me for a last time...?"/> <字串 編號="62524" 文字="I will help you to the end."/> <字串 編號="62525" 文字="I can't bear it, goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="62526" 文字="This request is not too difficult. I only want the [Ring of Angel Wings] so I can return to my Organization. If you have any, please lend them to me."/> <字串 編號="62527" 文字="Give him the Ring of Angel Wings"/> <字串 編號="62528" 文字="You are unable to help him..."/> <字串 編號="62529" 文字="You are really the great benefactor of my life... These tasks are all completed by you, I just stayed here and rested. Oh, I feel so ashamed!"/> <字串 編號="62530" 文字="Before I return to the Organization, please take this money and my supplies. They are all I can offer."/> <字串 編號="62531" 文字="Thank you for helping me. I will help you in the future if you have troubles. Farewell!"/> <字串 編號="62532" 文字="Adventurer, you haven't planned to leave here yet? But I must go now. Take care!"/> <字串 編號="62533" 文字="Tell me about the "Organization"."/> <字串 編號="62534" 文字="I am sorry, I can't tell you more about my Organization. I hope you will never be in contact with them because not everything they do is strictly legit.... That's all I can tell you."/> <字串 編號="62601" 文字="Wah! It is rare to meet an Adventurer from around here. I am an Exploring Member. You can call me Jaloyd. Recently, the Exploration Assoc has sent some members here to seek the legendary former residence of Lucifer. However, it also tends to attract some rather strange sorts."/> <字串 編號="62602" 文字="Chat with him about the recent situation."/> <字串 編號="62603" 文字="See what you can do for him."/> <字串 編號="62604" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="62605" 文字="The rumor of Lucifer's former residence was spread quite recently. About the same time that the path to the Underground Lava Cave was discovered. What a coincidence!"/> <字串 編號="62606" 文字="It is said many couples rushed into the dark place without thinking. Their bodies were brought out, still alive, but their minds are elsewhere."/> <字串 編號="62607" 文字="I feel that this is all to suspicious to just be coincidence. What do you think?"/> <字串 編號="62608" 文字="Oh, you want to help me? All right, I need a hand now. The Exploration Assoc. has ordered me to insure a smooth supply path. But the nearby Monsters often attack our transport staff."/> <字串 編號="62609" 文字="If you are so confident, why don't you eliminate the Monsters that attack the passers-by? I will reward you."/> <字串 編號="62610" 文字="I will accept the work."/> <字串 編號="62611" 文字="Busy, goodbye."/> <字串 編號="62612" 文字="It seems that you are too weak to deal with Monsters. I suggest you upgrade to lvl50 before you come back to have a try."/> <字串 編號="62613" 文字="Ok, please help me eliminate the Fly*40, and report to me. I will then tell you the next target. Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="62614" 文字="Please help me the eliminate [Fly]*40 in the Sad Abyss and the Fiery Path and report back to me. I will then tell you the next target."/> <字串 編號="62615" 文字="Well done, next go to eliminate the [Evil Grass]*40, they have also harmed our Assoc. Members... You will get a reward after you finish it."/> <字串 編號="62616" 文字="Please eliminate the [Evil Grass]*40 in the Sad Abyss and the Fiery Path. Come back as soon as you have completed the work. I will give you a reward."/> <字串 編號="62617" 文字="You are so excellent. The Flies and the Grass don't dare to make trouble now."/> <字串 編號="62618" 文字="Please accept this reward from the Exploration Assoc."/> <字串 編號="62619" 文字="Msg new sentence for two days"/> <字串 編號="62701" 文字="By the way, I would like to entrust you one more thing to you. Are you willing?"/> <字串 編號="62702" 文字="Not a problem!"/> <字串 編號="62703" 文字="Sorry I'm too busy..."/> <字串 編號="62704" 文字="I have some supply materials at hand. But because of the Monsters, the transport troops are unable to reach the deeper camp, my teammate [Jamier] needs them urgently..."/> <字串 編號="62705" 文字="Although the Monster are fewer now, I still cannot leave my post, so I want you to give the materials to [Jamier] in the [Lava Cave] instead of me."/> <字串 編號="62706" 文字="Promise him."/> <字串 編號="62707" 文字="Refuse him."/> <字串 編號="62708" 文字="Thank you! Please send the materials to [Jamier] in the [Lava Cave] ASAP."/> <字串 編號="62709" 文字="I am an Exploring Member. You can call me Jaloyd. Recently, the Exploration Assoc has sent some members here to seek the legendary Lucifer's former residence. However, it also tends to attract some rather strange sorts."/> <字串 編號="62710" 文字="Alas, what has happened in the Sad Abyss, why didn't the transport troop come? Our essential materials are almost all used up. Terrible!"/> <字串 編號="62711" 文字="What can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="62712" 文字="Are you Jamier?"/> <字串 編號="62713" 文字="Nothing, just pass by."/> <字串 編號="62714" 文字="Yes, I am an Exploring Member, Jamier. I am engaging in Underground exploration work with a group of volunteers."/> <字串 編號="62715" 文字="Are these the supply materials from Jaloyd? I can free my group from the brink of starvation at last. Here are some funds offered by Assoc. as a reward, please accept them."/> <字串 編號="62801" 文字="After accepting these materials, I must go on with my work. Adventurer, are you interested in helping me?"/> <字串 編號="62802" 文字="All right."/> <字串 編號="62803" 文字="I am busy."/> <字串 編號="62804" 文字="My job is to spy and support Assoc. Members in the fight with the Monsters. As the Monsters are so fierce, our work is greatly dangerous."/> <字串 編號="62805" 文字="That is to say, I need a strong assistant to remove the barriers."/> <字串 編號="62806" 文字="Accept the work."/> <字串 編號="62807" 文字="Busy, goodbye."/> <字串 編號="62808" 文字="After a careful observation, I find that you are brave enough, but your level is a little low... I am afraid you should be lvl60 at least before I can give you the task."/> <字串 編號="62809" 文字="The Theurgy Masters who come from the Shadow, and believe in Wizards, have become very annoyed recently. They often attack us, for no reason. I want you to defeat the Theurgy Master*40, thus lightening the burden of the Assoc. Be careful!"/> <字串 編號="62810" 文字="You job is to defeat 40 Theurgy Masters who come from the Shadow and believe in Wizards. After that, I will tell you the next action..."/> <字串 編號="62811" 文字="Thanks to you, the Theurgy Masters are not as aggressive as before."/> <字串 編號="62812" 文字="Next, please defeat 40 Evil Knights. They don't feel pain, only fight till the end. They have wrought great harm on our people. I am sure you can finish this job!"/> <字串 編號="62813" 文字="Please defeat 40 Evil Knights and then you can get your reward."/> <字串 編號="62814" 文字="After your fast attack, the Monsters of Lava Cave are much fewer. I admire you very much! "/> <字串 編號="62815" 文字="Please accept this reward from Exploration Assoc, brave Adventurer!"/> <字串 編號="62901" 文字="If you are free, could you help me send a letter to the Exploring Member in the [Underground Square]?"/> <字串 編號="62902" 文字="No problem!"/> <字串 編號="62903" 文字="I am busy..."/> <字串 編號="62904" 文字="Good! So please send this letter to Captain [Shajier] in the [Underground Square]. He is leading the members in the fight."/> <字串 編號="62905" 文字="Please send this letter to Captain [Shajier] in the [Underground Square]. He is leading the members in the fight."/> <字串 編號="62906" 文字="We meet again, brave Adventurer. I really want to introduce you to the Exploration Assoc. If you wish to meet them, don't forget to tell me!"/> <字串 編號="62907" 文字="We didn't expect the Monsters down here to be so strong, much stronger than the ones above ground. You look so weak but from the stories about you I know differently. But still be careful and don't take on more than you can handle!"/> <字串 編號="62908" 文字="Adventurer, it is extremely dangerous in the Castle Ruin. You'd better go back."/> <字串 編號="62909" 文字="Are you Captain Shajier?"/> <字串 編號="62910" 文字="Ok, I will go back now, goodbye."/> <字串 編號="62911" 文字="Oh, you helped Jamier to send the letter! Let me have a look... It seems that both Jaloyd and Jamier have benefited a lot from your aid. I didn't know you were so brave and strong."/> <字串 編號="62912" 文字="This is the treasure from the Monsters. I will give some to you for your help!"/> <字串 編號="63001" 文字="Look at the wide Underground Castle Ruin, it's so strange! If there were not so many powerful Monsters, my teammates and I would explore further."/> <字串 編號="63002" 文字="Maybe I can help you."/> <字串 編號="63003" 文字="What a pity!"/> <字串 編號="63004" 文字="Adventurer, Did you say that you want to eliminate the patrolling Monsters for us? What good news! Let me tell you about some of the main Monsters..."/> <字串 編號="63005" 文字="The [Poison Flower],the [Fire Ghost Kid] and the [Fire Fly] are our biggest headache. I have written their features down in your Quest Log, so that you can dispose of them according to the instructions. After that, I will reward you."/> <字串 編號="63006" 文字="Do you remember the promise between us? After you defeat the [Poison Flower]*50,the [Fire Ghost Kid]*30 and the [Fire Fly]*50 in the Underground Square. I will reward you."/> <字串 編號="63007" 文字="It is miraculous for you have made it this far, you haven't even reached lvl65 yet. You'd better practice more before you proceed."/> <字串 編號="63008" 文字="Because the sounds of fighting are at an end, I know that you have finished the task!"/> <字串 編號="63009" 文字="Please accept your reward! Adventurer, you have helped the Exploration Assoc a lot. "/> <字串 編號="63010" 文字="Ah, Adventurer, I hear that you have made quite an impact on the Monster races. I suggest you head for the [Magic Kitchen Path] or the [Gulp Room] with some friends. The Monsters there are more powerful, but the rewards are also greater."/> <字串 編號="63011" 文字="You are always running all around, do you have something important to do? If you are unable to deal with it all, why not join the Exploration Assoc? More people make things easier! Ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="63101" 文字="Nice to meet you! I am Scholar Hopkins from Aurora City. This lava space is a good place for studying the strange arrangements and volcanic activity."/> <字串 編號="63102" 文字="Do you have any friends in Cherry Village?"/> <字串 編號="63103" 文字="Chat with Hopkins."/> <字串 編號="63104" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="63105" 文字="You also know Nilsson!He is my old schoolmate, but our research fields are different. I think he must stay on the beach of Cherry Village to observe the environment there every day."/> <字串 編號="63106" 文字="Recently, I am doing research on the soil composition of the stratum. I have almost finished, but I lack of some necessary matter for analysis...that is the slag created from the magma."/> <字串 編號="63107" 文字="But the Monsters here are too fierce to defeat. It's impossible for me, a scholar to pass by them."/> <字串 編號="63108" 文字="Help him willingly."/> <字串 編號="63109" 文字="Quit."/> <字串 編號="63110" 文字="I am happy that an experienced Adventurer like you can help me. So please listen to me carefully."/> <字串 編號="63111" 文字="There are four places that the magma flows slowly on Fiery Path and Lava Cave. I will mark them on your map, you can see it by pressing Alt+M. Please go to the four places to collect the caky magma slag for me."/> <字串 編號="63112" 文字="There are four places that the magma flows slowly on Fiery Path and Lava Cave. I will mark them on your map, you can see it by pressing Alt+M. Please go to the four places to collect the cakey magma slag for me."/> <字串 編號="63113" 文字="Hot magma flows in front of you..."/> <字串 編號="63114" 文字="Hot magma flows in front of you but the soil here is too soft..."/> <字串 編號="63115" 文字="Dig [magma slag]."/> <字串 編號="63116" 文字="Better leave."/> <字串 編號="63117" 文字="Even though it is cooling the slag is still very hot, you'd better wrap it up."/> <字串 編號="63118" 文字="You have finished the digging work."/> <字串 編號="63119" 文字="How is everything going? Do you bring the slag from the four places?"/> <字串 編號="63120" 文字="Give all of the magma slag to Hopkins."/> <字串 編號="63121" 文字="Not finished yet."/> <字串 編號="63122" 文字="Thank you for your help! I must analyze it carefully. If everything is here then the report will come out quickly."/> <字串 編號="63123" 文字="Please accept this reward! I wish you a safe journey."/> <字串 編號="63124" 文字="I am Scholar Hopkins from Aurora City. Last time you brought back magma slag for me, so that I could write my research report more quickly. Thanks a lot!"/> <字串 編號="63125" 文字="Though I am only a scholar I do know of strong men! You are too weak to deal with the Monsters. Please help me after you have reached level/c$2 55 /c*."/> <字串 編號="63201" 文字="On, my! I have been attacked at a inopportune time... Why I can't see the sunshine anymore?"/> <字串 編號="63202" 文字="Cheer up, I can help you."/> <字串 編號="63203" 文字="Ignore him."/> <字串 編號="63204" 文字="You are willing to help me? Thank goodness, I don't how long I can last for I am badly injured...If you can talk to Cliss in Breeze Jungle, maybe I can be saved..."/> <字串 編號="63205" 文字="Thank goodness, I don't how long I can last for I am badly injured...If you can talk to Cliss in Breeze Jungle, maybe I can be saved..."/> <字串 編號="63206" 文字="I know you're kind, but you are not lvl60... I don't want you to suffer the same disaster as me."/> <字串 編號="63207" 文字="I have heard it, I have heard it! The great God of the Forest has ordered that all people of Breeze Jungle must obey him, so that disasters will not strike our homes... "/> <字串 編號="63208" 文字="Ask whether he is Cliss or not."/> <字串 編號="63209" 文字="Nonsense!"/> <字串 編號="63210" 文字="Did a love of nature lead you here?...No? A soldier asked you to find medicine for him?"/> <字串 編號="63211" 文字="Ok, let me see how to cure him."/> <字串 編號="63212" 文字="Hum...Ah!"/> <字串 編號="63213" 文字="Wait! I can hear the God's voice...He asks you to bring three offerings: [Fire Core]*4 of the Naughty Fire Elf, [Anti-inflammatory Gel]*6 of the Rock Slarm, [Cooling Oil]*1 of the Terra Lampman. If you can bring these things here, the soldier will be saved! Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="63214" 文字="The God asks you to bring him three offerings: [Fire Core]*4 of the Naughty Fire Elf, [Anti-inflammatory Gel]*6 of the Rock Slarm, [Cooling Oil]*1 of the Terra Lampman. If you can bring these things here, the soldier will be saved! Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="63215" 文字="It is really the God's blessing! You have found all of the offerings. The God will never give up any dying person... I have made the medicine. You only need to hand over 5000 gold to show your belief in the God, then the medicine is yours."/> <字串 編號="63216" 文字="...Give 5000 gold to Cliss."/> <字串 編號="63217" 文字="You can not scare me!"/> <字串 編號="63218" 文字="Hum! The Great God do not bring you any luck. I guess that he doesn't care about you!"/> <字串 編號="63219" 文字="Good, good...Both the sky and the earth have witnessed your firm conviction. "/> <字串 編號="63220" 文字="Take this herbal medicine to save dying people!"/> <字串 編號="63221" 文字="... Hi, traveler, do you come to me under the guidance of the Natural Group's consciousness? ...Money? I don't know what you are saying. I'm am a poor blind man. Since I've devoted myself to God, why should I care about such earthly trappings?..."/> <字串 編號="63222" 文字="You finally...come, come back...I'm glad you rushed about...for me...but...before my death, I hope you...you..."/> <字串 編號="63223" 文字="Don't say any more! Drink the potion quickly!"/> <字串 編號="63224" 文字="（It's hopeless, give up...）"/> <字串 編號="63225" 文字="You pour potion into mouth of Gustav. But he is still growing weaker and weaker..."/> <字串 編號="63226" 文字="Woo! .................."/> <字串 編號="63227" 文字="Gustav stops breathing...but he still has an unfinished wish. If you hurry back to the Angel Lyceum at once, you may be approved by the Angel Pickets to meet his spirit and listen to his wish..."/> <字串 編號="63228" 文字="Little Angel, I'm on duty now. Wait a moment if you have something to say...this new spirit is too stubborn to go with me..."/> <字串 編號="63229" 文字="Ah! I actually see you here! Am I dreaming?!"/> <字串 編號="63230" 文字="What's your last wish?"/> <字串 編號="63231" 文字="You've got the wrong person."/> <字串 編號="63232" 文字="If I am really dead, anyway I hope I can be with my [Huge Adventure Bag] because it accompanied me on countless adventures...If you are really an Angel, please help me to finish my wish! I beg you!"/> <字串 編號="63233" 文字="I will make your wish true."/> <字串 編號="63234" 文字="You've really got the wrong person."/> <字串 編號="63235" 文字="Thank you! My [Huge Adventure Bag] was stolen by the [Flame Mummy] who caused my serious injuries. If you can defeat them, you will have chance to find my bag! Then take it to my body and bury me with it..."/> <字串 編號="63236" 文字="Little Angel, what else do you want to ask him? Please make a long story as short as possible!"/> <字串 編號="63237" 文字="My [Huge Adventure Bag] was stolen by [Flame Mummy] who caused my serious injuries. If you can defeat them, you will have chance to find my bag! Then take it to my body and bury me with it..."/> <字串 編號="63238" 文字="You find an old big bag from the tight bandages of the Mummy. It must surely be Gustav's bag! Take it to his body as he requested."/> <字串 編號="63239" 文字="Gustav's body is still warm. You place his bag beside him and dig a grave to bury them."/> <字串 編號="63240" 文字="Woo...Woo..."/> <字串 編號="63241" 文字="Suddenly, you hear Gustav's moan and see that his body is trembling slightly!"/> <字串 編號="63242" 文字="Am I dreaming?...My bag has come back? It really has come back!"/> <字串 編號="63243" 文字="Do you know? I had a strange dream. I dreamt that I went to a shining school. There I met a person who looks like you...Although I'd like to have stayed there, I always kept my beloved bag in my mind..."/> <字串 編號="63244" 文字="While I was thinking of it, I woke up...I think it must you who found my bag for me! I don't know how to express my gratitude."/> <字串 編號="63245" 文字="I'm still short of strength to sustain myself. Please take the treasure from my bag for yourself. Look at them as a little gift to extend my thanks."/> <字串 編號="63246" 文字="We finally meet each other...Young Risk Taker, it is all thanks to you. Now that I have it back I will cherish it more than ever..."/> <字串 編號="63301" 文字="Too bad...Mr. Moline is in urgent need of aid. But I'm besieged and it's too difficult to get away. So upsetting..."/> <字串 編號="63302" 文字="What's wrong with you?"/> <字串 編號="63303" 文字="Leave!"/> <字串 編號="63304" 文字="Young Risk Taker, it's a long story. I'm a Warrior, who believes serving people. To destroy the potential evil force of the Underground, I came to the Underground Abyss with the most famous Sage Mr. Moline."/> <字串 編號="63305" 文字="Several days ago, we left Sad Abyss. Because of an attack from the Devil, we had to part. But we promised to meet each other here and then advance toward Lucifer's former residence."/> <字串 編號="63306" 文字="However, as you see, there are so many of the Devil's pawns around us. They are watching us continuously. But, if we do not try to break through, I'm afraid that Mr. Moline can not withstand the Devil corps!"/> <字串 編號="63307" 文字="Let me help you!"/> <字串 編號="63308" 文字="Take care. I will go first."/> <字串 編號="63309" 文字="Thanks be to the gods for letting me meet a righteous traveler like you! I need to fight with you!"/> <字串 編號="63310" 文字="Find [Heat Elf], [Evil Grass] and [Hell Slave] nearby and defeat them. If you can, I will have chance to break through unnoticed and go to assist Mr. Moline! Everything depends you!"/> <字串 編號="63311" 文字="No! Although I'm besieged, I can not let you sacrifice your life in vain. After all, your level is not higher than 50 yet. Let me deal with my own business by myself!"/> <字串 編號="63312" 文字="Find [Heat Elf], [Evil Grass] and [Hell Slave] nearby and defeat them. If you do I can go to assist Mr. Moline earlier!"/> <字串 編號="63313" 文字="Your assistance helped me to break through and defeat those Devils!"/> <字串 編號="63314" 文字="I will give you a present to express my thanks. I hope it will offer you more energy for tomorrow's fight. Thank you for your assistance, traveler! "/> <字串 編號="63401" 文字="Too terrible! Stop lamenting! Be quiet!"/> <字串 編號="63402" 文字="What's wrong with you?"/> <字串 編號="63403" 文字="Pretend to see nothing. Go away!"/> <字串 編號="63404" 文字="Do you believe? I have too often heard a terrifying Ghost's howl ever since I came down to this extremely hot Underground space!"/> <字串 編號="63405" 文字="These sounds constantly disturb me so much that I can not stop worrying. I'm on the edge of collapse! I almost want to quit my work!"/> <字串 編號="63406" 文字="Don't give up! I will help you!"/> <字串 編號="63407" 文字="You'd better come back. Good-bye."/> <字串 編號="63408" 文字="It's impossible...you can not defeat those Devils...if your level is more than 70...maybe can...Alas...Shut up! Be silent! Be silent!!"/> <字串 編號="63409" 文字="You, you are not teasing me? Then I request you to destroy 40 [Ghost Kid Cards]!! They keep muttering beside me so much so that I almost break down!! I beg you, do it quickly!"/> <字串 編號="63410" 文字="I request you to destroy 40 [Ghost Kid Cards] quickly!! They keep muttering beside me so much so that I almost break down!! Oh... "/> <字串 編號="63411" 文字="Hu hu...Finally, a bit quieter than before..."/> <字串 編號="63412" 文字="...Woo?! No, no! Another sad roar comes!! Woo..."/> <字串 編號="63413" 文字="[Poison Flower]... [Poison Flower]! They say that they need my blood to nourish them! I request you to remove them. The more, the better. Don't let them mutter to me!! I beg you! Quickly!!"/> <字串 編號="63414" 文字="[Poison Flower]... [Poison Flower]! They said they would nourish themselves with my blood!I request you to defeat them at once!! Woo..."/> <字串 編號="63415" 文字="........."/> <字串 編號="63416" 文字="When I approached, I found that Zapo had fallen pale all over and had seemed to die from exhaustion."/> <字串 編號="63417" 文字="I...I...I'm dying... [Soul Guide] said coldly that he would lead me to Hell and take my energy and consciousness..."/> <字串 編號="63418" 文字="You are my last hope...Find [Soul Guide] and defeat him, it's the only way to let me survive..."/> <字串 編號="63419" 文字="[Soul Guide] turns into a thick black fog and dissipates. [Devil Mark] with an intense evil air drops from him."/> <字串 編號="63420" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="63421" 文字="The noise that has disturbed me for such a long time has finally disappeared. I would have become a member of their evil nation but for your constant effort in destroying them."/> <字串 編號="63422" 文字="This is my only possession. Please accept it for your saving my life! Life is far more precious than money!"/> <字串 編號="63423" 文字="I realize now that I'm not suited to venture here and there like others. I'd better go back to Dark City and study magic. So I can lead a safer life."/> <字串 編號="63424" 文字="By the way, did you pick up a [Devil Mark]? There is a learned elder named Fouger in Dark City. He used to warn me not to go deep into this place willingly. Then, I did not take his words seriously. And as he predicted, I really suffered trouble. You can visit him if you have a chance and ask him what this mark is."/> <字串 編號="63501" 文字="Traveler, this world is very broad. When you come across anything beyond your comprehension, please keep calm and examine it carefully for it's truth."/> <字串 編號="63502" 文字="Tell him about Zapo and [Devil Mark]."/> <字串 編號="63503" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="63504" 文字="Oh! The dreadful Devil Mark! It is a powerful source of a curse because it has gathered the infinite resentment of the Spirits from Hell! If the mark is not destroyed, it will look for any creature in a bad way and torture them spiritually and ceaselessly. "/> <字串 編號="63505" 文字="We must ask someone to destroy it, otherwise, it will bring infinite calamity."/> <字串 編號="63506" 文字="Let me do it!"/> <字串 編號="63507" 文字="I will leave!"/> <字串 編號="63508" 文字="The first step to destroy this inauspicious mark is to hold a powerful [Holy Hammer] which is mighty enough to destroy it's strong structure."/> <字串 編號="63509" 文字="To make a Holy Hammer requires the following materials: 50 [Black Sycee], 30 [Shy Batten] and 30 [Cherry Thread], produced by Skilled workers of the Production Class. Please bring me these materials and I will make a Holy Hammer for you."/> <字串 編號="63510" 文字="If you can bring me 50 [Black Sycee], 30 [Shy Batten] and 30 [Cherry Thread], produced specially by the Production Class, I will make a [Holy Hammer] for you..."/> <字串 編號="63511" 文字="Did you bring the materials as I told you. You are so quick...wait a minute, let me smelt a Holy Hammer with Alchemy."/> <字串 編號="63512" 文字="After some time..."/> <字串 編號="63513" 文字="Traveler, I hand this [Holy Hammer] to you. Then take [Holy Hammer] and [Devil Mark] to the Square of city where Lucifer lived. You must throw broken pieces of the mark into the Underground magma of highest temperature after thrashing it with the Holy hammer. If so, you can destroy it completely."/> <字串 編號="63514" 文字="Please set out at once to prevent more innocent people from being hurt! Tell me good news after you finish it."/> <字串 編號="63515" 文字="Take [Holy Hammer] and [Devil Mark] to the Square of city where Lucifer lived. You must throw broken pieces of the mark into the Underground magma of the highest temperature after thrashing it with the Holy hammer. If so, you can destroy it completely. Tell me good news after you finish it..."/> <字串 編號="63516" 文字="The Devil Mark has been destroyed completely. I believe there will be no more poor victims like Zapo anymore."/> <字串 編號="63517" 文字="Here are some Treasures that have been kept for a long time...Many years ago, my first teacher asked me to hand these Treasures to the Warrior who would fight against evil for us. You are the most qualified person amongst all of the people I've seen all my life. Please accept them and make good use of them to create brighter future for people in Eden."/> <字串 編號="63518" 文字="I think you must be an Angel sent by Heaven to protect us humans...Please continue your efforts to create a brighter future for people in Eden!"/> <字串 編號="63519" 文字="This special Drill can not made by a common Blacksmith. Besides which, common forging tools and metals are also of no use."/> <字串 編號="63520" 文字="This special Drill is necessary article to destroy the Devil Mark as the Seer instructed."/> <字串 編號="63521" 文字="Begin to destroy the Devil Mark."/> <字串 編號="63522" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="63523" 文字="The outside of the Devil Mark has been broken into many pieces by the Holy Hammer. Only the core with it's intense light is left! But Holy Hammer has been ruined..."/> <字串 編號="63524" 文字="The extremely hot core is absorbing all the evil energy around it to try recover its magic. If you do not destroy it with the hot magma in time, you will have wasted all of your effort!"/> <字串 編號="63525" 文字="There is an extremely hot magma pool ahead. You have never felt such heat before."/> <字串 編號="63526" 文字="Put the Holy Seal into the magma."/> <字串 編號="63527" 文字="The mark begins to glow white hot and the edges are melting away...However, now a piercing scream is emanating from it as the core finally becomes one with the magma. It is over and silence returns!"/> <字串 編號="63528" 文字="I have successfully destroyed the Devil Mark. Now I will go back to Dark City and find the Seer!"/> <字串 編號="63601" 文字="The Broken Headless Knight Statue has stood here for many years as if it were protecting something with life."/> <字串 編號="63602" 文字="You see some words covered with dust on statue's base."/> <字串 編號="63603" 文字="Look at it carefully."/> <字串 編號="63604" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="63605" 文字="[The Hero's sword was broken into two halves by the Wanderer in battle. Even though he had lost the most powerful weapon, he still continued to fight courageously with his will...]"/> <字串 編號="63606" 文字="You find the broken sword from Wanderer"/> <字串 編號="63607" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="63608" 文字="As you place the broken sword on the statue, the words on it's base suddenly collapse and another some words appear."/> <字串 編號="63609" 文字="[When the Giant Rotten Fly spat moldy sour liquid, the Hero turned around and warded off it with his shield. But, the hard shield was melted by the sour liquid! Then he threw the shield at the Giant Rotten Fly with his last of his strength. However, the Fly escaped full of fear!]"/> <字串 編號="63610" 文字="A shield with a hole in it has dropped from the Giant Rotten Fly..."/> <字串 編號="63611" 文字="When you carefully place the shield in the hand of Knight Statue, a flagstone beside the words drop and some more text appears."/> <字串 編號="63612" 文字="[The barehanded hero did not wince in the presence of countless Devils. The Soul Wizard's Advanced Magic Wand spat out fierce flames and melted his Armor...]"/> <字串 編號="63613" 文字="After defeating the Soul Wizard, you find a pile of scorched metal beside him. It seems to be the Armor that the text mentioned."/> <字串 編號="63614" 文字="When you place the scorched Armor under the statue, it begins to shake and more words can be seen under the dust..."/> <字串 編號="63615" 文字="[Finally, the Hero fell down due to the Enmity Deissy's vicious chops, his blood reddened the ground....]"/> <字串 編號="63616" 文字="...The Baby Shoes in the hand of the Enmity Deissy look like something important. They should also be linked with Knight Statue..."/> <字串 編號="63617" 文字="You place all broken things that you have found at the corresponding places on the statue. Suddenly you see a dim final record under the foot of the statue."/> <字串 編號="63618" 文字="[The Hero defended this position and continued to fight until aid arrived. He saved lives of his fellow comrades by sacrificing himself.]"/> <字串 編號="63619" 文字="[To commemorate this battle, we erect this monument to praise the Hero's holy soul forever. Aurora Knight Corps]"/> <字串 編號="63620" 文字="Next to the statue you see a curious ridge in the turf. After digging it to investigate you find a long buried treasure chest!"/> <字串 編號="63621" 文字="You take the treasure in the box."/> <字串 編號="63622" 文字="I don't know how many years the broken headless Knight Statue has stood here for. But it's majestic appearance has kept the Monsters around away from it."/> <字串 編號="63701" 文字="There is also an unknown person's pile of bones. It seems that no-one has taken the time to give this person a proper burial. As you stand silently in thought the wind seems to echo with the voice of the fallen soldier...But it is too faint to make out the words..."/> <字串 編號="63702" 文字="This is a pile of unknown Bone Remains that no one has collected and buried. If you temporarily die and become a spirit, you will be able to understand the whisper on the wind and find out who the bones belong to!"/> <字串 編號="63703" 文字="You collect the message from the deceased."/> <字串 編號="63704" 文字="So terrible, revive yourself quickly..."/> <字串 編號="63705" 文字="[My diary...miners have stolen my diary...I want to take it back. I want to take it back!] You hear this sound dimly."/> <字串 編號="63706" 文字="Help him get his diary back!"/> <字串 編號="63707" 文字="So terrible, revive yourself quickly!"/> <字串 編號="63708" 文字="Look into this matter by first checking out the Monsters who are likely to work as miners..."/> <字串 編號="63709" 文字="[My diary...my diary!! I'm overjoyed...] You hear this sound."/> <字串 編號="63710" 文字="[You may take the treasures from these bones...take them with you...] You dig as instructed by the disembodied voice and get the treasures."/> <字串 編號="63711" 文字="This is a pile of unknown Bone Remains. But they are more orderly after you have cleared them up."/> <字串 編號="63801" 文字="The space in Underground is so broad. It is rich in minerals, just like a tremendous treasure reserve. We can take them...But...it's too troublesome!"/> <字串 編號="63802" 文字="What can I do?"/> <字串 編號="63803" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="63804" 文字="Alas...we found a rare Blue Iron Mine with low melting point nearby. But the Imp Elves came out so that Blue Iron Mine began to melt under the high temperatures...there are only a few workable mines left now. Please help us drive them away."/> <字串 編號="63805" 文字="Let me do it!"/> <字串 編號="63806" 文字="I'm busy now..."/> <字串 編號="63807" 文字="Thank you. But the quicker, the better. Otherwise the rare Blue Iron Mine will...I can't imagine what would happen if they all completely melted..."/> <字串 編號="63808" 文字="Alas, I think the person with a level below 60 can not drive away the Imp Elves..."/> <字串 編號="63809" 文字="The Imp Elves are still threatening our Blue Iron Mine! Quickly drive away them!"/> <字串 編號="63810" 文字="Luckily a part of mine was preserved...thank you! Thank you very much!"/> <字串 編號="63811" 文字="Thank you for your unfailing assistance! This is award is for you!"/> <字串 編號="63901" 文字="I can not understand! Where are those lifeless Evil Knights from...I don't know why they stole our tools...do they want to steal our mine also? Can you help us drive away them and retake our tools?"/> <字串 編號="63902" 文字="Not a problem."/> <字串 編號="63903" 文字="I'm busy now, next time."/> <字串 編號="63904" 文字="We can not work without tools. I will thank and repay you. If you can get them back."/> <字串 編號="63905" 文字="Since the Evil Knights are so strong I fear that no-one below level 60 can even begin to fight with them. I suggest you come back later when you are more experienced."/> <字串 編號="63906" 文字="Not all of have stolen tools have been reclaimed. The rest of them are still in the hands of the Evil Knights...I will continue to wait for your good news."/> <字串 編號="63907" 文字="Yeah! It's wonderful to regain what was once lost. I can continue to work."/> <字串 編號="63908" 文字="Thank you for your unfailing assistance! This is award is for you!"/> <字串 編號="64001" 文字="Please stop, gentle Warrior. I'm one of the VIP honorary members of the Suft C of C. My name is Plaim. My trade caravan has suffered from difficulties here. We need a brave Warrior to help us."/> <字串 編號="64002" 文字="Tell me about your difficulties..."/> <字串 編號="64003" 文字="Some other time."/> <字串 編號="64004" 文字="A couple of days ago, when our caravan passed by this cave, we decided to enter and see if we could find anything precious..."/> <字串 編號="64005" 文字="(after 10 minutes...)"/> <字串 編號="64006" 文字="...So we found the rare and perfect Red Crystal. But it was stolen by [Rock Slarm]...I request that you, brave Warrior, go to retrieve it for me."/> <字串 編號="64007" 文字="Let me do it!"/> <字串 編號="64008" 文字="Some other time."/> <字串 編號="64009" 文字="It all depends on you! Please get the Red Crystal back for me."/> <字串 編號="64010" 文字="Well...because your level is below 65, I'm afraid you have will have too much difficulty fighting against [Rock Slarm]. I have found wrong person."/> <字串 編號="64011" 文字="Do you find my Red Crystal? What! Not yet...can you improve your efficiency? Is it so hard to deal with the Rock Slarm?"/> <字串 編號="64012" 文字="Aha! About time! Idiot, you finally got the Red Crystal back for me ...what? I said you are an idiot? Oh no! You must have misheard me, I merely coughed!"/> <字串 編號="64013" 文字="What reward? Did I say I would give you reward?...Ok! I will give you some since you are so poor. Don't think I'm stingy. It's the Businessman's rule."/> <字串 編號="64101" 文字="Several days ago, when my caravan passed by this place, we were besieged..."/> <字串 編號="64102" 文字="(after 20 minutes...)"/> <字串 編號="64103" 文字="As a result [Terra Lampman] not only destroyed my goods, but also wounded my lackie. I request that you, brave Warrior, avenge me."/> <字串 編號="64104" 文字="Ok! Not a problem!"/> <字串 編號="64105" 文字="No, I will not. Ask someone else to do it"/> <字串 編號="64106" 文字="Please help me to clear up 60 [Terra Lampman]! Brave Warrior!"/> <字串 編號="64107" 文字="Terra Lampman are very brutal. Since your level is below 65, how can you defeat them...go back to train again!"/> <字串 編號="64108" 文字="You...you have not met my requirements! Make more effort! Is it so hard to defeat the Terra Lampman?"/> <字串 編號="64109" 文字="Aha! Idiot, you finally got the Red Crystal back for me ...what? I said you are an idiot? Oh no! You must have misheard me, I merely coughed!"/> <字串 編號="64110" 文字="What reward? Did I say I would give you reward?...Ok! I will give you some since you are so poor. Don't think I'm stingy. It's the Businessman's rule."/> <字串 編號="64201" 文字="I hide in my father's caravan, secretly and come here with them. I don't know where I am. I can not find anything fun to do. Could you find some interesting toys for me and I will give you the treasure that my father keeps in his locked box."/> <字串 編號="64202" 文字="Master! I will."/> <字串 編號="64203" 文字="I have no free time to play with you."/> <字串 編號="64204" 文字="I want a lantern. I found what the Terra Lampman hold interesting when we passed by just now. I want a lantern! I want a lantern! I want a lantern! I want a lantern! I want a lantern!"/> <字串 編號="64205" 文字="Master! I will do it for you at once."/> <字串 編號="64206" 文字="Stop acting so spoilt, you little brat!"/> <字串 編號="64207" 文字="I want you to prepare 10 lanterns for me. I only want the best and the most beautiful ones."/> <字串 編號="64208" 文字="Your level is below 65. Maybe I can collect them faster than you can. I don't need you."/> <字串 編號="64209" 文字="Did you prepare 10 lanterns? Not yet? ! I am so impatient..."/> <字串 編號="64210" 文字="Oh! Are you ready?? Let me have a look. A scratch here...this is not bright enough...What's wrong with this one? Oh, here is one that is just about acceptable. You did it... "/> <字串 編號="64211" 文字="This bag of gold was taken from my father's box. It's your reward."/> <字串 編號="64301" 文字="I saw a Rock Slarm on the way just now. I want it as my pet. You can help me to seize it! How to seize it? Well that's none of my business. Can't you think of a way by yourself?"/> <字串 編號="64302" 文字="Master! I will do it for you at once."/> <字串 編號="64303" 文字="Stop acting so spoilt, you little brat!"/> <字串 編號="64304" 文字="It's said that you can you tame a Slarm if you only collect its pieces after smashing it and then add water. You try it for me."/> <字串 編號="64305" 文字="Below level 65! You want to defeat the Rock Slarm! I think you will be defeated...I'd better ask someone else to do it."/> <字串 編號="64306" 文字="Did you seize the Rock Slarm? Not yet? ! I am so impatient..."/> <字串 編號="64307" 文字="Oh! Is this the Rock Slarm? It's uglier than I imagined...a bit small...far from fun. Ok! It's acceptable. You did it."/> <字串 編號="64308" 文字="This bag of gold was taken from my father's box. It's your reward."/> <字串 編號="64401" 文字="I'm [Seventieth Second Chef of Rolling Tail Guild] Faz. To be the continuous Champion of the 73rd games, I must create a new style of dish. I'm sure that there are excellent ingredients for delicious dishes in this region."/> <字串 編號="64402" 文字="Do you need my help?"/> <字串 編號="64403" 文字="Go!"/> <字串 編號="64404" 文字="Ah...You like to pursue delicious food too! I find there are many [/c$2Fire Flies/c*] nearby. According to my acute intuition in cooking, their mucus will become an excellent ingredient after being processed. Can you collect the mucus of/c$2 10/c* Fire Flies? If you do we can enjoy the super tasty dish together."/> <字串 編號="64405" 文字="OK, I can not wait to taste it."/> <字串 編號="64406" 文字="Sorry, I'm busy now."/> <字串 編號="64407" 文字="The sauce is created from the mucus and is combined with the flexible fungus...it almost makes my mouth water just to think about it."/> <字串 編號="64408" 文字="Alas... [/c$2Fire Fly/c*] is hot-tempered. It may be very hard for one below level/c$2 65/c* to seize them."/> <字串 編號="64409" 文字="The best sauce can not be made without sufficient mucus. Come to me after you have collected the mucus of 10 Fire Flies."/> <字串 編號="64410" 文字="Yee! Finally I have enough ingredients for the dish...I can not wait to throw them into pan and get creating."/> <字串 編號="64411" 文字="Thank you! Let us enjoy the delicious dish."/> <字串 編號="64501" 文字="My recipe is short of a spice: the rare pollen of [Evil Flower]. May I trouble you to collect some for me. I have been looking for it for days but have yet found any..."/> <字串 編號="64502" 文字="Let me do it!"/> <字串 編號="64503" 文字="It's a bit difficult."/> <字串 編號="64504" 文字="May I trouble you to collect 4 pollens from the Evil Flower?"/> <字串 編號="64505" 文字="These Evil Flowers can eat a man. Come back when you have reached level 70 lest you are eaten by them..."/> <字串 編號="64506" 文字="It is really hard to find them! The rarer, the more precious. Pay attention, only those flourishing Evil Flowers will have the best evil pollen."/> <字串 編號="64507" 文字="I can hardly believe you've made it! I almost imagine how it will be when I win Chef! Thank you for your help."/> <字串 編號="64508" 文字="Please accept this award, don't refuse me."/> <字串 編號="64601" 文字="Don't be scared, I've regained my consciousness. Ghost Kids attack travelers due to being demonized. The evil force here is so powerful that my friends have been affected too."/> <字串 編號="64602" 文字="How can I help you?"/> <字串 編號="64603" 文字="I can not trust you."/> <字串 編號="64604" 文字="Some of my friends are demonized completely. Their souls have been destroyed by strong evil force. Please help them."/> <字串 編號="64605" 文字="Let me solve it."/> <字串 編號="64606" 文字="I will not take this risk."/> <字串 編號="64607" 文字="Thank you! Please help my friends to be released from the Demon's curse so that they can have a pure beginning..."/> <字串 編號="64608" 文字="Maybe you can not resist the Ghost Kid Card with powerful magic before your level exceeds 75."/> <字串 編號="64609" 文字="Some of our friends are not release from the evil force yet. Please help us."/> <字串 編號="64610" 文字="Thank you for your helping them be reborn."/> <字串 編號="64611" 文字="The magic effect still exists here. Please be careful."/> <字串 編號="64701" 文字="There are many Poison Flowers in this region. Although they have a severe poison that can do great harm to common people, they are the only remedy to awaken us...there is a large poison sac of the Poison Flower. Please collect 5 complete poison sacs for me."/> <字串 編號="64702" 文字="Not a problem."/> <字串 編號="64703" 文字="I'm afraid I will be poisoned..."/> <字串 編號="64704" 文字="Thank you. Please collect 5 complete poison sacs for me. I feel like I am nearly beginning to lose consciousness again..."/> <字串 編號="64705" 文字="Maybe only those whose level is higher than 75 can withstand the intense poison of the Poison Flower! I can not let you sacrifice your life for us."/> <字串 編號="64706" 文字="There are not enough poison sacs, so we can not achieve the desired result yet. Go to get some more.."/> <字串 編號="64707" 文字="Err! You've collected sufficient poison sacs. I thank you for your assistance on behalf of my friends."/> <字串 編號="64708" 文字="The magic effect still exists here. Please be careful."/> <字串 編號="64801" 文字="Powerful evil forces spread from the Underground. Demons and Monsters also begin to be rampant. To ensure the safety of the people from the four great camps, we organized a joint guard in the hope that we can find the source of magic affecting the ground."/> <字串 編號="64802" 文字="Tell me about the aid."/> <字串 編號="64803" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="64804" 文字="When my team came to the ruin of this Castle, we found that [Riddle Bishops] constantly summoned evil forces through evil ritual. We must stop them."/> <字串 編號="64805" 文字="I'm willing to help you."/> <字串 編號="64806" 文字="It's a bit difficult for me."/> <字串 編號="64807" 文字="May I trouble you to defeat 50 Riddle Bishops to stop them doing evil?"/> <字串 編號="64808" 文字="The Riddle Bishops have strong magic. Many of our friends with a level below 75 have been defeated. I can't let you take this risk."/> <字串 編號="64809" 文字="We can still feel existence of the evil force. Stop the Riddle Bishop's plot quickly."/> <字串 編號="64810" 文字="This crisis has been resolved temporarily. Thank you for your aid. People on the ground will not suffer any threats for a while now."/> <字串 編號="64811" 文字="This is your award. Please accept it."/> <字串 編號="64812" 文字="In fact, there were many people in our team when we set out. But we lost many friends in battles on the way, especially in the fight with the Terra Miner. I hope you can get their remains back to console their souls."/> <字串 編號="64813" 文字="I'm willing to help you."/> <字串 編號="64814" 文字="It's a bit difficult..."/> <字串 編號="64815" 文字="My friends' skeletons have taken by the Terra Miners. Look for them after defeating the Miners..."/> <字串 編號="64816" 文字="The terra Miner's attack has caused the death of many of our friends. The levels of our survivors all exceeds 75. Maybe you'll be safer if you are of this level."/> <字串 編號="64817" 文字="Err...the remains of more of my friends have not been found yet...maybe a part of remains are still being held by the Terra Miners..."/> <字串 編號="64818" 文字="Thank you for retrieving my friend's remains. "/> <字串 編號="64819" 文字="This is your award. Please accept it."/> <字串 編號="64901" 文字="There are many Monsters nearby. It's too risky to ignite now...you'd better defeat/c$2 enemies around/c$2 first."/> <字串 編號="64902" 文字="There is a torch awaiting ignition..."/> <字串 編號="64903" 文字="Ignite it with a [Flint]."/> <字串 編號="64904" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="64905" 文字="You have no [/c$2Flint/c*] with you! Dig/c$2 ores nearby/c* and find one..."/> <字串 編號="64906" 文字="The torch is kindled..."/> <字串 編號="64907" 文字="The order board beside the gate reads: [Kindle 6 torches before starting]"/> <字串 編號="64908" 文字="A strong enemy who defends the gate has shown up. You must defeat it to open this gate!"/> <字串 編號="64909" 文字="[You must kindle all of torches you see before going on with the next toll-gate.]"/> <字串 編號="64910" 文字="Road ahead is blocked by vast wall, made of mucus. You can not advance without defeating the/c$2 Monster excreting mucus /c*! Try to kindle all torches to compel it to come out!"/> <字串 編號="64911" 文字="The road for withdrawal has been blocked by enemy. You can not leave unless you defeat all of Monsters here or you will become a spirit!"/> <字串 編號="64912" 文字="Ok...let's begin the race."/> <字串 編號="64913" 文字="You are reluctantly regarded to win the race. Go to Head Chef Berssif's General Kitchen."/> <字串 編號="64914" 文字="Stop. You needed to completer this task in under 10 minutes. You took too long and so you have failed! Try again."/> <字串 編號="64915" 文字="[The General of the Kitchen is inside, do not disturb! Anyone who wants to visit must first defeat all people before the gate and come back to press bell on this wall!]"/> <字串 編號="64916" 文字="Hum! Stupid Angels! you actually dare to break into my kitchen. I know well of your thoughts and methods. Let my underling teach you a lesson."/> <字串 編號="64917" 文字="Come on! We can not give him time to rest."/> <字串 編號="64918" 文字="Are you ready to surrender? The Evil Lyceum can accept you! Hah..."/> <字串 編號="64919" 文字="Now it's my turn to deal with you! Let Devil Dish's poison wash your heads, stupid Angels!"/> <字串 編號="64920" 文字="A volumous sound spreads from afar as if a heavy gate is being opened..."/> <字串 編號="64921" 文字="You have kindled the torch. It blazes up."/> <字串 編號="64922" 文字="After you kindle the torch, it burns so weakly as if it will go out in 5 minutes..."/> <字串 編號="64923" 文字="After you kindle the torch, it burns so weakly as if it will go out in several minutes..."/> <字串 編號="64924" 文字="When you kindle a torch, the others around go out suddenly. Do they need to be lit in a certain order?"/> <字串 編號="64925" 文字="As you go to leave the dark bottom of the vale, a wall of mucus suddenly comes and blocks your way ahead...a huge Stupor Elf is attacking you from behind."/> <字串 編號="64926" 文字="It is written on the sign: [The Mouse King hidden in Rats...key...open gate...], many critical words are wiped off."/> <字串 編號="64927" 文字="What strange dinner instructions on the board: [customers should prepare a shovel to dig out the Fire Seed from ores and then kindle the torches on the Kitchen Path]."/> <字串 編號="64928" 文字="Remark: [You can use shovels to dig Flint, even though you have never learned mining...]"/> <字串 編號="64929" 文字="[You can not pass this gate unless you kindle all torches in 5 seconds.]"/> <字串 編號="64930" 文字="[Kindle all the torches in order and let the Flame Envoy show up!]"/> <字串 編號="64931" 文字="When all torches are kindled, a huge Barft appears in the room!"/> <字串 編號="64932" 文字="The slope ahead leads straight down to the dark bottom of the deep vale..."/> <字串 編號="64933" 文字="Go forward"/> <字串 編號="64934" 文字="Go and find another path"/> <字串 編號="64935" 文字="[Only after defeating my bodyguard may the customer of "Rock God" can enter into this gate!]"/> <字串 編號="64936" 文字="Lots of Rock Slarms appear with the violent shaking of the ground!"/> <字串 編號="64937" 文字="[You want to fight with me! You must clear up these Slarms first!]"/> <字串 編號="64938" 文字="You sprinkle Devil Pepper on the metal gate carved with bizarre huge face..."/> <字串 編號="64939" 文字="Yawn!"/> <字串 編號="64940" 文字="Unexpectedly, the huge face on the gate sneezes! Then the gate opens slowly..."/> <字串 編號="64941" 文字="Poor and pedantic customer, you must compete with students of the Evil Lyceum to see who can clear up the most enemies in/c$2 10 minutes /c*! You will advance if you win the game!"/> <字串 編號="64942" 文字="Agree to it"/> <字串 編號="64943" 文字="Ignore it"/> <字串 編號="64944" 文字="Tell me about the content of game."/> <字串 編號="64945" 文字="If you agree, you will be sent to the corridor of the competing field. Compete with the students of the Evil Lyceum to see who can clear up the most enemies in/c$2 10 minutes /c*! Talk to the Server at the end of corridor before finishing the game. you will get to see the Head Chef Berssif if you win the game..."/> <字串 編號="64946" 文字="If your time is more than 10 minutes, you will fail the game anyway. Besides, you win the game only if you defeat more enemy than those students do and you defeat more than/c$2 50 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="64947" 文字="If you lose the game, you will be sent back. But you can challenge it again after 10 minutes."/> <字串 編號="64948" 文字="After if you are sure that you have defeated all of the enemies nearby, you can press the bell on this board."/> <字串 編號="64949" 文字="Hi...My good student, you finally came. Come in join our party! Ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="64950" 文字="The last gate opens slowly."/> <字串 編號="64951" 文字="After all torches are kindled, the sound of the Stupor Elf's creeping spreads from the exit of the Abyss!"/> <字串 編號="64952" 文字="Hum, I will let you feel the extreme heat of lava!"/> <字串 編號="64953" 文字="Ha-ha! You can not defeat me so long as I have Air Holes to provide me with energy!"/> <字串 編號="64954" 文字="Terrible! Too many Monsters surround me! I must defeat their Leader to break through!"/> <字串 編號="64955" 文字="The game is in progress. Your score is not in line with the victory standard. Make more effort..."/> <字串 編號="64956" 文字="You failed the challenge. You may challenge again in 10 minutes."/> <字串 編號="64957" 文字="[Visitor, close the gate carved with Head Chef's portrait if you want to enter into the kitchen.]"/> <字串 編號="64958" 文字="Too hot!"/> <字串 編號="64959" 文字="Play on! You can leave this room if you defeat Barft!"/> <字串 編號="64960" 文字="Careful! A huge Stupor Elf has appeared near the vale entrance!"/> <字串 編號="64961" 文字="Too hot! The steam from it's Air Holes are making me dizzy and clumsy in action..."/> <字串 編號="64962" 文字="Defeat the Rock Slarm and destroy the Air Holes. Then induce the Devil defending the gate ahead to come out!"/> <字串 編號="64963" 文字="You win!"/> <字串 編號="64964" 文字="You fail ..."/> <字串 編號="64965" 文字="[Vile Angels, I will deploy my troops in the "Gulp Room" and fight back again!]"/> <字串 編號="64966" 文字="The game is still in progress. You can not leave before the game is over!"/> <字串 編號="64967" 文字="There is a huge metal gate carved with a cruel Devil's face. You can not push it at all...Since you can not continue, you come back to finish the/c$2 Main Angel Quest /c*...Maybe/c$2 the waiter/c* knows something."/> <字串 編號="65001" 文字="It's not suitable for you to come here..."/> <字串 編號="65002" 文字="Why can we not pass...are there Monsters blocking our path?"/> <字串 編號="65003" 文字="Do you really want to pass? You can not return here if you do not defeat all of Berssif's pawns because we must ensure safety and peace."/> <字串 編號="65004" 文字="Yes, please let me pass!"/> <字串 編號="65005" 文字="Let me have a rest..."/> <字串 編號="65006" 文字="We are the spirits defeated by the Evil Eye. We strengthen ourselves with bones and wait for someone to avenge us..."/> <字串 編號="65007" 文字="We came here to uproot the evil forces. Take revenge for us!"/> <字串 編號="65008" 文字="May your soul rest in peace."/> <字串 編號="65009" 文字="Can you avenge us? We are still alive but can not escape as the Evil Eye will not let us."/> <字串 編號="65010" 文字="Unless you defeat the Evil Eye you too will become a spirit..."/> <字串 編號="65011" 文字="Let me try!"/> <字串 編號="65012" 文字="Really..."/> <字串 編號="65013" 文字="Bless you...brave Angel..."/> <字串 編號="65014" 文字="You can not escape. I will fight with you again! Angel!"/> <字串 編號="65015" 文字="It seems that no one can defeat the Evil Eye...even the Angel is unable to do it..."/> <字串 編號="65016" 文字="Thank you for your avenging us. Let us see you out! "/> <字串 編號="65017" 文字="Ok, thank you."/> <字串 編號="65018" 文字="Wait a moment."/> <字串 編號="65019" 文字="Thank you...finally we can be at rest..."/> <字串 編號="65020" 文字="Let us see you out..."/> <字串 編號="65021" 文字="[You have no Energy Stone...]"/> <字串 編號="65022" 文字="[Help me look for the Energy Stone...]"/> <字串 編號="65023" 文字="Put the brilliant Energy Stone in the seal..."/> <字串 編號="65024" 文字="No, I will not."/> <字串 編號="65025" 文字="[Put the Energy Stone in it]"/> <字串 編號="65026" 文字="[The seal begins to give out light!]"/> <字串 編號="65027" 文字="Mysterious sound spreads from far away: [Will you continue to challenge this Maze?]"/> <字串 編號="65028" 文字="Yes, I will."/> <字串 編號="65029" 文字="Come here next time..."/> <字串 編號="65030" 文字="It seems this gate can be opened, but how to do it?"/> <字串 編號="65031" 文字="This torch can be rotated."/> <字串 編號="65032" 文字="Rotate it."/> <字串 編號="65033" 文字="Do nothing."/> <字串 編號="65034" 文字="Blue magic flame of the torch is so intense that you can not approach it. It may be caused by the evil force from the Monsters nearby. This problem may be solved by defeating these Monsters."/> <字串 編號="65035" 文字="When the torch is rotated, the gate opens slowly...the blue flame goes out too."/> <字串 編號="65036" 文字="There is a sign showing that someone has rotated the torch on the wall. Besides, the torch is still smoking because it has just gone out."/> <字串 編號="65037" 文字="No response..."/> <字串 編號="65038" 文字="The statue makes you feel slightly uncomfortable and it has some elusive ancient words on it."/> <字串 編號="65039" 文字="Touch it."/> <字串 編號="65040" 文字="Let it alone."/> <字串 編號="65041" 文字="It is a common statue."/> <字串 編號="65042" 文字="The statue makes you feel so sick that you can not approach it."/> <字串 編號="65043" 文字="A strong evil force is being emitted from the monument...you feel that you are almost being sucked in!"/> <字串 編號="65044" 文字="Rush to the monument!"/> <字串 編號="65045" 文字="Go away quickly!"/> <字串 編號="65046" 文字="There are some ancient words on the monument: [The Statue is protecting me. Here lies Mark Ouqiar Ⅱ.]"/> <字串 編號="65047" 文字="Can not pass ...apparently, an invisible trap blocks your way. The source of its evil force must be cut off."/> <字串 編號="65048" 文字="The designs and words on the wall disappear and the gate opens slowly."/> <字串 編號="65049" 文字="There are some words on the monument: [the magic power of the evil creatures combines into a trap.]"/> <字串 編號="65050" 文字="Many kinds of evil force are surrounding this monument closely. It can only be opened if the evil forces are removed..."/> <字串 編號="65051" 文字="Push gate with great force."/> <字串 編號="65052" 文字="Pass on the magic power to the gate."/> <字串 編號="65053" 文字="Place the item into the groove on the gate."/> <字串 編號="65054" 文字="Give up."/> <字串 編號="65055" 文字="The gate doesn't move at all."/> <字串 編號="65056" 文字="The gate doesn't move."/> <字串 編號="65057" 文字="A mysterious weak sound comes from the gate: [Your energy is not high enough to open me]."/> <字串 編號="65058" 文字="[Something is sticking out of the monument. Do you want to investigate it?]"/> <字串 編號="65059" 文字="Yes."/> <字串 編號="65060" 文字="No."/> <字串 編號="65061" 文字="[The sound of the statue moving can be heard in the distance...]"/> <字串 編號="65062" 文字="No change..."/> <字串 編號="65063" 文字="[The two eyes on the monument are sending out light. If you stare at it, something may happen.]"/> <字串 編號="65064" 文字="Continue to stare at it."/> <字串 編號="65065" 文字="Move your vision."/> <字串 編號="65066" 文字="[I see courage in your eyes. You may be qualified to challenge Berssif]"/> <字串 編號="65067" 文字="[I see courage in your eyes. You may be qualified to challenge Bazac]"/> <字串 編號="65068" 文字="[I see courage in your eyes. You may be qualified to challenge the Demon Kidace]"/> <字串 編號="65069" 文字="[I know I do not misjudge you...]"/> <字串 編號="65070" 文字="[You may be unable...]"/> <字串 編號="65071" 文字="You fill Elf Bottle with water and then throw it at the Demon Kidace..."/> <字串 編號="65072" 文字="It is the Gulp Room ahead...Do you really want to go?"/> <字串 編號="65073" 文字="What other suggestion do you have?"/> <字串 編號="65074" 文字="Go."/> <字串 編號="65075" 文字="The Monsters in the Gulp Room are fiercer than those outside. You can not escape at all if they find you."/> <字串 編號="65076" 文字="Worse still, the room is full of invisible traps. If you do not defeat those Monsters, it will be impossible for you to pass."/> <字串 編號="65077" 文字="Your force is too weak to proceed!"/> <字串 編號="65078" 文字="It's said that you can get tremendous power deep in the Maze. We have a partner researching it and he may be able to help you..."/> <字串 編號="65079" 文字="Go ahead...brave Angels...you can destroy evil force only if you go ahead..."/> <字串 編號="65080" 文字="How did you get that stone?"/> <字串 編號="65081" 文字="I got it from Earl Makice's corpse."/> <字串 編號="65082" 文字="I would never have thought that you could defeat Earl Makice...unfortunately it has lost luster so that it can not seal up the/c$2 Glutton /c*..."/> <字串 編號="65083" 文字="Lost it's luster?"/> <字串 編號="65084" 文字="Seal up the Glutton?"/> <字串 編號="65085" 文字="Yes...maybe you can get back it's luster from/c$2 Lion Dragon /c*,/c$2 Evil Eye/c* or/c$2 Demon Kidace /c*..."/> <字串 編號="65086" 文字="Can you see what it lacks?"/> <字串 編號="65087" 文字="I can feel that it lacks the evil force from the/c$2 Lion Dragon /c*..."/> <字串 編號="65088" 文字="I can feel that it lacks the evil force from the/c$2 Evil Eye /c*..."/> <字串 編號="65089" 文字="I can feel that it lacks the evil force from the/c$2 Demon Kidace /c*..."/> <字串 編號="65090" 文字="Ah! Good luck."/> <字串 編號="65172" 文字="It's really rare to see person here."/> <字串 編號="65173" 文字="Why are you here?"/> <字串 編號="65174" 文字="The Exploring Association holds the principle [Explore any hole you see, look for new lodes], so a pioneer team was sent to explore the Underground, as a result, a suspicious Underground building has been found."/> <字串 編號="65175" 文字="So I am ordered to take the assigned/c$2 Researcher Polo/c* to study this region...talking of Polo...where is Polo? He was here just now!"/> <字串 編號="65176" 文字="I guess he must have gone in to study the ancient words on the wall. He likes running around and becomes very excited upon seeing anything worthy of study. If he gets lost, I will be worried."/> <字串 編號="65177" 文字="What about the harvest?"/> <字串 編號="65178" 文字="How can I pass through this room?"/> <字串 編號="65179" 文字="According to the records of Polo, in his notebook, the [/c$2power/c*] on the left door means that only those whose level exceeds/c$2 60/c* can open this door. The [/c$2glory of God Officer/c*] on the right represents that those whose class exceeds/c$2 7/c* can open this door."/> <字串 編號="65180" 文字="Then.../c$2 red door/c* means that it can be opened if the/c$2 Skills level/c* meets the given requirements.../c$2 green door/c* means that this door can be opened if/c$2 200 Level 55 advanced unfinished products/c* are placed into groove of the door."/> <字串 編號="65181" 文字="Err...these words are a little illegible: [when I install my excellent/c$2 equipment, level 50/c* to/c$2 yellow door /c*, no response...so I took the bad equipment, level 50 from my bag...the door opens, maybe articles of average quality are suitable to open this door?]"/> <字串 編號="65182" 文字="As for the last step:/c$2 the dark blue door /c*, Researcher Polo has not achieved satisfactory research results yet. However, he opened the door written with [/c$2Sacred judger/c*] with the/c$2 Judge Mantle/c* last time. So it's inferred that the item with the same level is just the key to this door."/> <字串 編號="65183" 文字="You scared me...I thought I was the only one here!"/> <字串 編號="65184" 文字="Are you Polo? Tell me about your work."/> <字串 編號="65185" 文字="What! I'm just absorbed in my research...Ah! It's really a harvest to find this warehouse!"/> <字串 編號="65186" 文字="Harvest?"/> <字串 編號="65187" 文字="Yes, this chest is filled with primitive rolling bar that records the unspoken history and taboo spells. It will take me all my life to study it. How wonderful!"/> <字串 編號="65188" 文字="By the way, I also found some spell scrolls in the chest...May I try them out?"/> <字串 編號="65189" 文字="Certainly."/> <字串 編號="65190" 文字="You'd better ask the others."/> <字串 編號="65191" 文字="I just have a quick go."/> <字串 編號="65192" 文字="[/c$2Lislis/c*.../c$2Banna/c*...What can this word mean?...]"/> <字串 編號="65193" 文字="Oh, success! Record it!... It can be cast by the whole team... only once though...Ok, I've recorded it."/> <字串 編號="65194" 文字="The evil power that was holding the seal tight has disappeared."/> <字串 編號="65195" 文字="The door opens and a strong presence can be felt in the room. A kind of praying sound can be heard, can it really be?.... All of the Death-head's have risen from their graves....."/> <字串 編號="65196" 文字="The door of the upper room seems to be locked. We must find another way."/> <字串 編號="65197" 文字="There is a strong evil power here, we are unable to pass by it."/> <字串 編號="65198" 文字="There is a lock underneath the torch... A key is required. "/> <字串 編號="65199" 文字="A strong evil power from that room is blocking your progress. You'd better find another way through."/> <字串 編號="65200" 文字="Too many Monsters have seen you. They are in the charge of our salesmen."/> <字串 編號="70011" 文字="The Suft C of C has received a variety of [/c$2orders/c*] for production, from all over the world. And has recruited the World's most excellent craftsmen. The one who can collect all of the materials that we need will get a reward from our salesmen."/> <字串 編號="70012" 文字="Oh, you have an order? Great! Let me check to see if you have prepared all the things on it."/> <字串 編號="70013" 文字="Well done, I will accept the items. Thank you."/> <字串 編號="70014" 文字="You haven't collected all of the items. Come and find me once you've got them all."/> <字串 編號="70015" 文字="You don't have an order. I'm too busy to deal with you now. I am only undertaking the production order of LV1~4 , so come back later."/> <字串 編號="70016" 文字="You don't have an order. I'm too busy to deal with you now. I am only undertaking the production order of LV5~8, so come back later."/> <字串 編號="70017" 文字="I am the [/c$2Weapon Clerk/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me? I am only undertaking the production order LV7~10 at present."/> <字串 編號="70018" 文字="I am the [/c$2Armor Clerk/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me? I am only undertaking the production order LV7~10 at present."/> <字串 編號="70019" 文字="I am the [/c$2Sewing Clerk/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me? I am only undertaking the production order LV7~10 at present."/> <字串 編號="70020" 文字="I am the [/c$2Cooking Clerk/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me? I am only undertaking the production order LV7~10 at present."/> <字串 編號="70021" 文字="I am the [/c$2Art Clerk/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me? I am only undertaking the production order LV7~10 at present."/> <字串 編號="70022" 文字="Well done, I will accept your items. Thank you."/> <字串 編號="70100" 文字="I am the [/c$2Weapon Director/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me?"/> <字串 編號="70101" 文字="I am the [/c$2Armor Director/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me?"/> <字串 編號="70102" 文字="I am the [/c$2Sewing Director/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me?"/> <字串 編號="70103" 文字="I am the [/c$2Cooking Director/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me?"/> <字串 編號="70104" 文字="I am the [/c$2Art Director/c*] of the Suft C of C, do you want to do business with me?"/> <字串 編號="70105" 文字="Are you...?"/> <字串 編號="70106" 文字="I was a member of the Suft C of C when I was alive. After I died, Michael invited me to live here and encourage the students to make great progress."/> <字串 編號="70109" 文字="You don't have an order, I am only undertaking the production order LV1 at present, so come back later."/> <字串 編號="70120" 文字="Do you want to join [Iron Castle Exploration Assoc]? As the Exploration Base of [/c$2Puqi Island/c*] has been set, we have decided to recruit more members. As long as you finish all of the simple steps, you will become an Honorable Member and Adventurer of Puqi Island."/> <字串 編號="70121" 文字="That sounds interesting, I think I will join."/> <字串 編號="70122" 文字="I am not free..."/> <字串 編號="70123" 文字="Sorry, a level/c$2 50/c* or above is the minimum requirement. I must refuse your application."/> <字串 編號="70124" 文字="You look like an experienced Adventurer! This test will be a piece of cake to someone like you. Simply go to the [/c$2Sad Abyss/c*] and bring me back the/c$2 15/c* [Flame Jade] mined by the [/c$2Hell Slaves/c*]. Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="70125" 文字="You look like an experienced Adventurer! This test will be a piece of cake to someone like you. Simply go to the [/c$2Sad Abyss/c*] and bring me back the 15 [Ancient Coal Terrene] mined by the [Hell Slaves]. Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="70126" 文字="You look like an experienced Adventurer! This test will be a piece of cake to someone like you. Simply go to the [/c$2Sad Abyss/c*] and bring me back the 15 [Ancient Grass Seeds] from the [Evil Grass]. Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="70127" 文字="You look like an experienced Adventurer! This test will be a piece of cake to someone like you. Simply go to the [/c$2Sad Abyss/c*] and bring me back the 15 [Ancient Root Seeds] from the [Evil Grass]. Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="70128" 文字="Wow, you are so quick! You've set the record for all of our members to aim for. Well done!!!"/> <字串 編號="70129" 文字="Congratulations on becoming an Honorable Member of [Iron Castle Exploration Assoc]! Our [/c$2Palm Base/c*] of Puqi Island needs more people. Welcome to [/c$2Cherry Village/c*] in the northwest of Eden."/> <字串 編號="70130" 文字="Honorable Member! Our [Palm Base] of Puqi Island needs more people. Welcome to [/c$2Cherry Village/c*] in the northwest of Eden."/> <字串 編號="70131" 文字="Hi, it's a beautiful day. Do you want to visit /c$2Puqi Island/c* by boat? You can walk to [Puqi Village] after getting off boat. If you are waiting for something special to happen then you can stay near the [Palm Base] for chance to come along."/> <字串 編號="70132" 文字="Please take me to Puqi Island."/> <字串 編號="70133" 文字="I don't need a boat right now..."/> <字串 編號="70134" 文字="Ok, Let's go~"/> <字串 編號="70135" 文字="Wow, are you an Honorable Member of the Exploration Assoc.? Oh good! My job is to take Adventurers and Travelers alike to /c$2Puqi Island/c*. Feel free to ask me for help."/> <字串 編號="70136" 文字="I would like to give you a souvenir in honor of the Assoc. Captain. You're welcome to join us anytime! Let's go to Puqi Island now."/> <字串 編號="70137" 文字="Do you want to go back to /c$2the Garden of Eden/c*? Our scheduled ship can take you back at any time."/> <字串 編號="70138" 文字="Please take me to Cherry Village."/> <字串 編號="70139" 文字="I don't need a boat right now..."/> <字串 編號="70140" 文字="If you want to join the [Iron Castle Exploration Assoc], please /c$2go back to the city/c* and apply with our captain."/> <字串 編號="70141" 文字="At the end of the beach is a shallow sea area. But you cannot go much further unless you are good at diving... You'd better learn basic Diving Skills from a /c$2Diving Trainer/c*! A trainer called /c$2Nila/c* was seen on the [/c$2Gold Beach/c*] not long ago. Go and see!"/> <字串 編號="70142" 文字="The water is too deep for diving. You'd better find a /c$2Blue Water diving trainer/c* so that you can learn the more advanced Diving Skills. A trainer called /c$2Yula/c* is in the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*], ask him for help."/> <字串 編號="70200" 文字="Hello, Honorable Member, do you wish to go to the [Palm Base] of Puqi Island now?"/> <字串 編號="70201" 文字="Yes! Please take me there."/> <字串 編號="70202" 文字="Wait..."/> <字串 編號="70203" 文字="Oh my! The island is so beautiful! This is my first time here, I need to find the /c$2Angel Aide of the Angel Lyceum/c*."/> <字串 編號="70204" 文字="Little Angel, welcome to Puqi Island. Our Angel Pickets have noticed a very unnatural changes in the sea. It even caused an exploration ship called [Habosen] to sink the other day. Too strange!"/> <字串 編號="70205" 文字="We have concluded that it must have something with Evil Lyceum. They are always plotting to destroy our happiness. Therefore, by dreaming, we asked the Exploration Heads to recruit new members. Who were willing to head for this island and protect it."/> <字串 編號="70206" 文字="The more people are aware of their plans, the harder it will be for the Evil Lyceum to successfully overthrow us. Certainly, the graduates of Angel Lyceum must come here, too."/> <字串 編號="70207" 文字="With the help of the Eden Plan Members, the secret of the Habosen Ship incident will soon be released. Now, please visit all of the Assoc. Directors by turn and familiarize yourself with the environment. Talk to the /c$2Business Director in the west of Palm Base/c* first."/> <字串 編號="70208" 文字="Please visit all Assoc. Directors by turn and familiarize yourself with the environment. After doing that, come back here and I will tell you all about the next step. Talk to the /c$2Business Director in the west of Palm Base/c* first."/> <字串 編號="70209" 文字="Hi, you must be the Honorable Member. I am the Exploration Assoc. Business Director. There are all kinds of businessmen here, including those who supply and repair gear. They are very reliable. Next, you may have a talk with /c$2Academy Director/c*/c$2 to the east of Palm Base/c*."/> <字串 編號="70210" 文字="New member, please have a talk with /c$2Academy Director/c* to the east of Palm Base. You may benefit a lot from doing so...."/> <字串 編號="70211" 文字="I am the Exploration Assoc. Business Director. There are all kinds of businessmen here, including those who supply and repair gear. They are very reliable."/> <字串 編號="70212" 文字="I've heard of you, Honorable Member! Our captain sent me your test results. You are great!"/> <字串 編號="70213" 文字="I am the Exploration Assoc. Academy Director. There are many professional skill tutors, selling advanced spells, Recipes and stances etc. You should come here often to learn new skills."/> <字串 編號="70214" 文字="Why don't you go to the southern production area and visit the /c$2Production Director/c*?"/> <字串 編號="70215" 文字="I am the Exploration Assoc. Academy Director. There are many professional skill tutors, selling advanced spells, Recipes and stances etc. You should come here often to learn new skills."/> <字串 編號="70216" 文字="Have you seen our production facilities? I am the Production Director here. Nice to meet you! If you are good at finding resources and making items, then we have a lot in common. Next, you should visit /c$2the Northern Bank Director/c*."/> <字串 編號="70217" 文字=" I am the Production Director here. Nice to meet you! If you are good at finding resources and making items, then we have a lot in common. Next, you should visit /c$2the Northern Bank Director/c*."/> <字串 編號="70218" 文字="Have you seen our production facilities? I am the Production Director here. Nice to meet you! If you are good at finding resources and making items, then we have a lot in common. Next, you should visit /c$2the Northern Bank Director/c*."/> <字串 編號="70219" 文字="I am too busy! Are you the new Honorable Member? I am sorry for not treating you well. I am the Exploration Assoc. Bank Director in charge of bank. Remember to get into the habit of saving your money. "/> <字串 編號="70220" 文字="Now I have visited all of the Directors, I should go back to find the /c$2Puqi Angel/c* so I can find out about the following tasks!"/> <字串 編號="70221" 文字="Busy, busy... Honorable Member, you have come again! I am sorry for not having anytime to treat you well."/> <字串 編號="70222" 文字="I have visited all of them, I should go back to find /c$2Puqi Angel/c* for the following tasks!"/> <字串 編號="70223" 文字="I am too busy! Are you the new Honorable Member? I am sorry for not treating you well. I am the Exploration Assoc. Bank Director in charge of bank. Remember to get into the habit of saving your money. "/> <字串 編號="70224" 文字="Little Angel, I am sure you are very familiar with the environment now. So let's get down to work. Please find the reason why the Exploration Assoc. needed to send the Habosen Ship out and help them find the truth behind why the ship sank."/> <字串 編號="70300" 文字="Trainer [/c$2Noya/c*] from the [/c$2Palm Base/c*] is taking charge of the sea bed exploration. You must get in contact with him before you also check it out. I am sorry but those are the rules, Little Angel!"/> <字串 編號="70301" 文字="Trainer [/c$2Noya/c*] from the [/c$2Palm Base/c*] is taking charge of the sea bed exploration. You must get in contact with him before you also check it out. I am sorry but those are the rules, Little Angel!"/> <字串 編號="70302" 文字="It's really terrible, Mamen is in pursuit of the Yatiss! And on top of that the Evil Lyceum has sent two officials to attack the humans? Do they plan on starting a large war?... Little Angel, please pay attention to this matter!"/> <字串 編號="70303" 文字="Hi, Little Angel. Michael has sent me here to investigate the unstable situation. I believe the Evil Lyceum is once again scheming against us. And at this very moment are putting another destructive plan into action. I suggest you/c$2 return to the city/c* and apply to join us at Assoc. Captain's office. "/> <字串 編號="70304" 文字="I will work harder. Goodbye..."/> <字串 編號="70305" 文字="Only an expert of the sea can become a member of the Exploration Assoc."/> <字串 編號="70306" 文字="Hey are you looking for/c$2Noya/c*? Don't you know I am Noya? The new members that have joined are not meeting the grade maybe you can show them how it's done?"/> <字串 編號="70307" 文字="What can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="70308" 文字="I wish to work for the Exploration Assoc."/> <字串 編號="70309" 文字="Nothing..."/> <字串 編號="70310" 文字="Ha-ha-ha! We only recruit the best of the best. Elites. If you are not in the top three percent of the class then we don't want to know. You could always become a delivery boy or a cleaner instead, right?"/> <字串 編號="70311" 文字="However, I will give you a chance to prove yourself today. If you can defeat/c$2 50/c* [/c$2Colored Whelks/c*] on the [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]. Then, I will let you become a member of Exploration Assoc. Understand? Go! But don't come back until you have finished."/> <字串 編號="70312" 文字="Didn't I say not to come back if you haven't finished?... All right, let me say it again. If you can defeat/c$2 50/c* [/c$2Colored Whelks/c*] on the [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]. I will let you become a member of Exploration Assoc. Understand? Go!"/> <字串 編號="70313" 文字="What..? You have really defeated so many Colored Whelks? (It should take ten elites a whole day to finish that task... I am surprised that he did it so quickly... )"/> <字串 編號="70314" 文字="You have proved your strength and value. Now, I declare you are a true member of Exploration Assoc! However, I'd like to suggest that you buy insurance first, because our work is very dangerous!"/> <字串 編號="70315" 文字="And now the good part....Your salary. Next, I will arrange training lessons for you!"/> <字串 編號="70400" 文字="Most of the work of Exploration Assoc is just under surface of the sea. So, you will need to learn the basic Diving Skill so that you can work there for longer."/> <字串 編號="70401" 文字="Go to find the Diving Trainer [/c$2Nila/c*] of Exploration Assoc on the [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]. He will teach you how to become a shallow sea diver!"/> <字串 編號="70402" 文字="Diving is the most enjoyable sea activity. You get to see and be a part of an alien world full of mystery and beauty."/> <字串 編號="70403" 文字="Hello, Honorable Member. I am the Basic Diving Trainer, Nile, in charge of training Exploration Assoc members. I know your intentions and I am glad to teach you, but..."/> <字串 編號="70404" 文字="My diving equipment has been stolen by the [/c$2Puqi Pirates/c*] of [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]. How vile they are!"/> <字串 編號="70405" 文字="Please help me to defeat [/c$2Puqi Pirates/c*] in the [/c$2Shining Coast/c*] and get back my/c$2 20 pieces of diving equipment /c*!"/> <字串 編號="70406" 文字="Please help me to defeat [/c$2Puqi Pirates/c*] in the [/c$2Shining Coast/c*] and get back my/c$2 20 pieces of diving equipment /c*! Or else we cannot go on our lessons."/> <字串 編號="70407" 文字="Thank you for getting back my diving equipment! I can be at one with the sea again!"/> <字串 編號="70408" 文字="Good. Let's begin our diving lessons! It's going to be hard work!"/> <字串 編號="70409" 文字="After several hours of hard training, you have finally learned the /c$2Neritic Diving Skill/c*!"/> <字串 編號="70410" 文字="Great! Your learning ability and physical strength are both excellent. From now on, you can /c$2feel safe in shallow sea./c*"/> <字串 編號="70411" 文字="Please accept this diploma! Take it to /c$2Trainer Noya/c* at [/c$2Palm Base/c*], he will award you a prize. Let me applaud for you."/> <字串 編號="70412" 文字="Take this diploma to /c$2Trainer Noya/c* at [/c$2Palm Base/c*], let him take a look at your results, I know he'll be impressed!."/> <字串 編號="70413" 文字="New member, you have only been at Gold Beach for one afternoon, are you asking a sick leave now?"/> <字串 編號="70414" 文字="You have got your diploma from Nile? What a surprise! Take your prize. Don't be too proud though, the dangerous work is just beginning!"/> <字串 編號="70415" 文字="I am Basic Diving Trainer Nile in charge of training adventurers. Have you come here to learn the /c$2Diving Skill/c*?"/> <字串 編號="70416" 文字="Yes!"/> <字串 編號="70417" 文字="No!"/> <字串 編號="70418" 文字="No problem, let's begin our lessons! Come on!"/> <字串 編號="70419" 文字="After several hours of hard training, you have finally learned the /c$2neritic Diving Skill/c*!"/> <字串 編號="70420" 文字="Great! Your learning ability and physical strength are both excellent. From now on, you can /c$2feel safe in shallow sea./c*"/> <字串 編號="70421" 文字="Your learning ability is strong. You are now able to feel safe in shallow sea. I cannot teach you any more. If you want to learn Abyssal Diving Skill, why not find my brother [/c$2Yula/c*]in the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]."/> <字串 編號="70422" 文字="I remember you have already learned the Diving Skill from me not long ago. You should have had diploma. Explain to /c$2Trainer Noya/c* in [/c$2Palm Base/c*] about your finding diving equipment for me. He will not question you."/> <字串 編號="70500" 文字="In order to find the location of the ancient relics [/c$2the Yatiss/c*], Binch is measuring the orientation in [Wave Harbor].
