However he is having some trouble now, I want you to head for [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*] to help /c$2Binch/c*."/> <字串 編號="70501" 文字="I want you to head for [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*] to help /c$2Binch/c* now."/> <字串 編號="70502" 文字="In order to find the correct location of the Yatiss, I will persevere, no matter how temperamental the sea is!"/> <字串 編號="70503" 文字="I can't continue my work because the Monsters have caused too much damage. Did Noya send you? Great! Please help me!"/> <字串 編號="70504" 文字="The /c$2Jellyfish/c* of [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*] are too tricky for me. They keep out of sight but always sting me so that I cannot work any more. Can you help me to drive them away? If you can defeat/c$2 35 /c*of them, then the others will be too scared to come near us."/> <字串 編號="70505" 文字="The /c$2Jellyfish/c* of [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*] are too tricky for me. They keep out of sight but always sting me so that I cannot work any more. Can you help me to drive them away? If you can defeat/c$2 35 /c*of them, then the others will be too scared to come near us."/> <字串 編號="70506" 文字="Wow! You really drove those jellyfish away? Wonderful! But now I have another problem. A large number of [/c$2Scale Fish/c*] are occupying [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*]. I am afraid of them to take any action. "/> <字串 編號="70507" 文字="Could you help me to drive away [/c$2Scale Fish/c*]of [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*]. It is really dangerous! Please defeat/c$2 30 /c*, then the others will be forced to leave."/> <字串 編號="70508" 文字="Could you help me to drive away [/c$2Scale Fish/c*]of [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*]. It is really dangerous! Please defeat/c$2 30 /c*, then the others will be forced to leave."/> <字串 編號="70509" 文字="Ahh! Excellent, they have left! Without you, my work would have been over. Now I will inform my other team mates to take measurements in the deeper sea."/> <字串 編號="70510" 文字="You want to go to Blue Water, too? But your diving equipment and skill are not high enough. Why not go back [/c$2Gold Beach/c*] and learn Abyssal Diving Skill from /c$2Trainer Nila/c*?"/> <字串 編號="70511" 文字="You want to go to Blue Water, too? But your diving equipment and skill are not high enough. Why not go back [/c$2Gold Beach/c*] and learn Abyssal Diving Skill from /c$2Trainer Nila/c*?"/> <字串 編號="70512" 文字="Honorable Member, you have come back again? Oh, you want to learn Abyssal Diving Skill. What a pity, I am not the best teacher for you."/> <字串 編號="70513" 文字="However, I can recommend a better trainer for you. It is my elder brother, Yula, who is called "Dipsey Hunter"."/> <字串 編號="70514" 文字="The barriers in our work have been almost all been cleared. Now we can continue our explorations. Thank you very much!"/> <字串 編號="70600" 文字="In terms of the Diving Skill, maybe nobody can compare with /c$2Yula/c*. My brother loves pursuing excitement, which forces him to become more and more advanced. He is an extreme diver!"/> <字串 編號="70601" 文字="If you go to find my elder brother and play with him. He may teach you how to dive in the deeper sea. He is bound to be in the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]. I heard that he is searching for rare artifacts for someone."/> <字串 編號="70602" 文字="You can find my brother Yula in [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]. I hear that he is searching for rare artifacts for someone."/> <字串 編號="70603" 文字="[Dipsey Hunter], My name is not a boast. I really am that good! Everyday I bring more than my body's weight in artifacts up from the bottom of the sea. Do you dare to have a contest with me? It will be dangerous, but that's the way I like it!"/> <字串 編號="70604" 文字="Well done, dude! You must have learned Diving Skill from my younger brother so you can dive here using simple equipment. The stance and tools are similar too."/> <字串 編號="70605" 文字="Yeah, I am He! So what can I do for you? You want to learn Blue Water skill? If you aren't afraid of losing your life and you can complete my task, then yes I will teach you all I know. And that's a lot!"/> <字串 編號="70606" 文字="Now I need a kind of rare thing called the [/c$2Angel Fish Fin/c*]. Collect/c$2 15/c* pieces from /c$2Angel Fish/c* in [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]. Then come back to me."/> <字串 編號="70607" 文字="The [/c$2Angel Fish Fin/c*]can be obtained by defeating the /c$2Angel Fish/c* in [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]. Collect/c$2 15/c* pieces for me."/> <字串 編號="70608" 文字="Have you finished? Let me take a look at the fins."/> <字串 編號="70609" 文字="Well done. Oh, this is exactly what my customer is wanting. They are really beautiful. Now, thanks to you, I can take a nap. It's tiring be so extreme all the time!"/> <字串 編號="70610" 文字="Oh o.k. Seeing as you finished my work for me, I will teach you. So, let's get down to strict training."/> <字串 編號="70611" 文字="After half a day's strict training, you have learned the /c$2Abyssal Diving Skill/c* from Dipsey Hunter."/> <字串 編號="70612" 文字="Hey, you are extremely talented! I have nothing more to teach you. As long as you practice more, then one day you could be as great as me. Almost!"/> <字串 編號="70613" 文字="Well done, dude! You must have learned Diving Skill from my younger brother so you can dive here using simple equipment. The stance and tools are similar too."/> <字串 編號="70614" 文字="I want to learn the Abyssal Diving Skill."/> <字串 編號="70615" 文字="You don't need to know who I learned from."/> <字串 編號="70616" 文字="Hey man, I gave you such a warm greeting. But your cool response really cut me. Alright, alright, I guess I shouldn't be so sensitive. But I also don't need to be so nice to you. Just go away, and don't bother me again. "/> <字串 編號="70617" 文字="What! You wanna be extreme too! Great! Since you have interest and are my brother's student, I will give you the real no holds barred training. Only the really brave person, who has experienced the edge of life and death is qualified for challenging the wide ocean. "/> <字串 編號="70618" 文字="After half-day of exhaustive training, you have learned all of the Diving Skills from Hunter Yula"/> <字串 編號="70619" 文字="Dude, you were totally born to dive! There's nothing more I can teach you. All you can do now is to get out there and get more practice hours under your belt. Someday you may become an awesome diver like me. Now dive down deep in the ocean and see what she is hiding down there. "/> <字串 編號="70620" 文字="Dude, you were totally born to dive! There's nothing more I can teach you. All you can do now is to get out there and get more practice hours under your belt. Someday you may become an awesome diver like me. Now dive down deep in the ocean and see what she is hiding down there. "/> <字串 編號="70621" 文字="Gee, you have mastered all of the Abyssal Diving Skills. Why didn't you tell me earlier. I guess it doesn't really matter. You need to pay me now."/> <字串 編號="70700" 文字="Now tell me your purpose for diving into the deep ocean. ...What?/c$2the Yatiss/c* Ooohh that sounds dangerous. You are really interested in that terrible place?"/> <字串 編號="70701" 文字="But I believe you are not fully clued up with our mission. I suggest you go to [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]to find the man who employed me to study broken houses with him. I'm no longer working there because I found it too boring. But, maybe you may like it?"/> <字串 編號="70702" 文字="His name is [/c$2Lubo/c*], a scholar. It is quite possible that he still stays in [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]. I believe the Yattiss you mentioned is the subject of his studies. Find him, he may help you."/> <字串 編號="70703" 文字="His name is [/c$2Lubo/c*], a scholar. It is quite possible that he still stays in [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]."/> <字串 編號="70704" 文字="The Yatiss' culture is so enthralling. I really wish that I could have witnessed all of the abundant prosperity of it's heyday"/> <字串 編號="70705" 文字="I never expected to meet anyone here. Ah well the more the merrier. Nice to meet you, my name is Lubo. I am dedicated to the study of the [/c$2Yatiss/c*]culture."/> <字串 編號="70706" 文字="So Yula suggested that you come here. I never thought he would do that. He is such a nice guy. If you are at all interested in the Yatiss, I can offer you a job. And you can join me here in my studies."/> <字串 編號="70707" 文字="I found this machine by chance. But I don't know what it is for. It looks like a controller of some sort. But, I can't understand these ancient characters around it and I don't want to waste time to studying them. So I want you to take the controller to [/c$2Palm Base/c*] and let [/c$2Pyalu/c*]translate it for me. Please tell me the results as soon as you get them. "/> <字串 編號="70708" 文字="So I want you to take the controller to [/c$2Palm Base/c*] and let [/c$2Pyalu/c*] translate it for me. Please tell me the results as soon as you get them. "/> <字串 編號="70709" 文字="It seems unimaginable that a whole civilization could have lived here under the ocean. I wonder how many secrets does our own land of Eden hold?"/> <字串 編號="70710" 文字="Hey there young risk taker, what can I do for you. I hope you don't want me to fight with you!"/> <字串 編號="70711" 文字="Oh, I see. It is Lubo who wanted you to come to my place. I admire him very much, staying under deep ocean and not being afraid of getting eaten by squid. Is this the item he wants me to examine. Ok, let me have a look at it."/> <字串 編號="70712" 文字="Well, I'm afraid that right now I can't help you. It's far too dirty for me to read anything on it. This calls for some special equipment. Common cleaning tools will destroy it. I need a specialist highly corrosive liquid to clean it."/> <字串 編號="70713" 文字="Let me think about it...Ah, I remember my scientist friend once told me that the fluid from the body of the [/c$2Fire Fly/c*]in [/c$2Hell Palace/c*]at the bottom of the Garden of Eden is quite useful for getting rid of dirt without destroying the surface of the object."/> <字串 編號="70714" 文字="Are you clear? To make it simple, you go to [/c$2Hell Palace/c*]at the bottom of the Garden of Eden and kill the [/c$2Fire Fly/c*]and collect the [Corrosive Acid Pickle]"/> <字串 編號="70715" 文字="Are you clear? To make it simple, you go to [/c$2Hell Palace/c*]at the bottom of the Garden of Eden and kill the [/c$2Fire Fly/c*]and collect the [Corrosive Acid Pickle]"/> <字串 編號="70716" 文字="Wow, You have got the [Corrosive Acid Pickle]. Great. Now let's witness it's effect."/> <字串 編號="70717" 文字="It worked! Now the characters on controller can been seen. Please give me a little time to translate them."/> <字串 編號="70718" 文字="I'm afraid that I don't know how to interpret them. I can only tell you that this is the controller of some ancient ruins. Please tell this to/c$2 Lubo in [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]"/> <字串 編號="70719" 文字="I can only tell you that this is the controller of some ancient ruins. Please tell this to/c$2 Lubo in [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]. By the way, don't forget to remind him to come up from the ocean floor once in a while. After all sunshine is good for your health!"/> <字串 編號="70720" 文字="Ah, young risk taker. What did Yalu say?"/> <字串 編號="70721" 文字="Controller of ruins? I see. It must be the [/c$2Sunken Ruins/c*]at the front of the ocean. But there are too many powerful Monsters guarding it. I dare not go too close to it. But I believe, you are the right person for this job. Yes you are not afraid to go are you?"/> <字串 編號="70722" 文字="Please go to [/c$2Sunken Ruins/c*]for me and find something that looks like a /c$2Control Pedestal/c* to test the controller's effect. I will give you most of my research funds. Please help me, it would mean the world to me."/> <字串 編號="70723" 文字="The strange characters on the front seem familiar to me. Were they used during the battle of immortal world? The meaning is [use controller]? Maybe I should take the controller with me as I explore."/> <字串 編號="70724" 文字="The strange characters on the front seem familiar to me. Were they used during the battle of immortal world? The meaning is [use controller]? "/> <字串 編號="70725" 文字="Use Lubo's controller"/> <字串 編號="70726" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="70727" 文字="Suddenly, another paragraph appears."/> <字串 編號="70728" 文字="[The defensive system has started. But most of mechanisms have been destroyed...There is not enough energy ore available and therefore it is unable to provide operation functions.]"/> <字串 編號="70729" 文字="It is quite possible that the lack of energy resulted in the continued operation failure. I might as well go back to [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*] and tell Lubo this result."/> <字串 編號="70730" 文字="When you use controller again. The same paragraph appears: [The defensive system has started. But most of mechanisms have been destroyed...There is not enough energy ore available and therefore it is unable to provide operation functions.]. Go back to [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*] and tell Lubo this result."/> <字串 編號="70731" 文字="You say that the controller can be used. What a amazing discovery! But you say that the lack of energy results in the continued operation failure. Hmm, let me think."/> <字串 編號="70732" 文字="Alas...It doesn't matter. Success always comes after failure. So we must find the source of the energy. This is your payment. Thanks your help."/> <字串 編號="70800" 文字="Now what we need is the energy to restart the ruins. According to the report from the Ocean Group of Investigation Team, they found that the [/c$2Winged Fish/c*]in [/c$2Sunken Ruins/c*] have scales which contain a form of highly explosive energy. If we can collect a large enough quantity of them, perhaps they can be used as the energy source we need."/> <字串 編號="70801" 文字="Because this old controller has obvious place to insert any energy into, I don't know where to put it. So I definitely think that we should try our lick with the scales of the [/c$2Winged Fish/c*]"/> <字串 編號="70802" 文字="Now I want you to go to [/c$2Sunken Ruins/c*]and defeat the [/c$2Winged Fish/c*]. Make sure you only collect the complete scales. I need/c$2 30/c* of them. Thank you very much."/> <字串 編號="70803" 文字="Now I want you to go to [/c$2Sunken Ruins/c*]and defeat the [/c$2Winged Fish/c*]. Make sure you only collect the complete scales. I need/c$2 30/c* of them. Thank you very much."/> <字串 編號="70804" 文字="It's amazing the way the scales of Crystal Angel Fish are glowing. I can feel an enormous surge of energy just by holding them. Strange. I will stick them onto the controller, it's worth a try."/> <字串 編號="70805" 文字="Cool, now the whole controller is glowing. It must have enough energy and has become a test radar."/> <字串 編號="70806" 文字="Wow, the radar shows that there is an excessively powerful energy reaction to the /c$2southeast/c* of our current position. Maybe important clues about the Yatiss are hiding there. I can't believe this. This is such a tremendous breakthrough in my research. Ha-ha, thank you so much"/> <字串 編號="70900" 文字="However, I asked my research assistant [Adams] to go to the southeast area to find the ruins of the Yatiss many days ago. He has not yet come back. I am beginning to get very worried about him."/> <字串 編號="70901" 文字="Young risk taker, could you please help me go to the southeast of the [/c$2Lost Region/c*] to find the source of the powerful energy shown on the radar and look for Adams for me."/> <字串 編號="70902" 文字="Ok!"/> <字串 編號="70903" 文字="Wait"/> <字串 編號="70904" 文字="Thanks. Please go to southeast of the [/c$2Lost Region/c*]to investigate the source of the powerful energy and tell my research assistant [Adams]to come back."/> <字串 編號="70905" 文字="Please go to southeast of the [/c$2Lost Region/c*]to investigate the source of the powerful energy and tell my research assistant [Adams]to come back. I am worried about his safety."/> <字串 編號="70906" 文字="Hicalu Ship 1 has totally stopped running. The strong energy wave that was affecting you has disappeared. Now, you find a pair of badly damaged leather gloves beside you. They seem to be part of the uniform of Investigation Association. Take them to Lubo in [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*] and let him have a look."/> <字串 編號="70907" 文字="Although Hicalu Ship 1 has stopped running, you do not have enough space in your bag to preserve critical items. What a pity. Quest failed."/> <字串 編號="70908" 文字="You've finally come back. Several hours ago, I saw the energy spot on radar suddenly disappear. Something strange must have happened. By the way, have you found Adams? "/> <字串 編號="70909" 文字="You tell Lubo of your fight against Hicalu Ship 1 and give him the pair of badly damaged leather gloves"/> <字串 編號="70910" 文字="Oh no! It is Adams' gloves. I won't believe that he has been..."/> <字串 編號="70911" 文字="Curses. If I could have fixed the radar earlier, I would not have let him go to that dangerous place. Why has this happened? We lost such an excellent young man. It's all my fault.(Sob! Sob!)"/> <字串 編號="70912" 文字="Lubo is sad. Tears fill his eyes"/> <字串 編號="70913" 文字="I refuse to carry on with my research without Adams! I am going to return to the Palm Base and grieve in peace!"/> <字串 編號="70914" 文字="But, the Habosen Ship that can take me back to Puqi Island has not yet arrived. Please help me go back to the [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]and ask the [/c$2Voyage Officer, Mafa,/c* why the ship has not yet come. I don't know of any other way that I can get back."/> <字串 編號="70915" 文字="I refuse to carry on with my research without Adams! But, the Habosen Ship that can take me back to Puqi Island has not yet arrived. Please help me go back to the [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]and ask the [/c$2Voyage Officer, Mafa,/c* why the ship has not yet come. I don't know how else I can get back."/> <字串 編號="70916" 文字="Sometimes exploring means risking one's life. But this is my fault for underestimating the underlying dangers and causing a young man, with bright future, to lose his life. I don't think I will ever continue my research, some things are just not as important as we think."/> <字串 編號="70917" 文字="Hi, nice to meet you. I am the Voyage Officer, Mafa, in charge of voyage schedule of the Investigation Association's ships to Puqi Island. What can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="70918" 文字="You are inquiring about the delay of the /c$2the Habosen Ship/c*? I think that it is strange."/> <字串 編號="71000" 文字="Actually, I have not received any information from the Habosen Ship for many days. Recently, I have heard that a lot of shipwrecks occurred around [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*] in west sea region."/> <字串 編號="71001" 文字="I think you get my drift. I am afraid that the Habosen Ship has been shipwrecked. I want you to go to [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*] and find the wreckage of the Habosen Ship."/> <字串 編號="71002" 文字="I am afraid that the Habosen Ship has been shipwrecked. I want you to go to [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*] and find the wreckage of the Habosen Ship."/> <字串 編號="71003" 文字="The wreckage of the ships"/> <字串 編號="71004" 文字="The wreckage of the ships. This must be the wreckage of the Habosen Ship."/> <字串 編號="71005" 文字="The wreckage of the Habosen Ship"/> <字串 編號="71006" 文字="You have collected enough evidence to prove that the [the Habosen Ship]has sunk. Go back and tell this bad news to the /c$2Voyage Officer, Mafa,/c* at [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]"/> <字串 編號="71007" 文字="What! You say that the Habosen Ship has sunk. Yes, according to the evidence, what you say must be true."/> <字串 編號="71008" 文字="But we at least should try to carry out a rescue mission. I believe that there may be survivors in the area of [/c$2Quiet Ocean/c*] and [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]. If we do not go to rescue them now, they will surely die."/> <字串 編號="71009" 文字="Please buy the [/c$2Aid Sirup/c*]from /c$2Charge Nurse/c* at [/c$2Palm Base/c*]. When you find victims, give them some of the Aid Sirup and get them out of the water."/> <字串 編號="71010" 文字="After all survivors have been rescued, kill all of the Monsters nearby. So that our rescue army can get to wreck scene to carry out the rescue."/> <字串 編號="71011" 文字="Although it sounds complicated, I will write the details in your /c$2Quest Log/c*. When you have no idea about what to do next, open it to check. Please hurry up. Those survivors are waiting for you to rescue them."/> <字串 編號="71012" 文字="The thing we must do right now is to rescue all of the survivors of this shipwreck. I believe they are now in the area of [/c$2Quiet Ocean/c*]and [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]. If we don't act fast, they will surely die."/> <字串 編號="71013" 文字="Hi, Young risk taker, do you want to buy [/c$2Aid Sirup/c*]? Five bottles of it cost you/c$2 1000/c* gold."/> <字串 編號="71014" 文字="Five bottles, please."/> <字串 編號="71015" 文字="No, thanks."/> <字串 編號="71016" 文字="Oh no! I don't have enough gold to pay so I can't buy the [/c$2Aid Sirup/c*]"/> <字串 編號="71017" 文字="So cold. I want to sleep."/> <字串 編號="71018" 文字="I don't want to die. Help"/> <字串 編號="71019" 文字="Please help me. Or I will die."/> <字串 編號="71020" 文字="Let them drink [Aid Sirup]"/> <字串 編號="71021" 文字="You did nothing to save me."/> <字串 編號="71022" 文字="Ah, I feel warmer now. You said there will be someone to save me. Is that true! Great! Thanks!"/> <字串 編號="71023" 文字="I feel much better now. You said there will be someone to save me. Is that true! Great! Thanks!"/> <字串 編號="71024" 文字="Thanks. I fell much better now. Nobody thought that the Habosen Ship could ever sink, as it was so advanced. But we all heard demonic laughter at the very moment that the thunder and fire ball hit the Habosen Ship. Please go back to Palm Base and report this news. What could it mean?"/> <字串 編號="71025" 文字="Now it's time to complete your next quest. Defeat/c$2 50/c* [/c$2Evil Fish/c*]in [/c$2Quiet Ocean/c*] to make it easier for the rescue team to proceed."/> <字串 編號="71026" 文字="Now it's time to complete your next quest. Defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Death Sailor/c*]in [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]to make it easier for the rescue team to proceed."/> <字串 編號="71027" 文字="You have completed all of the rescue work. Now go back to [/c$2Shining Coast/c*] and report to /c$2Voyage Officer, Mafa,/c*"/> <字串 編號="71028" 文字="Thanks for completing the rescue work for the Investigation Association. Luckily, this shipwreck did not produce serious loss of life. The sea-god must have been protecting those survivors. I have informed the Association to send ships so the survivors can return home at last."/> <字串 編號="71029" 文字="The Premier [Shanell] of Puqi Island has entrusted me to give you payment, to thank your help. Good for you, Young risk taker."/> <字串 編號="71030" 文字="Thanks"/> <字串 編號="71100" 文字="Now, the rescue work has come to an end. Through our investigation, the reason why the Habosen Ship sank seems to be due to the attack from unknown Monsters"/> <字串 編號="71101" 文字="We don't know why the Monsters attacked the Habosen Ship. It must related to the large quantity of antiques from the ruins of /c$2the Yatiss/c* onboard. The Monsters may have wanted to steal them or quite simply do not want them to fall into human hands. But this is only a guess. Nobody knows the real answer. It is most perplexing!"/> <字串 編號="71102" 文字="Lubo gave the Association an ancient radar. The radar shows there is a powerful source of energy in the depths of /c$2Coral Vale/c*. This may represent the ruins of the Yatiss culture. Theoretically, this is where the Habosen Ship sank. "/> <字串 編號="71103" 文字="Premier Shanell want you to go to inside the /c$2the Habosen Ship/c* on behalf of the Association and prevent the Monsters from stealing the Yatiss relics. Are you willing to help us?"/> <字串 編號="71104" 文字="It must be a plot. I will help you."/> <字串 編號="71105" 文字="None of my business."/> <字串 編號="71106" 文字="You are the real fighter. Now please take your companion and go inside the [/c$2Evil Ship/c*]"/> <字串 編號="71107" 文字="Stupid low-level Angel, you will regret your ignorance. I'll make sure of it!"/> <字串 編號="71108" 文字="Mamen, the Eternal Emperor of the Yatiss, will not allow you lesser beings to destroy me. Angel, your fate will be sunk like this ship, ha-ha-ha"/> <字串 編號="71109" 文字="If you sing before breakfast, you will cry before night. My loyal subordinate Sallen will protect the Yatiss in my place. We prefer to destroy it than to let you possess it."/> <字串 編號="71110" 文字="It's gonna be a good day. Young risk taker, are you ready to explore this wide blue ocean. I am the Premier Shanell of Palm Base on Puqi Island."/> <字串 編號="71111" 文字="Brave Young risk taker, I have heard your brave deeds. I am sad about the shipwreck of the Habosen Ship. Nobody expected that the Emperor of the Yatiss would be such a crazy devil."/> <字串 編號="71112" 文字="Thanks to you, all of the Yatiss relics on the Habosen Ship have been brought back safely. If we can unravel the mystery behind them, it will be a great help to our research. And it may even help us to discover new technology."/> <字串 編號="71113" 文字="As for the devils you mentioned, we will appeal to all of our members and leaders of four factions in the Garden of Eden to join forces to defeat them."/> <字串 編號="71114" 文字="I will give you the Top Honor Award of our Exploration Assoc for your great contribution. Your deeds will be recorded in our almanac."/> <字串 編號="71115" 文字="I hope you can experience more adventures and help more people. Go, young risk taker/c$2 %1 /c*!A wonderful world is waiting for you."/> <字串 編號="71116" 文字="Go, young risk taker!A wonderful world is waiting for you."/> <字串 編號="71200" 文字="Hey, you dare to pretend to not see me. Help me out of here."/> <字串 編號="71201" 文字="Hey, you dare to pretend to not see me. Help me out of here."/> <字串 編號="71202" 文字="Are you Kateman"/> <字串 編號="71203" 文字="Why who wants to know?."/> <字串 編號="71204" 文字="Aaahh! You have done nothing to help me!"/> <字串 編號="71205" 文字="Yes, I am Kateman. You'd better get me out of here."/> <字串 編號="71206" 文字="It is Kere who asked me to find you."/> <字串 編號="71207" 文字="Why do you care?"/> <字串 編號="71208" 文字="It is him who sent you here not me. You have been well paid, right? Being rich makes life much more convenient."/> <字串 編號="71209" 文字="But I have found out that you are really good at it. So I have decided not to leave here with you until you have defeated/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Scale Soldiers/c*]."/> <字串 編號="71210" 文字="Ok, it's a deal!"/> <字串 編號="71211" 文字="Don't push your luck"/> <字串 編號="71212" 文字="Hurry up. You'd better defeat the/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Scale Soldiers/c*] on the [/c$2Evil Ship/c*] and teach them a lesson. They bullied me something rotten."/> <字串 編號="71213" 文字="Why are you still standing here and wasting time. Hurry up, go to defeat the/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Scale Soldiers/c*] on the [/c$2Evil Ship/c*] and teach them a lesson. They bullied me something rotten."/> <字串 編號="71214" 文字="Cool. I suppose I should say thank you for helping me to get my revenge on those vile fish men. But I won't! In fact I think I will make myself the hero of the story when I retell it!"/> <字串 編號="71215" 文字="Now I will go back onshore. When I will tell everybody of my heroic ordeals I will be surrounded by many hot girls. Give me the [/c$2Ring of Angel Wings/c*]"/> <字串 編號="71216" 文字="What. You don't have the /c$2Ring of Angel Wings/c*? What use are you?"/> <字串 編號="71217" 文字="Wow, you have carried the [Ring of Angel Wings] with you. Great! Give it to me now!"/> <字串 編號="71218" 文字="I'm off now. Goodbye."/> <字串 編號="71219" 文字="You say that Kateman is well? Gee, people like him tend to live for a very long time. If only to annoy us!"/> <字串 編號="71220" 文字="When I have finished my work and go back to the Garden of Eden, I will hold a decent funeral for Kenny. Also, I will give you a huge bonus to say thank you for saving Kateman. "/> <字串 編號="71221" 文字="On these hot summer days, the happiest thing for me to do is to sit under a parasol, drinking iced coffee and watching all the beautiful girls go by."/> <字串 編號="71300" 文字="People of my age have very little to be concerned about. But I can't forget what had happened twenty years ago."/> <字串 編號="71301" 文字="Please tell me your past."/> <字串 編號="71302" 文字="Don't live in your past. Take care."/> <字串 編號="71303" 文字="You are too young to understand the meaning of memory. When someday your level has reached/c$2 90 /c*, you should find some friends to share it."/> <字串 編號="71304" 文字="Many villagers think that I am boasting. But I was indeed a member of [Shark Bugle]which was the strongest pirate gang at that time. Our life was treasure hunting, fighting and drinking. We did all kinds of bad things."/> <字串 編號="71305" 文字="Maybe we were punished for our misbehavior, because our ship met with an unprecedented storm the likes of which had never been seen before. All of my crew died except for me. I was saved."/> <字串 編號="71306" 文字="From now on, I try to lead a virtuous life. I make my living through fishing. I haven't seen any other members of the [Shark Bugle]in 20 years. They possibly have all died now."/> <字串 編號="71307" 文字="Do you miss them?"/> <字串 編號="71308" 文字="Thanks for sharing your story."/> <字串 編號="71309" 文字="No, I don't miss them. I just hope they behave well after they died. Because some fishermen said that they often saw some spirits like [Shark Bugle] shouting at them."/> <字串 編號="71310" 文字="It is quite possible the sinking of the Habosen Ship has made these spirits ready to cause more trouble. In that case, there must be someone to prevent them."/> <字串 編號="71311" 文字="Let me go to prevent them from causing trouble."/> <字串 編號="71312" 文字="Sorry that's not my department! Bye."/> <字串 編號="71313" 文字="I have not seen such a brave Young risk taker like you for such a long time You remind me of my youth. It is said many Evil Pirate Spirits are hiding inside the [/c$2Evil Ship/c*]. Although I can't prove whether they are my friends or not, I can't pretend not to know anything either. So could you please help me."/> <字串 編號="71314" 文字=" It is said many Evil Pirate Spirits are hiding inside the [/c$2Evil Ship/c*]. Although I can't prove whether they are my friends or not, I can't pretend not to know anything either. So could you please help me."/> <字串 編號="71315" 文字="You said another type of shark bugle is stuck on the collars of those spirits? You have done a good thing. At least they have not been making the same mistakes as they did when they were alive."/> <字串 編號="71316" 文字="Although I want to give you treasure to say thank you, I have only carried gold with me. So just take it. You deserve it."/> <字串 編號="71317" 文字="I am as peaceful as this quiet sea. Thanks for you relieving me and my friends, brave Young risk taker. "/> <字串 編號="71400" 文字="Humans are taking over the sea. It is not only destroying the environment, but also destroying the balance between tribes in the ocean. Just like the old saying misfortunes never come alone!"/> <字串 編號="71401" 文字="What can I do for you?"/> <字串 編號="71402" 文字="Bye"/> <字串 編號="71403" 文字="You'd better focus on upgrading your level. Human. What can you do with level lower than/c$2 90 /c*"/> <字串 編號="71404" 文字="You may be a human. But you look reliable. So I will tell you difficulties facing our tribe. Since the humans set up base on Puqi Island, great changes have happened to the marine ecology. Our lives have become difficult. The tribe of fish men has divided into two parties because of all of the controversy."/> <字串 編號="71405" 文字="[Kassispo],the leader of war party goes in for fighting back. The Mermans, however, do not share the same viewpoint of attacking the humans to save the other creatures. Kassispo has built a base with his followers and leads the Fishmen to continually attack the humans. Which has resulted in the hatred between the humans and all of the Marine Tribes. It embarrasses Mermaids like us who advocate peace."/> <字串 編號="71406" 文字="It is hard to understand why the Mermans have become so irritable and crazy. I think defeating their leader [Kassispo] can solve this problem for the time being."/> <字串 編號="71407" 文字="Let me do this."/> <字串 編號="71408" 文字="I will go first"/> <字串 編號="71409" 文字="I never thought that someday we would need a human to help us. It is so embarrassing. It is said that [Kassispo]is hiding inside the [/c$2Evil Ship/c*].He is riding on one of the [/c$2Linberd Knights/c*]. You will have to check them one by one to find him."/> <字串 編號="71410" 文字="If you defeat him, please come back and inform me. Thanks"/> <字串 編號="71411" 文字="You have defeated Kassispo. That's great. ...What? You said he is not a merman, but something much more sinister........"/> <字串 編號="71412" 文字="Could the power from Hell have stirred up the hatred between the humans and the Marine Tribes. But why would they benefit from the fight between them. If it is real, that is too terrible. I must inform the Elder in village."/> <字串 編號="71413" 文字="Thank you, human. Please accept this reward. I have to report the news of the Demon's invasion as soon as possible."/> <字串 編號="71414" 文字="The devils from hell are far too vile, stirring up a war between the humans and the Marine Tribes. Just as way of getting rid of us all. If we do not think out a way to stop them, our world will surely come to an end."/> <字串 編號="71500" 文字="...What can I do...the fruit of my painstaking labor.......the work from my whole lifetime has been totally destroyed......who can help me?........."/> <字串 編號="71501" 文字="Maybe I can help you."/> <字串 編號="71502" 文字="Please stop moaning"/> <字串 編號="71503" 文字="Thanks for your kindness. But I don't think a young risk taker with level lower than/c$2 90/c* can solve my crisis."/> <字串 編號="71504" 文字="You can really help me? Ok, please listen to me. I planned to run a grocery store on Puqi Island. But I was unexpectedly held at sword point by a bunch of demonized Octopus. They were being led by a Pirate Spirit. And they stole everything, all my money, all my vegetables even my sign!"/> <字串 編號="71505" 文字="Now I have lost everything. But I spent all of my savings and borrowed money from my friends and the Bank of the Garden of Eden. How can I get home? And how do I tell everyone?"/> <字串 編號="71506" 文字="If you can help, I beg you to find [/c$2Blade Octopus/c*]and recapture my goods. I have heard at that moment the Spirit Captain order his subordinates to carry the goods back to the [/c$2Evil Ship/c*]. You may find them there. Those goods are my last hope. Please help me."/> <字串 編號="71507" 文字="I beg you, help me to find the [/c$2Blade Octopus/c*] on the [/c$2Evil Ship/c*]and recapture my goods. They are my last hope."/> <字串 編號="71508" 文字="Hurrah, my goods have come back to me. My life once again has hope in it!"/> <字串 編號="71509" 文字="The people that live on this island refused to help me, but you gave me the most unselfish help. Thanks very much. I had prepared some reserve funds for my goods, I would like to give them to you as your reward. I will be more careful from now on."/> <字串 編號="71510" 文字="If I sell all of my goods, my debts can be settled. I can start from the beginning, which is attributed to you, my benefactor."/> <字串 編號="71600" 文字="Why are you staring at me. Get out of my way! Stop blocking my way!"/> <字串 編號="71601" 文字="Kenny has died. Do you understand?"/> <字串 編號="71602" 文字="I'm not going to pay you any attention"/> <字串 編號="71603" 文字="Don't give yourself airs! Yokel, go back to the farm to work."/> <字串 編號="71604" 文字="What, that pauper has died. I suppose since he was so poor, living would have become too difficult for him. Death is the best thing that could have happened to him."/> <字串 編號="71605" 文字="Now he has died. His spirit may possibly get chance to visit some other places and play with his mermaid sister. Ha-ha, I couldn't care less!"/> <字串 編號="71606" 文字="You recall that there is indeed a Merman Village at the bottom of sea. Maybe Kenny's spirit has gone there. How about taking the time to find out? Although it is quite incredible."/> <字串 編號="71607" 文字="It is quite possible that his death gives his spirit a chance to visit some other places and play with his Mermaid sister. Ha-ha-ha, I am laughing myself silly. Death is better than living for that poor old fool. Ha-ha-ha, Ah! I am crying from laughing too much!"/> <字串 編號="71608" 文字="You recall that there is indeed a Merman Village at the bottom of sea. Maybe Kenny's spirit has gone there. How about taking the time to find out? Although it is quite incredible."/> <字串 編號="71609" 文字="Ha-ha-ha, I have laughed so much that I feel my sides have split－－－－－－I am too weak to use the Ring of Angel Wings－－－－－－－－－ha-ha-ha－－－－－－－－－－－Who can help me－－－－－－－－－－－－－－?????"/> <字串 編號="71610" 文字="Messenger from Heaven, sea is the origin of all life in the Garden of Eden. So you have to protect from all of the Devils."/> <字串 編號="71611" 文字="Since the human's huge ship had sunk, the wailing cries of the spirits has begun to be echo over the whole sea region. It makes me feel so sad. "/> <字串 編號="71612" 文字="Have you ever seen Kenny?"/> <字串 編號="71613" 文字="I think I'd better leave you alone."/> <字串 編號="71614" 文字="Oh, Kenny, he's my new friend. He is not like other spirits shouting the whole time. He just likes to keep me company. I like him."/> <字串 編號="71615" 文字="Do you think that he can be revived?"/> <字串 編號="71616" 文字="Is that so? Alright, I leave you alone..."/> <字串 編號="71617" 文字="It is actually possible. Generally speaking, it is hard for a human's spirit to act according to their will. But Kenny's spirit managed to find the Merman Village all by itself. Refusing to go to heaven or fall into hell, which may show that his spirit is full vivid life energy."/> <字串 編號="71618" 文字="Our Merman Tribe is the protector of the Marine Tribes. So if you can find the lost holy relic [/c$2Red Shell/c*] of our tribe, I can bring Kenny back to life."/> <字串 編號="71619" 文字="I want to find the Red Shell for you."/> <字串 編號="71620" 文字="I see. Good bye."/> <字串 編號="71621" 文字="Alas, Red Shell was been stolen by the Machine Solider [Hicalu Machine] who guards the [/c$2Lost Region/c*]a long, long time ago. We couldn't recapture it because he was too powerful to be defeated. If you want the Red Shell to revive Kenny, the only way is to beat the Hicalu Machine and recapture the holy relic."/> <字串 編號="71622" 文字="You find the [/c$2Red Shell/c*], but have not enough space in your bag to carry it."/> <字串 編號="71623" 文字="You have recaptured the holy relic [/c$2Red Shell/c*]of the Mermaid Tribe. Take it back to Blue Sea and find Herst."/> <字串 編號="71624" 文字="Oh, my. You have really recaptured the holy relic [/c$2Red Shell/c*]. Messenger from Heaven is essentially omniscience. Please give it to me."/> <字串 編號="71625" 文字="As Herst is whispers, a young spirit comes closer and closer. Herst is smiling as she bids him goodbye, and then begins to cast. The young spirit is absorbed into Shell."/> <字串 編號="71626" 文字="Now, Kenny 's spirit is in the Shell. You must take it to the Mermaid Altar in [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*]before/c$2 30minutes/c* is up. Kenny will come back from the dead."/> <字串 編號="71627" 文字="Please take the Shell, with Kenny's spirit in it, to Mermaid Altar in [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*]before/c$2 30minutes/c* is up, to revive Kenny. There is no time to waste. Hurry up."/> <字串 編號="71628" 文字="After Kenny is brought back to life make sure he remembers me and still comes to visit. Other Mermans may feel that to live one's life alone is a magical feeling but I get bored and lonely. So please remind him for me."/> <字串 編號="71629" 文字="The altar looks very mystic. I wonder who built it?"/> <字串 編號="71630" 文字="The altar looks mystic. It must the Mermaid altar that Herst mentioned."/> <字串 編號="71631" 文字="Place the Shell on the altar."/> <字串 編號="71632" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="71633" 文字="Suddenly the surroundings are filled with a ominous glow and the Shell flies up into the air. I can see the shape of it changing into that of a man. But it is zooming around the room like a vibrant flashing star. How magical!"/> <字串 編號="71634" 文字="If Herst was right, then Kenny must have been brought back to life. I'd better go to [/c$2Puqi Village/c*] and tell Kere the good news"/> <字串 編號="71635" 文字="The Mermaid altar looks very mystic."/> <字串 編號="71636" 文字="You know what? Kenny is still alive. He just now ran into me and told me he had been spending his time away playing under the sea with beautiful Mermaids. Why did you say he had died?"/> <字串 編號="71637" 文字="You tell the whole story to Kere"/> <字串 編號="71638" 文字="Is it a fairy tale? You swear you are not lying to me. But I don't think you are the type to tell lies. Whatever. Since Kenny is back, I needn't spend my money on his funeral. I have decided to give the money to you as a reward instead."/> <字串 編號="71639" 文字="That fat Kateman is in hospital due to spasms in his sides. Kenny may be playing in the sand on the beach. But I think I am the happiest of all, as I sit under this parasol, drinking iced coffee and watching beautiful girls go by!"/> <字串 編號="71700" 文字="Hi, Young risk taker, I am the Scholar Newton dedicated to studying high-tech in Ancient Cultures. Now I am here with Investigation Association to thoroughly study the Yatiss culture. But what a pity that the Habosen Ship sank and our study has been stopped for a while."/> <字串 編號="71701" 文字="Can I be your assistant?"/> <字串 編號="71702" 文字="Do you know Nilsson?"/> <字串 編號="71703" 文字="Failure is the mother of success. Cheer up."/> <字串 編號="71704" 文字="I would welcome you if your level only reached above/c$2 90 /c*"/> <字串 編號="71705" 文字="Yes I know him. Have you met him? We used to study at the same college. Although we have developed different research fields and been apart for many years, we still have regular meetings and exchange our viewpoints to expand our knowledge."/> <字串 編號="71706" 文字="If you will, I certainly agree. But I need an experienced young risk taker to be my assistant. They need to be brave enough to explore deep into dangerous regions. Are you sure fully understand what I mean?"/> <字串 編號="71707" 文字="Yes"/> <字串 編號="71708" 文字="No, I haven't"/> <字串 編號="71709" 文字="Ok, let's make it simple. According to the records in ancient books, the Yatiss possessed advanced mechanical sciences and technology. But the war in immortal world destroyed and buried it at the bottom of sea. No one has ever verified its existence beyond rumor."/> <字串 編號="71710" 文字="Speaking frankly, I believe that you know my aim, the Habosen Ship was used to find the ruins of the Yatiss' culture. But the ship was sunk. We must start from the beginning. I need you to find some professional young risk takers to dive down into the sea and reach the [/c$2Lost Region/c*]at the bottom of it."/> <字串 編號="71711" 文字="The records in the book I am carrying state that a Robot called [/c$2Hicalu Ship 1/c*] represented the most advanced high-tech level at that time and was also lost within the [/c$2Lost Region/c*]. If you find him, please take his host core and body parts back for me. I will give you a rich reward. Please try your best."/> <字串 編號="71712" 文字="The records in the book I am carrying state that a Robot called [/c$2Hicalu Ship 1/c*] represented the most advanced high-tech level at that time and was also lost within the [/c$2Lost Region/c*]. If you find him, please take his host core and body parts back for me. I will give you a rich reward. Please try your best."/> <字串 編號="71713" 文字="But you must be very careful, because I can't assure you whether or not he possesses any self-defense abilities. Although no any power system can still work after thousands of years in theory... But the Yatiss's science and technological level is so hard to guess at by our modern standards. So, take care of yourself."/> <字串 編號="71714" 文字="What are you talking about? Hicalu Ship 1 can still work and possess sound self-defensive ability. It is amazing!"/> <字串 編號="71715" 文字="You had to destroy Hicalu Ship 1 in order to complete the task I gave you. Well, it is pity. But I am afraid that I could not have carried on with my research if you hadn't."/> <字串 編號="71716" 文字="Ah! I guess it doesn't really matter. You contribution and hard work are beyond doubt. Our study can be carried on with. Here is the payment I promised. Please accept it. Thanks for your help."/> <字串 編號="71717" 文字="Is it possible that Gods and devils were jealous of the Yatiss' hi-tech and destroyed it? Suppose that Yatiss had not been destroyed, what the world have become?"/> <字串 編號="71800" 文字="Save quest"/> <字串 編號="71900" 文字="Save quest"/> <字串 編號="72000" 文字="My neighbor once told me that Puqi Island was so picturesque and it's beach is without compare. So I wanted to make full use of my rare vacation time and took my family here by ship. But, a giant cargo ship called Ya-something-sen sank around here several days ago. Now the whole island is heavily-guarded. The beach is now dominated by turtles and crabs. So we can't go ashore to visit. I am really disappointed. "/> <字串 編號="72001" 文字="I can weed out the beach for you."/> <字串 編號="72002" 文字="I will go to deal with it now, goodbye."/> <字串 編號="72003" 文字="Really, you are so kind. I believe that all visitors here will be happier without those crabs on beach. Actually, you should only have to drive away 35 [/c$2Puqi Turtle/c*]s from [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]as the others will just follow."/> <字串 編號="72004" 文字="I think you only have to drive away 35 [/c$2Puqi Turtles/c*]s from [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]the others will just follow. Then everyone will not be disturbed when sunbathing. It all depends on you."/> <字串 編號="72005" 文字="Young risk taker, welcome back. The number of turtles has been reduced so much I can actually see the sand now. It is all thanks to you."/> <字串 編號="72006" 文字="But, these crabs have become more aggressive. I think you possibly need drive away at least 35 [/c$2Color Crab/c*]s from Gold Beach. Or they will attack us. Please help us again."/> <字串 編號="72007" 文字="I think you possibly need drive away at least 35 [/c$2Color Crab/c*]s from Gold Beach. Or they will attack us."/> <字串 編號="72008" 文字="You may look young but you are certainly very reliable. Now those crabs have been evacuated from beach. We don't have to worry about them attacking anymore."/> <字串 編號="72009" 文字="Let me give you some money for your trouble. Thanks your help. Now I can indulge myself in the beauty of Puqi Island."/> <字串 編號="72100" 文字="Thanks to you, I can enjoy the sandy beach, the sea and the sunshine again with all of the other tourists. But just now I found out that my impatient innocent son [Stany] has slipped away to the other side of the beach, the [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]. What a naughty boy! Could you please help me again? I want to remind him that he came here to spend the holiday with his parents!"/> <字串 編號="72101" 文字="I will go do that now!"/> <字串 編號="72102" 文字="Sorry I have no time..."/> <字串 編號="72103" 文字="At present, Adventurers who are willing to do anything, just like you, are rare! So please go instead of me to the [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]to ask my playboy son [/c$2Stany/c*]not to walk off with his girlfriends, but come back to be with his parents!"/> <字串 編號="72104" 文字="We meet again, great Adventurer! My playboy son [/c$2Stany/c*] is sure to gone to cozy with his girlfriend at [/c$2Shining Coast/c*] where there are less visitors. Please help me call him back and tell him that his father is looking for him!"/> <字串 編號="72105" 文字="Hey! You are the sort of man who still can find time to play, just like me! That's good~ So smart!"/> <字串 編號="72106" 文字="Woo woo! Hey there chickie babe, would you like to join us swimming and surfing? I'm good at playing! In the water that is! I will teach you all of my smooth moves! "/> <字串 編號="72107" 文字="Your father is looking for you..."/> <字串 編號="72108" 文字="Have a good time. I have to go now"/> <字串 編號="72109" 文字="Oh, You are sent by my father!"/> <字串 編號="72200" 文字="I can not go back with you now! Because the love necklaces of me and Wendy was have stolen by the vile Pirates. I won't leave here until I find it!"/> <字串 編號="72201" 文字="I will go to find it for you!"/> <字串 編號="72202" 文字="Well that's up to you. Goodbye"/> <字串 編號="72203" 文字="You will search for it for me? Great! The more help I get the better the possibility of getting it back! I think the/c$2 Pirate/c* were wandering around the [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]and are wearing our love necklaces. Please beat up as many as you can and I'm sure you can find it!"/> <字串 編號="72204" 文字="Do you want to find it for me? But your look like you will be beaten by the Pirates very soon! I think I will do it myself unless your level reaches/c$2 Lvl60/c* or higher than that."/> <字串 編號="72205" 文字="The/c$2 Pirates/c* were wandering around the [/c$2Shining Coast/c*] and the /c$2the Pirate leader/c* is wearing our love necklaces. Please beat up as many as you can and I'm sure we will find it!"/> <字串 編號="72206" 文字="I found your necklace!"/> <字串 編號="72207" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="72208" 文字="Well done! I made it for Wendy when we first started dating. Look! Our names are carved on it!"/> <字串 編號="72209" 文字="Thank you so much for helping us to find the necklace. Now, we can carry on enjoying our games!"/> <字串 編號="72300" 文字="Eh? Do you really want me to go back to my father? I don't think so! Gold Beach is so crowded that it's too hard to play on. It's boring just lying around turning red. I like to play as much as I can! I have decided that I will ask you call my friend [Kere]to come here to play with us. He is only a child but he loves to play in the sea. You will get a huge reward if you can just do this trivial thing for me."/> <字串 編號="72301" 文字="What? Where is he?"/> <字串 編號="72302" 文字="No. I think you'd better go back right now..."/> <字串 編號="72303" 文字="Awww, no! Don't listen to my pig headed father. Go to Coast Coffee House in [/c$2Puqi Village/c*] and invite my friend, [/c$2Kere/c*] to join us!"/> <字串 編號="72304" 文字="Don't be so dull! It can't hurt to play just for a little while~"/> <字串 編號="72305" 文字="Hey, you are still playing water! Never mind that. Don't forget to go to Coast Coffee House in [/c$2Puqi Village/c*] to call my friend [/c$2Kere/c*] to come here!"/> <字串 編號="72306" 文字="Ah~it's too hot! This sun is too strong for our bodies... It's a better decision to stay in a coffee shop, drinking something cold and watching the beautiful girls in bikinis go by! I'm so smart!"/> <字串 編號="72307" 文字="Do you know Stany?"/> <字串 編號="72308" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="72309" 文字="You have been sent by Stany to give me a message~ But it's so hot out! You must be very tired. Take this money to buy some cold juice, keep the change!"/> <字串 編號="72400" 文字="Did you say Stany invited me to the Shining Coast to play just now? It's a pity that I don't want to go out today because of the heat. Tell him to pick another day. I think your Skills is ok. Do you want to do something for me and get some extra money?"/> <字串 編號="72401" 文字="What do you need?"/> <字串 編號="72402" 文字="I'm sorry I have no time..."/> <字串 編號="72403" 文字="Why are so many riskers willing to give up such good tasks? Your task is just to go anywhere to work aimlessly...Forget it. Think, tell me about it and come back any time But please pass on my apologies, I'm just not in the mood to play with Stany today."/> <字串 編號="72404" 文字="Before this vacation, I bought a large diamond ring [Eden's Light] with the purpose of enticing all the pretty girls. But ,accidentally I threw it in the garbage!... I'm such an idiot!"/> <字串 編號="72405" 文字="I have enough money to replace it, but the man who deals in the diamond business lives in Puqi. He sells one of a kind handcrafted products. What should I do now?"/> <字串 編號="72406" 文字="Now, the only thing I can do is to look in the rubbish heap to find the [/c$2Eden's Light/c*]. Do you want to have a try? I will give you a large sum of money if you do. I don't like to get dirty if I can pay someone else to!"/> <字串 編號="72407" 文字="Sure I'll do it!"/> <字串 編號="72408" 文字="Who do you think you are? Do it yourself!"/> <字串 編號="72409" 文字="The beautiful waitress in the coffee room had said that the rubbish has been sent to the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]to be deserted in the sea area. Maybe you can find it. Good luck."/> <字串 編號="72410" 文字="The beautiful waitress in the coffee room says that the rubbish has been sent to the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*] to be deserted in the sea area. Maybe you can find it. You are the best bodyguard I have ever seen. I believe this kind of diving will be easy for you!"/> <字串 編號="72411" 文字="The huge garbage pile and the filthy sea water make you angry about the young man's ignorance."/> <字串 編號="72412" 文字="I want to know if the diamond ring is in it."/> <字串 編號="72413" 文字="Aaaww! It smells terrible. I give up!"/> <字串 編號="72414" 文字="You put out your trembling hands to reluctantly dig through the rubbish heap. But nothing can be found..."/> <字串 編號="72415" 文字="You have found the bright diamond ring. It must be Kere's [/c$2Eden's Light/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="72416" 文字="Yes! It's my [Eden's Light]! But, it is too dirty and smelly, it's not worthy to be kept. I will give it to the waitress at the coffee shop and send my chamberlain to buy a larger one and ask the "Eden Express" to send it to me!"/> <字串 編號="72417" 文字="You did a lot to get this job done. I will pay you extra. Don't be shy, just take it!"/> <字串 編號="72500" 文字="By the way, I am looking for a suitable young Risk Taker to do a job. I think you are the most suitable candidate. Are you interested? The reward of it will be more than that of looking for the ring."/> <字串 編號="72501" 文字="Keep talking!"/> <字串 編號="72502" 文字="I want to think it over..."/> <字串 編號="72503" 文字="We co-operated well last time~ and you got what you deserved. Why do you have to think it over? But if you change your mind, you can come back at anytime. I will give you the priority to take the job."/> <字串 編號="72504" 文字="Have you heard the news? Tell me about the sinking of [Habosen Ship]? Driven by our curiosity and courage, I slipped into Habosen Ship with [Kateman] and [Kenny],Stany's close friends, when the ship was on shore for supplies...The current condition is as you see that the ship has sunk and they lost."/> <字串 編號="72505" 文字="They have probably died. But I think we should still do something for them as they were our friends. For example to find their bodies and bury them. You dove into the Blue Sea to find my [Eden's Light]. So I believe you can find the place the ship sank and dive down to find them."/> <字串 編號="72506" 文字="No problem! I got it!"/> <字串 編號="72507" 文字="Too dangerous. I refuse!"/> <字串 編號="72508" 文字="The fishermen in Puqi Village said that the place that the Habosen Ship sank is a dangerous area of the sea called the [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*]. Please go there to find the wreck. If you find something belongs to [Kateman] or [Kenny] or their...bodies, please bring them back to me! I sincerely hope that you can help me. Because they have been my friends for more than ten years..."/> <字串 編號="72509" 文字="The fishermen in Puqi Village said that the place that the Habosen Ship sank is the dangerous area of the sea the [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*]. Please go there to search through debris. If you find something belongs to [Kateman] or [Kenny] or their...bodies, please try your best to bring them back to me! "/> <字串 編號="72510" 文字="In front of you there is a pile of ship debris...battered and miserable. They did not seem to have run up against a submerged rock or met a storm, but appeared to have suffer a strong impact from outside and then broke. There is also an unknown body beside the debris."/> <字串 編號="72511" 文字="On the bodies clothes is a name patch, that seems to say [Kenny] unclearly...... and you can see a very special package is in his arms."/> <字串 編號="72512" 文字="Take it and have a look"/> <字串 編號="72513" 文字="Leave it alone..."/> <字串 編號="72514" 文字="Through the Angel's ability, you can see that the package is a diary wrapped in waterproof paper. On the last page of the diary, is written in scratches, something like [Kateman was catched by the Ghost Pirates!]"/> <字串 編號="72515" 文字="It seems that Kenny is no longer. But Kateman may be still alive somewhere. We'd better tell Kere in [/c$2Puqi Village/c*]what we have found."/> <字串 編號="72516" 文字="In front of you there is a pile of ship debris...battered and miserable. They did not seem to have run up against a submerged rock or met a storm, but appeared to have suffer a strong impact from outside and then broke. There is also an unknown body beside the debris. It seems that Kenny is no longer. But Kateman may be still alive somewhere. We'd better tell Kere in [/c$2Puqi Village/c*]what we have found."/> <字串 編號="72517" 文字="There is bad news for you..."/> <字串 編號="72518" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="72519" 文字="Oh...no! Kenny was so young and full of life. Although he was very poor he was very happy...And that guy Kateman is still alive! It's just so unfair－－!"/> <字串 編號="72520" 文字="Wu...... by appointment, I prayed for your help so you have to find Kateman......"/> <字串 編號="72600" 文字="Although Kateman is an argumentative guy I just can't leave him alone. The last part of Kenny's diary is written in the code known only to us. The Ghosts are murmuring about the [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]. I think that might be the name of the place where he is. Can you go to find any other clues?"/> <字串 編號="72601" 文字="I will be sure to finish the job completely!"/> <字串 編號="72602" 文字="I caught a cold. See a doctor first ..."/> <字串 編號="72603" 文字="Maybe the seawater is too cold for you? Do you need me to pay the charge to see a doctor? Please remember to call me when you feel better..."/> <字串 編號="72604" 文字="I can't find the location of the [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]! But it must be in a place that is deeper and more dangerous than the Raging Reefs! Please go to the seabed in that area and try to find anything clues about [Kateman] or...his body. If he is alive, please punch him squarely on the nose for me!"/> <字串 編號="72605" 文字="I can't find the location of the [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]! But it must be in a place that is deeper and more dangerous than the Raging Reefs! Please go to the seabed in that area and try to find anything clues about [Kateman] or...his body. If he is alive, please punch him squarely on the nose for me!"/> <字串 編號="72606" 文字="The debris of Habosen Shiphas sunk deeply. The frozen sea water lends a feeling of fear and the air is full of horror."/> <字串 編號="72607" 文字="In a sealed glass bottle, you find a letter written in a hurry bearing the signature Kateman?! Bring it to /c$2Kere/c* first..."/> <字串 編號="72608" 文字="Hurry up and take the letter to Kere in [/c$2Puqi Village/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="72609" 文字="What? Kateman was able to write a letter and put it in a bottle? It's so strange! Is he so lucky that he would not die even after falling into the sea?"/> <字串 編號="72610" 文字="Shall I hire more islanders who are good at diving to rescue Kateman from the blue water? That may be much more expensive than a diamond...... I don't know if it is worth it or not on such a guy!"/> <字串 編號="72611" 文字="By the way, you did a lot for me recently and I should say [Thank you] to you! I hardly ever say thank you to others usually. You are the special one! This is the reward you deserve and a some extra money. Please take it! You are You are welcome to join us later for the rescue action on the sea."/> <字串 編號="72700" 文字="I'm Kanlier, the leader of the Fighting Army directly under Iron Castle Exploration Assoc. Because we accidently fell out of contact with the Habosen Ship,the Army has ordered that the whole island is in top urgence.During this period, every Adventurer please act carefully. When you meet an emergency such as taking temporary refuge, examining and searching, please co-operate! "/> <字串 編號="72701" 文字="Is there anything I can do to help?"/> <字串 編號="72702" 文字="I will keep to the rules. See you!"/> <字串 編號="72703" 文字="Risker, are you willing to join in our action? Although non-members are not really allowed to work with the Army according to our rules. I can give you the right to be in charge of the public security on the island . "/> <字串 編號="72704" 文字="I'm very pleased to take it!"/> <字串 編號="72705" 文字="Erm, let me see..."/> <字串 編號="72706" 文字="I appreciate your sincerity, but according to your ability, I'm afraid you can't manage it! Practice more and come to work for the public security after your character level is up to/c$2 50 /c*."/> <字串 編號="72707" 文字="Great! The Army directly under the Exploration Assoc is in need of passionate Adventurers just like you! Let me introduce the work briefly!"/> <字串 編號="72708" 文字="After the Exploration Assoc. entered Puqi, some problems appeared between the local people on the island and us. They are hard to communicate with and insist that we are the invaders. They view us as hostile and believe that we desecrate their God. So they always attack the people in the outlands of Palm Base."/> <字串 編號="72709" 文字="We have excellent equipment, but our rivals are more familiar with the terrain and can appear and disappear mysteriously. Therefore, it is difficult for us to defend ourselves against them. What's more, because most of our Army is working on the rescue attempt, we lack workers. Those in command also believe that the natives are untraceable."/> <字串 編號="72710" 文字="Now, I will send you to [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]to expel 40 of the [/c$2Puqi Local/c*] so that they can not attack the Palm Base temporarily! Report to me directly after finishing it! If you have no questions take action now! Good luck!"/> <字串 編號="72711" 文字="Your task is to go to [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]to expel 40 of the [/c$2Puqi Local/c*] so that they can not attack the Palm Base temporarily! It's urgent! Please take action at once! Report to me directly after finishing it!"/> <字串 編號="72712" 文字="According to the sentinel from Observation tower, the nearby aborigines who were ready to attack us, have now withdrawn. You did a good job and will be rewarded!"/> <字串 編號="72713" 文字="But the braver Warriors, the [/c$2Puqi Warrior/c*] of the Puqi tribe have readied themselves to take the place of their fallen comrades to attack Palm Base! Now, I send you to [/c$2Gold Beach/c*] again to expel 35 of the [Puqi Warriors] and stop their attack! Report to me directly after finishing it! If you have no questions take action now! Good luck!"/> <字串 編號="72714" 文字="Next you go back to [/c$2Gold Beach/c*] to expel 35 of the [/c$2Puqi Warriors/c*] and prevent them from attacking Palm Base! It's urgent! Please take action at once! Report to me directly after finishing it!"/> <字串 編號="72715" 文字="According to the sentinel from the Observation tower, the second team have shrunk back due to their difficulties. You have made a great achievement for the United Factions again !"/> <字串 編號="72716" 文字="If we chase the them and beat their Leader [/c$2Pontiff Hululu/c*] of the Puqi tribe on [/c$2Gold Beach/c*],Palm Base may be free from threat completely!"/> <字串 編號="72717" 文字="Your last job is to beat [/c$2Pontiff Hululu/c*] with the other experienced Adventurers! Report to me directly after finishing it! If you have no questions take action now! Good luck!"/> <字串 編號="72718" 文字="Your last job is to beat [/c$2Pontiff Hululu/c*] with other experienced Adventurers! Report to me directly after finishing it! "/> <字串 編號="72719" 文字="According to the report of the sentinel from the Observation tower, the aboriginal army in Puqi, led by Pontiff has withdrawn from Gold Beach for a few hours! Our army directly under the Exploration Assoc will always remember your outstanding work!"/> <字串 編號="72720" 文字="Kanlier General on behalf of the Fighting Army of Exploration Assoc. will award the first class prize to all of the brave/c$2 %1/c* here! All members, Salute－－!!"/> <字串 編號="72721" 文字="I'm Kanlier,the leader of the Fighting Army of Exploration Assoc. All officials, please salute the brave riskers/c$2 %1/c* again－－!! Hip hip hooray!"/> <字串 編號="72800" 文字="Hello~ visitor, You are welcome to Puqi! There is a myriad of delicious foods and keepsakes in this island. As well as a lot of exciting entertainment on the water......But as the number of dangerous creatures in the sea is rising fast recently, we feel sorry that the diving program in the shallow sea is out of business!"/> <字串 編號="72801" 文字="Let me help you start it up again!"/> <字串 編號="72802" 文字="What a pity. See you..."/> <字串 編號="72803" 文字="Woo Hoo! Dude you like totally want to help me kick start this business? Sweet! Alls ya need to do is go to the [/c$2Colorful Coral Reefs/c*] region and like do away with the bogus creatures that want to hurt people. If you can sort out 30 each of the [Ball Jellyfish], the [Ink Octopus] and the [Crab General]. Then I can get my business kicking again! Awesome! [健康潜泳课程]"/> <字串 編號="72804" 文字="Bogus, your level is too low~ and you would totally be stung by the jellyfish XD. You'd better go to another place to take a risk. But definitely mosie on back here when your character level is up to/c$2 60 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="72805" 文字="People like us, in the entertainment sector of divin, are freaked out by jellyfish mostly! It's also very painful if you get pinched by crabs! Octopi will spit ink to disorientate a person. It is also big trouble. They will scare the customers. So please help me, go to the [/c$2Colorful Coral Reefs/c*] to defeat the [Ball Jellyfish],the [Ink Octopus] and the [Crab General], 30 each!"/> <字串 編號="72806" 文字="Awesome! The bogus creatures in the Colorful Coral Reefs have, like, disappeared in a minute! What's your secret? I guess you do not use electricity or poison to defeat them. It's amazing~"/> <字串 編號="72807" 文字="Hey man, you're totally getting' a hug for that! Thanks a mil' for everything you did for me! If you ever come to dive here, I will give you a 50 percent discount~~Later!"/> <字串 編號="72808" 文字="Dude you rock, you're, like my hero! I can totally get back to doin' what I love. Thanks! Yeah!!"/> <字串 編號="72809" 文字="Hi~We meet again! As you have arrived Puqi, please relax and have a good time! My job, diving in shallow sea, is an interesting entertainment! Do you want to have a try? "/> <字串 編號="72900" 文字="The Yatiss puzzle is come to know day after day and magic relics, ancient's treasures and rare creatures emerge very fast! I must think hard to purchase some unusual items and take them to the garden of Eden to sell them for a lot of money!"/> <字串 編號="72901" 文字="What do you want to do?"/> <字串 編號="72902" 文字="Strange man, please go away..."/> <字串 編號="72903" 文字="Are you interested in this rare, but unknown, ocean species? I heard that the creatures, [Mermen]of many legends are living in this vast ocean. For people in Eden, it is seen as just a myth. But I'm thinking that if I can get the proof of their survival...... "/> <字串 編號="72904" 文字="Yes! Hair! It's hair! According to the legend, merman's hair is soft like silk, has a charming aroma and shines as though it had been polished. If it could be turned into decorations or clothes, it would sell very well! Ha...you are so smart. Do you want to co-operate with me? We will share the profits."/> <字串 編號="72905" 文字="Ok!"/> <字串 編號="72906" 文字="No! What a strange man..."/> <字串 編號="72907" 文字="Ha...The nearby fishermen say, at full moon, on the [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*] many Mermen can be heard singing in the sea. That means this place probably is the habitat of the Mermen. Go and have a look...When you find the [/c$2Blue Merman/c*], hit them. Don't sympathize with them. When they are unconscious, try to cut off 10 wisps of their hair!"/> <字串 編號="72908" 文字="Keep in mind...That [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*] probably is the habitat of the Mermen. When you find the [/c$2Blue Merman/c*],hit them. Don't sympathize with them. When they are unconscious, try to cut off 10 wisps of their hair! Don't defeat them by mistake. They can make a lot money for us! Ha ha ha..."/> <字串 編號="72909" 文字="Oh, you have come back. How is the collection going on? Show it to me at once..."/> <字串 編號="72910" 文字="You have given the Mermen's hair to Kelian..."/> <字串 編號="72911" 文字="Ha ha!You are right! Well done! Come on! According to our arrangement, this money is yours! I'm going to return Eden~~"/> <字串 編號="72912" 文字="Yatiss is a place full of treasure......Next time I will send more cargo ships, professional bodyguards and hatchetmen here to earn even more! Ha ha~~"/> <字串 編號="73000" 文字="You are welcome, my dear friends! There are all kinds of the touring articles in my shop, such as the so called〝Puqi Treasure Three〞,chocolates, printed shirts and wooden key ring. Please look around! "/> <字串 編號="73001" 文字="I want to get a job!"/> <字串 編號="73002" 文字="Come in another day..."/> <字串 編號="73003" 文字="I really need people to pick some new products lately. But it seems to that you are not capable of this job...The man I need is the/c$2 any one collecting skill/c* higher than Lvl 70 in the Production System."/> <字串 編號="73004" 文字="Good question. Recently I'm looking for the Adventurers who are good at finding new products, to find some new materials to make new products! 〝Puqi Treasure Three〞is too out of date to attract tourists. If we do not start to find new chances in business, Puqi's tourism will meet a great slump!"/> <字串 編號="73005" 文字="I accept it!"/> <字串 編號="73006" 文字="Is that serious...I must go now..."/> <字串 編號="73007" 文字="A few month ago, when collecting Seashells whilst diving, I found many bright rhomboid crystals clung to all of the items in [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*]. They looked so beautiful! Later I turned to the scientists in Palm Base and found that the crystals are formed from the salt from the seawater only in the proper sunlight, light reflecting Angels and proper intensity..."/> <字串 編號="73008" 文字="That means what I need you to do is to use your exploring specialty to find materials in [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*]. There must be many chances to find the [/c$2Blue Salt Crystal/c*]! If you can bring 10 of them, your work is done and I will pay a satisfying sum of money to you!"/> <字串 編號="73009" 文字="Please use your exploring specialty to find materials in [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*]. There must be many chances to find the [/c$2Blue Salt Crystal/c*]! If you can bring 10 of them, your work is done and I will pay a satisfying sum of money to you!"/> <字串 編號="73010" 文字="Ya! This is Puqi's future star [Blue Salt Crystal] in tourism! I found the right guy! It seems to that I'm a man good at business and judging people!"/> <字串 編號="73011" 文字="I'm sorry to have you dip in the water all the time. I hope the salary can satisfy you! Thank you! "/> <字串 編號="73012" 文字="You are welcome, everybody! My shop have all kinds of touring products in Puqi. Except the 〝Puqi Treasure Three〞 chocolates printed shirts, wooden key ring. There is now a new product, called [blue crystal earring]. It's suitable to be a present or just for yourself. Help yourself and pick the one you like!"/> <字串 編號="73100" 文字="You...are you from the heaven? My ancestor told me, there had been a long time with no traces of Angel in the world, since the Heaven War. At present, the Evils come up from the Hell to disturb people and make trouble. Even here in the quiet ocean. Did you Angels appear to stop it? "/> <字串 編號="73101" 文字="What happened to the seabed?"/> <字串 編號="73102" 文字="I have thought too much. I'm just a tourist..."/> <字串 編號="73103" 文字="What we have met is a long story. Your current skills may can not help us...When your character level is up to/c$2 75 /c*, maybe you can save the ocean."/> <字串 編號="73104" 文字="Human beings stepped on Puqi and set a base for mechanization here. They brought a lot of armies, tourists, merchants and rubbish...However, Puqi is a island with little land, so the rubbish was tipped into the ocean and that polluted our living environment severely..."/> <字串 編號="73105" 文字="The dirty sea water badly affects our normal life. If it continues, I'm afraid we will be replaced by the competitive creatures of the ocean...Dear Angel, would you like to save us and give us some hope instead of Poseidon?"/> <字串 編號="73106" 文字="It's my duty!"/> <字串 編號="73107" 文字="I have said I am just a tourist..."/> <字串 編號="73108" 文字="That's great...We can see the light of our future...... Around the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]in which the Merman Village is located, there is a huge pile of rubbish left by the men in Puqi. It is increasing day after day, destroying the ocean ecology and weakening our activity."/> <字串 編號="73109" 文字="So please clear away these four huge piles of rubbish in the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="73110" 文字="Please clear away these four huge piles of rubbish in the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="73111" 文字="The huge rubbish heaps are standing in front of you..."/> <字串 編號="73112" 文字="Use all your power to burn it!"/> <字串 編號="73113" 文字="Leave it alone..."/> <字串 編號="73114" 文字="With all your magic you burn the rubbish heap on the seabed! Soon there will be nothing left!"/> <字串 編號="73115" 文字="The rubbish heap is burning fast so that soon there will be nothing left!"/> <字串 編號="73116" 文字="Your spell is not enough to burn out this rubbish heap at this time! You should find a safe place to have a rest..."/> <字串 編號="73117" 文字="All of the rubbish heaps have been burned. You can return to the Merman Village and tell Lilian this good news!"/> <字串 編號="73118" 文字="Thank you, dear Angel...The sea water has turned clear again. We have overcome the crisis!"/> <字串 編號="73119" 文字="You are the avatar of the Archangel Michael... If every novice was like you then the Evils would not dare to act so wildly. I wish you a peaceful life...... See you!"/> <字串 編號="73120" 文字="Although the Merman is not a species that likes war, some of my fellowmen are very angry with the human's behavior. Especially the way they destroy the environment so recklessly. So that they lost themselves and would attack other species in the sea for no reason, including the Angels...Please forgive them and do not hurt them....."/> <字串 編號="73200" 文字="Hello, man! If you don't pass over this land, I will not touch you. Let's do what we should and protect this ocean......"/> <字串 編號="73201" 文字="Anyone dare to invade here?"/> <字串 編號="73202" 文字="Great! See you..."/> <字串 編號="73203" 文字="Of course there is! Competition for survival is fierce even in the sea. Because of the huge mechanization base built by man in Puqi, the appearance of exhaust gases and heat not only cause the rise in water temperature but also cause the fast growth of jellyfish and octopi making them stronger..."/> <字串 編號="73204" 文字="In this way, it's bad for the Mermaids here. Because we can't beat the mollusca who will become stronger as the water temperature rises. My clansmen are moving to the Blue Sea gradually for the cool weather. But here is my hometown, I am willing to stay to patrol. I will stay here no matter what happens!"/> <字串 編號="73205" 文字="You are great! What can I do to help you?"/> <字串 編號="73206" 文字="Work hard in a patrol? I'm leaving..."/> <字串 編號="73207" 文字="Ha-ha! You must be kidding! You want to help me, all right? Lower than the/c$2 level 80 /c*, when meet the jellyfish even the weakest ones, you can't beat them. I advise you to do more practice at home before you come back."/> <字串 編號="73208" 文字="Please defeat more octopi and jellyfish to save our world! The less of them , the more hope for the return of my clansmen. The aim is to repel 50 [/c$2Stab Jellyfish/c*]and 40 [/c$2Wood Octopi/c*] in the [/c$2Dream Ocean/c*]. Please come to me after finishing the work! "/> <字串 編號="73209" 文字="Our aim is to repel 50 [/c$2Stab Jellyfish/c*] and 40 [/c$2Wood Octopi/c*] in the [/c$2Dream Ocean/c*]. Please come to me after finishing the work! "/> <字串 編號="73210" 文字="Wa! Although I know the aim, I never thought you can beat them in such a short time! You are so powerful!"/> <字串 編號="73211" 文字="If you can expel all of them at this time...Forget it. I just want to save our home to ensure our survival. Come on! This is the treasure I found in the sunken ship. Now, I give it to you! Thanks!"/> <字串 編號="73212" 文字="I haven't seen you for a long time, man! After your outstanding work, the nearby jellyfish and octopus are quiet. Our working pressure is lower. Thank you very much! Recently I am planning to use your idea to make a large of “Seagrass Men” to keep them away!"/> <字串 編號="73300" 文字="The violent shark is the natural enemy of humans. Numerous scars on my body show their violence. The war between the sharks and man will break out one day. I have been close to death many times at their hands..."/> <字串 編號="73301" 文字="I hate Sharks too! Count me in!"/> <字串 編號="73302" 文字="You should cherish your life more..."/> <字串 編號="73303" 文字="A man like you can not understand me, the person who has struggled between live and death. No need to say more. We keep on moving with our different way of living..."/> <字串 編號="73304" 文字="Do you want to fight with the violent tyrant in the sea. There are still some species who do not cherish their lives! If you understand the conditions, you know the basic value of death. It's worthless to sacrifice a soldier whose level is lower than/c$2 85 /c*."/> <字串 編號="73305" 文字="Another fearless Warrior? If you want to show yourself, please first come to the [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*] and beat/c$2 40/c* /c$2Sea Shark/c*! Then I will lead you to the real battlefield."/> <字串 編號="73306" 文字="If you want to show yourself, please first come to the [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*] and beat/c$2 40/c* /c$2Sea Shark/c*! Then I will lead you to the real battlefield."/> <字串 編號="73307" 文字="Right! The real Warrior must be like you with the consciousness and fighting ability to destroy enemies, but to sacrifice and gain nothing."/> <字串 編號="73308" 文字="In those years, I couldn't get the point and burst into the Sharks. The result was that I had not beat a rival and probably would have died. During the treatment these years, I finally get the value of sacrifice..."/> <字串 編號="73309" 文字="Now, it's time for me to take revenge. Our main target is the really powerful Shark warrior the [/c$2Rage Shark/c*] in the [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]. They are the chief criminals who defeat the tiny species and invade other's territory. You go and beat/c$2 35/c* [/c$2Rage Sharks/c*] and I will find other chances to hunt them ..."/> <字串 編號="73310" 文字="Don't tell me you want out? If not, please go to the [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]to beat/c$2 35/c* the real shark warrior [/c$2Rage Shark/c*]...When you are in battle, I will hunt them when they are not prepared!"/> <字串 編號="73311" 文字="Ah...are we still alive? If you didn't drive their attention in front of me, I would not have beat all of them. The result of our co-operation is that both of us are still alive."/> <字串 編號="73312" 文字="I have never met a person so brave like you...Among human beings, your power is incredible. It's my honor to fight with you shoulder to shoulder! Please take this mere trifle, my dear comrade!"/> <字串 編號="73313" 文字="There are still lots of Sharks aiming for us. I will keep on fighting and I'm sure you will, won't you? My dear comrade."/> <字串 編號="73400" 文字="Floating and diving is a small entertainment whilst diving deep into the Blue Water is the exciting one! During it you can see many rare things which you may never see again in your whole life!"/> <字串 編號="73401" 文字="Such as?"/> <字串 編號="73402" 文字="Too dangerous. I'm leaving..."/> <字串 編號="73403" 文字="Are you interested in the Blue Water? Let me tell you something. In the dark blue sea, I have seen a creature which can reflect bright rays of light just like the sun. But I didn't know it's a plant or animal."/> <字串 編號="73404" 文字="I'll try to take it to you!"/> <字串 編號="73405" 文字="It does not surprise me. I'm going now..."/> <字串 編號="73406" 文字="The base of diving in the Blue Water is that the higher your character level the deeper and longer you can dive. Although you can use the diving equipment, you must have a strong body to endure the hydraulic pressure and the low temperatures. In other words your level must be up to/c$2 90 /c*!"/> <字串 編號="73407" 文字="Woah, really? That means you will be in trouble!! The place I dived to is called the [/c$2Quiet Ocean/c*]. If you can go there, please find the mysterious shiner/c$2 10 /c*~ I'd like to exchange it for one month's income!"/> <字串 編號="73408" 文字="The place I dived to is called the [/c$2Quiet Ocean/c*]. If you can go there, please find the mysterious shiner/c$2 10 /c*~ But I don't know what it is and can't tell you any more. Sorry to trouble you a lot......"/> <字串 編號="73409" 文字="What? The light comes from a growth on the head of Lantern Fish? Well it's certainly strange!
