But nothing would surprise me the ocean is full of mysterious things!"/> <字串 編號="73410" 文字="I shall practice my observation Skills more! In that way I can clearly see more interesting things! By appointment, this money is yours. Thank you!"/> <字串 編號="73411" 文字="Floating and diving is just a sport for children. The real deal is for the adults, diving deep into the Blue Water constantly challenges their limits!"/> <字串 編號="73500" 文字="Brave young Risk Taker! Are you willing to undertake another difficult task for our Army?"/> <字串 編號="73501" 文字="Keep talking!"/> <字串 編號="73502" 文字="I am not willing to..."/> <字串 編號="73503" 文字="At present, we are trying our best to search for the survivors and the important products in Habosen Ship. We can't lose all of the workers, capital and products to the sea! However, we are lack labor and are in need of other excellent Adventurers to join us!"/> <字串 編號="73504" 文字="Ok, I will join the rescue action!"/> <字串 編號="73505" 文字="No, I have other things to deal with..."/> <字串 編號="73506" 文字="Great! You deserve the name of Hero! According to the report of Exploration Team of Blue Water,there are the most important documents and Coffer in Habosen Ship. They have sank in the [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]. I want you to get back the coffer because it's priceless!"/> <字串 編號="73507" 文字="According to the report, there are the most important documents and a coffer in Habosen Ship. They have sank in the [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]. I want you to get back the Coffer because it's priceless! If it is lost, our country cannot recover after a such a grave setback!"/> <字串 編號="73508" 文字="Please repeat that! You say the coffer has broken and it's contents have stolen by the Ghosts from the Blue Water? No, we must get it back! You have to go to the [/c$2Coral Vale/c*] till you find the/c$2 8/c* [/c$2confidential wooden crate/c*]!Go!!"/> <字串 編號="73509" 文字="You have finished your work finally! You devote a great contribution to our Iron Castle Exploration Assoc. The bankruptcy crisis of Iron Castle has passed. Thank you for your help, brave Adventurer!"/> <字串 編號="73510" 文字="Kanlier General on behalf of Exploration Assoc. award the first class prize to all the brave/c$2 %1/c* men here! All members, Salute－－!!"/> <字串 編號="73511" 文字="What you found in the debris of the sunk ship is similar to the chest described by the General Kanlier. But it has been forced open. Meanwhile you see the/c$2 Ghost/c* are wandering, holding wooden cases with the logo of Steel Faction...defeat them and get the wooden cases of No.1 to No.8. back Then give them to the General Kanlier!"/> <字串 編號="73512" 文字="The coffer mentioned by the General Kanlier has been forced open and broken. Its contents have been stolen by the Ghosts. defeat the/c$2 Ghost/c* wandering around [/c$2Coral Vale/c*] quickly and get back the [/c$2confidential wooden crate/c*]in/c$2 8/c* coffer. Then return it to the General Kanlier!"/> <字串 編號="73513" 文字="Among the debris of the Habosen Ship, there is a broken coffer. But it is useless now."/> <字串 編號="73601" 文字="Not long ago, an Uncle of mine, working in the port gave me a beautiful Seashell. He said he picked it by the sea. But I couldn't find any others like it there..."/> <字串 編號="73602" 文字="Can I help you?"/> <字串 編號="73603" 文字="leave."/> <字串 編號="73604" 文字="That's very nice of you . But my Uncle's working place is very dangerous. Please come back after your level is up to [/c$250/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="73605" 文字="I just know it was found by the sea...but I couldn't find anymore like it there. Please ask my Uncle where he picked it up from?"/> <字串 編號="73606" 文字="OK, no problem!"/> <字串 編號="73607" 文字="I'm sorry I'm busy now."/> <字串 編號="73608" 文字="Uncle is at the port of Gold Beach. I'm sorry to trouble you!"/> <字串 編號="73609" 文字="(Yawn!) I'm so tired of working, especially on such a hot day! But it will be good for Puqi once the port is built..."/> <字串 編號="73610" 文字="Where can I find beautiful Seashells?"/> <字串 編號="73611" 文字="Wow! That is the most beautiful Seashell I have ever seen. Let me see... Hmmm! I have noticed that both Crabs and Whelks on the beach like to eat Shellfish. Maybe you can start from there."/> <字串 編號="73612" 文字="Look around the Gold Beach."/> <字串 編號="73613" 文字="Forget it."/> <字串 編號="73614" 文字="Good luck to you! With such nice Seashells, the more the better!"/> <字串 編號="73615" 文字="You have only been looking for a short time! Please be patient and search some more!"/> <字串 編號="73616" 文字="You haven't found any? You are unlucky! You can go to ask the farmers on the Shining Coast! I found that one with him. Maybe he can remember where it was found!"/> <字串 編號="73617" 文字="How annoying! Where have the troublesome crabs and turtles come from!"/> <字串 編號="73618" 文字="Where can I find beautiful Seashells?"/> <字串 編號="73619" 文字="O...Those are not Seashells, but the Shells of crabs and turtles. There are a lot of them in front of my house. You can go there and pick them!"/> <字串 編號="73620" 文字="Eh... I got it!"/> <字串 編號="73621" 文字="I don't believe it!"/> <字串 編號="73622" 文字="Work harder and defeat more!"/> <字串 編號="73623" 文字="I'm sorry to trouble you a lot...Let me tell you something since you have worked so hard! The beautiful Seashell is not the Shell of crabs or turtles. I just wanted you to help me to clear them away, because they always eat my crops!"/> <字串 編號="73624" 文字="Go to Gold Beach and ask the lifeguard Zhi! He is very familiar with the creatures in the sea. He can help you!"/> <字串 編號="73625" 文字="I'm Zhi. If you want to know anything about the sea, then you have found the right guy!"/> <字串 編號="73626" 文字="Where can I find beautiful Seashells?"/> <字串 編號="73627" 文字="There are a lot of them in the sea. You can find anything you want there! If you can find the Mermaids they will tell you!"/> <字串 編號="73701" 文字="Lalala~I'm the Footloose Mermaid~I have the most beautiful hair ~and the sweetest voice~~~"/> <字串 編號="73702" 文字="Nice Mermaid, do you know where to find the most beautiful Seashells?"/> <字串 編號="73703" 文字="There are a lot in the sea. They are very common. But the [/c$2Crab General's Badge/c*]and the [/c$2Whelk Swordsman's Sword/c*]are very precious and hard to find! If you give me [/c$2Crab General's Badge/c*]and [/c$2Whelk Swordsman's Sword/c*] I will give you some Seashells!"/> <字串 編號="73704" 文字="Take [/c$2General's Badge/c*]and [/c$2Whelk Sword/c*]to me quickly!I can't wait any more!"/> <字串 編號="73705" 文字="Wah! What wonderful presents! I'm so happy! We will be good friends from now on!"/> <字串 編號="73706" 文字="Hi! My dear friend! It's very nice of you to visit me!"/> <字串 編號="73707" 文字="Where can I find beautiful Seashells?"/> <字串 編號="73708" 文字="No matter how nice the Seashells, they are nothing but Seashells. If you want I can make a Shell Music Box for you!"/> <字串 編號="73709" 文字="That's great!"/> <字串 編號="73710" 文字="Well, the nearby Mermaids are very annoying. Their singing is so bad. Please keep them away. So that I can make the best Music Box in peace."/> <字串 編號="73711" 文字="Please keep them away!"/> <字串 編號="73712" 文字="I can't bear those noisy Mermaids any longer. Please keep them away! My dear friend!"/> <字串 編號="73713" 文字="So nice of you! It's my great luck to have a friend like you! I can make the Music Box for you now. But you have to collect some materials for me first! [/c$210 Whelk Shell/c*]should be enough!"/> <字串 編號="73714" 文字="Please bring me [/c$210 Whelk Shell/c*]!I can't wait to show off my great workmanship any longer!"/> <字串 編號="73715" 文字="That's great! My dear friend, give me three days. Come back after three days!"/> <字串 編號="73716" 文字="Don't hurry! My dear friend! Patience is a virtue!"/> <字串 編號="73717" 文字="Take it! My dear friend! I think I have not disappointed you! Here is one beautiful Shell Music Box! Ha!"/> <字串 編號="73718" 文字="You bag is full! My dear friend! Tidy it up!"/> <字串 編號="73719" 文字="Have you found the nice Seashell?"/> <字串 編號="73720" 文字="Yes! I think that you will like it!"/> <字串 編號="73721" 文字="Not yet"/> <字串 編號="73722" 文字="This is not the nice Seashell that I wanted..."/> <字串 編號="73723" 文字="Wah! It's so beautiful! Thank you very much!"/> <字串 編號="73724" 文字="These are what I found whilst looking for the Seashells. Here I will give all of them to you!"/> <字串 編號="73725" 文字="What a nice Music Box... I love it!"/> <字串 編號="73801" 文字="Ooohh...Why the young people not cherish such a beautiful ocean..."/> <字串 編號="73802" 文字="Old man, are you all right?"/> <字串 編號="73803" 文字="Young man, you are novice. You can't deal with this until your level is up to [/c$255/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="73804" 文字="The beach in Puqi was so beautiful before. But now it is full of rubbish. I can't bear it! Who is polluting the beach?!"/> <字串 編號="73805" 文字="I have been living here for a long time, I think it must be Crabs and Whelks! Please drive them away!"/> <字串 編號="73806" 文字="Young man, do you really regard the beach so seriously? There are still lots of Crabs and Whelks. Please drive them away! "/> <字串 編號="73807" 文字="It's no use even though we have driven away so many Crabs and Whelks...I'm afraid I am getting too old for this... Please go to Gold Beach to ask the lifeguard Zhi! Maybe he knows what's going on..."/> <字串 編號="73808" 文字="You ask me what's going on...I want to know that myself! Since the Pirates have arrived here, Puqi has been in trouble. Even the turtles go to eat my crops! I'm afraid you need to kick the Pirates out of Puqi! It's all their fault!"/> <字串 編號="73809" 文字="Those vile Pirates have made lots of trouble. Please kick them out of here!"/> <字串 編號="73810" 文字="I'll take it!"/> <字串 編號="73811" 文字="I can't manage it..."/> <字串 編號="73812" 文字="Alas...I want to know that myself...It's regrettable. I found this in my childhood. Please give it to old man and comfort him... At least this Seashell is pure and has not been tainted..."/> <字串 編號="73813" 文字="Please give this Seashell to old man... Maybe it can make him happier..."/> <字串 編號="73814" 文字="Please give the Seashell to him"/> <字串 編號="73815" 文字="What a beautiful Seashell...I remember that when I was a child, all of the Seashells on the beach were so beautiful..."/> <字串 編號="73816" 文字="Ah!I know! There is person called the [/c$2Coast Protector/c*]on Shining Coast!But we don't know where he is! No matter where he is...he shouldn't leave such a beautiful beach. Get him out and teach him a lesson!"/> <字串 編號="73817" 文字="En, I will!"/> <字串 編號="73901" 文字="I've finally found someone reliable... Please go and sort out the [/c$2Coast Protector/c*], he should never have left his guard of the beach!..."/> <字串 編號="73902" 文字="Give him [/c$2Coast Protector's Heart/c*]."/> <字串 編號="73903" 文字="Alas...even you know the result why you did ...You can replace them..."/> <字串 編號="73904" 文字="This Coast Protector isn't eligible to stay in this beach again... "/> <字串 編號="73905" 文字="Your bag is full. I can't give it to you..."/> <字串 編號="73906" 文字="Thank you, brave Angel. You are the real Coast Protector..."/> <字串 編號="73907" 文字="You tell him off again if you like. I can't forgive him so easily..."/> <字串 編號="74001" 文字="Who are you? I don't know you!"/> <字串 編號="74002" 文字="I'm an Angel. what's wrong in the ocean?"/> <字串 編號="74003" 文字="I am in charge of the security in this area. But, I'm busy now. I have no time to talk to you!"/> <字串 編號="74004" 文字="I'm the Merman Guard in charge of the security of Dream Ocean. What's the matter?"/> <字串 編號="74005" 文字="I want to keep on chatting with you, but your level is too low. There is no use talking about this with you till your level is up to [/c$275/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="74006" 文字="I'm too busy to talk with you. More and more Octopi are making waves in Dream Ocean recently. That adds a lot to may work. I'm very busy."/> <字串 編號="74007" 文字="Please defeat these aggressive Octopi. Can you manage that?"/> <字串 編號="74008" 文字="The number of Octopi has not decreased. It doesn't matter if you can't do this. Our Mermaids will take care of it."/> <字串 編號="74009" 文字="You are quite capable! Maybe you can help us Mermaids after all!"/> <字串 編號="74010" 文字="Please help us to collect the [/c$2Angel Fish Heart/c*].The [/c$2Angel Fish Heart/c*]can stop the outbreak of the Angel Fish . Everything is on you."/> <字串 編號="74011" 文字="Would you like to do me another favor?"/> <字串 編號="74012" 文字="The [/c$2Angel Fish Heart/c*] can prevent the Angel Fish from invading. I hope you can get it back."/> <字串 編號="74013" 文字="Would you like to get the [/c$2Angel Fish Heart/c*] for me?"/> <字串 編號="74014" 文字="I'm sorry to trouble you, warmhearted Angel."/> <字串 編號="74015" 文字="Thank you very much. Please bring our [/c$2Recommendation/c*]to our Chief! Our Chief will like you, for you are such a great man."/> <字串 編號="74016" 文字="Please keep our [/c$2Recommendation/c*]for good. Good luck! My friend!"/> <字串 編號="74017" 文字="Your bag is too full. I can't give it to you!"/> <字串 編號="74018" 文字="Who are you? You shouldn't have come here."/> <字串 編號="74019" 文字="Give the [/c$2Recommendation/c*]to him"/> <字串 編號="74020" 文字="Eh...I believe you are a good man... But this is so important... We didn't mean to drag you in the matter Tell me about the ocean..."/> <字串 編號="74021" 文字="Let me help you!"/> <字串 編號="74101" 文字="En... I understand..."/> <字串 編號="74102" 文字="Hmmm! You are so ambitious! O.k.! I will give you a test. Go to defeat 40 Sharks for me! That will prove whether or not you can help me!"/> <字串 編號="74103" 文字="Er...I think there is nothing that I can do..."/> <字串 編號="74104" 文字="You have not defeated 40 sharks... You give up?"/> <字串 編號="74105" 文字="I believe I have found the right guy! With your help, I can get twice the results with half the effort."/> <字串 編號="74106" 文字="Actually, all the creatures in the sea hate the people who destroy the environment. But only some use violence to stop them! According to our research, the Monsters are plotting with the Scale Fish. Go to have a look if you like."/> <字串 編號="74107" 文字="Brave Angel, what have you found?"/> <字串 編號="74108" 文字="Thank you for your help. But it must stop now... It's significant. I must report to out Chief and wait for the orders. Thank you dear Angel."/> <字串 編號="74109" 文字="We give you this card the [/c$2Merman's Trust/c*] card. You will always be the Mermaids' good friend."/> <字串 編號="74110" 文字="Our Chief has handed this to you in the hopes that it can serve you well."/> <字串 編號="74201" 文字="Hello, I'm [/c$2Guang/c*], I grew up on this island. My favorite place is the sea and my favorite snack is super sweet chocolate... "/> <字串 編號="74202" 文字="Ahh, you are really careless. The coral reef is so easily damaged but so hard to repair! Stop it right now, otherwise it will be too late!"/> <字串 編號="74203" 文字="Sorry...I didn't do it on purpose."/> <字串 編號="74204" 文字="Be careful, ocean resources are very precious..."/> <字串 編號="74205" 文字="I will give you this card for all of your hard work. Be careful later!"/> <字串 編號="74206" 文字="Please beware..."/> <字串 編號="74301" 文字="I'm the Oceanographer Joey from the Iron Castle. I came here to research how the ocean cleans itself. The water is heavily polluted now containing too many impurities. It can no longer purge itself without the help of humans."/> <字串 編號="74302" 文字="Collect some more [/c$2Pollution/c*]whilst you work at sea. I can use the science power of Iron Castle to purge the impurities and release it back into the sea."/> <字串 編號="74303" 文字="Do you wish to help purify the impurities?"/> <字串 編號="74304" 文字="Ok, it's a deal! Remember to gather 200 [/c$2Pollution/c*] and hand them to me. So nice of you to help me! "/> <字串 編號="74305" 文字="You haven't collected enough [/c$2Pollution/c*] yet. Collect all of them then hand them over please"/> <字串 編號="74306" 文字="It's great! If we continue soon the sea will become much more clearer. Thank you so much!"/> <字串 編號="74307" 文字="Thank you for your help. I'd like to present you with this little card that shows our gratitude for your help. "/> <字串 編號="74401" 文字="Hi, Little Angel. I am [/c$2Teny/c*],the wandering artist travelling around the Garden of Eden."/> <字串 編號="74402" 文字="What are you doing here?"/> <字串 編號="74403" 文字="I will stay at Puqi Village for a while, for there are so many tourists there and I want to make a bit of money. Would you like to help me? I can pay for you."/> <字串 編號="74404" 文字="What is the job?"/> <字串 編號="74405" 文字="I pride myself on the craft of making many beautiful decorations with the Seashells which I collect from around here and there on the beach. But recently I have been too busy to collect them, if you can help me to collect some, I can expand my business! Ha-ha! "/> <字串 編號="74406" 文字="Do you plan to do some odd jobs?"/> <字串 編號="74407" 文字="Ok, I am free now."/> <字串 編號="74408" 文字="No, I am not interested in this."/> <字串 編號="74409" 文字="The materials needed as follow: [/c$2Shell Brooch/c*]= [/c$2Whelk Shell/c*]*10 + [/c$2Silver Ingot/c*]*200 [/c$2shell necklace/c*]= [/c$2Whelk Shell/c*]*10 + [/c$2Angel Silk/c*]*200 [/c$2Shell Bracelet/c*]= [/c$2Whelk Shell/c*]*10 + [/c$2Purple Crystal Strip/c*]*200 [/c$2Shell Bag/c*]= [/c$2Whelk Shell/c*]*10 + [/c$2Crystal Beast Leatherlace/c*]*200"/> <字串 編號="74410" 文字="You can get some Shells from the Conch and others you have to collect them by yourself. Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="74411" 文字="I forgot which materials are needed"/> <字串 編號="74412" 文字="I have brought the materials"/> <字串 編號="74413" 文字="You have not brought enough! I can't pay you if you don't complete the task!"/> <字串 編號="74414" 文字="Yeah! I have been waiting for you for a long time. Thanks goodness for you are here finally!"/> <字串 編號="74415" 文字="Thank you so much! It's a pleasure working with you."/> <字串 編號="74416" 文字="Come around again when you are free. You should make hay while sun shines, for I will leave Puqi Village one day."/> <字串 編號="74417" 文字="Thank you for the past favor. I'd like to present you with this little card!"/> <字串 編號="74501" 文字="Stay clear of him"/> <字串 編號="74502" 文字="I have no idea where the group of the pesky Puqi Turtles and Crabs came from. They keep stealing my crops. It's quite maddening!"/> <字串 編號="74503" 文字="You can't do this anything with that level. Let's talk about it later when you reach/c$2 60/c*!"/> <字串 編號="74504" 文字="It's so kind of you. These days people as warm-hearted as you are not typical. Please help me to beat 30 each of the /c$2Puqi Spine Turtle/c*and the /c$2Puqi Island Crab/c* which are lazing around at [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="74505" 文字="You promised that you would help me, wouldn't you? Please help me to beat 30 each of the /c$2Puqi Spine Turtle/c*and the /c$2Puqi Island Crab/c* which are lazing around at [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="74506" 文字="Well done! Thanks to your help their numbers have clearly decreased."/> <字串 編號="74507" 文字="I wish that there will never be such greedy Turtles and Crabs ever again."/> <字串 編號="74601" 文字="Did you see that? It's the first time for me to see such a kind of fish. It's so fast! If we can bring it back to the Scholar in Iron Castle, then he can definitely use it to further develop our technology!"/> <字串 編號="74602" 文字="I think the key to it's ability is it's tail. Look! How fast it moves. Would you do me a favor and gather the Evil Fish Tails in the [/c$2Quiet Ocean/c*]area? The Exploration Assoc. will be very grateful."/> <字串 編號="74603" 文字="You haven't gathered/c$2 40 tails of/c* evil fish yet. Put more effort into it! "/> <字串 編號="74604" 文字="Wow! Your progress is very impressive. You finished before I even had time to take notes."/> <字串 編號="74605" 文字="Well. That would be very kind of you. We will talk about this again after you reach/c$2 90/c*"/> <字串 編號="74606" 文字="Thanks a lot! Let me take the samples back to the Scholars!"/> <字串 編號="74701" 文字="Huh...those soft creatures make me sick. I feel nauseous every time I think about what they looked like when they rushed at us..."/> <字串 編號="74702" 文字="Marvelous! Please help me to drive away all of the soft creatures around the [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*].Otherwise, I can not leave here! I'll leave it in your hands. "/> <字串 編號="74703" 文字="These creatures are not only disgusting but also rather fierce. I'd better stay here until you got to/c$2 80 /c*..."/> <字串 編號="74704" 文字="Drive away all of the soft creatures for me! Hurry up! They are lazing around at [/c$2Raging Reefs/c*]. They make me feel sick! I/c$2 have already written all the details in your daily schedule /c*. Don't forget to check it carefully."/> <字串 編號="74705" 文字="Thank you so much! I had shivers of disgust running all through me!"/> <字串 編號="74706" 文字="How nauseating the soft creatures are!"/> <字串 編號="74801" 文字="I am [Watt. Lightening],a great playwright! Many people want the chance to act in one of my plays. But such rotten fish didn't admire me with their eyes. I'm furious!"/> <字串 編號="74802" 文字="Will you teach them a lesson?"/> <字串 編號="74803" 文字="I really want you to show them who's boss. But you are not strong enough to do so. I'll talk to you later when you reach/c$2 level 85 /c*"/> <字串 編號="74804" 文字="Definitely, we should punish them! Let them know that the Great Creator cannot suffer such insults any more! You approve of my suggestion too, don't you ?
"/> <字串 編號="74805" 文字="Yes ,I think so."/> <字串 編號="74806" 文字="Well, I hold my view."/> <字串 編號="74807" 文字="Great! Then I'll send you to teach them! Let me think...the target is set at the/c$2 Angel Fish/c* and the/c$2 Sea Shark/c* in this district of the [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]"/> <字串 編號="74808" 文字="Did they cry out for mercy? Keep punishing more of them and beat 30/c$2 Angel Fish/c* and/c$2 Sea Sharks/c* in [/c$2Blue Ocean/c*]! Ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="74809" 文字="Hey! They should realize their mistake ! Now they found out the hard way! Ha-ha!"/> <字串 編號="74810" 文字="Thank you very much! You truly understand my art!"/> <字串 編號="74901" 文字="There is no reason why I frown on the Mermen all the time, don't you think so ?"/> <字串 編號="74902" 文字="Yes! It must be their eyes that gape at me all the time! It makes me so uncomfortable! Their eyes should be used to make a soup instead of staring! They deserves to be punished! Do you agree? "/> <字串 編號="74903" 文字="I can't bear their eyes, twice as big as normal. I must find someone to scratch their eyes out and use them to make dinner! "/> <字串 編號="74904" 文字="Well , if you insist..."/> <字串 編號="74905" 文字="I can't agree with you."/> <字串 編號="74906" 文字="I haven't any soup for such a long time? There are many/c$2 Scale Fish/c* whose eyes are as big as basketballs at [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*]! Bring/c$2 30/c* of them to me, I am aching to go home to make some delicious soup "/> <字串 編號="74907" 文字="Well! You are finally back! Even though it may not taste to good but I would love to have a try anyway."/> <字串 編號="74908" 文字="Thank you! I would love to invite you to have dinner with me if the soup tastes good!"/> <字串 編號="74909" 文字="Forget about it! It is no good to ask you, because you haven't got to/c$2 level 75/c* yet!"/> <字串 編號="74910" 文字="Yep, I will let you take charge of all things from now on! Fire all the/c$2 Scale Fish/c* in [/c$2Wave Harbor/c*]right now! Bring/c$2 30/c* their eyeballs for me!"/> <字串 編號="75001" 文字="Hey! Friend~can you do me a favor?"/> <字串 編號="75002" 文字="What's up?"/> <字串 編號="75003" 文字="Ignore it."/> <字串 編號="75004" 文字="You know, I've earned much money recently, since my business has got better and better. I think it's time to give thanks to my customers. So I want to invite all of them to attend my upcoming party "Free Crabs" where people can eat as many crabs as they like. But I don't have enough Crabs, this may spoil my party. I need you to get some from the [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]"/> <字串 編號="75005" 文字="No problem! With pleasure!"/> <字串 編號="75006" 文字="Oh! But actually your level isn't as high as/c$2 50 /c*"/> <字串 編號="75007" 文字="Please catch some c/$2 Color Crab/c* from [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]. I need/c$2 50 /c*. You will get a reward after that."/> <字串 編號="75008" 文字="The dinner party is about to begin. Please go to [/c$2Gold Beach/c*]to get/c$2 50 /c*/c$2 Color Crab /c*!"/> <字串 編號="75009" 文字="The quality of these Crabs is very good. Where did you get them from?"/> <字串 編號="75010" 文字="We finally have enough for my "Free Crabs" party tonight! Thanks a lot!"/> <字串 編號="75011" 文字="Crabs are definitely the gift of the ocean! My business has never been so good. I should prepare another "Free Crabs" party to show my customers my appreciation."/> <字串 編號="75101" 文字="Curses! Why did I bother to ask you?"/> <字串 編號="75102" 文字="What's wrong with you?"/> <字串 編號="75103" 文字="It's no use to talk about it with you. Your level is not even up to/c$2 75 /*c!"/> <字串 編號="75104" 文字="Not only the Mermen didn't accept my invitation, but also the Mermaids! I just hoped that both sides would give up their hostility to each other. But it didn't work. I can't see how I can make things better between them?"/> <字串 編號="75105" 文字="What about trying to calming your anger first?"/> <字串 編號="75106" 文字="It's better to leave her alone..."/> <字串 編號="75107" 文字="Great! Please crack down on those 30/c$2 Scale Fish/c* and the/c$2 Blue Merman/c* to stop them from fighting with each other in [/c$2Blue Sea/c*]"/> <字串 編號="75108" 文字="Have you given an unforgettable lesson to the 30/c$2 Scale Fish/c* and 30/c$2 Blue Merman/c* in the [/c$2Blue Sea/c*] yet? I must make them realize that fighting never solves anything!"/> <字串 編號="75109" 文字="I have waited so long for you to came back! Now they must be as peaceful as I asked!"/> <字串 編號="75110" 文字="Ha ha! It's much better now! Thanks a lot!"/> <字串 編號="75201" 文字="No...everybody is behaving horribly towards me..."/> <字串 編號="75202" 文字="No...I won't talk with you unless you rise up to/c$2 Lvl 80 /c*"/> <字串 編號="75203" 文字="Really? Those/c$2 Bottle Merman/c* in [/c$2Dream Ocean/c*]won't let me join them...and treat me so badly... they left me here to cry my heart out alone...I want to get/c$2 30/c* bottles from them... "/> <字串 編號="75204" 文字="It's fine, it's fine. Don't cry! I will sort them out for you!"/> <字串 編號="75205" 文字="You promised to pay them back for me? I want to make all of the/c$2 Bottle Merman/c* in [/c$2Dream Ocean/c*]are as depressed as I am! So break/c$2 30/c* bottles without exception! "/> <字串 編號="75206" 文字="Tank you...Their toys have been destroyed by you...they deserve all that has happened to them for not playing with me..."/> <字串 編號="75207" 文字="Ha...that's the consequence for their bad behavior towards me...Ha ha... "/> <字串 編號="75301" 文字="Er...the entrance of the sunken ship is ahead...but there are so many Ghosts...how to get through?..."/> <字串 編號="75302" 文字="Let me help you!"/> <字串 編號="75303" 文字="Thanks...but you have to reach level/c$2 90/c*"/> <字串 編號="75304" 文字="Oh! Thank you very much! I'm totally depending on you now! Please get rid of/c$2 30/c* each of the Ghost sailors, the/c$2 Death Sailor/c* and the/c$2 Death Sail/c* that troop in front of the sunken vessel in [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]! Then we can continue our exploration."/> <字串 編號="75305" 文字="Er...Excuse me... there are still many Ghosts blocking the path towards the sunken vessel in [/c$2Coral Vale/c*]...Please clear away/c$2 30/c* each of the/c$2 Death Sailor /c*and the/c$2 Death Sail /c*!"/> <字串 編號="75306" 文字="喔喔! Our approach is clear. We, the Exploration Assoc., can carry on with our work!"/> <字串 編號="75307" 文字="I couldn't appreciate you more! I'll report your good deeds to my boss!"/> <字串 編號="75401" 文字="嘘... there are so many heavily-equipped Sharks ahead... can you catch sight of them?"/> <字串 編號="75402" 文字="What should I do?"/> <字串 編號="75403" 文字="I have no idea as well... You aren't up to/c$2 level 90 /c*"/> <字串 編號="75404" 文字="It's so unbelievable to have such Sharks, armed to the teeth, here! We ought to do some investigation!"/> <字串 編號="75405" 文字="Em... I must stay here to wait for the upcoming members. If you can break the chain of the armed Sharks advance then that will be good for our partners. So please defeat the/c$2 50 /c*/c$2 Rage Shark/c* in [/c$2Sunken Ruins/c*]"/> <字串 編號="75406" 文字="The rear support is arriving. How's it going on your part? Please defeat the/c$2 50 /c*/c$2 Rage Shark/c* in [/c$2Sunken Ruins/c*] ASAP!"/> <字串 編號="75407" 文字="Thank you very much for your assistance! The investigation is going much better now."/> <字串 編號="75408" 文字="So glad to see you here!"/> <字串 編號="75501" 文字="How strange...Ridiculous..."/> <字串 編號="75502" 文字="Can you just leave me alone for a while? Honestly you shouldn't dare to but in if you are not yet even qualified to/c$2 level 75/c*"/> <字串 編號="75503" 文字="What for?"/> <字串 編號="75504" 文字="The pollution of [/c$2Colorful Coral Reefs/c*] have definitely harmed many species, but the numbers of Mermen seems to be almost to the saturation point. We need to control it."/> <字串 編號="75505" 文字="Please defeat some Mermen around [/c$2Colorful Coral Reefs/c*]for the balance of the ecology."/> <字串 編號="75506" 文字="You haven't cut of the quantity of the Mermen on [/c$2Colorful Coral Reefs/c*]. Please get serious because the balance of the ecology is very important."/> <字串 編號="75507" 文字="Great! The ecology has become more stable! It's all because of you!"/> <字串 編號="75508" 文字="The balance of the ecology is very important..."/> <字串 編號="75601" 文字="Oh no!... It is to be going to be exposed..."/> <字串 編號="75602" 文字="What's up?"/> <字串 編號="75603" 文字="It's meaningless to talk about it with someone under the/c$2 level 55 /c*"/> <字串 編號="75604" 文字="I will notify Guang that those crabs on the beach are mine. I have trained them to return to the sea on hearing my whistle."/> <字串 編號="75605" 文字="But...It's impossible, obviously..."/> <字串 編號="75606" 文字="I don't want it that way also... Hey! Can you shoo them into the sea? Then I can tell Guang the crabs have gone to sleep..."/> <字串 編號="75607" 文字="That's the only way..."/> <字串 編號="75608" 文字="There are still many crabs that haven't been sent back into the sea... Please help me to deal with 30 each of the/c$2 Color Crab/c* and the/c$2 Crab General/c* on [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]."/> <字串 編號="75609" 文字="Yeah yeah~! You got it! I'll go and bring Guang here!"/> <字串 編號="75610" 文字="Thanks a lot! I'll wait for you if I need help next time !"/> <字串 編號="75611" 文字="Yeah! Got the idea? Please dismiss 20 each of the/c$2 Color Crab/c* and the/c$2 Crab General/c* on [/c$2Shining Coast/c*]"/> <字串 編號="75700" 文字="Something wrong? What's eating you?"/> <字串 編號="75701" 文字="Referring to the results of the Senior Researcher for the Exploration Association, there are Sleep 4 Demons in the Nightmare Cave whose power, it's said, it is derived from the Pure Soul Stone by corrupting all of the sweet dream that they catch."/> <字串 編號="75702" 文字="Unfortunately, no one has proved the existence of the Pure Soul Stone yet. If someone can defeat the Demons then we can find it out..."/> <字串 編號="75703" 文字="I would like to help you."/> <字串 編號="75704" 文字="It sounds like a mission impossible..."/> <字串 編號="75705" 文字="I don't want you to sacrifice yourself for us since it's a too difficult."/> <字串 編號="75706" 文字="I still wish the truth to be found out one day, although it's with little possibility."/> <字串 編號="75707" 文字="It's said only the mighty and venerable Demons have access to the pure soul stone while those not yet matured do not. "/> <字串 編號="75708" 文字="So...This's the soul stone of legend! Very good! Your name will be on the list in the great exploration log."/> <字串 編號="75801" 文字="哦! You are disturbing my investigations..."/> <字串 編號="75802" 文字="What's it?"/> <字串 編號="75803" 文字="Ha ha. It's a secret! I will let you know in the presence of some savory pumpkin pie... those from Faz last time... oh... very good..."/> <字串 編號="75804" 文字="I am to find the pumpkin pie."/> <字串 編號="75805" 文字="Forget him!"/> <字串 編號="75806" 文字="Ah! What I need are pumpkin pies!"/> <字串 編號="75807" 文字="Oh! You are the fan of my Super Cook as well! Do you want to have a try the Tasty Pumpkin Pie?"/> <字串 編號="75808" 文字="Delicious! No wonder it's from the cook..."/> <字串 編號="75809" 文字="Tell me about the secret research..."/> <字串 編號="75810" 文字="哦!You really want to know it...heyhey... You must promise not to tell anyone else!"/> <字串 編號="75811" 文字="I'm engaging in the method to withstand gravity... to enhance the carrying capacity of the metal robot. But now it's short of 2 crucial chemical elements, the Lasting Fire and the Ocean Heart, which are extremely difficult to get hold of."/> <字串 編號="75812" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="75813" 文字="Give up."/> <字串 編號="75814" 文字="These 2 elements can only be reached in the hottest district and the bottom of the Blue Ocean respectively. The former one can be got from the Monster in the fervent channel Underground, whilst the latter lies in the Quiet Ocean."/> <字串 編號="75815" 文字="But remember! Both will begin to fade away about 2 hours after I'm leaving their resting places."/> <字串 編號="75816" 文字="These 2 elements can only be reached in the hottest district and the bottom of the Blue Ocean respectively. The former one can be got from the Monster in the fervent channel Underground, whilst the latter lies in the Quiet Ocean."/> <字串 編號="75817" 文字="Wah! Unbelievable. You made it... Quickly give them to me before they both melt away!"/> <字串 編號="75818" 文字="En! We made it...Cool! So now I only lack the materials to make the metal robot! Please get me the Refined Black Sycee, the Shy Board, the Beast Fell Cloth, the Condensed Cherry Oil, the Cherry Clew, the White Scale, Beast Meat Cake and the White Fish Fin. I need 200 of each."/> <字串 編號="75819" 文字="No problem."/> <字串 編號="75820" 文字="Give up."/> <字串 編號="75821" 文字="Then please deal with it for me."/> <字串 編號="75822" 文字=" Please get me the Refined Black Sycee, the Shy Board, the Beast Fell Cloth, the Condensed Cherry Oil, the Cherry Clew, the White Scale Beast Meat Cake and the White Fish Fin. I need 200 of each."/> <字串 編號="75823" 文字="Finally I have got everything I need to make the gravity-free metal robot... It shall be a success!"/> <字串 編號="75824" 文字="Thanks very much for your generous kindness...I absolutely will pay you back if my metal robot sells well!"/> <字串 編號="75825" 文字="喔! You've got the pumpkin pie at last? No problem. I have many here. But you should have some fun after taking plenty."/> <字串 編號="75901" 文字="You look pale and anguished. Are you ok?"/> <字串 編號="75902" 文字="唉! It does bring us an great honor but also lots of trouble that Faz won the great Cook title!"/> <字串 編號="75903" 文字="After he won the championship on the last occasion, orders came from all over the Eden continent for his cuisine"/> <字串 編號="75904" 文字="I'm here to help you."/> <字串 編號="75905" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="75906" 文字="The food must be delivered on time. Are you sure you can manage it? All right, please send the Toasted Slarm soup to intern Timi of Aurora City. Hurry up! The soup will taste bad if it cools down. "/> <字串 編號="75907" 文字="Come on. The soup tastes bad when it cools down."/> <字串 編號="75908" 文字="Oh! Here comes the savory food I ordered. Very delicious!!"/> <字串 編號="75909" 文字="E!You seem to be a trust worthy man. Please take the Mummy Cheese Cake to Scholar Francis in the Iron Castle. Pay attention to the time of the food. But don't tell him what's the materials."/> <字串 編號="75910" 文字="Please take the mummy Cheese Cake to Scholar Francis in the Iron Castle."/> <字串 編號="75911" 文字="Oh! What a delicious cheese cake! I can't help slavering over it. Thank you very much."/> <字串 編號="75912" 文字="Thank you for your help. I only have one more favor for you to do. Please send this Gold Fly Sundae to Veifu in Puqi Village as soon as possible! The ice is melting. Remember ... the ingredients are confidential..."/> <字串 編號="75913" 文字="Please take it as soon as possible! The ice is melting."/> <字串 編號="75914" 文字="Great! Nothing can be better than having ice-cream on summer's day! Thank you!"/> <字串 編號="75915" 文字="Thanks for helping us to handle the orders. We can get down to preparing for the next competition now."/> <字串 編號="75916" 文字="Beach boys should know how to surf!"/> <字串 編號="75917" 文字="En...the latest orders were all settled. Now we have no delivery work to do, we had better take a rest now as I am sure that we'll be submerged by new orders soon!"/> <字串 編號="75918" 文字="What?! There's nothing left! It's fortunate that Faz prepared more than one copy, pay attention to delivery time, don't lose it again!"/> <字串 編號="76001" 文字="Ahh! What a good day today is! It's time to water the flowers!"/> <字串 編號="76002" 文字="Those flowers are so fabulous"/> <字串 編號="76003" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="76004" 文字="Yeah! These flowers are my friends! I have a dream for long...(Looking far ahead )..."/> <字串 編號="76005" 文字="What kind of dream?"/> <字串 編號="76006" 文字="I have lived on Puqi Island for all my life, man and boy. I dream to be able to see the flowers of the Eden, even just to look at their seeds"/> <字串 編號="76007" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="76008" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="76009" 文字="Really? Will you help me to make my dream come true, you're such a good person.If you wouldn't mind."/> <字串 編號="76010" 文字="Wow! This is a Rose...and a Charming Flower...a bud! Great, I feel my life is full of hope! I can image their appearance when they blossom. But...(Looking far ahead)"/> <字串 編號="76011" 文字="What's wrong?"/> <字串 編號="76012" 文字="I heard that there're some even rarer flowers, perhaps you didn't notice them. Can you help me to collect them? It's a little bit difficult to collect this kind of rare flowers..."/> <字串 編號="76013" 文字="No problem!"/> <字串 編號="76014" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="76015" 文字="I didn't expect that you could get so many kinds of rare flower seeds, the seeds of Queen Angela...seeds of Bloody Flower..., It must have been very hard for you to collect them! A million thanks...(look far ahead)..."/> <字串 編號="76016" 文字="What's wrong again?"/> <字串 編號="76017" 文字="Last time, a tourist passed by our Village and I heard from him that a kind of flower called Fragrant Soside,which is full of spirituality. It makes my heart thirst for it again, I wish I could have a look at it.Can you help me?"/> <字串 編號="76018" 文字="There's a kind of Flower called Fragrant Soside,which's full of spirituality."/> <字串 編號="76019" 文字="Let me try!"/> <字串 編號="76020" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="76021" 文字="So sorry to bother you so many times...You're really a good man..."/> <字串 編號="76022" 文字="Woo! So adorable, so adorable! It's really lovely.Thanks your help to make my dreams come true. You're such a good man. I would like to give you this Good Person Card!"/> <字串 編號="76101" 文字="It's weird! I have only had two pieces of milk bread and I'm full. How can this be......why?"/> <字串 編號="76102" 文字="Why you stuff yourself with food?"/> <字串 編號="76103" 文字="What a oddball, stay away!"/> <字串 編號="76104" 文字="Oh no! I'm so embarrassed that you saw me eating. Actually, I'm finding out the reason why Chef Berssif of the Evil Lyceum can never satisfy himself with food, this is my life long aim. But I, myself, can't eat any more, I'm full to bursting. It's hard to work out the reason why a person can't stop eating. Can you help me to figure it out?"/> <字串 編號="76105" 文字="Great! I love to eat!"/> <字串 編號="76106" 文字="Forget it! I don't want to get fat!"/> <字串 編號="76107" 文字="I don't think we can work out the reason by merely stuffing ourselves. Maybe the cause lies in the deepest place of Gulp Room? You should investigate that!"/> <字串 編號="76108" 文字="It's too dangerous for you help me to carry out the task like this. In my opinion, you should take exercise and come back to me after you reach Lvl60!"/> <字串 編號="76109" 文字="Why are you still here? All of this food is for me! You need to go to see what happens in Gulp Room. The place that needs the most attention is where the key lies!"/> <字串 編號="76110" 文字="En...I see! Let me check..."/> <字串 編號="76111" 文字="So the secret of why Berssif eats excessively has something to do with the Energy Stone in Underground Riddle City. It appears that we need to get the Energy Stone, my warmhearted Little Angel, we need your help!"/> <字串 編號="76112" 文字="You didn't catch me ? Yes, the Energy Stone. Give it to me if you find it."/> <字串 編號="76113" 文字="Is this the Energy Stone? It looks different."/> <字串 編號="76114" 文字="So it's the Lusterless Energy Stone. To know why Berssif is such a glutton, we need evil power to be joined with the Energy stone .So go defeat the Demon Lord Underground to see whether or not it will become shiny."/> <字串 編號="76115" 文字="This Energy Stone has no evil power. Go to get some from the Demon Lord Underground."/> <字串 編號="76116" 文字="Wow, so bright! How shiny this Energy Stone is. Let see what secrets the light will tell us."/> <字串 編號="76117" 文字="So it tells everything. The secret of Glutton is here. In Berssif's room in the Gulp Room is sealed the Spirit of Berssif. Please help to get the proof for me, brave Angel."/> <字串 編號="76118" 文字="Yes, this is the Glutton's sealed room. We are almost there to get the secret."/> <字串 編號="76119" 文字="Great! So we got the proof about the Glutton. "/> <字串 編號="76120" 文字="You had a hard job this time, back and forth so many times for me. The reason why Berssif eats excessively was revealed, and my lifetime dream also came true, all of these should be attributed to you. This is a little something for you, if you don't mind, I so appreciate your help."/> <字串 編號="76201" 文字="Well, I can't do it."/> <字串 編號="76202" 文字="You face some difficulty?"/> <字串 編號="76203" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="76204" 文字="Well. I am about to finish my apprenticeship as a Craftsman, but my Master wants me to get precious material from the Underground first. It's said that the Monsters there are all cruel. But I am only a craftsman!"/> <字串 編號="76205" 文字="I can help you."/> <字串 編號="76206" 文字="Aw, thank you."/> <字串 編號="76207" 文字="You can help me, that's great! Come here...take this magnifying glass which I use frequently. As long as you use it, you will discover very rare and special materials whilst you're digging for Lvl61 material.For example, you may discover the very scarce black silver crystal in Silver Ore."/> <字串 編號="76208" 文字="What? You look worse than me. You need to be over Lvl/c$2 60 to collect Underground material, otherwise it will be too dangerous. So thank you but no! I need to ask for other's help."/> <字串 編號="76209" 文字="My master wants you to find/c$2 10 Black Iron Crystal/c*,/c$2 10Shy Plant Bud/c*,/c$2 10 Varietal Cherry Bud/c*,/c$2 10Varietal Spot Alga/c*,/c$2 10Fantastic Beast Egg/c*.So we are all relying on you!"/> <字串 編號="76210" 文字="Gosh, these are not enough. How can I go back to my Master with so few ? Work harder."/> <字串 編號="76211" 文字="How was it? Did you get attacked by Monsters? It's hard to find but you made it. Thank you. So, now I can graduate as a talented and independent Craftsman."/> <字串 編號="76212" 文字="Come here. Here is the gift you deserve. Besides this, the portable Improved Magnifier is also for you. My former one is too old."/> <字串 編號="76213" 文字="You've lost the Improved Magnifier? Never mind. I have many more. I also use it to find rare Lvl61 materials. Here take this one."/> <字串 編號="76214" 文字="I've lost my Improved Magnifier but I still need to find rare Lvl61 materials."/> <字串 編號="76301" 文字="Wow! It's you,/c$2%1/c*. I couldn't have graduated and become independent Craftsman without your help. Thank you."/> <字串 編號="76302" 文字="Though I have successfully finished my apprenticeship, I still have a long way to go. Thus I am studying the various mysterious materials so I can refine one unique legendary weapon."/> <字串 編號="76303" 文字="ㄟ......Though a good craftsman, I am not a brave Adventurer. The Underground Riddle City is too dangerous for me. Can you go there for me ? Please be assured that I will reward you according to your behavior."/> <字串 編號="76304" 文字="Is there something wrong?"/> <字串 編號="76305" 文字="I don't want to risk my life any more."/> <字串 編號="76306" 文字="Your words have excited me. Ok! Let's see what mysterious material you can collect for me."/> <字串 編號="76307" 文字="[Sharp Material]"/> <字串 編號="76308" 文字="[Heavy Material]"/> <字串 編號="76309" 文字="[Stiff Material]"/> <字串 編號="76310" 文字="Page Down"/> <字串 編號="76311" 文字="[Curving Material]"/> <字串 編號="76312" 文字="[Lucid Material]"/> <字串 編號="76313" 文字="Well, forget it."/> <字串 編號="76314" 文字="Page Up"/> <字串 編號="76315" 文字="You are so nice. The birth of legendary weapon relies on you."/> <字串 編號="76320" 文字="You don't have enough material to hand. I can't make it yet."/> <字串 編號="76321" 文字="Great. So I am nearer to become a legendary great craftsmen. I really appreciate all your help. One second please..."/> <字串 編號="76322" 文字="Bang...Bang... Bang... (Anderson beats the material for some time...)"/> <字串 編號="76323" 文字="Come here. This is the/c$2 [Sharp Blade]/c*. It needs to be mixed it with brave young Risk Taker's breath to make it legendary. Can you wear it for me so that it can absorb some of your greatness? Give it back to me /c$2in 48hours/c*.Then it's done."/> <字串 編號="76324" 文字="Come here. This is the/c$2 [Heavy Hammer]/c*. It needs to be mixed it with brave young Risk Taker's breath to make it legendary. Can you wear it for me so that it can absorb some of your greatness? Give it back to me /c$2in 48hours/c*.Then it's done."/> <字串 編號="76325" 文字="Come here. This is/c$2 [Hard Platinum Steel]/c*. It needs to be mixed it with brave young Risk Taker's breath to make it legendary. Can you wear it for me so that it can absorb some of your greatness? Give it back to me /c$2in 48hours/c*.Then it's done."/> <字串 編號="76326" 文字="Come here. This is/c$2 [Curving Bow]/c*. It needs to be mixed it with brave young Risk Taker's breath to make it legendary. Can you wear it for me so that it can absorb some of your greatness? Give it back to me /c$2in 48hours/c*.Then it's done."/> <字串 編號="76327" 文字="Come here. This is/c$2 [Lucid Magic Spar]/c*. It needs to be mixed it with brave young Risk Taker's breath to make it legendary. Can you wear it for me so that it can absorb some of your greatness? Give it back to me /c$2in 48hours/c*.Then it's done."/> <字串 編號="76328" 文字="No. It's not yet 48hours. Be patient, or the weapon will not be perfect."/> <字串 編號="76329" 文字="Great! 48hours have passed and the weapon is full of brave young Risk Taker's breath. It's time to refine it further now. Thanks to you brave and zealous Angel. This legendary weapon will be all the stronger because of you. Take this, the reward I promised you."/> <字串 編號="76330" 文字="It seems that the materials are not enough to refine the legendary weapon. Can you help to collect some more mysterious material?"/> <字串 編號="76331" 文字="/c$2%1/c*,thanks for your help. Now I can refine the legendary weapon with this mysterious material and become closer to being a legendary great Craftsman. "/> <字串 編號="76332" 文字="This material is enough. Do you want to help me find another kind?"/> <字串 編號="76333" 文字="What? The material mixed with brave young Risk Taker's breath has been lost? Fortunately I have more. But don't lose it again."/> <字串 編號="76334" 文字="You do have the magnifier. Don't play games with me."/> <字串 編號="80000" 文字="Angel, we are now holding an activity called [/c$2Angel Protector DNA/c*].You will have the chance to meet new friends and get gifts or rewards"/> <字串 編號="80001" 文字="What is Angel Protector DNA?"/> <字串 編號="80002" 文字="How do I take part in this activity?"/> <字串 編號="80003" 文字="Apply to participate."/> <字串 編號="80004" 文字="Match"/> <字串 編號="80005" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80006" 文字="The Angel Lyceum holds this activity to help students get know each other better. You will get an [/c$2Angel Protector Gift/c*]as long as you take part in this activity called [/c$2Finding the Angel that match you./c*]."/> <字串 編號="80007" 文字="Try to find your partner. If a couple meet together in the activity, the system will remind you and show on radar map. You can get the rewards by [/c$2Exchanging each other's gifts/c*]"/> <字串 編號="80008" 文字=" As long as you purchase the [/c$2Loving You Forever Bag/c*]or the [/c$2First-Love Adventure Bag/c*]from the convenience store, you can get [/c$2Unused DNA/c*]from the [/c$2Bao Clerk/c*]in the Angel Lyceum. Then come to apply to participate in this activity."/> <字串 編號="80009" 文字="To apply to participate, you should have [/c$2Unused DNA/c*]. Also if you have already applied once you can't apply again."/> <字串 編號="80010" 文字="To log in to the match, you should have [/c$2Log-in DNA/c*]. Also if you have already been matched once you can't be matched again."/> <字串 編號="80011" 文字="We will sell GM Equipment to GM-qualified Angels. They have strong power. GMs need to be keep the rules in mind and don't use it to hurt other Angels."/> <字串 編號="80012" 文字="I will obey."/> <字串 編號="80013" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="80014" 文字="It is not the GM I checked. I can't sell GM equipment to you."/> <字串 編號="80015" 文字="The gift box activity of celebrating public test is highly commented upon. The Lyceum wants to continue it. Every Angel can get small gift which is specially designed according to defeats of different classes. You are welcome to take your awards in time."/> <字串 編號="80016" 文字="I have come to get my gifts. "/> <字串 編號="80017" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80018" 文字="The Lyceum present 3 kinds of gifts namely [/c$2Short Distance Swordsman Class/c*], [/c$2Long Distance Swordsman and Mage Class/c*]and [/c$2Production Class/c*].Choose the one you like."/> <字串 編號="80019" 文字="I prefer [Short Distance Swordsman Class]"/> <字串 編號="80020" 文字="I prefer [Long Distance Swordsman Class]"/> <字串 編號="80021" 文字="I prefer [Production Class]"/> <字串 編號="80022" 文字="No problem! Please take this gift. You can come to take it again one day later. Don't forget it."/> <字串 編號="80023" 文字="Angel, you have already taken it today. You can only take one a day "/> <字串 編號="80024" 文字="Sorry. Only Angels over Level/c$2 11/c* can take these gifts."/> <字串 編號="80101" 文字="There are so many savage animals in Crashing Hillock. The Exploration Project can not go on smoothly."/> <字串 編號="80102" 文字="What is the Exploration Assoc.?"/> <字串 編號="80103" 文字="Consulting Help."/> <字串 編號="80104" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80105" 文字="The Exploration Assoc. is in charge of searching for valuable mineral veins worldwide to exploit. We have workers specially assigned to explore the unexploited ones."/> <字串 編號="80106" 文字="Though it's mainly mineral veins, we can sometimes dig some ancient remains like the newly discovered [/c$2Nightmare Cave/c*]."/> <字串 編號="80107" 文字="We discover these are many mineral veins to exploit. But these mountainous areas are full of savage wolves. The workers can't focus on their work if they are not driven away."/> <字串 編號="80108" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="80109" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80110" 文字="Brave young man, please help me to expel the [/c$2White Wolf/c*].You will be highly rewarded."/> <字串 編號="80111" 文字="Thanks young man. But the wolves are really savage. Come to help me after you reach Lvl/c$2 27 /c*."/> <字串 編號="80112" 文字="Come back to me after expelling the [/c$2White Wolf/c*]"/> <字串 編號="80113" 文字="Well, the special workers have reported to me that the [/c$2White Wolf/c*] are fewer. Thanks."/> <字串 編號="80114" 文字="The Exploration Assoc. really appreciates your help. Please take this reward"/> <字串 編號="80201" 文字="The White Wolves appear in the near mountainous areas, they are really savage and fierce. But I found out that their sharp teeth have shocking uses. They can bite through rock easily. It will be great if they can be used to make cutters."/> <字串 編號="80202" 文字="Need any help?"/> <字串 編號="80203" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80204" 文字="Great! I thought I wouldn't find anyone. Please help to take the/c$2 5/c* White Wolves' teeth from the [/c$2White Wolves/c*] "/> <字串 編號="80205" 文字="Is your head really as hard as a rock? Stop it. Come back to me after you reach Lvl/c$2 27 /c*"/> <字串 編號="80206" 文字="Come on. Come back to me after you have found enough White Wolves' teeth"/> <字串 編號="80207" 文字="Wow! You are so efficient. So I will take these shining White Wolves'teeth."/> <字串 編號="80208" 文字="The Exploration Assoc. really appreciates your help. Please take this reward"/> <字串 編號="80301" 文字="I am in charge of security of the exploitation. Don't make trouble here. Sorry if I am being rude, but I am fed up with the Wolves every day."/> <字串 編號="80302" 文字="Tell me how I can help"/> <字串 編號="80303" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80304" 文字="Many workers of my association have been bitten by the [/c$2Green Wolf/c*]after work. They are really very cruel, we can only drive them out by force."/> <字串 編號="80305" 文字="I will take care of it"/> <字串 編號="80306" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80307" 文字="You look talented. Do you want to try? Then defeat/c$2 40/c* the Green Wolves that appear in mountainous areas."/> <字串 編號="80308" 文字="You are not agile enough. You can't cope with them. Wait until you reach Lvl/c$2 27 /c*."/> <字串 編號="80309" 文字="Teach them a lesson. Come to me after you defeat/c$2 40/c* of the [/c$2Green Wolf/c*]"/> <字串 編號="80310" 文字="Great! I can feel a fierce battle with Wolves from the wolf-bloody odor on your body. They must be very frightened."/> <字串 編號="80311" 文字="This is your reward. Take it please."/> <字串 編號="80401" 文字="I've found the fur of Green Wolves has a ready market. The glory makes them sell well. But I have not yet found the right hunter to help."/> <字串 編號="80402" 文字="Give this Quest to me."/> <字串 編號="80403" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80404" 文字="Help me to collect one pile of/c$2 5/c* green wolf furs. I will pay you. And you must keep it from being known by my supervisor."/> <字串 編號="80405" 文字="Are you kidding? Stripping Wolves' skin? It's impossible unless you reach Lvl/c$2 27 /c*."/> <字串 編號="80406" 文字="You can only take skins from the [/c$2Green Wolf/c*]. Come on. My future all depends on you."/> <字串 編號="80407" 文字="Well done. Are you a full-time hunter? These skins are a good state. I'll take them"/> <字串 編號="80408" 文字="Thank you. This is the reward I promised. Take it."/> <字串 編號="80501" 文字="Many poisonous creatures appear around here. Leave here ASAP if you don't want to lose your life."/> <字串 編號="80502" 文字="Try to prove your capability."/> <字串 編號="80503" 文字="...Bye."/> <字串 編號="80504" 文字="I didn't know you are so eager to do well in everything. Many [/c$2Giant Mice/c*]are prolific nearby due to the lack of enemies these days, it's very catastrophic. Their tails have toxic thorns and have stung many passers by."/> <字串 編號="80505" 文字="I come forward to defeat the Giant Mice. Any other who is qualified to defeat them will score points too?"/> <字串 編號="80506" 文字="I can."/> <字串 編號="80507" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80508" 文字="Prove your words with actions. Go to defeat/c$2 forty/c* [/c$2Giant Mice/c*]. You can find many in the central part of Fungus Forest North. "/> <字串 編號="80509" 文字="Ha-ha...You split my sides. You are in too low a Level. Go to train to Lvl/c$2 27/c* then come back to me."/> <字串 編號="80510" 文字="How is it going? want to give up? Forget that you ever came to me. If you want to go on, then I repeat, go to defeat/c$2 forty/c* [/c$2Giant Mice/c*]"/> <字串 編號="80511" 文字="Wow! You are back. So quick! Have you defeated all the Giant Mice?"/> <字串 編號="80512" 文字="Whatever, you are qualified to talk to me. Take this money to cure your injuries. Don't challenge yourself any more. You know, our courage, resolution, perseverance, capability and insight far outweigh yours "/> <字串 編號="80601" 文字="Really? I've met many braggers before. I am the Hero [/c$2The Bravest in Mushroom Forest/c*]with countless accomplishments."/> <字串 編號="80602" 文字="I came here to protect my hometown, to stop those Mushrooms and Mice intruding on people's property. How about you? Are you a speculator just digging up treasure?"/> <字串 編號="80603" 文字="Don't look down upon me."/> <字串 編號="80604" 文字="This is boring. I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="80605" 文字="You know what? A man's value doesn't come from boasting. If you also want to be a wise and brave hero, help me to take/c$2 ten /c*of the poisonous tails from the [/c$2Giant Mice/c*]."/> <字串 編號="80606" 文字="I want you to get/c$2 ten /c*. I hope it's not too hard for you. You have to train from this tiny quest if you want to be as great as me. Remember that you cannot get complete tails from every defeated [/c$2Giant Mouse/c*]"/> <字串 編號="80607" 文字="Ha-ha...Are you kidding? Your Level is so low. Don't talk to me until you reach Lvl/c$2 27 /c*."/> <字串 編號="80608" 文字="How do you feel? want to give in like a coward? If not ,then hurry to fetch/c$2 10/c* tails of Giant Mouse. I am considering whether to take you on as my subordinate."/> <字串 編號="80609" 文字="Yes, this sharp item is the Giant Mouse tail. Thank you."/> <字串 編號="80610" 文字="Take this money to cure your injuries. Don't risk your life any more. You know, our courage, resolution, perseverance ,capability and insight far outweigh yours "/> <字串 編號="80701" 文字="Hello. I am the Commander-in-Chief of the Fungus Forest North project from the Railway Company. One railway is under construction. But numerous monsters here have made our process too slow."/> <字串 編號="80702" 文字="Tell how I can help."/> <字串 編號="80703" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80704" 文字="Many gigantic pieces of equipment need to be constructed in the Mushroom Forest according to the project layout from our head office. But too many poisonous [/c$2Dark Fungus/c*]occupy the locations. We can do nothing."/> <字串 編號="80705" 文字="Let me handle it."/> <字串 編號="80706" 文字="Bye."/> <字串 編號="80707" 文字="You wish to help? Then please go to the /c$2Fungus Forest North/c*] to defeat/c$2 forty/c* [/c$2Dark Fungus/c*]so that the project team can get started. All is dependent upon you. "/> <字串 編號="80708" 文字="Perhaps it's improper to say so, but there was someone of the same level as you who gave up very quickly. So please come to help after you reach Lvl/c$2 27 /c*."/> <字串 編號="80709" 文字="The future of the Railway Company needs your help. Please go to the north to defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Dark Fungus/c*]then return quickly."/> <字串 編號="80710" 文字="On behalf of Railway Company, we appreciate your help, Adventurer. Thanks to your efforts the Dark Fungus has decreased in population. The construction can get started soon."/> <字串 編號="80711" 文字="This is the reward as acknowledgement from all of the engineers. We are all glad to give you this present ourselves, which is worthless of mentioning compared with your help."/> <字串 編號="80801" 文字="We have encountered so much trouble. Monsters hurting our constructors even looting the priceless project materials. We have suffered great losses"/> <字串 編號="80802" 文字="I think I can help you."/> <字串 編號="80803" 文字="...I am leaving first."/> <字串 編號="80804" 文字="You really want to help? Great! Days ago many [/c$2Dark Fungus/c* attacked our warehouse and looted many of the iron-screws for fixing the rails. I need you to help recover/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Iron Screws/c*]so that the construction can continue."/> <字串 編號="80805" 文字="Perhaps it's improper to say so, but there were someone of the same level as you who gave up very quickly. So please come back to defeat the fungus after you reach Level/c$2 27 /c*."/> <字串 編號="80806" 文字="The future of the Railway Company needs your help. Please go to the north to recover/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Iron Screws/c*]then return with them quickly."/> <字串 編號="80807" 文字="They are those stolen screws. Well done Adventurer. Our project can now go on. We are closer to the accomplishment of the railway."/> <字串 編號="80808" 文字="This is the reward as acknowledgement from all of the engineers. We are all glad to give you this present ourselves, which is worthless of mentioning compared with your help."/> <字串 編號="80901" 文字="Hello, I am an Archeologist from Iron Castle. I used to research mummies and Pharaohs. So I was very attracted by the mysterious monument in the Megalith Plain. But I have no helpers so my work must stop."/> <字串 編號="80902" 文字="Tell me about the help you need."/> <字串 編號="80903" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="80904" 文字="Archeology needs high concentration. But numerous [/c$2Green Wolves/c*] attack those approaching the monument and make me distracted."/> <字串 編號="80905" 文字="Let me drive them away."/> <字串 編號="80906" 文字="I am busy. Bye"/> <字串 編號="80907" 文字="It couldn't be happier that you are willing to help me. Please defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Grean Wolves/c*]then come back for a reward."/> <字串 編號="80908" 文字="Even though you may love archeology like me, you are unable to resist so many green Wolves. Come back to try again after you reach Lvl/c$2 27 /c*."/> <字串 編號="80909" 文字="Green Wolves always assemble to the north and east of Megalith Plain. Please defeat/c$2 40/c* and report to me."/> <字串 編號="80910" 文字="I find that the wolves howl is weaker than before. You've done me a great favor."/> <字串 編號="80911" 文字="This is the reward I promised you. I hope you can help me again should I need you."/> <字串 編號="81001" 文字="Many pictures and words are carved onto the giant monument. The monument is too hard to be scratched with a common knife. Recently I've found that the [/c$2Green Wolves/c*] can leave lines when rubbing their claws."/> <字串 編號="81002" 文字="Do you need these wolf claws?"/> <字串 編號="81003" 文字="I am busy. Bye"/> <字串 編號="81004" 文字="As you are willing to help? If so then please go to obtain/c$2 10/c* finger claws of the [/c$2Green Wolf/c*]"/> <字串 編號="81005" 文字=" Even though you may love archeology like me, you are unable to resist so many green Wolves. Come back to try again after you reach Lvl/c$2 27 /c*."/> <字串 編號="81006" 文字="Green Wolves always assemble to the north and east of Megalith Plain. Please obtain/c$2 10/c* and report to me."/> <字串 編號="81007" 文字="I am so glad that you brought so many claws. Let me try out their sharpness. Gosh! They can leave marks on the monument easily."/> <字串 編號="81008" 文字="Then the ancient's life style has become a little clearer. I believe there are more uses for wolf claws. Thanks for your help Adventurer."/> <字串 編號="81101" 文字="I am the patroller of Breeze Jungle. I am following Leader Sharker's order to spy on the Titans. But I think it's useless to be passive all the time..."/> <字串 編號="81102" 文字="What do you want to do then?"/> <字串 編號="81103" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="81104" 文字="The [/c$2Plain Titan/c*]is strong and cruelly powerful. Common soldiers aren't their competition. Are you willing to be our leader and defeat them?"/> <字串 編號="81105" 文字="No problem"/> <字串 編號="81106" 文字="Bye."/> <字串 編號="81107" 文字="I admire your courage to fight the most cruel races in Eden. Please help to beat/c$2 40/c* of the [/c$2Plain Titan/c*]. I will apply for rewards for you. They infest the southeast of [/c$2Megalith Plain/c*]."/> <字串 編號="81108" 文字="You look like a beginner and lack training. It's better to reach Lvl/c$2 27/c* first. Life is everything."/> <字串 編號="81109" 文字="How is it going on? Report to me after beating/c$2 40/c* Plain Titans on the Megalith Plain."/> <字串 編號="81110" 文字="Well done! You are really as intelligent as our leader Sharker, regarding attack as the best defense."/> <字串 編號="81111" 文字="You made so great a contribution to our cause. My officer has ordered to reward you and wanted me to forward this. Please take it. Thanks."/> <字串 編號="81201" 文字="I have observed for some time but have failed to figure out how the Titans communicate with each other. I hope you can help to get some clues from the Titans and explain to our learners."/> <字串 編號="81202" 文字="Let me have a try!"/> <字串 編號="81203" 文字="Busy"/> <字串 編號="81204" 文字="The [/c$2Plain Titan/c*]always acts strange with a piece of Rock in its hand, which I think is the hinge. Please help to beat them and remove/c$2 5/c* [/c$2Rock Pieces/c*]from the body."/> <字串 編號="81205" 文字="You look like beginner and lack training. It's better to reach Lvl/c$2 27/c* first. Life is everything."/> <字串 編號="81206" 文字="How is it going on? Remember to take back/c$2 5/c* Rock Pieces~I don't think every Titan has one?"/> <字串 編號="81207" 文字="Such a lovely and valuable Rock Piece. Though it looks common, it has secrets......"/> <字串 編號="81208" 文字="Thanks Adventurer. Our troop leader wanted me to give this to you. I hope it's useful on your following trip. Bye."/> <字串 編號="81301" 文字="So dark places have Adventurers too? I am the Spell Material Seller from Dark City specialized in collecting raw materials hard to obtain."/> <字串 編號="81302" 文字="Tell me about your worries"/> <字串 編號="81303" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="81304" 文字="There lives a [/c$2Fog Lizard/c*]in the north Foggy Forest where the Fog Grassroot which I need grows. I can't get them without disturbing the Lizards."/> <字串 編號="81305" 文字="I can help"/> <字串 編號="81306" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="81307" 文字="Then start your work. [/c$2Fog Lizards/c*]always show up to the north of the [/c$2Foggy Forest/c*].Please be careful "/> <字串 編號="81308" 文字="I find that you are not qualified to deal with the Lizards. It's better to come back to me after you reach Lvl/c$2 30 /c*."/> <字串 編號="81309" 文字="Not yet finished the agreed work? I need/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Fog Lizards/c*]from the north of [/c$2Foggy Forest/c*].The rest of our work depends on you."/> <字串 編號="81310" 文字="You there. The wandering Fog Lizards have decreased in number. You've done me a great favor."/> <字串 編號="81311" 文字="This is the promised rewards. Please check them. Come back to me at any time if you want to help"/> <字串 編號="81401" 文字="Lizards in the Foggy Forest are good at attacking with a Ball, which bears different curses. Those who are beaten by it are in a daze and full of nightmares every night."/> <字串 編號="81402" 文字="But it intrigues my interest. If you want to help, please go to seize the [/c$2Cuss Balls/c*]used by/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Fog Lizards/c*]"/> <字串 編號="81403" 文字="I will take care of it."/> <字串 編號="81404" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="81405" 文字="Then you can get started. [/c$2Fog Lizards/c*]always show up to the north of the [/c$2Foggy Forest/c*].You can obtain the needed [/c$2Cuss Balls/c*]after beating the Fog Lizards."/> <字串 編號="81406" 文字="After examination I've found your Level is not high enough to beat the Lizards. Come back to me after you reach Lvl/c$2 30 /c*"/> <字串 編號="81407" 文字="You've forgotten where the lizards are? They all haunt the north [/c$2Foggy Forest/c*]. Please come report to me after obtaining/c$2 10/c* [/c$2 [/c$2Cuss Balls/c*] used by the [/c$2Fog Lizards/c*]"/> <字串 編號="81408" 文字="Wow, the added cursed power on the Ball...I've never seen such excellent Magic Catalyzer. Thanks so much for helping me to accomplishing this difficult task."/> <字串 編號="81409" 文字="I would not be so worried if I had employed soldiers as good as you. Please do take this reward. I hope we can co-operate again if there is any chance"/> <字串 編號="81501" 文字="I am a Merchant of magic materials from Aurora City. I have come here for new materials of stronger magic. But I am so disappointed that I can't withstand the Monsters' attack in the Foggy Forest."/> <字串 編號="81502" 文字="Tell me about your worries"/> <字串 編號="81503" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="81504" 文字="Vampires, who were exiled noble classes, live in the Foggy Forest. They hate everyone. I can't move on without getting rid of the [/c$2Exiled Earls/c*..."/> <字串 編號="81505" 文字="I can help you to drive away the Vampires."/> <字串 編號="81506" 文字="Take care. Bye"/> <字串 編號="81507" 文字="Great. You are so kind Adventurer. Please go to attack/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Exiled Earls/c*]in the west [/c$2Foggy Forest/c*]and return to report to me."/> <字串 編號="81508" 文字="I am so moved by your enthusiasm. But to be frank, you need more experience to fight with these savage Vampires. I can let you help after you reach Lvl/c$2 30 /c*"/> <字串 編號="81509" 文字="It seems you have not yet driven away those Vampires completely. Please go to the west [/c$2Foggy Forest/c*]to defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Exiled Earls /c*..."/> <字串 編號="81510" 文字="You return finally. The number of Vampires has decreased greatly, like being drawn away by your chaos."/> <字串 編號="81511" 文字="Now I can continue to search for magic materials without worries, deep in the Foggy Forest. Please take these humble rewards. Thank you, Adventurer."/> <字串 編號="81601" 文字="I have noticed that the Vampires' teeth is not only sharp but also cruelly magic, perhaps because of their long exile. They are not like the Dark City Vampire, which has difficulty even biting water melons."/> <字串 編號="81602" 文字="Please help to collect some [/c$2Evil Teeth/c*]if you like. Then I can extract the essence of the dark magic and bring it back to Aurora City to sell."/> <字串 編號="81603" 文字="I would like to have a try."/> <字串 編號="81604" 文字="It seems dangerous. I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="81605" 文字="I didn't think that you would take this risk, judging from your appearance. I need/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Evil Teeth/c*]from the [/c$2Exiled Earls/c*].You need first to defeat them before obtaining the teeth."/> <字串 編號="81606" 文字="I am so moved by your enthusiasm. But to be frank, you need more experience to fight with these savage Vampires. I can let you help after you reach Lvl/c$2 30 /c*"/> <字串 編號="81607" 文字="The [/c$2Exiled Earls/c*] mostly infest in the west [/c$2Foggy Forest/c*]Please come to me after obtaining/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Evil Teeth/c*]"/> <字串 編號="81608" 文字="I can feel the strong unstoppable magic hurting my palms. Such precious materials will definitely sell well amongst the Mages."/> <字串 編號="81609" 文字="Please take my acknowledgement and have a safe trip."/> <字串 編號="81701" 文字="Have you noticed that the village has been taken over by the [/c$2Circus Tyrant/c*]?Many villagers have moved out of this previous happy fishing village because of their frequent attacks "/> <字串 編號="81702" 文字="Tell me the history of the Circus."/> <字串 編號="81703" 文字="Tell me about the help you need."/> <字串 編號="81704" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="81705" 文字="I heard that this circus used to be decent and made circuit performances around the Eden. But all of the members, including the leader, became crazy over one night, like a curse or something, I don't know. "/> <字串 編號="81706" 文字="They took advantage of skills and occupied most of north of this village. We can do nothing about it."/> <字串 編號="81707" 文字="We are in urgent need of aid to defeat those cruel Circus Tyrants. I have already ordered help from [/c$2Aurora Ciry/c*]and [/c$2Breeze Jungle/c*], but have had no good news back yet."/> <字串 編號="81708" 文字="I am qualified for this quest."/> <字串 編號="81709" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="81710" 文字="Really? We have rescuers now! Please help to drive those tyrants away."/> <字串 編號="81711" 文字="No. It's too dangerous unless you are Lvl/c$2 30 /c*, you may have to forget it."/> <字串 編號="81712" 文字="Tyrants are making trouble in the village. Tell me after you drive them away."/> <字串 編號="81713" 文字="The number of tyrants has decreased a lot. We can expect the peace if there are many more decent Adventurers like you."/> <字串 編號="81714" 文字="I don't know when will it come."/> <字串 編號="81801" 文字="We villagers all make our living as fishermen. All our stocks have been looted by those lazy tyrants. They loot half of our stock every harvest time...What is this world like?"/> <字串 編號="81802" 文字="I will help you to get back catches captured"/> <字串 編號="81803" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="81804" 文字="Please help to get back our lost catches captured from the [/c$2Circus Tyrants/c*].I am waiting here for you."/> <字串 編號="81805" 文字="No, you have not yet reached Lvl/c$2 30 /c*.Those tyrants are big and strong. You will be beaten to death."/> <字串 編號="81806" 文字="I will be very satisfied if you can get back, from the Circus Tyrants, our/c$2 5 /c*catches captured."/> <字串 編號="81807" 文字="Thanks, Adventurer, for your help. You made our efforts worthwhile. "/> <字串 編號="81808" 文字="Please take this reward, though I have low income."/> <字串 編號="81901" 文字="What is wrong with everything? Even the trees are against me when cutting them."/> <字串 編號="81902" 文字="Tell me about the help you need."/> <字串 編號="81903" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="81904" 文字="I don't know which Mage has cast a spell on those trees. They have turned into Treemen running here and there, even assaulting people. I really want to burn them with fire."/> <字串 編號="81905" 文字="Give this Quest to me."/> <字串 編號="81906" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="81907" 文字="You don't like these Treeman too? So will you please help to cut these weird Treeman down?"/> <字串 編號="81908" 文字="You seem to be too weak, below Lvl/c$2 30 /c*.You'd better stay back and don't touch those Treeman"/> <字串 編號="81909" 文字="Please help to cut down all these [/c$2Lake Deathwoods/c*]in the forest. I can't put up with these running geeks."/> <字串 編號="81910" 文字="Well done. Those wood bites show that you are serious with the Deathwood."/> <字串 編號="81911" 文字="This is little reward for you."/> <字串 編號="82001" 文字="You know that there are Circus Tyrants making trouble in our village? Our infrastructure is all in a mess. I am anxious about the lack of wood to repair our damaged furniture."/> <字串 編號="82002" 文字="Let me collect them for you."/> <字串 編號="82003" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="82004" 文字="Please help to collect five excellent wood from the [/c$2Lake Deathwoods/c*].I will give you the rewards."/> <字串 編號="82005" 文字="You want to collect wood? You will faint if you even bump into those Deathwoods. Come back to help after you reach Lvl/c$2 30 /c*."/> <字串 編號="82006" 文字="Come back to me if you have collected five excellent wood from the [/c$2Lake Deathwoods/c*]"/> <字串 編號="82007" 文字="Not bad. You are certainly agile. Do you want to be my assistant? I will take the wood first."/> <字串 編號="82008" 文字="This is the money I promised. Take it. Tell me if you want to help."/> <字串 編號="82101" 文字="I have trained in this tranquil valley for years. This place has become so noisy due to the Evil Nazarite and Wild Lizardmen."/> <字串 編號="82102" 文字="What are the Evil Nazarite?"/> <字串 編號="82103" 文字="Tell me how I can help."/> <字串 編號="82104" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="82105" 文字="They are Religious Fanatics of the Demon God and come all the way from the [/c$2Dark City/c*].Maybe they are searching for something here, haunting nearby all the day. So mean."/> <字串 編號="82106" 文字="Frankly speaking, I respect Dark City humans. They can put up with the crazy behavior of these Fanatics."/> <字串 編號="82107" 文字="I need someone to help me to drive away the Evil Nazarite haunting in the valley to make it tranquil again."/> <字串 編號="82108" 文字="I will take care of it."/> <字串 編號="82109" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="82110" 文字="Really? Then please help to drive away those [/c$2Evil Nazarite/c*]"/> <字串 編號="82111" 文字="Thanks but your level is under Lvl/c$2 30 /c*.They are not easily handled. "/> <字串 編號="82112" 文字="Please come back to tell me if you have driven away/c$2 40/c* Evil Nazarites. I am waiting here for you."/> <字串 編號="82113" 文字="Good training. Those Evil Nazarites are not your equals."/> <字串 編號="82114" 文字="I hope those Evils will be driven back to Dark City one day to make this valley tranquil again."/> <字串 編號="82201" 文字="Have you ever met the [/c$2Wild Lizardmen/c*]who hide in the bushes? They are aggressive. They always come to destroy my house and loot my food when I am not there."/> <字串 編號="82202" 文字="You want me to teach them a lesson?"/> <字串 編號="82203" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="82204" 文字="You are willing to help? Great, then please teach those [/c$2Wild Lizardmen/c*]a hard lesson."/> <字串 編號="82205" 文字="How dare you? How can you beat lizard men when you are lower than Lvl/c$2 30/c* . I advise you to give up."/> <字串 編號="82206" 文字="Please come back to tell me if you have exiled/c$2 30/c* Lizardmen. I am waiting here."/> <字串 編號="82207" 文字="Thanks for exiling that many Lizardmen. Now it's tranquil again. They dare not come here again."/> <字串 編號="82208" 文字="I truly hope that those vile green Lizardman will disappear one day "/> <字串 編號="82301" 文字="I am the Breeze Jungle Militia Soldierin charge of watching the environment of the path from Tranquil Valley to Breeze Jungle. It seems much better these days."/> <字串 編號="82302" 文字="Tell me about your work"/> <字串 編號="82303" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="82304" 文字="According to my long investigation, I have noticed that groups of Fanatics have come all the way from Dark city to force their beliefs on people. I am pondering on how to keep them out for Breeze Jungle so that it will not badly influenced"/> <字串 編號="82305" 文字="I can help"/> <字串 編號="82306" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="82307" 文字="Great! I am in urgent need of Adventurers. Will you help to drive away/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Evil Bishops/c*].That will beat them. "/> <字串 編號="82308" 文字="It's too dangerous for you because you are below Lvl/c$2 30 /c*.I can't let you take this work."/> <字串 編號="82309" 文字="Please come back to tell me if you exile/c$2 40/c* Evil Bishops. I am waiting here."/> <字串 編號="82310" 文字="I applaud you! Well done. Ever thought about joining in our Breeze Jungle Militia? "/> <字串 編號="82311" 文字="Thanks for your help. Please take this reward."/> <字串 編號="82401" 文字="We, Militia, have figured out a method to find their base and exile these religious Fanatics forever. "/> <字串 編號="82402" 文字="May I join in ?"/> <字串 編號="82403" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="82404" 文字="Sure. We really need some help. We think that the clue to their base is hidden on the stone of the crown of the [/c$2Evil Bishops/c*]"/> <字串 編號="82405" 文字="It's a pity that we can't trust your level. Come back to try again after you reach Lvl/c$2 30 /c*."/> <字串 編號="82406" 文字="You can only obtain stones from the [/c$2Evil Bishops/c*].Come back to me after you have collected/c$2 5/c* stones."/> <字串 編號="82407" 文字="Yes. These are the right stones. Let me send them back for research and analysis to the head office of the Breeze Jungle Militia"/> <字串 編號="82408" 文字="Adventurer, we Breeze Jungle Militia appreciate your help."/> <字串 編號="82501" 文字="You! Also Adventurer come to exploit this infertile land? I am a famous Adventurer. My feet have landed on every corner of Eden. Now I am preparing to challenge this damp and dangerous place. However..."/> <字串 編號="82502" 文字="Tell me about the difficulty of your adventure"/> <字串 編號="82503" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="82504" 文字="You are bright-eyed Adventurer. Right. I am in trouble. I can't move on because many Man-eating Flowers that live on human fresh and blood are blocking my way. "/> <字串 編號="82505" 文字="Let me defeat those Man-eating Flowers"/> <字串 編號="82506" 文字="Take care. Bye"/> <字串 編號="82507" 文字="Then please help to defeat this cruel plant. Do come back to me until after you beat/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Nepenthess/c*].I will give you great reward. "/> <字串 編號="82508" 文字="Are you sure you can do it? In my opinion, don't approach here before you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*~~.It's very dangerous."/> <字串 編號="82509" 文字="Defeat/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Nepenthess/c*].They mostly live in east half of this place and wait to attack the innocent. I am waiting here. "/> <字串 編號="82510" 文字="Well done, Adventurer.The number has been tremendously cut down. Now I can bathe in the swamp with natural fragrance and start back on my adventure."/> <字串 編號="82511" 文字="This is the reward I promised. Maybe we can co-operate again if we get the chance."/> <字串 編號="82601" 文字="So you know my worry. Frankly speaking, I was attacked by the Man-Eating Flower whilst adventuring in the east Swamp area. Though I was not badly injured my tools were stolen."/> <字串 編號="82602" 文字="Let me find them for you."/> <字串 編號="82603" 文字="I am busy. I am I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="82604" 文字="I didn't know there are still warm Adventurers like you left. Then thanks in advance. Please beat more [/c$2Nepenthess c*]and find my/c$2 9/c* adventuring tools for me."/> <字串 編號="82605" 文字="Are you sure you can do it? In my opinion, don't approach here before you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*~~.It's very dangerous."/> <字串 編號="82606" 文字="I have/c$2 9/c* pieces of equipment in total with my name [Peter]carved on each. You could possibly get them after beating the [/c$2Nepenthes/c*]"/> <字串 編號="82607" 文字="You are really my life companions. Equipment, this familiar comprassor, telescope, notebook, knife and cook...Sorry. I will be more careful from now on."/> <字串 編號="82608" 文字="Thank you so much. Please take this reward.
