You are welcome back to help me again if you ever get the chance."/> <字串 編號="82701" 文字="I am not used to meeting people in such remote places. I am a Botany Specialist doing research into plant's green color and care."/> <字串 編號="82702" 文字="Tell me the details of this green."/> <字串 編號="82703" 文字="Tell me about your research"/> <字串 編號="82704" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="82705" 文字="The outer laying areas generally hold the idea that Iron Castle only focuses on mechanical technological research and development. However, we do attach high importance to environmental-protection. Iron Castle is surrounded by dry desert. And the desert is enlarging due to gas and heat pollution becoming severer in fast-speed industrialization. "/> <字串 編號="82706" 文字="Greenland will disappear faster in the future if this problem is not tackled. Even the Breeze Jungle surroundings may become affected by this. Thus more and more learners devote themselves to the research of plant and soil."/> <字串 編號="82707" 文字="I intended to take notes on the air humidity and plant growth and collect some samples to study in the swamp, only to find large group of giant Tree Elves standing in the road, stopping me from moving on."/> <字串 編號="82708" 文字="Give this Quest to me."/> <字串 編號="82709" 文字="I'd better go back."/> <字串 編號="82710" 文字="I want you to drive away those Tree Elves with slight force. Just drive away/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Fantastic Tree Elves/c*]. Don't be too hard to them. They are all rare plants."/> <字串 編號="82711" 文字="It's good that you are ready to help. But you should be qualified. It's better that you come to try again after you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*"/> <字串 編號="82712" 文字="Have you driven away/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Fantastic Tree Elves/c*]? They all assemble to the center and west of the Mysterious Wetland."/> <字串 編號="82713" 文字="You are shockingly efficient! It's so good that they dare not stand in the road now and that they were not badly injured"/> <字串 編號="82714" 文字="We will be highly praised by the Senior Officials if the Iron Castle project can be successfully carried out. Please take this reward and have a good trip."/> <字串 編號="82801" 文字="We don't have good enough technology to re-forest the desert. I want to take the buds from the Tree Elves back for research. Are you willing to help me?"/> <字串 編號="82802" 文字="Let me make it!"/> <字串 編號="82803" 文字="I'm quite busy, how Tell me about the other day."/> <字串 編號="82804" 文字="Ok. Please go to fetch/c$2 5/c* [/c$2Fantastic Tree Buds/c*]from /c$2Fantastic Tree Elves/ and forward them to me."/> <字串 編號="82805" 文字="It's good that you are ready to help. But you should be qualified. It's better that you come to try again after you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*"/> <字串 編號="82806" 文字="The/c$2 5/c* new buds are only very few. But it's difficult because there will be injury to the tree and it will be hard to keep plantable buds safe during battles with /c$2Fantastic Tree Elves/. Whatever, please be patient. They all assemble to the center and west of the Mysterious Wetland."/> <字串 編號="82807" 文字="Are these the new buds of the Tree Elves...Really energetic .So my research is in a higher stage."/> <字串 編號="82808" 文字="This stands for the acknowledgement of our members for your help. Please do take it."/> <字串 編號="82901" 文字="Hahaha~Bro, have you never seen an Evil Spell Fanatic like me ?Get out of my way if you want to survive."/> <字串 編號="82902" 文字="It's boring, I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="82903" 文字="You know what the [Soul Core]is for?"/> <字串 編號="82904" 文字="...I am in the middle of a charming ritual. I have no time for your business. Come here later."/> <字串 編號="82905" 文字="Wow! I didn't know you had got so much fruit. So you have ruined many plant's lives?"/> <字串 編號="82906" 文字="You mean? I am not that cruel? At least I obtained these nuts by damaging those Demon Trees and Flowers. Men of Evil like me are always cruel. "/> <字串 編號="82907" 文字="I don't think this nut is of any use to you. Can I have it?(Giggles)"/> <字串 編號="82908" 文字="I'll let you try."/> <字串 編號="82909" 文字="I don't want to work with you. Byebye."/> <字串 編號="82910" 文字="Ok, then I am casting spells to get the soul and power of the nut re-instated..."/> <字串 編號="82911" 文字="I seem to see one Man-eating Flower, mouth wide open, eager for your fresh meat and blood...!"/> <字串 編號="82912" 文字="I seem to see one Demon Tree waving its limbs, shouting about how it is going to split open...!"/> <字串 編號="82913" 文字="It's endless darkness...without any passive will. So this indeed a rare perfect nut."/> <字串 編號="82914" 文字="You didn't hear those soul's moan? Go to ease them."/> <字串 編號="82915" 文字="My ritual is over...I want to keep this nut. You can leave."/> <字串 編號="82916" 文字="This is you slight reward. Give more to me if you find them.(Giggling...)"/> <字串 編號="83001" 文字="As humans become more greedy and degenerated, the Eden is also becoming full of evil ideas. This originally Tranquil Desert is over run by so many Skeletons and Evil Souls. I am so worried."/> <字串 編號="83002" 文字="What is the Warrior like?"/> <字串 編號="83003" 文字="Tell me about the evil Barft"/> <字串 編號="83004" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="83005" 文字="Beasts Race which is close to natural power has long been the practice of strict training to make their nature uncommon and their hearts able to communicate with Nature's creatures and souls. They commit themselves to protect Nature and prevent or punish any damage to the life balance from any Evil Souls or Devils."/> <字串 編號="83006" 文字="And I am one of the [/c$2Warriors/c*]. As technology develops, many races on Eden don't believe in the harmony amongst the divine, Devil and Nature. But we stick to our mission passed down generations and take this responsibility though being not agreed upon."/> <字串 編號="83007" 文字="A group of evil Barfts acting together are posing a threat to the safety of travelers. They even spread their influence. I am ready to help, but in vain by myself.."/> <字串 編號="83008" 文字="Let me give you a hand."/> <字串 編號="83009" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="83010" 文字="You also want to stop their evil doings? Then go to defeat/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Hook Barfts/c*]or there will be disaster."/> <字串 編號="83011" 文字="Your training is not good enough, Adventurer. Come to help when you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*. We Warriors will need your help then."/> <字串 編號="83012" 文字="The /c$2Hook Barfts/c*]take up half of the west Dragon Graveyard. You need to help me defeat/c$2 45/c* and I need to build a boundary by spirit power to stop them spreading."/> <字串 編號="83013" 文字=" The chaos caused by the Barft seems to be over after your hard work. People will no longer live under the horror of them"/> <字串 編號="83014" 文字="I thank you on behalf of all of the Warriors. This is my small reward. Please take it."/> <字串 編號="83101" 文字="The Hook Barft are rampaging around Dragon Graveyard not only hurting many innocents but also driving them crazy by casting spells to make them attack nearby. This can't be overlooked. The number of those injured is increasing fast!"/> <字串 編號="83102" 文字="According to ancient records, I know that only by taking the sharpened tool from the Hook Barft can you relieve the spell."/> <字串 編號="83103" 文字="I will fetch you some."/> <字串 編號="83104" 文字="See you another day."/> <字串 編號="83105" 文字="I can't leave this place. Thank you for shouldering burden for me. Please go to defeat the [/c$2Hook Barft/c*]and take their [/c$2Barft Tine Horns/c*]. I need/c$2 5/c* in total. Hurry up. Many injured people are waiting for your help."/> <字串 編號="83106" 文字="Your training is not good enough, Adventurer. Come to help when you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*. We Warriors will need your help then."/> <字串 編號="83107" 文字="You have not yet obtained/c$2 5/c* [/c$2Barft Tine Horns/c*].Go to find them in west Dragon Graveyard. You have the chance to take them complete 尖角 after defeating them."/> <字串 編號="83108" 文字="This is the Barft Tine Horn I needed...The injured can shake off the horrible curses now. They will be very grateful."/> <字串 編號="83109" 文字="This is the your reward. I hope you can continue to help us to stop the spread of Evil."/> <字串 編號="83201" 文字="Have you seen piles of Skeletons far away, Adventurer? They used to be brave Aurora City Knights who came to fight the Evil dragon. But an unknown Evil Power turned them into this form."/> <字串 編號="83202" 文字="Tell me about the Knight's Soul."/> <字串 編號="83203" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="83204" 文字="I am the Knight who was ordered to come here alone to help these pitiful souls. But they used to be senior Knights, I can't fight them though they are controlled."/> <字串 編號="83205" 文字="Let me help you."/> <字串 編號="83206" 文字="Don't be sad, see you."/> <字串 編號="83207" 文字="Ok. Then help to relieve souls of/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Ancient Soldiers/c*].Return to me after that and I will reward you."/> <字串 編號="83208" 文字="You are brave. But I don't want you to become one of them too. Come back to try after you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*."/> <字串 編號="83209" 文字="Your goal is those [/c$2Ancient Soldiers/c*]with only cruel intentions. Return to me after releasing/c$2 45 /c*."/> <字串 編號="83210" 文字="Seems like you finished it easily. Our seniors' souls will never be controlled again. I can't understand why the Senior Officials didn't think it was so important?"/> <字串 編號="83211" 文字="You accomplished such a tough and sad quest for me. Please take this reward, Adventurer."/> <字串 編號="83301" 文字="These brave but pitiful Knights, lying on the desert without any care. They died for righteousness and justice. But even now are being controlled by what they once fought against. I hope to collect their bones and souls to take back to bury in Aurora City."/> <字串 編號="83302" 文字="I'd like to help."/> <字串 編號="83303" 文字="Come on, see you."/> <字串 編號="83304" 文字="Really? Then please help to beat the [/c$2Ancient Soldiers/c*]and collect/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Complete Skeletons/c*]for me. It's difficult to keep them complete in the fierce battle but I believe in you. You will have many more chances to try again."/> <字串 編號="83305" 文字="I can feel the sincerity from your eyes. But you will die. It's safer after you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*."/> <字串 編號="83306" 文字="You have not yet collected/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Complete Skeletons/c*].Well come on. Never give up is knight's spirit."/> <字串 編號="83307" 文字="Adventurer, you did a big favor for our Aurora City Knights. Our seniors can now long rest peacefully."/> <字串 編號="83308" 文字="This is reward coming from our Knight's appreciation for you. Take this glorious symbol, Adventurer. "/> <字串 編號="83401" 文字="Wuh...My stone! my stone!!"/> <字串 編號="83402" 文字="What's wrong with you?"/> <字串 編號="83403" 文字="I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="83404" 文字="Whilst I was taking a nap, swarms of Coo-ers landed here and pecked me hard. Fortunately I was agile enough to drive them away, only to find that my stone bag had been taken when I got back."/> <字串 編號="83405" 文字="Then what do you think we should do?"/> <字串 編號="83406" 文字="...see you."/> <字串 編號="83407" 文字="Those stones in the bag are all very rare and priceless. However, I dare not provoke those [/c$2Deset Coo-ers/c*]who live on bone-biting..."/> <字串 編號="83408" 文字="I can help search for you"/> <字串 編號="83409" 文字="I am I'm leaving"/> <字串 編號="83410" 文字="You are the kindest Adventurer I've ever met. Please go to fight those vile [/c$2Desert Coo-ers/c*]and find my bag on their bodies. Though there is a tiny chance, I still hope you will try."/> <字串 編號="83411" 文字="By the way, the stones in the bag are of various levels namely [/c$2Superior/c*], [/c$2Regular/c*]and [/c$2Inferior/c*].The more valuable stones you bring back, the more I will reward you."/> <字串 編號="83412" 文字="...You are just like a child, you can't defeat me let alone those Coo-ers.I will consider it if you reach Lvl/c$2 35/c* ."/> <字串 編號="83413" 文字="Have you found my stones? You will find more if you defeat more [/c$2Desert Coo-ers/c*].All is dependent on you."/> <字串 編號="83414" 文字="Have you found my stones? Let me have a look...!"/> <字串 編號="83415" 文字="These are all inferior stones, dark and full of cracks...They are of little value."/> <字串 編號="83416" 文字="I can only reward you little. Come to talk to me if you want to go on searching."/> <字串 編號="83417" 文字="These regular stones aren't worth so much money. You can try to sell them in the market if you don't believe me."/> <字串 編號="83418" 文字="...of course I will keep them myself. It's not easy getting them back. Please take this reward. We can talk later if you want to continue to search."/> <字串 編號="83419" 文字="Err...!Isn't this the rare superior stone selected from among a million stones? Look at it's glory. You are really my lucky star."/> <字串 編號="83420" 文字="Please take this reward. It's the best I can offer. I hope you can continue to search for more stones after."/> <字串 編號="83501" 文字="North of the Mirror Lake is full of fish and has good surroundings. It is said to be a paradise for fishermen. But just recently swarms of Soldier Crabs, who are fond of nipping, have been stopping me from fishing."/> <字串 編號="83502" 文字="Tell me something about fishing"/> <字串 編號="83503" 文字="Tell me something Tell me about the Soldier Crab"/> <字串 編號="83504" 文字="I'm leaving now."/> <字串 編號="83505" 文字="Speaking of that, those fishermen have been so unlucky recently. Dawn Harbor is full of dirty Rats, Riprap Coast and Cherry Village have almost become a private Pirate playground, South of Mirror Lake has been rampaged by the Evil Circus. There is just no place left for the peaceful man!"/> <字串 編號="83506" 文字="I intended to restart fishing in the bleak North of Mirror Lake. Who knows maybe the Soldier Crab are rampaging there too. If it continues like us this all of us fishermen will have to turn to farming."/> <字串 編號="83507" 文字="Those vile [/c$2Iron Crabs/c*]always hide in the water and attack people. If you are nipped by them, you can't walk for three days. I really hope somebody can teach them a firm lesson..."/> <字串 編號="83508" 文字="Let me handle this small problem."/> <字串 編號="83509" 文字="I'm leaving."/> <字串 編號="83510" 文字="Haha!You brave young man. Ok then, help to drive away/c$2 45 /c [/c$2Iron Crabs/c*].I have prepared many rewards and yummy food for you on your return. Hurry up!"/> <字串 編號="83511" 文字="What? Look at yourself in the Mirror Lake. You are far too scrawny to mention defeating those Solider Crabs. It's never too late to help once you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*."/> <字串 編號="83512" 文字="Why come back when you have not yet accomplished your task? Remember it's you that said wanted to drive away/c$2 45/c* [/c$2Iron Solider Crabs./c*]"/> <字串 編號="83513" 文字="Ha-ha~~Great! The Solider Crabs have all gone. So I guess I underestimated you!"/> <字串 編號="83514" 文字="Come here. Take this reward. Don't forget to enjoy my special fish soup! Drop by when you are free. "/> <字串 編號="83601" 文字="The [/c$2Iron Solider Crab/c*]of the North of Mirror Lake always prevents my from fishing and so makes me poor. Fortunately I found out that they have a pearl inside their Shells. That should make up for some of the income I have lost if I can sell them!"/> <字串 編號="83602" 文字="I can help you to make a fortune"/> <字串 編號="83603" 文字="I'm still busy, Bye-bye."/> <字串 編號="83604" 文字="Really? You are also interested in this venture? Great! I will share the money with you if you help to bring back/c$2 9/c* [/c$2Milky Pearls/c*].Hurry up and beat some [/c$2Iron Solider Crabs/c*]and unclench the Shells to see if they have a pearl or not."/> <字串 編號="83605" 文字="What? Look at yourself in the Mirror Lake. You are far too scrawny to mention defeating those Solider Crabs. It's never too late to help once you reach Lvl/c$2 35 /c*."/> <字串 編號="83606" 文字="Did you bring the pearls from inside Soldier Crab's Shell?"/> <字串 編號="83607" 文字="...not yet finished! Don't waste time here, get a move on to defeat the [/c$2Iron Crab/c*]and open their shells to find/c$2 9/c* [/c$2Milky Pearl/c*]before you come back here!"/> <字串 編號="83608" 文字="Yes,here they are! Have you ever seen such perfectly round and bright pearls? We could make our fortune by selling them to the rich women in Aurora City. We could become the richest merchants ever. "/> <字串 編號="83609" 文字="But the life of a fisherman suits me better. I am happy as I am. But if that's what you want to do. Then you can come back anytime to ask for my help to collect the pearls. "/> <字串 編號="83701" 文字="Hello Adventurer, I'm a Priest in training. I hope to learn about the complex relationships between man and nature. When I passed by here earlier, I heard what I can only describe as a cry from an Elf. Did you hear it too? "/> <字串 編號="83702" 文字="Tell me about the local Water Elves. "/> <字串 編號="83703" 文字="I wish to leave. "/> <字串 編號="83704" 文字="I'm afraid that something has changed around here recently. The normally docile, Water Elves have become very aggressive and now are very easy to rile. They have been attacking the nearby creatures for no reason at all. Because of this they are the most feared beings around here. Have you noticed it too?"/> <字串 編號="83705" 文字="I could expel them from here for you?"/> <字串 編號="83706" 文字="Sorry I don't think so. Bye. "/> <字串 編號="83707" 文字="Don't worry we also have the Elves best interests at heart. We don't want to hurt them. But after considering the safety of tourists and what may happen if more get hurt, then it is clear that we have no choice. To try and sort them out you must first defeat the/c$2 45/c* [/c$2North Lake Water Fairy/c*]. If you do that then the random attacks should be at an end. "/> <字串 編號="83708" 文字="Adventurer, your training is no better than those who have tried but failed at this task before. I advise you to train more. You must be at least of the level of/c$2 35 /c*, before you try to attack such a foe as this. "/> <字串 編號="83709" 文字="The Elves' residence is at the southeast of [/c*North of Mirror Lake/c*]. Please go and defeat/c$2 45/c* [/c$2North Lake Water Fairy/c*]to prevent any further attacks on our tourists. "/> <字串 編號="83710" 文字="Aahh! Thank you so much. Now the tourists can pass by here safely. Although it's too bad for Elves, I still don't know why they became so aggressive? Because of the fishermen? Or the increasing numbers of tourists? Or maybe some other cause?"/> <字串 編號="83711" 文字="I think perhaps I should stay at Mirror Lake to try and study the cause of the changes. Here are some gifts as a thank you for your help, Adventurer. May the god of the Nature guard you forever. "/> <字串 編號="83801" 文字="I think you must also have noticed that the have Elves become very aggressive. I wish to know whether this has also caused any impact on their bodies. "/> <字串 編號="83802" 文字="Can I help you?"/> <字串 編號="83803" 文字="...Bye. "/> <字串 編號="83804" 文字="Will you please help me fetch/c$2 5/c* [/c$2Spirit Piece/c*]from [/c$2North Lake Water Fairy/c*]. Come to me when you obtain them."/> <字串 編號="83805" 文字="You need more training, Adventurer. It would be better for you to come back once your level exceeds/c$2 35 /c*. "/> <字串 編號="83806" 文字="Will you please help me fetch/c$2 5/c* [/c$2Spirit Piece/c*]from [/c$2North Lake Water Fairy/c*]ASAP? I really need them now. "/> <字串 編號="83807" 文字="You have completed the task, thanks Adventurer. But, even though this means that there will be no more attacks from the Elves, since Spirit Piece has been taken down, I still feel very sorry because they also get hurt. "/> <字串 編號="83808" 文字="But I had to do it in order to find out the reason behind it all. Here is a gift to say thank-you for all of your help. May the god of The Nature guard you forever. "/> <字串 編號="83901" 文字="Wow!! I can't believe it I have found a message in a bottle!"/> <字串 編號="83902" 文字="I must open it! Huh? Just someone's scribble, I guess it looks a bit like a map but I just can't figure out the meaning of it..."/> <字串 編號="83903" 文字="Why don't you try going to Antique Appraisers in the world (Aurora City, Dark City, Breeze Jungle and Iron Castle) maybe at one of these places they can assess its value and use for you? "/> <字串 編號="83904" 文字="Then go to visit the experts!"/> <字串 編號="83905" 文字="Greetings, Adventurer. I am Antique Appraiser. You can come to me if you find any incredible antiques or interesting tools that you can not identify. "/> <字串 編號="83906" 文字="Greetings, Adventurer. I am Antique Appraiser. Can I help you?"/> <字串 編號="83907" 文字="Can you identify this paper for me?"/> <字串 編號="83908" 文字="I will certainly have a go!"/> <字串 編號="83909" 文字="Hhmmmmm, let me see...Aahh! So mysterious scribbling! Almost like a map, or a drawing...How incredible..."/> <字串 編號="83910" 文字="I'm very sorry. The meaning of this piece eludes me, I can't explain it. Why don't you go to other Antique Appraisers. Perhaps they may know something. "/> <字串 編號="83911" 文字="I'm sorry that I can't give you a satisfactory answer. Please go to other Antique Appraisers in the bigger city. They will have a better chance of understanding it. Yes I feel that your answer will wait for you there. "/> <字串 編號="83912" 文字="This one...Hhmmm, it appears to be a queer red circle with some kind of yellow symbol inside. This map shows characteristics that could be an area of Eton, but I'm not sure? Oh dear, I am so confused..."/> <字串 編號="83913" 文字="Well, all I can say is that it's probably an old treasure map. However, I would suggest that you go to the other Antique Appraisers for a second opinion."/> <字串 編號="83914" 文字="Ahh...The other Antique Appraisers also thinks it's a map? But, it's not possible to say that it's definitely a treasure map. The problem being that there are no accurate location signs or descriptions of the surrounding area. I mean, this map could be of anywhere. "/> <字串 編號="83915" 文字="So even the experts seem to be confused by it. Surely someone must know of the maps origin?"/> <字串 編號="83916" 文字="Could this really be what I think it is?...!!"/> <字串 編號="83917" 文字="This is the so-called battle map, drawn by the former Knight Colonel Douglas of Aurora City. We can imagine just how exciting the atmosphere in the meeting must have been from the speedy scribbles. Although just a doodle, it shows completely the excellent battle plan he came up with."/> <字串 編號="83918" 文字="It's an Angel Statue－ [Michael's worry]by the great wandering artist Leopher. Such exquisite drawing. See how he has perfectly captured the handsome but sad face. Aaahhh, it really exceeds the human definition of "beauty". And how wonderful that it should appear again after being lost for so long. Just, just, incredible! "/> <字串 編號="83919" 文字="This is an imagined sight map from the Orient. Look at the ink sketches, the temple-like buildings,the splendid line drawn mountains and clouds, the gorgeous character of [Captical], [Cloud Road], [Sky Temple]...Although this is not the map of Eden, it's still a rare piece of the oriental collection. "/> <字串 編號="83920" 文字="Wow! This map really shows the way to find real buried treasure. Not gold and jewels but the most powerful weapon ever imagined. It's said that it far surpasses the power of any defenses that we have now. From the fly bomb to the scatter-gun. It's was stolen by a teenage revolutionary and become his favorite weapon. However it exploded deep in the depths of the desert and became lost until now..."/> <字串 編號="83921" 文字="Please, please sell this incredible draw to me. "/> <字串 編號="83922" 文字="Ok..."/> <字串 編號="83923" 文字="Let me think about it. "/> <字串 編號="83924" 文字="Great! Please take this money and these gifts. You have brought new energy to our dry antique world."/> <字串 編號="84001" 文字="Oh Shlunk!...There is no-one around to ask the way from. Only some aborigines, but I don't speak their language. I knew that I shouldn't have taken this shortcut. And now I don't know how to get to the Breeze Jungle, and the Special-Offer sales may finish soon..."/> <字串 編號="84002" 文字="I need help! "/> <字串 編號="84003" 文字="I wish to leave. "/> <字串 編號="84004" 文字="I have just finished fighting in a battle in Dark City and was going to the Breeze Jungle. I took this shortcut because I am in a bit of a rush to get to the sales. There is only a little time left before it ends. Now I have been surrounded by the Savage Aborigines. My goodness, what do they want from me?...Am I going to be their dinner?"/> <字串 編號="84005" 文字="Let me settle this problem."/> <字串 編號="84006" 文字="Don't be so upset next time. Bye. "/> <字串 編號="84007" 文字="Really? You will help me? I am so moved! Please defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Savage Dogface/c*]. I am terrified by the idea that they will take me to their Savage Leader. "/> <字串 編號="84008" 文字="You said that you could help me! But you seem too unprotected and naive. Your role level needs to exceed/c$2 40/c* before you take these guys on! Go and train then come back to save me later. But please hurry!!!!!"/> <字串 編號="84009" 文字="Please hurry up to defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Savage Dogface/c*] in [/c$2Thorn Wasteland/c*] to save my life! "/> <字串 編號="84010" 文字="So you are back, brave Adventurer! There are no little Earth Man guarding the Dragon Graveyard. You have already saved a grateful maiden's precious life. "/> <字串 編號="84011" 文字="You must know that Dragon Graveyard is also very dangerous. But relax. There will be always heroes around whenever beauty is in danger. Now, please accept these as gifts. Thank-you once again Adventurer. "/> <字串 編號="84101" 文字="I was rushing from Dark City to the Breeze Jungle, so I took a shortcut but was attacked by Savage Aborigines. I managed to escape from them but my purse was stolen. "/> <字串 編號="84102" 文字="Would you like me to find it for you?"/> <字串 編號="84103" 文字="...It is time to leave. "/> <字串 編號="84104" 文字="You are too kind. I need your help to find whether my [/c$2Brand Bag/c*]has been taken by the [/c$2Savage Priest/c*]. There are/c$2 5/c* in total. But be careful there are many Savage Priests there and it will be very difficult. However, I believe that you are strong enough to defeat them!"/> <字串 編號="84105" 文字="Well...Your role level has not reached/c$2 40 /c*. I would rather smile at the wrong do-ers and try to get it back myself than let you killed. "/> <字串 編號="84106" 文字="You will get my/c$2 5/c* [/c$2Brand Bag/c*]after beating the [/c$2Savage Priest/c*]..."/> <字串 編號="84107" 文字="Yes, these are my five bags! You are so wonderful Adventurer! Look, these wolf-skin bags are so beautiful on my back. They are especially for dates... "/> <字串 編號="84108" 文字="This is my grateful thanks for your oh so brave help. Mmwaaahh! I wonder can I count on you if I have any troubles in the future?"/> <字串 編號="84201" 文字="Thorn Wasteland is one of the most dangerous places on the Garden of Eden. I would never ask you to help me there if it wasn't so very important. But if you do not wish to help us please say so."/> <字串 編號="84202" 文字="Tell me about the quest."/> <字串 編號="84203" 文字="I wish to leave. "/> <字串 編號="84204" 文字="Our soldiers at the front lines are tirelessly for keeping away the cruel Evils from around Iron Castle. However, many tourists have informed us that there are many Barfts threatening people's safety in the Thorn Wasteland. "/> <字串 編號="84205" 文字="May I help you?"/> <字串 編號="84206" 文字="I wish to leave. "/> <字串 編號="84207" 文字="We gladly welcome any adventurer who is willing to guard the safety of our people. Your reputation precedes you. The front line soldiers, on hearing about your exploits, have decided that you are the best choice to defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Fire Barft/c*]. You will be well rewarded if you succeed. "/> <字串 編號="84208" 文字="Alas, after checking your ability level we discovered that it is only [D-],barely higher than a commoners. Thus, we can not assign this quest to you. Please come to try again once your level reaches/c$2 40 /c*. "/> <字串 編號="84209" 文字="Numerous [/c$2Fire Barft/c*]are now fiercely attacking innocent people. Please go to defeat the/c$2 40/c* as quickly as you can, so no-one else will be hurt. "/> <字串 編號="84210" 文字="Our spy has already reported on your deeds. Well done! You have set a shining example for our formal members. "/> <字串 編號="84211" 文字="Please take this Supply, Material and Diploma as honorable gifts from the army. The Front line appreciates all of your efforts. "/> <字串 編號="84301" 文字="Recently we have battled with the Fire Barft but have been unsuccessful. After many discussions, we have concluded that our main weak point lies with our weapons. Their force seems to be blocked somehow by the Barft. "/> <字串 編號="84302" 文字="After reviewing the video of sight-battles, we have noticed that Fire Barft's furs are able to absorb the ammunition's power, with no ill effect on the creature. So we now must collect some of these furs to test our new weapons on. "/> <字串 編號="84303" 文字="Let me do it. "/> <字串 編號="84304" 文字="I am leaving now"/> <字串 編號="84305" 文字="The Front line now needs men. You are welcome to join us. The quest is to defeat [/c$2Fire Barft/c*]and take a whole set of/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Barft Fur/c*]for army research. If we are successful then there will be many rewards. "/> <字串 編號="84306" 文字="Alas, after checking your ability level we discovered that it is only [D-],barely higher than a commoners. Thus, we can not assign this quest to you. Please come to try again once your level reaches/c$2 40 /c*. "/> <字串 編號="84307" 文字="Your quest is to collect/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Barft Fur/c*]from the [/c$2Fire Barft/c*]. But take care not all of the Fire Barft furs conform to the standard required. "/> <字串 編號="84308" 文字="Our spy has already informed us of your exploits. You are very talented at attack and defense and you have very fast reactions. However, it can't be easy for an adventurer without an army title. "/> <字串 編號="84309" 文字="Please take this Supply, Material and Diploma, they are titles from the army. The Front line appreciates your efforts. "/> <字串 編號="84401" 文字="Hey there, friend...Would you like to fight with demons?"/> <字串 編號="84402" 文字="Wow that sure sounds exciting. "/> <字串 編號="84403" 文字="It is boring. Goodbye. "/> <字串 編號="84404" 文字="My friend, you must be a brave man, who has wandered near both life and death. Don't worry, I can see it all in your eyes, they show everything. Do you want to join us hunting? It's a lot of fun. "/> <字串 編號="84405" 文字="It is funny. I am in."/> <字串 編號="84406" 文字="...I am leaving now. "/> <字串 編號="84407" 文字="Great. Our aims is to collect/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Barft's Eyeball/c*],/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Cursed Mask/c*]/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Fallen Angel's Feather/c*]and/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Fire Demon's Spear/c*]!You need to take them from the strongest and fiercest creatures in the Garden of Eden."/> <字串 編號="84408" 文字="So what will it be? Join us? Or give up?"/> <字串 編號="84409" 文字="That's a piece of cake. I'm in. "/> <字串 編號="84410" 文字="Are you crazy? I quit. "/> <字串 編號="84411" 文字="Hurrah! Then let's get started. Let's see who will collect them first. Men on your way!!"/> <字串 編號="84412" 文字="It is natural to want to protect your life but not at the expense of living! Come back and see me once you have become enlightened. "/> <字串 編號="84413" 文字="Oh, what a pity! Your level has not yet reached our team's standard. Our lowest is level/c$2 40 /c*. Come back when you make the grade. "/> <字串 編號="84414" 文字="You are still in mood for kidding. Watch out for me. Remember, our goal is to collect/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Barft's Eyeball/c*],/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Cursed Mask/c*]/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Fallen Angel's Feather/c*]and/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Fire Demon's Spear/c*]!"/> <字串 編號="84415" 文字="Hints? It's won't be so exciting and fun if I give you some tips. You must find the items by yourself! And no cheating!!!!"/> <字串 編號="84416" 文字="Aahh, so you are back. Let me see...Alas!"/> <字串 編號="84417" 文字="Alas...Sorry. You have several broken bones and internal injuries...You have managed to get all but one of the items. You lack a [Fallen Angel's Feather]."/> <字串 編號="84418" 文字="Owwww!...It is so painful...I am totally defeated. I never believed that there could be one more willing to risk his life than me. But you are... "/> <字串 編號="84419" 文字="These are rewards are for you to remember our competition. You have inspired me to train further and strive to never be defeated again. "/> <字串 編號="84501" 文字="Long time no see Little Angel. I am Angel Picket. I came Eden to stop the increasingly fierce attacks from the pioneers in Evil Lyceum. "/> <字串 編號="84502" 文字="Ask for more details. "/> <字串 編號="84503" 文字="Tell me about the duty. "/> <字串 編號="84504" 文字="I wish to leave."/> <字串 編號="84505" 文字="As all of the Little Angel's in the Angel Lyceum come to Eden to clear their minds completely, the Evil Lyceum becomes more itching to try it on with us. Angel Lyceum Leader Michael worries that there will be more fierce conflict than Asmode Incident. Thus we need more hands to help prevent it. "/> <字串 編號="84506" 文字="The Evil Lyceum has seduced the Angel Lyceum and transformed some of us into Fallen Angels, destined to serve them. I can't let such a nefarious plan be successful. "/> <字串 編號="84507" 文字="I feel the same. Let me help you. "/> <字串 編號="84508" 文字="Goodbye."/> <字串 編號="84509" 文字="Are you willing to help lost students to find themselves again? Then please help to defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Fallen Angel/c*]. After I will send them back to the Angel Lyceum to be re-educated."/> <字串 編號="84510" 文字="I appreciate your enthusiasm Little Angel. But don't try to exceed your talent. You can return to help me once your grade reaches level/c$2 40 /c*. "/> <字串 編號="84511" 文字="Come on! Defeat the Evil Lyceum. Hurry and defeat the/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Fallen Angel/c*]. "/> <字串 編號="84512" 文字="We Angel Pickets really owe you, Little Angel. These 40 Fallen Angels have been safely sent back to the Angel Lyceum and can now receive their re-education."/> <字串 編號="84513" 文字="Only by joining forces and fighting together can we defeat the wicked but strong Evil Lyceum...Thank you. "/> <字串 編號="84601" 文字="Our spies have told us that the Evil Lyceum holds afterschool training and many talented students go out into Eden, to carry out their atrocious schemes. We have to stop them. "/> <字串 編號="84602" 文字="Let me try to take them down. "/> <字串 編號="84603" 文字="I am too busy. I have many other things to do. "/> <字串 編號="84604" 文字="You are so excellent. Your objective will be to defeat the [/c$2Burning Monsters /c]. Please dispatch the c$2 40/c* quickly and report back to me straight after. "/> <字串 編號="84605" 文字="I appreciate your enthusiasm Little Angel. But don't try to exceed your talent. You can return to help me once your grade reaches level/c$2 40 /c*. "/> <字串 編號="84606" 文字="Come on, we have no time to waste! Defeat the Evil Lyceum. Hurry and defeat/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Burning Monster/c*]. "/> <字串 編號="84607" 文字="Thanks for accomplishing this tough quest, little Angel. The defeated Burning Monsters have been sent to Angel Lyceum, so that we can properly manage them. I feel sure that the leaders of the Evil Lyceum must be getting very worried now. "/> <字串 編號="84608" 文字="I think Michael will be happy when he knows this news. I will wait here to tell him. Please come back if we ever need your help again, Little Angel. "/> <字串 編號="84701" 文字="You looks tired. Any creature in this world, human, God or devils must feel tired too. Alas..."/> <字串 編號="84702" 文字="Who are you?"/> <字串 編號="84703" 文字="Tell me about the quest"/> <字串 編號="84704" 文字="I wish to leave."/> <字串 編號="84705" 文字="Appearances can be deceptive. Don't you think so? Perhaps not, but I think you may be an Azrael. "/> <字串 編號="84706" 文字="We, Azrael, also have our work and quests. Life and death are only two sides of the same coin. If there is no death, then there can be no life. The world would just grind to a halt! "/> <字串 編號="84707" 文字="But there are some Azraels that only care about profit. They become intrigued and join the Evil Lyceum forsaking their own duties. I don't like to interfere into another's affairs. But, I really can't stand their cruel behavior. I will never let the Evil Lyceum win. Even if we do share the same ancestors. "/> <字串 編號="84708" 文字="So you see these [/c$2Guilt Azrael/c*]in the Thunder Ruins? They give up the dignity as Azrael and fight willingly for the Evil Lyceum, killing the innocent. It is impossible for me to defeat them on my own. Would you help me?"/> <字串 編號="84709" 文字="I can help you. "/> <字串 編號="84710" 文字="(I wish to leave! Be quick!)"/> <字串 編號="84711" 文字="So we are of the same mind. However, I would like you to kill/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Guilt Azrael/c*]. I will handle the rest."/> <字串 編號="84712" 文字="I am surprised to find an Angel that doesn't cherish his life. Don't mistake enthusiasm for ability little one. Return to me after your level has reached/c$2 40 /c*. You are too weak to withstand any attack right now. "/> <字串 編號="84713" 文字="Have you defeated/c$2 40/c* [/c$2Guilt Azrael/c*]? So they are disgraced. Defeat them all! Now!"/> <字串 編號="84714" 文字="Well...I'm happy that I got to fight by your side Little Angel. You are truly the stuff of legend! So we all live to fight another day. "/> <字串 編號="84715" 文字="I don't have the words to express my deep felt gratitude to you. Please take these gifts. They are your reward. I look forwards to fighting by your side again. "/> <字串 編號="84801" 文字="It's really none of my business what those spineless [/c$2Guilt Azrael/c*]want to do. But I can't let them carry on once they bring [/c$2Deathworld Hook/c*]to the Evil Lyceum. "/> <字串 編號="84802" 文字="This hook is for separating the human soul from the withered body. But, recently there has been an increasing number of victims who are not yet dead but have had their souls taken away. So I need to take them back. "/> <字串 編號="84803" 文字="I can help you to do this. "/> <字串 編號="84804" 文字="(Leave quickly!)"/> <字串 編號="84805" 文字="Lovely Angel, I appreciate your courage. If your really want to save the innocent, go to take back/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Deathworld Hook/c*]from [/c$2Guilt Azrael/c*]. By doing this you can save my strength and many lives. "/> <字串 編號="84806" 文字="I am surprised to find an Angel that doesn't cherish his life. Don't mistake enthusiasm for ability little one. Return to me after your level has reached/c$2 40 /c*. You are too weak to withstand any attack right now. "/> <字串 編號="84807" 文字="I am waiting here for you to bring them back/c$2 10/c* [/c$2Deathworld Hook/c*]from [/c$2Guilt Azrael/c*]. This constant battle has left me very tired. I will continue after a sleep. "/> <字串 編號="84808" 文字="Wow! I never would have believed that you could finish the task so quickly. You have brought all of the souls back uninjuredly. You are indeed one of the most rare heroes that I have ever come across!"/> <字串 編號="84809" 文字="These are your rewards, Azrael's gifts, do you like them? Do come back to see me whenever you are free. "/> <字串 編號="84901" 文字="Life is just one long game to me. The higher the risk, the more satisfying I find it! Do you feel like trying your luck with me? "/> <字串 編號="84902" 文字="May I first know the rules?"/> <字串 編號="84903" 文字="Yes!"/> <字串 編號="84904" 文字="No, I'm not interested. Goodbye!"/> <字串 編號="84905" 文字="It's easy. First you must collect the 3 card sets, namely [/c$2Angel Card set/c*], [/c$2Evil Card set/c*], [/c$2Azrael Card set/c*]. 13 pieces for each. You can only get them by defeating the Monsters in Thunder Ruins that correspond to the card set subject. However, success is meaningless if the card sets are not complete. "/> <字串 編號="84906" 文字="So let's begin. First you must pick one set and show the card. Compare the total points. But the exciting part is that every card contains a different power from gods. So the god's will either reward or punish you dependant on whether you win or lose. I told you that I thrived on risk. "/> <字串 編號="84907" 文字="Finally, once the game's over, the cards will return to the Monsters' body. Should you wish to play again you must start right from the very beginning."/> <字串 編號="84908" 文字="Good. Then I will wait here for you to collect all 3 card sets. Come on, don't waste time!"/> <字串 編號="84909" 文字="So, have you found all the card sets?"/> <字串 編號="84910" 文字="Let me know the rules first. "/> <字串 編號="84911" 文字="Not yet. "/> <字串 編號="84912" 文字="There. Let's start. "/> <字串 編號="84913" 文字="Great. So choose one set. "/> <字串 編號="84914" 文字="Choose [Angel Card set] "/> <字串 編號="84915" 文字="Choose [Evil Card set] "/> <字串 編號="84916" 文字="Choose [Azrael Card set]"/> <字串 編號="84917" 文字="...I wish to leave now. Come back later. "/> <字串 編號="84918" 文字="A new deck of cards. Ready? Pick your cards! Ready...Set...Go!"/> <字串 編號="84919" 文字="Haha...I won! Wow!! I can feel the magnificent power pouring into my body. Gorgeous! Remember to come and play with me next time. Hahaha..."/> <字串 編號="84920" 文字="(Meanwhile. It feels like millions of volts are running through your body! This must be the punishment. It is too painful to stand!)"/> <字串 編號="84921" 文字="Aahaa! It is a dogfall...So the Goddess of Luck found it too hard to choose between us...So let's try again next time."/> <字串 編號="84922" 文字="(All cards scatter in the air and fly far far away. )"/> <字串 編號="84923" 文字="Oh No!!! What a pity! So, you beat me. Ah well, it's only a game. It doesn't really matter. Let's try again next time, Ok? "/> <字串 編號="84924" 文字="(A ray of light collects in the palm of your hand and turns into a real gift)"/> <字串 編號="84925" 文字="Hey, Little Angel, I am the silly but helpful [/c$2Unwise Angel/c*]. Come on, let's enjoy this sweet valentine's day together. "/> <字串 編號="84926" 文字="Tell me about the [Cowherd and Vega]"/> <字串 編號="84927" 文字="Tell me about [Lover's gift of China]"/> <字串 編號="84928" 文字="I wish to help [Cowherd and Vega]"/> <字串 編號="84929" 文字="I want [Lover's gift of China] "/> <字串 編號="84930" 文字="I wish to leave"/> <字串 編號="84931" 文字="The annual meeting of Cowherd and Vega is coming. But, the careless Vega has fallen down onto the Garden of Eden. Cowherd follows her there...Kind hearted Angels, please come to help. "/> <字串 編號="84932" 文字=" During this activity, as long as you kill monsters over level 21, or collect products over level 21, you will have the chance to collect [/c$2Black Chocolate Brick/c*], [/c$2White Chocolate Brick/c*], [/c$2Chocolate Model/c*], [/c$2Fresh Strawberry/c*], [/c$2Sponge Cake/c*]. Such materials can easily be changed into different Lover's gift of China."/> <字串 編號="84933" 文字="[/c$2Black Chocolate/c*]= [/c$2Black Chocolate Brick/c*]*5 + [/c$2Chocolate Model/c*]*5 [/c$2White Chocolate/c*]= [/c$2White Chocolate Brick/c*]*5 + [/c$2Chocolate Model/c*]*5 [/c$2Strawberry Cake/c*]= [/c$2Fresh Strawberry/c*]*5 + [/c$2Sponge Cake/c*]*5"/> <字串 編號="84934" 文字="I really don't want to see this sweet couple stay apart. So I decided to make them special Cowherd and Vega rings but I have not yet finished. Once they are completed, no matter how far apart from each other they may be the rings will connect them..."/> <字串 編號="84935" 文字="Your level isn't high enough to deal with this situation. Come back here after you have reached level/c$2 20 /c*. "/> <字串 編號="84936" 文字="Oh you wonderful Angel! You are willing to help me to save their love. Please arrange for them to meet again. And also please help me to collect the correct materials, so that I can finish off their rings. Then when they meet I can present them to them."/> <字串 編號="84937" 文字="Wonderful Angel, please take these rings to them with my compliments. "/> <字串 編號="84938" 文字="What? The materials for the rings have been misplaced? You are so silly, like me. Don't worry. I will give you the list once again. Hurry up and bring them back. "/> <字串 編號="84939" 文字="Great! You have brought me the things that I need. Now I will finish the rings. Wait, I need your help with one more matter..."/> <字串 編號="84940" 文字="I need one more special item to finish the making the rings. You can only find it from/c$2 Black Jeweller Jelly/c* in the /c*/c$2 Palm Base/c*. Please help me to collect it [/c$ 25 Pink Diamonds/c*]. "/> <字串 編號="84941" 文字="Please help me to collect /c$ 25 Pink Diamonds/c* as soon as possible, Little Angel. "/> <字串 編號="84942" 文字="Little Angel /c$2%1/c*, you are so great. Now I will finish. Just give me a moment please. "/> <字串 編號="84943" 文字="Done! Please send these rings to Cowherd and Vega. According to Angel Pickets' reports,/c$2 Cowherd/c$2 has appeared in/c$2 Golden Beach /c$2,/c$2 Shining Coast /c$2,/c$2 Wave Harbor/c$2 and/c$2 Vega/c$2 in/c$2 Deity Palace Ruins /c$2,/c$2 Sad Abyss/c$2 and/c$2 Fiery Path /c$2."/> <字串 編號="84944" 文字="Wonderful Angel, please help me to send letter and ring to Cowherd and Vega. "/> <字串 編號="84945" 文字="I just don't understand? Where is my Vega? "/> <字串 編號="84946" 文字="I just don't understand? Where is my Cowherd?"/> <字串 編號="84947" 文字="Here you are. This is a ring from Unwise Angel. "/> <字串 編號="84948" 文字="Thank you for bringing me the letter and ring. "/> <字串 編號="84949" 文字="Thank you for bringing me the letter and ring. This is a letter for Unwise Angel, please help me give it to him."/> <字串 編號="84950" 文字="I have given the ring and the letter to Cowherd and Vega. Here are their letter for you."/> <字串 編號="84951" 文字="Please take this as payment for all of your help. "/> <字串 編號="84952" 文字="Angel, what kind of Lover's gift of China do you wish to exchange?"/> <字串 編號="84953" 文字="Exchange for [Black Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="84954" 文字="Exchange for [White Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="84955" 文字="Exchange for [Strawberry Cake]"/> <字串 編號="84956" 文字="I don't want to exchange now."/> <字串 編號="84957" 文字="How much Black Chocolate do you want to exchange for?"/> <字串 編號="84958" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 10/c* [Black Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="84959" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 50/c* [Black Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="84960" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 100/c* [Black Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="84961" 文字="I don't want to exchange now"/> <字串 編號="84962" 文字="How much White Chocolate do you want to exchange for?"/> <字串 編號="84963" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 10/c* [White Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="84964" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 50/c* [White Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="84965" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 100/c* [White Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="84966" 文字="I don't want to exchange now"/> <字串 編號="84967" 文字="How much White Chocolate do you want to exchange for?"/> <字串 編號="84968" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 10/c* [Strawberry Cake]"/> <字串 編號="84969" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 50/c* [Strawberry Cake]"/> <字串 編號="84970" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 100/c* [Strawberry Cake]"/> <字串 編號="84971" 文字="I don't want to exchange now"/> <字串 編號="84972" 文字="You don't have enough materials. I cannot exchange a present for you. "/> <字串 編號="84973" 文字="You will have many chances to exchange monsters or property over Lvl 21 for materials. Cherish your time. "/> <字串 編號="84974" 文字="Thanks. Then I will take it. "/> <字串 編號="84975" 文字="I just don't understand? Where is my Vega? "/> <字串 編號="84976" 文字="I just don't understand? Where is my Cowherd?"/> <字串 編號="84977" 文字="Hello, Little Angel. I am Black Jeweller Jelly. I have various jewels, if you wish to look. "/> <字串 編號="84978" 文字="Do you have [Pink Diamond]? I need five. "/> <字串 編號="84979" 文字="Yes. They are very precious and rare diamonds. Only we have them. Well, I will give you the best price I can, how about 5000 each? "/> <字串 編號="84980" 文字="Give me five. Thanks. "/> <字串 編號="84981" 文字="I don't have enough money just now for them. "/> <字串 編號="84982" 文字="I need more time to prepare these. I will come back in 10 hours. "/> <字串 編號="99999" 文字="Back to last page. "/> <字串/> <字串 編號="500001" 文字="I am the Dark Alchemist [/c$2Yake Mater/c*] in the Garden of Eden. I am highly proficient at refining dark articles. In fact I am the no.1."/> <字串 編號="500002" 文字="What are you doing standing by the outer city?"/> <字串 編號="500003" 文字="I wish to leave. "/> <字串 編號="500004" 文字="I am travelling around to collect [/c$2Devil Wings Shards/c*]to make dark articles."/> <字串 編號="500005" 文字="Tell me about Devil Wings. "/> <字串 編號="500006" 文字="Devil Wings are rare material used for making dark articles. They make incredible articles. But the Angels don't think too highly of them. Thus, I am standing here, waiting for a Little Angel to help me. "/> <字串 編號="500007" 文字="[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7], in total 7 kinds of [/c$2Devil Wings Shards/c*]will drop from monsters with level 10 to level 80. They can be exchanged for Dsack in their different combinations. "/> <字串 編號="500008" 文字="Devil Wings Shards1+2:can be exchanged for milk bread*10 or fruit Wine *10 Devil Wings Shards1+2+3:can be exchanged for Lvl 1 Dsack, Devil Wings Shards1+2+3+4:can be exchanged for Lvl 2 Dsack, Devil Wings Shards1+2+3+4+5:can be exchanged for Lvl 3 Dsack, Devil Wings Shards1+2+3+4+5+6:can be exchanged for Lvl 4 Dsack, Devil Wings Shards1+2+3+4+5+6+7:can be exchanged for Lvl 5 Dsack. "/> <字串 編號="500009" 文字="As long as you can collect [/c$2Devil Wings Shards/c*], I can give you the corresponding [/c$2Dsack/c*]. Is it attractive?"/> <字串 編號="500010" 文字="About Dsack and Epic Dsack."/> <字串 編號="500011" 文字="Dsack have five different levels. Every level has different quantity [/c$2Gloom/c*]. I can help you to upgrade to [/c$2Epic Dsack/c*]as a special favor as long as you give me [/c$2Dsack/c*]and [/c$2Gloom/c*]."/> <字串 編號="500012" 文字="[/c$2Lvl 1 Dsack/c*]+ [/c$2Gloom/c*]*2: can be exchanged for [/c$2Lvl 1 Epic Dsack/c*]"/> <字串 編號="500013" 文字="[/c$2Gloom/c*]can be bought from the item mall during activity. Be quick if you really want to buy."/> <字串 編號="500014" 文字="I wish to exchange a Dsack."/> <字串 編號="500015" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 1 Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500016" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 2 Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500017" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 3 Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500018" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 4 Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500019" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 5 Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500020" 文字="I wish to exchange a Epic Dsack "/> <字串 編號="500021" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 1 Epic Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500022" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 2 Epic Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500023" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 3 Epic Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500024" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 4 Epic Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500025" 文字="Exchange for Lvl 5 Epic Dsack"/> <字串 編號="500026" 文字="You haven't collected enough materials...Collect them then come to me, [Yake Mater]."/> <字串 編號="500027" 文字="Wow. So efficient. Thanks."/> <字串 編號="500028" 文字="[Epic Dsack]is a top article. Take it. Don't hesitate."/> <字串 編號="500029" 文字="your bag is too full. Tidy it to pack in more precious articles."/> <字串 編號="500030" 文字="Hello, /c$2%1/c*. I am the/c$2 Fool's Day Envoy /c*. What? My name? If you surround the city circling thrice and bark 3 times...then...I will...not tell you. Ha-ha...So much fun to be had from playing pranks. "/> <字串 編號="500031" 文字="What are you doing here?"/> <字串 編號="500032" 文字="Exchange for a Fools Treasure Bag."/> <字串 編號="500033" 文字="Exchange for a Fools Work Chest."/> <字串 編號="500034" 文字="You are too dull! Go away! "/> <字串 編號="500035" 文字="Oh yeah! Well if that's your opinion? Bring it on!!!!! Ha-ha!!! Don't beat me. I am only joking. I am here to make this Fool's day more interesting. "/> <字串 編號="500036" 文字="Oh? What's the activity?"/> <字串 編號="500037" 文字="You bore me! I have no interest in anything you have to say!"/> <字串 編號="500038" 文字="Ha-ha! Where do you think that I have hidden the/c$2 Fools Treasure Bag/c* in monsters who are more than level/c$2 21 /c*? You may obtain/c$2 Fool Lottery/c* from the bags. If you can collect/c$2 100/c* Fool Lottery, I can give you a/c$2 Fools Treasure Bag /c*. What's in it? I can only say...Well..."/> <字串 編號="500039" 文字="I have also scattered some/c$2 Fool Point Ticket/c* in materials which are more than level/c$2 21 /c*. If you can collect/c$2 100 /c*, I will give you a/c$2 Fools Work Chest /c*. What's in it? I only can say...it is a secret..."/> <字串 編號="500040" 文字="You don't have enough Fool Lotterys which can be exchanged. You don't know what you will exchange. Don't be so hardworking, will you?"/> <字串 編號="500041" 文字="You don't have enough Fool Point Tickets What can be exchanged for this few is definitely not so good. Don't be so hardworking, will you?"/> <字串 編號="500042" 文字="Now it's your turn to trouble me? Your bag is too full. How can I give you anything? Give me a little space. "/> <字串 編號="500043" 文字="Wow! You really crammed everything in there. Well I definitely didn't cheat you that time! It's all yours. Why not show it off to others?"/> <字串 編號="500044" 文字="Exchange for milk bread or Fruit Wine. "/> <字串 編號="500045" 文字="[/c$2Lvl 4 Dsack/c*]+ [/c$2Gloom/c*]*8: can be exchanged for [/c$2Superior Lvl 4 Dsack/c*]"/> <字串 編號="500046" 文字="hahaha...Thanks. "/> <字串 編號="500047" 文字="Then choose. Milk bread or Fruit Wine?"/> <字串 編號="500048" 文字="Hello, brave Angel. We have opened the long-closed Mysterious Area in the inner city as part of our training for the investigation. It is open for one week to the public. Do you want to see?"/> <字串 編號="500049" 文字="Please transmit me to Mysterious Area 1."/> <字串 編號="500050" 文字="Please transmit me to Mysterious Area 2."/> <字串 編號="500051" 文字="Please transmit me to Mysterious Area 3."/> <字串 編號="500052" 文字="I am not ready..."/> <字串 編號="500053" 文字="Hello, brave Angel. We have opened the long-closed Mysterious Area in the inner city as part of our training for the investigation. It is open for one week to the public. Do you want to see?"/> <字串 編號="500054" 文字="[/c$2L2 Dsack/c*]+ [/c$2Gloom/c*]*4:= [/c$2L2 Epic Dsack/c*]"/> <字串 編號="500055" 文字="[/c$2L3 Dsack/c*]+ [/c$2Gloom/c*]*6:= [/c$2L3 Epic Dsack/c*]"/> <字串 編號="500056" 文字="[/c$2L5 Dsack/c*]+ [/c$2Gloom/c*]*10:= [/c$2L5 Epic Dsack/c*]"/> <字串 編號="500057" 文字="Hello Angel, I am [/c$2Quyan/c*]. I come to the Garden of Eden to help you enjoy a good summer by the order of Michael. The time is limited. I can only help you from 8th June to 22nd June."/> <字串 編號="500058" 文字="Introduction of Dragon Boat Festival Activity"/> <字串 編號="500059" 文字="compound dumplings"/> <字串 編號="500060" 文字="exchange for Ox Horn Yellow Boy"/> <字串 編號="500061" 文字="Do you want to head for the Dragon Area?"/> <字串 編號="500062" 文字="I wish to leave."/> <字串 編號="500063" 文字="Tell me about the dumplings"/> <字串 編號="500064" 文字="Tell me about the Demon Bazac."/> <字串 編號="500065" 文字="Tell me about the Dragon Area "/> <字串 編號="500066" 文字="During this activity, as long as you kill monsters over Lvl 21, or collect products over Lvl 21, you will have the chance to collect items, [/c$2Fragrant Thai Rice/c*], [/c$2Muscle/c*], [/c$2Fresh Shrimp/c*], [/c$2Fresh Mushroom/c*]. Such ingredients can make dumplings with different tastes that have different effects. Your power will largely increase after eating them and help you to resist attack from [Demon Bazac]and Riddle City Army."/> <字串 編號="500067" 文字="[/c$2Festival Dumplings/c*]= [/c$2Fragrant Thai Rice/c*]*5 + [/c$2Fresh Mushroom/c*]*5 [/c$2Meat Dumplings/c*]= [/c$2Fragrant Thai Rice/c*]*5 + [/c$2Muscle/c*]*5 [/c$2Seafood Dumplings/c*]= [/c$2Fragrant Thai Rice/c*]*5 + [/c$2Fresh Shrimp/c*]*5"/> <字串 編號="500068" 文字="You all have chances to exchange monsters or property over Lvl 21 for ingredients. Cherish your time. "/> <字串 編號="500069" 文字="The greedy Demon Bazac knows that I've come to Garden of Eden to make dumplings thus will come to loot. It's said that he shows up here at sharp 19:00 every evening with Riddle City Army. If you can successfully resist them and take their [/c$2Ox Ox Horn Yellow Boy/c*], I have precious rewards for you. "/> <字串 編號="500070" 文字="The exchange rule for Ox Horn Yellow Boy: [/c$2Ox Horn Yellow Boy/c*]*1 = Ride Feed [/c$2Ox Horn Yellow Boy/c*]*10 =Blue Sea Soldier or Shake Turtle [/c$2Ox Horn Yellow Boy/c*]*20 = Polis Egg or Storm Egg or Quintet Egg"/> <字串 編號="500071" 文字="[/c$2Ox Horn Yellow Boy/c*]*70 = Secret Sword or Nemesis Axe or Thunder King or Fire Tooth or Mage Staff [/c$2Ox Horn Yellow Boy/c*]*200 = Adam's Power or Elar's Leaf or Namila's Soul or Jiabli's Nail or Libelice's Torture"/> <字串 編號="500072" 文字="Demon Bazac Corps also may drop rich awards. Join us to protect your hometown, Angels!"/> <字串 編號="500073" 文字="In order to raise an Angel's resistance to attack from Demon Bazac, Michael has decided to open the [/c$2Dragon Area/c*]to the public and has asked me to be the area administrator. But I am too busy making dumplings. Thus only those Angels holding [/c$2Mysterious Area Ticket/c*]can pass. "/> <字串 編號="500074" 文字="What kind of dumplings do you want, Angel?"/> <字串 編號="500075" 文字="I wish some Festival Dumplings please."/> <字串 編號="500076" 文字="I wish some Meat Dumplings please."/> <字串 編號="500077" 文字="I wish some Seafood Dumplings please."/> <字串 編號="500078" 文字="None"/> <字串 編號="500079" 文字="My Quyuan's dumplings are [Top Dumplings] in the world. Get more now or you will have no more chances to eat. "/> <字串 編號="500080" 文字="You want to go to Dragon Area? Ok. But I must remind you that it will take you one [/c$2Mysterious Area Ticket/c*]."/> <字串 編號="500081" 文字="I wish to go to Dragon Area 1."/> <字串 編號="500082" 文字="I wish to go to Dragon Area 2."/> <字串 編號="500083" 文字="I wish to go to Dragon Area 3."/> <字串 編號="500084" 文字="Then I will let you enter. Don't just stay inside. Come to help us resist Demon Bazac's attack at 19:00 every evening. "/> <字串 編號="500085" 文字="I can't send you into Dragon Area without [/c$2Mysterious Area Ticket/c*]."/> <字串 編號="500086" 文字="I can't make delicious dumplings without enough material."/> <字串 編號="500087" 文字="your bag is too full. Eat one dumpling. "/> <字串 編號="500088" 文字="Do you have any [/c$2Ox Horn Yellow Boy/c*], Angel? I can exchange them for superior weapons. "/> <字串 編號="500089" 文字="Exchange Ride Feed"/> <字串 編號="500090" 文字="Exchange Blue Sea Soldier / Shake Turtle"/> <字串 編號="500091" 文字="Exchange Polis Egg/Storm Egg/Quintet Egg"/> <字串 編號="500092" 文字="Next page. "/> <字串 編號="500093" 文字="Take more [/c$2Ox Horn Yellow Boy/c*]from Demon Bazac to exchange when they attack. "/> <字串 編號="500210" 文字="How can I get Mysterious Box and Needle."/> <字串 編號="500211" 文字="Give the/c$2 South Pole Stone/c*,/c$2 North Pole Stone/c* and/c$2 Mysterious Finger /c*, one each to me and I can help to make a Mysterious Box and Needle for you. "/> <字串 編號="500214" 文字="Here is the Mysterious Box and Needle. Good luck. Take this/c$2 Navigation Chest/c* to fight with the fierce sea. "/> <字串 編號="500215" 文字="If you have/c$2 Pirate Lord Chest/c* and/c$2 Pirate Gold /c*, I can help you exchange it for the/c$2 True.Pirate Lord Chest /c*."/> <字串 編號="500216" 文字="Yes, this is the Chest and the Gold that I need. I wish to exchange my True.Pirate Lord Chest for them. "/> <字串 編號="500217" 文字="It's said that Ghost Pirate Lord still keeps watching on his treasure even after death. "/> <字串 編號="500218" 文字="You can get 1000 Offer Points by defeating the Pirate Lord Chest and 2000 Offer Points by obtaining the True.Pirate Lord Chest. "/> <字串 編號="500259" 文字="I wish to leave."/> <字串 編號="500260" 文字="You poor frogs...what happened to you in the sea...so desperate...so pitiful..."/> <字串 編號="500261" 文字="How should I look after him?"/> <字串 編號="500262" 文字="Angel reports that frogs will throw out one [/c$2Sea Gold/c*] every four hours.(right click the frog). This Sea Gold contains the unknown power of the sea. It definitely has something to do with the strange events recently. "/> <字串 編號="500263" 文字="The [/c$2Sea Gold/c*]is refined from special metal from the sea. It's said that only the old refining methods can make it shine. My technique is not that good. I can only refine [/c$2Limited Weapon/c*]. The true shining weapons can only be refined by monsters or by Mr.Smith who lives in the sea. "/> <字串 編號="500264" 文字="Only seven [/c$2Sea Gold/c*]are needed to refine [/c$2Limited Weapon/c*]. But I need to take the frogs out of the Garden of Eden by mid night, so please hurry. "/> <字串 編號="500265" 文字="I can also give you my chest as part of the exchange for your [/c$2Sea Gold/c*]if I don't have all of the seven gold's. But this chest is locked and can only be open by the key from [/c$2Old Friend/c*]. I don't know what it's contents are. "/> <字串 編號="500266" 文字="So you don't have enough gold Angel. "/> <字串 編號="500267" 文字="This was found when patrolling. Remember to get the key from [/c$2Old Friend/c*]to open it. "/> <字串 編號="500268" 文字="Really? So here are all of the seven gold's. Which [/c$2Limited Weapon/c*] do you want to refine?"/> <字串 編號="500269" 文字="Take it...Though it is not comparable to true shining weapon and will disappear in seven days, I have tried my best. Make full use of it. "/> <字串 編號="500270" 文字="You bag is too full. I can't give it to you. "/> <字串 編號="500271" 文字="How are you Little Angel? "/> <字串 編號="500285" 文字="In this School Anniversary Activity, You can use one [/c$2Sea Pearl/c*]to exchange for one [/c$2Small Lotto Box/c*] or use 10 [/c$2Sea Pearl/c*]to exchange for one [/c$2Big Lotto Box/c*]."/> <字串 編號="500286" 文字="Do you have the [/c$2Friend Chest/c*]and [/c$2Gold Sea Key /c*? "/> <字串 編號="500287" 文字="Hey, who do you think I am? I need the [/c$2Friend Chest/c*]and [/c$2Gold Sea Key/c* to open it. "/> <字串 編號="500288" 文字="Done! So I have still got it! Do join us again next year!"/> <字串 編號="500291" 文字="Your bag is too full. Tidy it."/> <字串 編號="500292" 文字="This is your [/c$2Little Lotto Box/c*]. May you win the lottery!"/> <字串 編號="500293" 文字="This is your [/c$2Big Lotto Box/c*]. May you win the lottery!"/> <字串 編號="500294" 文字="Do you have the [/c$2Sea Pearl/c*]to hand? You have no chance to win Lotto Box without it. "/> <字串 編號="500295" 文字="Michael sent [Spy Frogs]to investigate the weird events. They desperately want to leave the Garden of Eden. I am here to take them away. But there are too many. So I need to ask for help from [/c$2Angels Over Lvl 50/c*]"/> <字串 編號="500296" 文字="mes1"/> <字串 編號="500297" 文字="option1"/> <字串 編號="500298" 文字="option2"/> <字串 編號="500299" 文字="mes2"/> <字串 編號="500300" 文字="mes3"/> <字串 編號="500301" 文字="option3"/> <字串 編號="500302" 文字="option4"/> <字串 編號="500303" 文字="mes4"/> <字串 編號="500304" 文字="mes5"/> <字串 編號="500305" 文字="mes6"/> <字串 編號="500306" 文字="mes7"/> <字串 編號="500307" 文字="mes8"/> <字串 編號="500308" 文字="mes9"/> <字串 編號="500309" 文字="option5"/> <字串 編號="500310" 文字="option6"/> <字串 編號="500311" 文字="mes10"/> <字串 編號="500312" 文字="mes11"/> <字串 編號="500313" 文字="option7"/> <字串 編號="500314" 文字="option8"/> <字串 編號="500315" 文字="mes12"/> <字串 編號="500316" 文字="mes13"/> <字串 編號="500317" 文字="mes14"/> <字串 編號="500318" 文字="mes15"/> <字串/> <字串 編號="500319" 文字="I just don't understand? Where is my Vega? "/> <字串 編號="500320" 文字="I just don't understand? Where is my Cowherd?"/> <字串 編號="500321" 文字="Thank you for bringing me this ring and keepsake. "/> <字串 編號="500322" 文字="Thank you for bringing me this ring and keepsake. This is a thank you letter for the Unwise Angel, please could you take it to him? "/> <字串 編號="500323" 文字="Hello, I am Jeweller Jelly, there are various gems."/> <字串 編號="500324" 文字="Do you have [Pink Diamond]?"/> <字串 編號="500325" 文字="Yes. They are very precious and rare diamonds. Only we have them. Well, I will give you the best price I can, how about RMB5000 each? "/> <字串 編號="500326" 文字="Give me five Thanks. "/> <字串 編號="500327" 文字="your bag is too full...I can't give it to you..."/> <字串 編號="500328" 文字="Do you have enough money to hand?"/> <字串 編號="500329" 文字="Unwise Angel let me forward them to you."/> <字串 編號="500330" 文字="How do you want me to co-ordinate?"/> <字串 編號="500331" 文字="Hello, Little Angel. I am [/c$2Unwise Angel/c*], I broke the date of Cowherd and Vega because of silliness. Can you do me a favor?"/> <字串 編號="500332" 文字="What happened to the [Cowherd and the Vega]?"/> <字串 編號="500333" 文字="Any [Lover's gift of China]to exchange?"/> <字串 編號="500334" 文字="Let me arrange the date of [Cowherd and Vega]"/> <字串 編號="500335" 文字="Exchange [Lover's gift of China]"/> <字串 編號="500336" 文字="I wish to leave"/> <字串 編號="500337" 文字="The annual meeting of the Cowherd and the Vega is nigh. But, the careless Vega has fallen down into the Garden of Eden. The Cowherd must follow her there... Kind hearted Angels, please come to help. "/> <字串 編號="500338" 文字="During this activity, as long as you kill monsters over level21, or collect products over level21, you will have the chance to collect such ingredients [/c$2Black Chocolate Brick/c*], [/c$2White Chocolate Brick/c*], [/c$2Chocolate Model/c*], [/c$2Fresh Strawberryc*], [/c$2Sponge Cake/c*, they can easily be changed into different Lover's gift of China"/> <字串 編號="500339" 文字="It's a specially made Lover's gift of China. You can give it to your true love. [/c$2Black Chocolate/c*]= [/c$2Black Chocolate Brick/c*]*5 + [/c$2Chocolate Model/c*]*5 [/c$2White Chocolate/c*]= [/c$2White Chocolate Brick/c*]*5 + [/c$2Chocolate Model/c*]*5 [/c$2Strawberry Cake/c*]= [/c$2Fresh Strawberry/c*]*5 + [/c$2Sponge Cake/c*]*5"/> <字串 編號="500340" 文字="I really don't want to see this sweet couple to stay apart. I am making special Cowherd and Vega rings but not they are not yet finished. When they put them on even though they may be far apart from each other their hearts will be close..."/> <字串 編號="500341" 文字="Your level isn't high enough to cope with this situation. Come here after you have reached level/c$2 20 /c*. "/> <字串 編號="500342" 文字="Oh you wonderful Angel! You are willing to help me to save their love. Please arrange for them to meet again. And also please help me to collect the correct materials, so that I can finish off their rings. Then when they meet I can present them to them."/> <字串 編號="500343" 文字="Oh, Little Angel, will you please help to change the correct token. "/> <字串 編號="500344" 文字="What? The materials for the rings have been misplaced? You are so silly, like me. Don't worry. I will give you the list once again. Hurry up and bring them back. "/> <字串 編號="500345" 文字="Great! You have brought me the things that I need. Now I will finish the rings. Wait. I need your help with one more matter...."/> <字串 編號="500346" 文字="I need one more special item to finish the making the rings. You can only find from /c$2Black Jeweller Jelly/c* in the/c*/c$2Palm Base/c*. Please help me to collect it [/c$25Pink Diamond/c*]. "/> <字串 編號="500347" 文字="Please help me to collect /c$25 Pink Diamond/c* as soon as possible, Little Angel. "/> <字串 編號="500348" 文字="Little Angel, you are so great! Now I will finish the ring. Just give me a moment please. "/> <字串 編號="500349" 文字="Done! Please send the rings to the Cowherd and the Vega. According to the reports of Angel Pickets, /c$2Cowherd/c* once appeared in /c$2Gold Beach/c$*, /c$2Shining Coast/c*, /c$2Wave Harbor/c*; /c$2Vega/c* once appeared in /c$2Deity Palace Ruins/c*, /c$2Sad Abyss/c*, /c$2Fiery Path/c*."/> <字串 編號="500350" 文字="Wonderful Angel, please help me to send these rings to the Cowherd and the Vega. "/> <字串 編號="500351" 文字="Job done. Here is the thankful letter. "/> <字串 編號="500352" 文字="To thank you for all your help, here are 3 gifts, whose power will last for 12 hours only. Please pick one of them. "/> <字串 編號="500353" 文字="Thanks. Then I will choose this one. "/> <字串 編號="500354" 文字="Angel, what kind of Lover's gift of China do you wish to have?"/> <字串 編號="500355" 文字="Exchange for [Black Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="500356" 文字="Exchange for [White Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="500357" 文字="Exchange for [Strawberry Cake]"/> <字串 編號="500358" 文字="I don't want to exchange now."/> <字串 編號="500359" 文字="How much Black Chocolate do you want to exchange for?"/> <字串 編號="500360" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 1/c* [Black Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="500361" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 10/c* [Black Chocolate] "/> <字串 編號="500362" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 50/c* [Black Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="500363" 文字="How much White Chocolate do you want to exchange for?"/> <字串 編號="500364" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 1/c* [White Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="500365" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 10/c* [White Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="500366" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 50/c* [White Chocolate]"/> <字串 編號="500367" 文字="How much Strawberry Cake do you want to exchange?"/> <字串 編號="500368" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 1/c* [Strawberry Cake]"/> <字串 編號="500369" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 10/c* [Strawberry Cake]"/> <字串 編號="500370" 文字="Exchange for/c$2 50/c* [Strawberry Cake]"/> <字串 編號="500371" 文字="You don't have enough ingredients Angel. I cannot exchange a present with you. "/> <字串 編號="500372" 文字="Remember you must give the gift to your true love as soon as you can!"/> <字串 編號="500373" 文字="Sorry, I need to prepare some more ingredients. Come back to me in 10 hours. "/> <字串 編號="500374" 文字="I don't want to buy now."/> <字串 編號="500375" 文字="I wish to have one. "/> <字串 編號="500380" 文字="Event Battle Royal untuk melatih strategi dan ketangkasan berperang akan segera berlangsung, siapkan kekuatan dan tenagamu sebelum memasuki arena ini. Apakah kamu sudah siap?"/> <字串 編號="500381" 文字="Siap menerima tantangan Battle Royal"/> <字串 編號="500382" 文字="(Pergi)"/> <字串 編號="500383" 文字="Apakah Kamu sudah siap mengalahkan Angel Gavreel? Malaikat Gavreel merupakan malaikat perang yang tangguh, ia dilindungi oleh 4 malaikat yang tidak dapat dilihat oleh mata telanjang. Apakah kamu takut?"/> <字串 編號="500384" 文字="Aku yakin bisa mengalahkannya !"/> <字串 編號="500385" 文字="(Pergi)"/> <字串 編號="500386" 文字="Little Angel, kamu belum memenuhi syarat untuk mengikuti pertarungan. Datanglah lagi setelah kamu mencapai level 8."/> <字串 編號="500387" 文字="mes1"/> <字串 編號="500388" 文字="mes2"/> <字串 編號="500389" 文字="option1"/> <字串 編號="500390" 文字="option2"/> <字串 編號="500391" 文字="mes3"/> <字串 編號="500392" 文字="mes4"/> <字串 編號="500393" 文字="mes5"/> <字串 編號="500394" 文字="option3"/> <字串 編號="500395" 文字="option4"/> <字串 編號="500396" 文字="mes6"/> <字串 編號="500397" 文字="mes7"/> <字串 編號="500398" 文字="option5"/> <字串 編號="500399" 文字="option6"/> <字串 編號="500400" 文字="mes8"/> <字串 編號="500401" 文字="mes9"/> <字串 編號="500402" 文字="mes10"/> <字串 編號="500403" 文字="mes11"/> <字串 編號="500404" 文字="mes12"/> <字串 編號="500405" 文字="Cluck... Cluck... Cluck......"/> <字串 編號="500406" 文字="Ah...my old hen is ill...What can I do for her..."/> <字串 編號="500407" 文字="About old hen"/> <字串 編號="500408" 文字="About Feed"/> <字串 編號="500409" 文字="About men at sea"/> <字串 編號="500410" 文字="About Giant Rose and Giant Crusader's Pick"/> <字串 編號="500411" 文字="Offer Feed"/> <字串 編號="500412" 文字="Offer Wheat Feed"/> <字串 編號="500413" 文字="Offer Corn Feed"/> <字串 編號="500414" 文字="Offer Worm Feed"/> <字串 編號="500415" 文字="Offer Sea Manhood Set"/> <字串 編號="500416" 文字="Offer one bag of feed"/> <字串 編號="500417" 文字="Offer 5 bags of feed"/> <字串 編號="500418" 文字="Offer 10 bags of feed"/> <字串 編號="500419" 文字="Next"/> <字串 編號="500420" 文字="Turn to previous page"/> <字串 編號="500421" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="500422" 文字="Although my hen is old, she is healthy and can lays an egg everyday. But she got sick a few days ago. Now she can't lay even an egg. The doctor said she is not getting enough nutrients. But I have no money to buy feed for her..."/> <字串 編號="500423" 文字="Oh my! You are my savior. What kind of feed will you give me?"/> <字串 編號="500424" 文字="Oh my! That's very nice of you! How many bags will you give me?"/> <字串 編號="500425" 文字="Wowo! My old hen laid two eggs as soon as she ate the feed! She can lay more eggs than before! Please take the extra one! Thank you very much!"/> <字串 編號="500426" 文字="Your bag is full. In this way, I can't give you my thank you present."/> <字串 編號="500427" 文字="Eh...what do you intend to feed my old hen? You don't have enough feed with you..."/> <字串 編號="500428" 文字="I heard that a/c$2 Profiteer Manny/c* is selling feed...But if we want to buy his feed, we have to prepare 10/c$2 wheat grass /c*,/c$2 sweet corn /c*,/c$2 live earthworm /c*...and pay 100 yuan for the commission charge..."/> <字串 編號="500429" 文字="The seashore scenery is so beautiful. Many strong and brave men are sailing to do business aroud the world. I admire them...But I have to look after my old hen and cannot leave home. If I can bring some rememberance with man's breath on the sea home,I have no pity coming to Puqi Island..."/> <字串 編號="500430" 文字="I found/c$2 Giant Rose/c* and/c$2 Giant Crusader's Pick/c* in the Giant Garden. If you collect a set of/c$2 Sea Manhood Set/c* for me, I can give you one of them!"/> <字串 編號="500431" 文字="Yeah! So cool! I can't wait any more to take them home to show to my mother!"/> <字串 編號="500432" 文字="By appointment, do you want/c$2 Giant Rose/c* or/c$2 Giant Crusader's Pick /c*?"/> <字串 編號="500433" 文字="Yeah yeah! I'm so happy! Thank you! Little angel!"/> <字串 編號="500434" 文字="/c$2 Giant Rose/c* and/c$2 Giant Crusader's Pick/c* are what I found in the Giant Garden. They are very precious...So, I will exchange them only if you can collect all the/c$2 Sea Manhood Set /c*!"/> <字串 編號="500435" 文字="Oh...your bag seems be full!"/> <字串 編號="500436" 文字="Teny...My dear Teny...You are my goddess Teny..."/> <字串 編號="500437" 文字="Who are you?"/> <字串 編號="500438" 文字="About Golden Spray-paint"/> <字串 編號="500439" 文字="About Giant Rose"/> <字串 編號="500440" 文字="About Top Pearl"/> <字串 編號="500441" 文字="Make gold eggs"/> <字串 編號="500442" 文字="Make one gold egg"/> <字串 編號="500443" 文字="Make 5 gold eggs"/> <字串 編號="500444" 文字="Make 10 gold eggs"/> <字串 編號="500445" 文字="Offer Giant Rose"/> <字串 編號="500446" 文字="Offer the top pearl"/> <字串 編號="500447" 文字="Next "/> <字串 編號="500448" 文字="Turn to previous page"/> <字串 編號="500449" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="500450" 文字="I'm the famous Artist Nary in Eden. Passing by here this time, I never thought I could meet my goddess Teny in Puqi Island...Wo Teny... when will you accept my love..."/> <字串 編號="500451" 文字="/c$2 Golden Spray-paint/c* is a very high class dope. Everything can be [gold]in my hand."/> <字串 編號="500452" 文字="In order to make her love me, I will do everything for her! I heard from Flora that in the Giant Garden there is a kind of flower called the/c$2 Giant Rose/c* which cannot be found in Eden. It's most suitable for my goddess Teny! If you can bring the/c$2 Giant Rose/c* to me,I would appreciate it very much!"/> <字串 編號="500453" 文字="I just found out that the/c$2 Top Pearl/c* is Teny's favourite. I'm planning to make a unique beautiful/c$2 Top Pearl Necklace/c* with my wonderful handicraft skills for my goddess Teny. So she might love me deeply!"/> <字串 編號="500454" 文字="If you can bring me/c$2 200 Top Pearls /c*, I will give one/c$2 Top Pearl Card /c*, which I got during my travels in Eden. Please, little angel, my happiness is in your hands!"/> <字串 編號="500455" 文字="Make golden eggs? It is a piece of cake. It can't beat me [Artist Nary]!"/> <字串 編號="500456" 文字="Take the golden eggs! Strange little angel. The golden eggs cannot be eaten."/> <字串 編號="500457" 文字="En...the material is not enough! No one can make something without material even me, the great Artist."/> <字串 編號="500458" 文字="En...your bag is full! I can't give you angthing."/> <字串 編號="500459" 文字="Wowo! This is/c$2 Giant Rose /c*!It's so beautiful...Only the/c$2 Giant Rose/c* can fit my goddess Teny...Thanks a lot!"/> <字串 編號="500460" 文字="Wu...are you sure you have/c$2 Giant Rose /c*?It's the flower for my goddess Teny. Do not play with it! "/> <字串 編號="500461" 文字="Wowo!So many/c$2 Top Pearls/c*!That's great!Only a precious/c$2 Top Pearl Necklace/c* can really fit my goddess Teny!"/> <字串 編號="500462" 文字="Eh...this is the/c$2 Top Pearl Necklace/c* for my goddess Teny. You can't jerry-rig it...It must be made of/c$2 200 Top Pearls/c* of the highest quality and craftmanship!"/> <字串 編號="500463" 文字="Dear little angel, would you like to buy a/c$2 Wonder egg /c*...It's the latest product this season!"/> <字串 編號="500464" 文字="About Feed"/> <字串 編號="500465" 文字="About Wonder Egg"/> <字串 編號="500466" 文字="About Gold Egg"/> <字串 編號="500467" 文字="About Boys on the sea"/> <字串 編號="500468" 文字="Exchange Feed"/> <字串 編號="500469" 文字="Exchange Wheat Feed"/> <字串 編號="500470" 文字="Exchange Corn Feed"/> <字串 編號="500471" 文字="Exchange Worm Feed"/> <字串 編號="500472" 文字="Exchange Wonder Egg"/> <字串 編號="500473" 文字="Exchange one Feed"/> <字串 編號="500474" 文字="Exchange 5 Feed"/> <字串 編號="500475" 文字="Exchange 10 Feed"/> <字串 編號="500476" 文字="Next page"/> <字串 編號="500477" 文字="Turn to the previous page"/> <字串 編號="500478" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="500479" 文字="The feed I sell is of the highest class! It's usual price is 300 thousand per bag.But as the price of materials goes up, if you can bring me ten bags of materials and pay a 100 commission charge, I will give you one bag of feed...It's reasonable... "/> <字串 編號="500480" 文字="/c$2 Wonder Egg /c*,is the most popular product made by me, Emany. One egg just costs 500 thousand. I'm sure you'll see it's a fantastic deal! You can have a discount if you buy 5 or 10 eggs at one time!"/> <字串 編號="500481" 文字="/c$2 Golden Egg /c*...that's a great thing...But on the whole Eden only I/c$2 Profiteer/c* can afford it...If you have/c$2 Golden Egg/c*,I can exchange it for my/c$2 Wonder Egg /c*...You gain..."/> <字串 編號="500482" 文字="You mean those stupid pirates...They were my bodyguards when I was doing business in Puqi Island... All of them are too stupid to be mentioned. But if someone dares to irritate me, I will call them to scare him. It works wonders!"/> <字串 編號="500483" 文字="Which kind of feed do you want to exchange?"/> <字串 編號="500484" 文字="I take away the commission charge! Thank you for your purchase!"/> <字串 編號="500485" 文字="What's the matter! This material is not enough! Go away and do not waste my time!"/> <字串 編號="500486" 文字="Your bag is full. Why not tidy it up and come!"/> <字串 編號="500487" 文字="Thank you for coming. Remember to come often!"/> <字串 編號="500488" 文字="You have the/c$2 Golden Egg /c*!Wealth is coming!...little angel,I use the/c$2 Wonder Egg/c* which is the most popular among children to exchange with yours. Deal?"/> <字串 編號="500489" 文字="OK"/> <字串 編號="500490" 文字="No"/> <字串 編號="500491" 文字="I will be a rich man soon!If there are some left, remember to bring them here!"/> <字串 編號="500492" 文字="Let me tell you ,little angel, only I/c$2 Profiteer /c*can afford this/c$2 Golden Egg/c* in the whole Eden. You will come back!"/> <字串 編號="500493" 文字="Hey! It is not a golden egg! You tricked me/c$2 Profiteer /c*,no way!Come on my men!Hit him!"/> <字串 編號="500494" 文字="You, the cheat! Dare to come here! Come on my men! Go, get him!"/> <字串 編號="500495" 文字="/c$2 wheat grass /c*,/c$2 sweet corn /c*,/c$2 alive earthworm /c*, you can obtain them from products or monsters whose level is higher than Lvl 21...But I have to look after my hen and cannot to collect materials...What's more, I can't afford the commission charge...my old hen...will you die of hunger?"/> <字串 編號="500496" 文字="Pirate Head is still searching for me. If I go to find the Wonder Egg before he stops hunting me, I will die..."/> <字串 編號="500497" 文字="Found by you. Give you the things you wanted. Which one do you choose..."/> <字串 編號="500498" 文字="Your bag has not been tidied up. How can I give you the presents?"/> <字串 編號="500499" 文字="You found the wrong guy, wahahaha."/> <字串 編號="500500" 文字="Monster...monster...Run."/> <字串 編號="500501" 文字="Mid-autumn Day arrived..."/> <字串 編號="500502" 文字="Mid-autumn Festival begins. You can exchange the Mid-autumn Day presents with your collection of/c$2 Rock Piece /c*,/c$2 Moon Piece /c*."/> <字串 編號="500503" 文字="About [Rock Piece]and [Moon Piece]"/> <字串 編號="500504" 文字="About [Mid-autumn Fiesta Gift]"/> <字串 編號="500505" 文字="About [Moon Searching]"/> <字串 編號="500506" 文字="Exchange Gold Pieceor Pt Piece"/> <字串 編號="500507" 文字="Leave"/> <字串 編號="500508" 文字="Think over.Leave"/> <字串 編號="500509" 文字="OK"/> <字串 編號="500510" 文字="Previous"/> <字串 編號="500511" 文字="Next"/> <字串 編號="500512" 文字="The way to get the/c$2 [Rock Piece]/c* is to beat down the werewolves that appear in the first map out of the four main towns at noon, at 3 pm, at 6 pm, and at 9 pm. Then you can get the/c$2 Rock Piece /c*.
